Text: होता होता राहीलेला निवडणूक मारो मर्ज़ीभई
translated_text: The election that was held was a draw, Marjibhai.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it discusses elections but lacks any strong emotional words.

Text: खरा लखोबा तर हा बोबडाच आहे
translated_text: The real Lakhoba is this Bobada.
Justification: The word "बोबडाच" (stammering) suggests mild criticism but does not strongly indicate a specific emotion.

Text: मुंबईतील घाटकोपरमध्ये धुळवड खेळून घरी परतलेलं दाम्पत्य बाथरुममध्ये मृतावस्थेत आढळलं!
translated_text: A couple who returned home after playing Dhulwad in Ghatkopar, Mumbai, was found dead in the bathroom!
Justification: The words "मृतावस्थेत" (dead) and "बाथरुममध्ये" (in the bathroom) create a disturbing and unpleasant image, leading to disgust.

Text: वेडाबाई भूतकाळ बघ लोक शेन घालतात आणी दांडा ही
translated_text: Crazy lady, look at the past, people wear masks and stick to it.
Justification: The phrase "शेन घालतात" (people spread dirt/muck) is figurative but lacks strong emotion.

Text: कुर्ला वाहतुक विभागाला फक्त हे पाठवले जाते पण कधी कारवाई होत नाही
translated_text: Only this is sent to Kurla Transport Department but no action is ever taken.
Justification: The sentence talks about inaction but does not express strong emotions explicitly.

Text: साहेब भाजपा, गोदी मिडीया, अंधभक्त साठी परिवारवाद लागू होत नाही
translated_text: Sir, family politics does not apply to BJP, Godi Media, and fanatics.
Justification: The words "अंधभक्त" (blind devotees) suggest sarcasm, but the sentence remains neutral.

Text: चित्रा ताई वाघ आणि आपण शिंदे गट काडीचीही किंमत नाही ट्विट ला
translated_text: Chitra Tai Wagh and we Shinde group are not worth even a penny, tweet.
Justification: The phrase "काडीचीही किंमत नाही" (not worth even a penny) is dismissive but not highly emotional.

Text: एकवेळ मला काही देउ नका । पण शानपट्टी देऊन मला जाऊ नका ॥
translated_text: Don't give me anything at once. But don't leave me without giving me a reward.
Justification: The phrase "शानपट्टी देऊन मला जाऊ नका" (don’t let me go without dignity) expresses frustration, leading to anger.

Text: हा त्यांचा नैतिक विजयच आहे कारण समोर सत्तेसाठी जमलेले महत्वकांक्षी राक्षस उभे होते.
translated_text: This is their moral victory because in front of them stood ambitious monsters gathered for power.
Justification: The phrase "महत्वकांक्षी राक्षस" (ambitious monsters) is figurative but lacks strong sentiment.

Text: आता हे वसुली करणारे वित्तमंत्र्यांना फायनांस विषयात बोलणार….कमाल आहे बुवा तुमची!
translated_text: Now these collectors will talk to the Finance Minister about finance...you are amazing!
Justification: The phrase "कमाल आहे बुवा तुमची!" (Amazing, you guys!) suggests sarcasm, but it can be interpreted as joyful mockery.

Text: बस घाण करणारयाना द्यायला बर पडल असत नाही
translated_text: It wouldn't be good to give it to someone who makes the bus dirty.
Justification: The phrase "घाण करणारयाना" (those who make things dirty) implies disgust towards unhygienic behavior.

Text: असा आपण भाबडा समज करून घ्यायचा
translated_text: We should have made such a foolish assumption.
Justification: The phrase "भाबडा समज" (naive assumption) suggests a lack of awareness but no strong emotion.

Text: भाजप हद्दपार होत आहे...
translated_text: BJP is being expelled...
Justification: The phrase "हद्दपार होत आहे" (being expelled) conveys frustration and anger.

Text: म्हणून सांगतो पाव खा पण भाव खाऊ नका...
translated_text: That's why I say eat bread but don't eat the price...
Justification: The phrase "भाव खाऊ नका" (don't show off) is advisory and does not indicate strong emotion.

Text: कोण मेला ? वारला म्हणायचं आहे का तुम्हाला ? रोजगार वारला का ?
translated_text: Who died? Do you mean died? Did employment die?
Justification: The phrase "रोजगार वारला" (employment is dead) evokes sadness and concern about job losses.

Text: तुझी तेवढी तरी लायकी आहे का भात्या
translated_text: Are you even worth that much, Bhatia?
Justification: The phrase "लायकी आहे का?" (Are you even capable?) questions someone’s worth, which can evoke surprise.

Text: अक्कल नको पाजळू तुझी, हिंदू सणं डोळ्यात खूपतात का तुझ्या ?
translated_text: Don't let your common sense fool you, do Hindu festivals get in your eyes?
Justification: The phrase "डोळ्यात खूपतात" (does it hurt your eyes?) suggests frustration, leading to anger.

Text: आंदोलन करणे हाच उपाय आहे का त्याशिवाल न्याय मिळणार नाही का???
translated_text: Is protesting the only solution? Won't justice be achieved?
Justification: The phrase "हाच उपाय आहे का?" (Is this the only way?) questions justice aggressively, leading to anger.

Text: अक्कल नको पाजळू तुझी, हिंदू सणं डोळ्यात खूपतात का तुझ्या ?
translated_text: Don't show off your intelligence, do Hindu festivals bother you?
Justification: The phrase "अक्कल नको पाजळू" (don't show off intelligence) expresses frustration, while "डोळ्यात खूपतात" (bother your eyes) adds confrontation.

Text: हा जो शिवसेनेच्या विरोधात खेळ खेळत आहात याचा परिणाम भोगावे लागणार आहेत
translated_text: The game you are playing against Shiv Sena will have consequences.
Justification: The phrase "परिणाम भोगावे लागणार आहेत" (will face consequences) is a warning, indicating anger.

Text: खरच हा पक्षच धर्मद्रोही आहे .
translated_text: This party is truly anti-religious.
Justification: The term "धर्मद्रोही" (anti-religious) has a strong negative connotation, showing disgust.

Text: या चोंग्याला बाळासाहेब आणि त्यांचे नेमके विचार माहित आहेत का ??
translated_text: Does this idiot even know Balasaheb’s exact thoughts?
Justification: The word "चोंग्या" (idiot) is an insult, and the questioning tone conveys anger.

Text: “सहानुभूती, डोळ्यात पाणी,” राज ठाकरेंची उद्धव ठाकरेंवर जोरदार टीका; म्हणाले “कोणतीही लाट…”
translated_text: "Sympathy, tears in the eyes," Raj Thackeray strongly criticizes Uddhav Thackeray; he said, "Any wave..."
Justification: The phrase "जोरदार टीका" (strong criticism) implies disapproval, falling under disgust.

Text: हारफीकनी ते गटार तोंड स्वच्छ नाही होणार.
translated_text: No matter how much you clean, that gutter mouth won't be clean.
Justification: The phrase "गटार तोंड" (gutter mouth) is highly negative, expressing disgust.

Text: नामर्द बोलतो आहेस, स्वतः कडे बोट आहेत ते बघा
translated_text: You are speaking like a coward, look at yourself first.
Justification: The word "नामर्द" (coward) is an insult, making this disgust-driven.

Text: फैजाबाद ही निर्लज्ज पणाचा कळस आहे... असुरी प्रवृत्ती आहे ती
translated_text: Faizabad is the peak of shamelessness… It is a demonic tendency.
Justification: The words "निर्लज्ज पणाचा कळस" (peak of shamelessness) and "असुरी प्रवृत्ती" (demonic tendency) strongly indicate disgust.

Text: गद्दारी करुन, आपले टँक्स पैसे भष्टाचारी लोकांच्या हातात दिल्यामुळे लोकखत नि पुरस्कार दिला
translated_text: After betraying, tax money was given to corrupt people, leading to awards.
Justification: The words "गद्दारी" (betrayal) and "भष्टाचारी" (corrupt people) show disgust.

Text: समर्थकांनी पक्षातील चुका दाखवणं हा त्यांच्यामते गुन्हा समजला जातो....
translated_text: Pointing out mistakes in the party is considered a crime by them.
Justification: The phrase "गुन्हा समजला जातो" (considered a crime) expresses disapproval.

Text: फैजाबाद ही निर्लज्ज पणाचा कळस आहे... असुरी प्रवृत्ती आहे ती
translated_text: Faizabad is the epitome of shameless greed... it is demonic in nature.
Justification: Strong negative language like "shameless" and "demonic" conveys disgust.

Text: गद्दारीची ढाल तलवार अनाजी पंत कडे पण होती..
translated_text: Anaji Pant also had the shield and sword of betrayal.
Justification: The sentence presents a historical reference without strong emotional expression.

Text: म्हणजे आम्ही रिकामेच आहोत तुमच्यासारखे, मोक्कार पैसा कमवायचा तुम्ही आणि काम करायचं आम्ही वा.......
translated_text: So we are just like you, you have to earn money and we have to work...
Justification: While the statement expresses frustration, it does not convey strong enough emotion to classify as anger or sadness.

Text: पोलीस स्मृती दिन निमित्त देशासाठी कर्तव्य बजावत असताना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली !!
translated_text: Emotional tribute to the martyrs who died while performing their duty for the country on the occasion of Police Memorial Day!!
Justification: The phrase "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" (heartfelt tribute) expresses sorrow and mourning.

Text: तु कोणत्या क्रिकेट प्रकारात प्लेअर होता?????????????????? उपाध्यक्ष होण्याची तुझी लायकी काय???????
translated_text: What type of cricket were you a player in??????????????????? What are your qualifications to be the vice president???????
Justification: The excessive punctuation and questioning indicate a tone of shock and disbelief.

Text: “सहानुभूती, डोळ्यात पाणी,” राज ठाकरेंची उद्धव ठाकरेंवर जोरदार टीका; म्हणाले “कोणतीही लाट…”
translated_text: "Sympathy, tears in the eyes," Raj Thackeray strongly criticizes Uddhav Thackeray; said "Any wave..."
Justification: The phrase "जोरदार टीका" (strong criticism) and mocking tone suggest disgust.

Text: पक्षाने तिकीट कापलेले तुम्ही, का उगाच हसं करुन घेताय.
translated_text: Why are you laughing so hard at the party ticket you've been given?
Justification: The rhetorical question implies surprise or disbelief.

Text: यांना विचारांपेक्षा सत्ता जास्त महत्वाची आहे.
translated_text: Power is more important to them than ideas.
Justification: This is a political opinion without emotional exaggeration.

Text: म्हणजे बीजेपी कीड आहे
translated_text: That means BJP is a pest.
Justification: Though it contains a negative word ("कीड" - pest), it lacks strong emotional depth.

Text: जर काँग्रेस वाले एवढेच भ्रष्टाचारी आहे तर तुम्ही का त्यांना भाजप मध्ये घेता?
translated_text: If Congress people are so corrupt, why do you accept them in BJP?
Justification: The word "भ्रष्टाचारी" (corrupt) conveys disgust towards political behavior.

Text: समर्थकांनी पक्षातील चुका दाखवणं हा त्यांच्यामते गुन्हा समजला जातो....
translated_text: They consider it a crime for supporters to point out mistakes in the party....
Justification: Criticism of party intolerance suggests frustration and disgust.

Text: तुम्ही नेते आहात यात शंकाच आहे, एवढी बालबुद्धी तर लहान मुलांना पण नसते
translated_text: There is no doubt that you are a leader, even small children do not have such childish intelligence.
Justification: Though mildly insulting, it lacks strong emotional charge.

Text: कायमस्वरूपी बंदी का नाही केली.? कुठली सेटिंग झाली आहे??
translated_text: Why not ban it permanently? What setting has been made??
Justification: The questioning and tone suggest curiosity and surprise.

Text: हा गद्दार अजुन आपल्या सारखे गद्दार शोधतच फिरतो आहे वाटत ....
translated_text: It seems this traitor is still looking for traitors like us...
Justification: The term "गद्दार" (traitor) repeatedly indicates anger.

Text: हा माणूस खूप मोठा गैरसमज समाज्यात पसरवत आहे. याच्या ज्ञानात भर टाका.
translated_text: This man is spreading a huge misunderstanding in the society. Please increase his knowledge.
Justification: The accusation of misinformation conveys disgust.

Text: तुला शिवसैनिकांनी चांगल हाणला होतो त्यामुळे तू बोलतोयस
translated_text: You were beaten up by Shiv Sainiks, that's why you're talking.
Justification: Though it refers to violence, it is presented as a factual statement.

Text: घाणेरड्या विचारांचे / आहेत हे वडापाव सैनिक
translated_text: These Vadapav soldiers are of dirty thoughts.
Justification: "घाणेरड्या विचारांचे" (dirty thoughts) conveys contempt.

Text: त्रास भोगल्याशिवाय अक्कल येत नाही...! अर्ध्या तासाच्या पावसामुळं होणारी तारांबळ खूप गरजेची आहे
translated_text: Wisdom cannot be gained without suffering...! The relief that comes from half an hour of rain is very necessary.
Justification: The sentence conveys a general observation rather than strong emotion.

Text: ह्यांच्यात कसला आला राष्ट्रवाद, हे तर भ्रष्टवादी
translated_text: What kind of nationalism has come into these people, they are corrupt.
Justification: The phrase "भ्रष्टवादी" (corrupt) conveys strong disapproval.

Text: असे प्रश्न विचारू नका सर, ते वेडे पुन्हा काही वेडसरपणा करतील हो.
translated_text: Don't ask such questions, sir, those madmen will do something crazy again.
Justification: The word "वेडसरपणा" (madness) and the warning suggest anger.

Text: दोन्ही राज्यांत भाजपच्या मुख्यमंत्री आहेत म्हणजे हे सगळे सोंग ठरवुन केलेली आहे असे समजावे
translated_text: There are BJP Chief Ministers in both the states, so it should be understood that all this is a pretext.
Justification: The statement presents an observation rather than emotion.

Text: भारतात राहून पाकिस्तान जिंदाबादच्या घोषणा देणे हे निषेधार्यच आहे, अशा लोकांना कठोरात कठोर शिक्षा झाली पाहिजे...
translated_text: Raising slogans of 'Pakistan Zindabad' while living in India is unacceptable, such people should be punished severely...
Justification: The demand for strict punishment conveys anger.

Text: मशाल हे गद्दारसाठी आहे
translated_text: The torch is for the traitor.
Justification: The term "गद्दार" (traitor) and the implied punishment suggest anger.

Text: मोदीभक्त यांचे नाव घ्यायला परवानगी नाही दिली वाटत साहेबांनी
translated_text: I don't think the hon. has given permission to take the name of a Modi devotee.
Justification: This is a neutral political statement.

Text: सरकारला खाजगीकरण करायचे आहे.. ज्यामुळे गरिबी आणखी वाढेल..
translated_text: The government wants to privatize... which will further increase poverty.
Justification: Expresses concern over economic issues, leading to sadness.

Text: तेथील काम आपण केलेले नाहीत कधी कराल?
translated_text: If you haven't done the work there, when will you?
Justification: A straightforward question without strong emotional intensity.

Text: उद्धटरावांनी आता मशालीनेच स्वतःच्या वडिलांचा पक्ष जाळायला काढला आहे.
translated_text: Uddhatrao has now used the torch to burn his own father's party.
Justification: The imagery of burning one's father's party expresses strong anger.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री मराठी बोलायचं सोडून सातत्याने हिंदी का बोलत आहात? उत्तर द्यावे!
translated_text: Why is the Chief Minister constantly speaking Hindi instead of Marathi? Answer me!
Justification: The questioning tone conveys shock and disbelief.

Text: खूपच...!!! अगदी पिसाळल्या सारखे पूर्ण वातावरण दूषित करतात, कसलाच एकोपा राहिला नाही..!!!
translated_text: Very much...!!! They pollute the entire atmosphere like a mad dog, there is no harmony left..!!!
Justification: The phrase "पूर्ण वातावरण दूषित करतात" (pollute the entire atmosphere) suggests frustration and anger.

Text: बुर्जी पटेल ला उमेदवारी दिली ..तेव्हा तू कोणत्या बिळात लपली होती ग...झिपरे
translated_text: Burji Patel was nominated..then in which hole were you hiding...zipare
Justification: The phrase "कोणत्या बिळात लपली" (which hole were you hiding in) conveys disbelief and surprise.

Text: काही शेण किड्यांना असा राहूल गांधी फोटो बघितला की जाळ होतो......
translated_text: Some dung beetles get excited when they see a photo of Rahul Gandhi like this...
Justification: "शेण किडे" (dung beetles) is a derogatory term, expressing disgust.

Text: माय दिवाळी फराळ चाखुन कंटाळा आला सुद्धा
translated_text: I'm tired of tasting my Diwali snacks.
Justification: Expresses dislike and weariness toward food, showing disgust.

Text: हिंदू पोरींना हिंदू मुलगे मिळत नाहीत का? भिकार करीना कपूर बघ
translated_text: Don't Hindu girls get Hindu boys? Look at the beggar Kareena Kapoor.
Justification: The use of "भिकार" (beggar) and judgmental tone convey disgust.

Text: मला कधी कधी वाटतं ते आपल्याला "माणसं कुठली" म्हणून हिणवत असतील.
translated_text: Sometimes I think they might be belittling us as "people of some kind."
Justification: Reflects contemplation but lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: महाराष्ट्र मधील शेतकरी जातोय भिक मागत आणि ह्याची दिल्ली वारी सतत सतत
translated_text: Farmers in Maharashtra are begging while they continue their Delhi visits.
Justification: Describes economic struggles, evoking sadness.

Text: या मार खायला सोबतीने
translated_text: Come and get beaten up.
Justification: Lacks strong emotion, though slightly aggressive.

Text: गद्दरांना त्यात पण पोट दुःखी होत आहे का?
translated_text: Are traitors also getting sick of it?
Justification: The term "गद्दर" (traitor) conveys contempt.

Text: ह्याचे पूर्वजांनी हाताच्या पंजाचा वापर करून झोपले असते तर ही वेळ आली नसती
translated_text: If his ancestors had slept using their hands, this time wouldn't have come.
Justification: Implies offensive critique of ancestry, expressing disgust.

Text: सुप्रीम कोर्टाने काल च्या निर्णयात पण कठोर भुमिका घ्यायला पाहिजे होती....
translated_text: The Supreme Court should have taken a tough stance in yesterday's decision.
Justification: A general opinion without strong emotional intensity.

Text: चायबांची गुलामी करणारे सुद्धा लाळचाटे असतात हे काय नवीन नाही..
translated_text: Isn't it new that even those who enslave tea are slobs?
Justification: "लाळचाटे" (sycophants) is derogatory, expressing disgust.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी आणि काँग्रेसने हातात धरलेलं 'मशाल' जनता स्वीकार करणार नाही!
translated_text: The public will not accept the 'torch' held by the NCP and Congress!
Justification: The assertion of public rejection conveys anger.

Text: क्रांतीच्या वल्गना केल्या पण आता भीतीपोटी वांत्या सुरू झाल्या अलिबाबा आणि चाळीस चोरांना..
translated_text: They praised the revolution, but now they are starting to vomit out of fear.. Alibaba and the Forty Thieves.
Justification: "भीतीपोटी वांत्या" (vomiting out of fear) indicates disdain and disgust.

Text: हे विरोधक म्हणजे एकमेकांचे पाय खेचणारे खेकडे आहेत
translated_text: These opponents are crabs pulling each other's legs.
Justification: A metaphor without strong emotional intensity.

Text: तुम्हीच राहिले होते आता फेकाची गोष्टी सांगायचं
translated_text: You were the only one left, now telling nonsense.
Justification: Accusatory tone conveys frustration and anger.

Text: मोदीजींचे हे पूर्णपणे चुकीचे आहे. मनीष सिसोदिया यांना अटक
translated_text: This is completely wrong of Modiji. Manish Sisodia arrested.
Justification: "पूर्णपणे चुकीचे" (completely wrong) conveys disapproval and disgust.

Text: हा पॅटर्न अंध भक्त होण्यासाठी अनिवार्य आहे
translated_text: This pattern is mandatory to become a blind devotee.
Justification: A sarcastic remark, but not strongly emotional.

Text: निर्लज्ज सदा सुखी! आपल्या बंगल्याच नामकरण केले काय! बाबासाहेबांची मातोश्री!
translated_text: Shameless, always happy! Did you name your bungalow! Babasaheb's mother!
Justification: The word "निर्लज्ज" (shameless) conveys anger and criticism, indicating a strong negative sentiment.

Text: आणि शिवसैनिक की भाषा मे महाराष्ट्र द्रोही मोहीत कंपोष्ट महा चुटीया है..
translated_text: And in the language of Shiv Sainiks, Maharashtra is a country full of traitors, a country full of corruption.
Justification: Although the sentence uses strong words like "traitor," it appears more like a general statement rather than an emotional outburst.

Text: पूर्वी पाऊस पडावा म्हणून बेडकांची लग्न लावली जायची. आता त्याचा घटस्फोट घेयची वेळ आली आहे
translated_text: In the past, frogs were married to make it rain. Now it's time to divorce them.
Justification: The sentence is metaphorical and does not express any strong emotions.

Text: किती भडकातोस रे, मागील दरवाजा ही तर शाखा वाल्यांची खासियत...
translated_text: How arrogant you are, the back door is the specialty of the branch people...
Justification: Use of "भडकातोस" (arrogant) and reference to a "back door" implies disgust and criticism.

Text: देशाचा गृहमंत्री एक आरोपी असताना देशाचे अजून काय हाल होणार भामट्या...
translated_text: What else will happen to the country when the Home Minister of the country is an accused, you idiot...
Justification: The phrase "भामट्या" (idiot) and accusing the Home Minister indicates strong disgust.

Text: हा म्हणजे तरंगणारी विष्ठा य
translated_text: This is floating feces.
Justification: Comparing someone to "floating feces" is highly derogatory, expressing disgust.

Text: नवीन संडासाचे उद्घाटन सोडून तुम्ही काय केलं आहे का मतदार संघात???
translated_text: Apart from inaugurating a new toilet, what have you done in the constituency???
Justification: The sentence questions actions but does not express strong emotion, making it neutral.

Text: कांड केलंय म्हणून ब्लॉकची सजा का नाही केलंय त्याची सजा? बेंचो
translated_text: Why wasn't the block punished for committing the crime? Bencho
Justification: The word "बेंचो" is informal, but the sentence lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: तुमच्या सारख्या गद्दारांना ढाल-तलवार नाही...तर खंजीर शोभुन दीसेल....
translated_text: Traitors like you don't have a shield or sword...but a dagger will show off...
Justification: The sentence contains the word "गद्दार" (traitor), but its overall tone is more factual than emotional.

Text: अशा मवाळ भाषेने असे नाठाळ सुधारणार नाहीत. यांना जोड्याची भाषा
translated_text: Such soft language will not improve such a fool. The language of the couple
Justification: The phrase suggests punishment but is not heavily emotional.

Text: छान संस्कार केलेत....बघा मतदारांनो अशा लोकांना निवडून आपण देणार का
translated_text: You have done a great job....look, voters, will you elect such people?
Justification: The sarcastic praise implies irony but is not strongly emotional.

Text: कोकणासह राज्यात ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर होणार अत्यंत गरजेचं आहे.
translated_text: It is extremely important that a wet drought be declared in the state, including Konkan.
Justification: A factual statement without emotional charge.

Text: बघा तुमच्या नशिबी हे काही नाही.... दुसऱ्याची नाव लावायला लागतात...
translated_text: Look, this has nothing to do with your destiny.... They start naming others...
Justification: The phrase implies resentment, making it an angry statement.

Text: मुरजी पटेल चा फॉर्म भरायला कोंबडी चोराचं कार्ट गेलं तिथंच पनवती लागली होती
translated_text: The chicken thief's cart had started to rustle right where Murji Patel's form was filled.
Justification: The sentence has some negative connotations but does not strongly convey an emotion.

Text: कोण तुम्ही कुणीही ओळखत नाही तुम्हाला मग का पुढे पुढे करायचं
translated_text: No one knows who you are, so why should you continue?
Justification: A simple question without emotional intensity.

Text: ट्विटर नाही अपमान सोडा , आणि आपल्याकडे बटन आहेच की...
translated_text: No Twitter, stop insulting, and we have a button...
Justification: The phrase "अपमान सोडा" (stop insulting) implies frustration and anger.

Text: तू पेंग्विन ची खाजवून चोखतो का
translated_text: Do you scratch and suck penguins?
Justification: The sentence is crude but lacks strong emotional context.

Text: असे कोण आहे रे तिकडे? च्यायला.. माझीच शेपटी होती व्हय
translated_text: Who is that there? Oh my.. I had a tail.
Justification: The expression "च्यायला" and the surprise in the sentence indicate shock or surprise.

Text: जनावरं ही त्रस्त आहेत रामराज्यात.
translated_text: Animals are suffering in the kingdom of Ram.
Justification: The phrase expresses suffering, indicating sadness.

Text: पण असं कुणी परीक्षा आली की पळ काढत का?
translated_text: But does anyone run away when the exam comes?
Justification: The question is rhetorical and does not express strong emotion.

Text: भंगारा,पहाटेचे शपथविधी चालते का?
translated_text: Bhangara, is the swearing-in ceremony going on in the morning?
Justification: A simple question without emotional intensity.

Text: मग पंढरपूर नांदेड कोल्हापूर इथ काय झालं होत कपटी भाजप
translated_text: Then what happened in Pandharpur, Nanded, Kolhapur, the hypocritical BJP?
Justification: The phrase "कपटी भाजप" (hypocritical BJP) suggests some negativity, but the main tone is curiosity or surprise.

Text: आय शेमण्या काही कुठला संदर्भ आहे का..की नुसताच उपटत बसलास च्या धक्क्यामुळे..?
translated_text: Is there any reference to I Shemanya...or is it just because of the shock of being uprooted...?
Justification: The sentence questions a reference but lacks any strong emotional expression.

Text: अच्छा म्हणजे मुरलीन काम केलेली नाही अस नाही , त्याने पैसे खाल्लेत असय
translated_text: Well, it's not that Murlin hasn't done any work, he's just been eating money.
Justification: The sentence hints at corruption but does not display a strong emotional tone.

Text: रात्री भेटणाऱ्या एकनाथला विचार फडणवीस ला का भेटत होता वेषांतर करून तो सांगेल
translated_text: Eknath, who met him at night, wondered why he was meeting Fadnavis. He would disguise himself and tell him.
Justification: The statement presents curiosity but does not convey strong emotion.

Text: हे असल्या छपरी लोकांची कसली पत्रकार परिषद घेता.. लायकी आहे का याची.
translated_text: What kind of press conference do these kind of people hold? Is it worth it?
Justification: The phrase "छपरी लोक" (cheap people) shows mild disapproval but not strong emotion.

Text: स्वपक्षा बद्दल बोलतांना काहीच वाटत नाही का मालक बोंबलणार ना....
translated_text: Doesn't it feel like the owner will be shocked when he talks about his own party?
Justification: The phrase suggests an unexpected reaction, aligning with surprise.

Text: ही दळभद्री फक्त हिंदू धर्मावरच बोलणार इतर धर्मावर बोलायला वीतभर नाही हातभर फाटती
translated_text: This Dalbhadri will only talk about Hinduism, she doesn't even have the guts to talk about other religions, she's just a handful.
Justification: Though the statement criticizes, it does not have a strong emotional charge.

Text: तुझ्या सारखे म्हणजे शंबर टक्के शेजाऱ्याला पप्पा म्हणणारे तुम्हीं.
translated_text: Like you, you are the one who calls your neighbor papa.
Justification: The sentence is sarcastic but does not express a specific emotion.

Text: अवघड आहे ही
translated_text: This is difficult.
Justification: A factual statement without emotional weight.

Text: बास करा ही नाटकं किती दिवस धर्माच्या नावावर राजकारण करून लोकांना मूर्ख बनवणार
translated_text: Stop this drama, how long will you fool people by playing politics in the name of religion?
Justification: The phrase "नाटकं" (drama) and "मूर्ख बनवणार" (fooling people) convey frustration and anger.

Text: सत्ते मधे कशा साठी बसले तुम्ही हे आधी सांगा जनतेला
translated_text: First tell the people why you came to power.
Justification: A question without a strong emotional tone.

Text: “अंधारात गाडी उभी केली आणि…” या अभिनेत्रीला आला प्रवासात धक्कादायक अनुभव
translated_text: "Parked the car in the dark and..." This actress had a shocking experience while traveling.
Justification: The phrase "धक्कादायक अनुभव" (shocking experience) indicates fear or anxiety.

Text: टीव्हीचॅनल तर वेगळेच दाखवत होते..... किती खोट बोलणार...( टीव्हीचॅनल वाले नाही ) ?
translated_text: The TV channel was showing it differently..... How many lies will they tell...(not the TV channel)?
Justification: Expresses doubt but does not strongly convey emotion.

Text: भाजपाला टार्गेट करत, नेटकऱ्यांनी बाळासाहेबांच्या नावावरून शिंदे गटाला केले ट्रोल –
translated_text: Targeting BJP, netizens trolled Shinde group in Balasaheb's name –
Justification: A factual statement without emotional intensity.

Text: मा.सत्यजित कदम ह्यांना उमेदवारी देऊन त्यांना कायमचे घरी बसावलत...हे कितपत योग्य आहे ओ साहेब....
translated_text: Giving nomination to Hon. Satyajit Kadam and making him stay at home forever...how right is this, sir...?
Justification: The question is rhetorical but does not express a strong emotion.

Text: भाजपाईं हरामख़ोर काही ही करूँ शकतात, पाताळयंत्री
translated_text: The BJP bastards can do this, Patalyantri.
Justification: The use of "हरामखोर" (scoundrels) is strong language, but overall sentiment remains neutral.

Text: हा पण बुडते ती निष्ठा तरंगते ती विष्ठा
translated_text: This too sinks, that loyalty floats, that excrement floats.
Justification: A metaphorical phrase but does not convey a clear emotion.

Text: तुरुंगातल्या शौचालयात गैरसोय झालेल्या आपल्या पार्श्वभागावर
translated_text: On your back, which is inconvenient in the prison toilet.
Justification: Crude language but lacks strong emotion.

Text: अख्खी लोकशाही ची धुरा एका माणसावर अवलंबून असावी हीच शोकांतिका आहे
translated_text: It is a tragedy that the entire axis of democracy should depend on one man.
Justification: The word "शोकांतिका" (tragedy) conveys sadness.

Text: भंगार आहे हा भंगार ,महाराष्ट्र ला लागलेली ही एक मोठी किड आहेत.
translated_text: This is junk, this is junk, this is a big pest that has infected Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "मोठी किड" (big pest) indicates disgust.

Text: : लागवड घटल्याने यंदा कांद्याचे होणार वांधे !
translated_text: : There will be a shortage of onions this year due to reduced planting!
Justification: A factual statement without emotional intensity.

Text: या भुंकणाऱ्या कुत्र्याला पैसे भेटलेत म्हणून भुंकतोय
translated_text: This barking dog is barking because he got money.
Justification: The phrase "भुंकणाऱ्या कुत्र्याला" (barking dog) is derogatory but does not strongly express emotion.

Text: आता जास्त बोलू नको..व्हिडिओ पाठव..तू बोलतोस जास्त..काम कमी.. चल कामाला लाग रे.
translated_text: Don't talk too much now..send a video..you talk too much..work too little..let's get to work.
Justification: The phrase "जास्त बोलू नको" (don't talk too much) suggests frustration, indicating anger.

Text: स्वर्गात दारू मिळत नसेल तर तिथे जाणे व्यर्थ आहे.
translated_text: If there is no alcohol in heaven, it is pointless to go there.
Justification: The statement is neutral as it humorously expresses an opinion without strong emotions.

Text: तुझ्या बापाची कुळं जरी आरी तरी तुझं कुत्रीस्वप्न सत्यात येणार नाही...
translated_text: Even if your father's family survives, your dream won't come true...
Justification: While it dismisses someone's ambition, it does not convey a strong emotional charge.

Text: हा पत्रकार नेमका दसरा दिवाळीला च जागा होतो !!
translated_text: This journalist wakes up exactly on Dussehra, Diwali!!
Justification: The use of sarcasm and frustration towards the journalist indicates anger.

Text: हे तुमच्या सारख्यांचा सर्वे करुन नंबर असतील %
translated_text: These will be the numbers from a survey of people like you.
Justification: The statement is dismissive but lacks emotional intensity.

Text: श्रमाला किंमत नाही. आणि अशा व्यक्तीने खिल्ली उडवावी जी स्वतः परिचारिका होती
translated_text: Labor has no price. And to be ridiculed by someone who was a nurse herself
Justification: Expresses resentment towards someone’s attitude, conveying disgust.

Text: सुप्रीम कोर्टाने दिवसभर वेळ खाण्याची काहीही गरज न्हवती. सकाळीच निकाल देऊन मोकळं व्हायचं होत.
translated_text: There was no need for the Supreme Court to waste time all day. It wanted to give its verdict in the morning and be free.
Justification: The statement critiques a process but does not strongly express emotion.

Text: अन् हा भाऊ या जन्मातच फुटला घरातुन ,किती कच्चा म्हणायचा!
translated_text: And this brother broke away from home in this very birth, how crude he was!
Justification: The phrase "किती कच्चा" suggests disdain, indicating disgust.

Text: कोण तरी चोम्या सांगतो म्हणून ऐक नारी आंधळी भक्त भ्रस्टाचारी जनता पार्टी
translated_text: If someone tells you something, listen to the woman, the blind devotee, the corrupt Janata Party.
Justification: The use of derogatory words and political criticism indicates disgust.

Text: हे देशद्रोही आहे. —एक अंधभक्त
translated_text: This is a traitor. —A blind devotee
Justification: Labeling someone a traitor in a derogatory manner suggests disgust.

Text: महाराष्ट्रीयन ऑफ द इयर आहे की बिहारीयन ऑफ द इयर
translated_text: Maharashtrian of the Year or Bihari of the Year?
Justification: The statement raises a question but does not strongly express any emotion.

Text: पोलिसांना बघून पळून कोण गेला होता
translated_text: Who ran away after seeing the police?
Justification: Expresses curiosity or shock, indicating surprise.

Text: तिला बँकेत नोकरी करयाची होती पण...', रस्ता सोडून घरात घुसलेल्या ट्रकने तरुणीस चिरडले
translated_text: She wanted to work in a bank but...', A young woman was crushed by a truck that left the road and entered a house.
Justification: The phrase "तरुणीस चिरडले" (crushed young woman) conveys fear and tragedy.

Text: गद्दारांच्या जिवावर मजा मारत आहेत
translated_text: They are making fun of the lives of traitors.
Justification: Calling someone a traitor and ridiculing them conveys disgust.

Text: पळून लय भारी गेलता हा संदीप
translated_text: This Sandeep ran away.
Justification: The sentence does not contain strong emotions.

Text: हिंदूत्ववादी सरकारमधे गोरक्षकांवर हल्ले खपवुन घेतले जाणार आहेत का?
translated_text: Will attacks on cow vigilantes be tolerated in a Hindutva-dominated government?
Justification: The question is critical but does not contain a clear emotional charge.

Text: अवघड आहे मराठी पत्रकारीतेचं
translated_text: Marathi journalism is difficult.
Justification: The statement is factual and does not express strong emotion.

Text: आतातरी समजुन जा, ह्यांच्या पक्षानेच तुमची ही अवस्था केलीय.
translated_text: Understand now, it is their party that has put you in this situation.
Justification: The sentence criticizes a party but remains neutral in tone.

Text: मग कोर्टात कशाला झक मारायला युक्तिवाद करतात का
translated_text: Then why do they argue in court?
Justification: The statement is rhetorical and lacks strong emotion.

Text: जेव्हा मन साथ सोडत तेव्हा माणूस हरतो आणि मरतो
translated_text: When the mind leaves, a person loses and dies.
Justification: The statement is philosophical and does not indicate strong emotion.

Text: महेश कोठारे ला हे वाचून किडनी मध्ये हार्ट अटॅक आला असेल
translated_text: Mahesh Kothare must have had a heart attack in his kidneys after reading this.
Justification: The statement is sarcastic but does not strongly indicate any specific emotion.

Text: वर्ल्ड चॅम्पियन संघाला हरवलं पण नवख्या संघानं धुळ चारली, आयर्लंडनं उघडलं खातं
translated_text: The world champion team was defeated but the newcomer team was defeated, Ireland opened its account.
Justification: The sentence discusses a sports outcome but does not carry strong emotion.

Text: साल्या आमच्यामुळे लोक प्रतिनिधी झालास आम्हला किंमत नाही
translated_text: Salya, you became a representative of the people because of us, we don't value you.
Justification: The use of "साल्या" and the accusatory tone indicate anger.

Text: तेच तर म्हणतोय बाकीचे का झोपलेत?
translated_text: That's what I'm saying, why are the rest of you sleeping?
Justification: The sentence questions inaction but lacks strong emotion.

Text: मुळात गद्दारी ही कुठल्या जातीपूर्ती मर्यादित नसते. गद्दारी हा एक स्वभाव आहे.
translated_text: Basically, betrayal is not limited to any caste. It is a nature.
Justification: The statement is analytical and does not convey strong emotion.

Text: तुम्हीच विचार करा स्वायत्त संस्था विश्र्वास ठेवण्या लायक राहिलेत का.....
translated_text: Think for yourself whether autonomous institutions are worthy of trust.
Justification: It questions trust but does not express strong emotion.

Text: स्वतःच्या ठुगना खाली पाणी आले का लोक सुशिक्षित होतात.
translated_text: People become educated because of their own deceit.
Justification: The sentence makes an observation but lacks strong emotion.

Text: पप्पुचा चोखून चोखून तुझ डोक फिरले आहे
translated_text: Your head is spinning after sucking on Pappu's dick.
Justification: The sentence is vulgar but does not indicate a specific emotional category.

Text: कामाला तर लाग म्हणावं बाबा.. कुठे स्व बाळासाहेब आणि कुठे हे.. अवघड आहे सर्व..!!
translated_text: Let's get to work, Baba.. Where is Balasaheb and where is this.. Everything is difficult..!!
Justification: The phrase "अवघड आहे सर्व" (everything is difficult) suggests uncertainty and fear.

Text: आणि म्हणतात आम्ही बाळासाहेबांच्या विचारावर आदर्शावर चालतोय. सत्ता मिळताच त्यांनाच विसरले.
translated_text: And they say we are following Balasaheb's ideals and thoughts. As soon as we got power, we forgot him.
Justification: The sentence is critical but lacks a strong emotional charge.

Text: कोणतीही निशाणी मिळाली तरी कपाळावर लागलेली फुटीर आणि गद्दार ही निशाणी पुसता येणार नाही!
translated_text: No matter what mark you get, the mark of a traitor and traitor on your forehead cannot be erased!
Justification: The use of "गद्दार" (traitor) and the assertive tone indicate anger.

Text: मूर्ख मानस या महाराष्ट्र मधले राने...
translated_text: Foolish mind, these are the Rane of Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence is derogatory but does not indicate a strong emotion.

Text: अरे आम्हांला कडवे चालतील पण तुझ्यासारखे भडवे नको, मुफ्तीला सोबत घेणारे सत्तापिपासू
translated_text: Oh, we may be bitter, but we don't want scoundrels like you, power-hungry people who take the Mufti with them.
Justification: The use of "भडवे" (scoundrels) and "सत्तापिपासू" (power-hungry) indicate disgust.

Text: केवळ मराठी माणसाचा नाही एकूणातच कलेचा अवमान झाला आहे..
translated_text: Not only Marathi people but art in general has been insulted.
Justification: The word "अवमान" (insult) and the tone suggest disgust.

Text: अरे हे कुठं नायजेरियाला पोहचले भारत जोडण्या अगोदर इथं पाकिस्तान, बांगलादेश राहूनच गेले
translated_text: Oh, where did this reach Nigeria? Before joining India, it had to stay in Pakistan and Bangladesh.
Justification: The sentence makes a geographical comparison but does not carry strong emotion.

Text: च्या ट्विटर हँडलचा असा वापर करणं अत्यंत चुकीचं आहे.
translated_text: It is very wrong to use the Twitter handle like this.
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत चुकीचं" (very wrong) indicates disapproval and disgust.

Text: भाजपच्या भ्रष्ट नेत्यांची चौकशी केव्हा होणार?
translated_text: When will the corrupt BJP leaders be investigated?
Justification: The accusatory tone suggests anger.

Text: काँग्रेसच्या कुबड्या एवढ्या मोठ्या असतात की काँग्रेसमधून हाकलून दिलेले पण भाजपात मंत्री होतात.
translated_text: The Congress's hunches are so big that even those expelled from the Congress become ministers in the BJP.
Justification: The sentence is critical but lacks strong emotion.

Text: तुमच्या सारखा स्वाभिमान गहाण नाही ठेवला त्यांनी
translated_text: They didn't sacrifice their self-respect like you did.
Justification: The sentence is critical but does not express strong emotion.

Text: काम नीट करायची नाहीतर आम्ही जनता तुम्हाला तुमची जागा दाखवून देईल....
translated_text: Do your job properly or we the people will show you your place...
Justification: The statement is a warning, but it lacks strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: थोरात,.विखे,आंबेडकर कोर्टात जाणार.त्यांच्या नावाचा गैरवापर केला म्हणून.
translated_text: Thorat, Vikhe, Ambedkar will go to court for misusing their names.
Justification: This is a factual statement about legal action, without strong emotional undertones.

Text: कुलकर्णी ना म्हणजे डोक्यावर पडलेला असायलाच हवा.
translated_text: Kulkarni must have fallen on his head.
Justification: The phrase is critical but in a casual manner, making it neutral rather than overtly emotional.

Text: हा तोच ना ज्याच्यावर शिवसेनेच्या महिला नगरसेविकांनी आरोप केले होते....ह्याची लायकी आहे का??
translated_text: Isn't this the same person who was accused by the Shiv Sena's female corporator....is this worthy??
Justification: Words like "लायकी आहे का??" (is he worthy?) imply contempt and disgust.

Text: ते विश्वासार्ह फॅक्ट चेकर्स काही दिवस तुरुंगात होते असं समजलं
translated_text: I heard those trusted fact checkers were in jail for a few days.
Justification: The phrase "तुरुंगात होते" (were in jail) and "विश्वासार्ह" (trusted) express disappointment and concern, leading to sadness.

Text: आपल्यालाच सांगावे लागणार….. आणि आता लोकांनाही यांची खेळी लक्षात येऊ लागलीय.
translated_text: We have to tell them… and now people are starting to notice their tricks.
Justification: This is an observational statement, without strong emotions.

Text: महिला सक्षमीकरणाचे ढोंग बंद कर आणि महाराष्ट्रातून पहिले निघ
translated_text: Stop pretending to empower women and get out of Maharashtra first.
Justification: The sentence expresses criticism but lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: फुले शाहू आंबेडकरांच्या महाराष्ट्रामध्ये लहानग्यांना शिक्षणासाठी आंदोलन करावं लागणं हे लाजिरवाणे आहे.
translated_text: It is shameful that children in Phule Shahu Ambedkar's Maharashtra have to agitate for education.
Justification: The word "लाजिरवाणे" (shameful) expresses strong discontent and disgust.

Text: तूझ्या खाली का जाळ पेटलाय पण ? जा पळ बर्फाच्य लादीवर जाऊन बास पटकन
translated_text: Why is the fire burning under you? Go and run on the ice-laden ground quickly.
Justification: This statement contains sarcasm and surprise, making "surprise" an appropriate emotion.

Text: काही महीन्यातचं बाळासाहेबाची शिवसेना आणी भाजपा सरकारची उतरती कळा दिसायला लागली.. हे प्रभु
translated_text: Within a few months, the decline of Balasaheb's Shiv Sena and BJP government began to be seen.. Oh Lord.
Justification: The phrase expresses concern and disappointment, leading to sadness.

Text: जळ जळ तय,सहन होत नाही अन् सांगताही येत नाही कुरेशी सर
translated_text: It's so hot, I can't stand it and I can't even tell you, Qureshi Sir.
Justification: The phrase expresses frustration and disgust.

Text: मैदान मिळाले म्हणून लयं नाचले होते... आता आयोगापुढे...
translated_text: They danced because they got the ground... Now before the commission...
Justification: The phrase is descriptive without strong emotion.

Text: गरिबांना लुटले म्हणून तुम्ही जेल मध्ये आहात
translated_text: You are in jail for robbing the poor.
Justification: The phrase "लुटले" (robbed) and the accusation convey strong disgust.

Text: पण डॉलर च्या तुलनेत रुपया खाली येतोय .. त्याचं काय
translated_text: But the rupee is falling against the dollar.. what about that?
Justification: An economic observation without emotional intensity, making it neutral.

Text: पहिले शिवसैनिक म्हणायचे बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना. आणि आता शिवसैनिक बोलतात बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना म्हणजे बाळासाहेब कोण?
translated_text: Earlier, Shiv Sainiks used to say Balasaheb's Shiv Sena. And now Shiv Sainiks say Balasaheb's Shiv Sena. So who is Balasaheb?
Justification: A rhetorical question without strong emotional cues, making it neutral.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत ली पक्ष नसतो आम्हाला हेच शिकवलं शाळेत तुमची कोणती शाळा होती
translated_text: Gram Panchayats do not have parties. This is what we were taught in school. Which school did you go to?
Justification: A question regarding governance, without strong emotional cues.

Text: ही गोष्ट घरात सांगायच विसरले होते वाटत
translated_text: I think I forgot to mention this at home.
Justification: A simple statement without emotional intensity.

Text: हे त्या नेपाळी बेडकाना सांग आधी गद्दार
translated_text: Tell that Nepali frog first, he's a traitor.
Justification: The words "गद्दार" (traitor) and "बेडक" (frog) show contempt, aligning with disgust.

Text: उध्दव ठाकरेंनी तुझ्या आईच्या बोच्यांत काय लंड घातला होता का
translated_text: Did Uddhav Thackeray put his penis in your mother's vagina?
Justification: The sentence is offensive and vulgar. The word "लंड" (penis) makes it explicitly obscene and degrading. "Surprise" may not be the best classification; "Disgust" or "Anger" would be more appropriate.

Text: अंधेरीत विधानसभेची उप निवडणूक आहे. जनतेला मूर्ख बनविण्याचे उद्योग चालू आहे.
translated_text: There is a by-election for the assembly in Andheri. There is an attempt to fool the people.
Justification: The sentence states an event and makes an allegation but lacks strong emotional words. The phrase "मूर्ख बनविण्याचे" (fooling people) suggests mild criticism but does not evoke a strong emotional reaction.

Text: “उद्धव ठाकरे हताश, अकर्तृत्ववान, अहंकारी”, भाजपा आमदाराचा टोला; म्हणाले, “घरात बसणाऱ्यांना…”
translated_text: “Uddhav Thackeray is desperate, incompetent, arrogant”, BJP MLA says; said, “Those who stay at home…”
Justification: The words "हताश" (desperate), "अकर्तृत्ववान" (incompetent), "अहंकारी" (arrogant) are strong criticisms, making "Disgust" an appropriate emotion.

Text: अडणीच्या पोर्ट्वरचा फुकटचा माल कितीही घेतात आणि असे बडबड करत राहतात.
translated_text: They take whatever free goods they can from the Adani port and keep on babbling like this.
Justification: The phrase "फुकटचा माल" (free goods) and "बडबड करत" (babbling) imply sarcasm, but they do not strongly indicate anger or disgust, making "Neutral" appropriate.

Text: आपल्याला आणि पक्षाला खूप मोठी भरपाई भरून द्यावी लागेल
translated_text: You and the party will have to pay a huge compensation.
Justification: The sentence is factual without any emotional charge. The phrase "मोठी भरपाई" (huge compensation) indicates consequence but not a strong emotion.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात हल्ली चाललेल्या गल्लिच्च राजकारणाबद्दल खालील समर्पक दंतकथा लागु होते.
translated_text: The following apt anecdote applies to the current political turmoil in Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "गल्लिच्च राजकारण" (petty politics) is slightly critical, but the sentence is mostly descriptive, justifying a "Neutral" label.

Text: हा नंतर ताईची हाथ जोडून माफी मागेल बघा...
translated_text: Let's see if he will apologize to his aunt later...
Justification: The phrase "हाथ जोडून माफी" (folding hands and apologizing) suggests a prediction but does not strongly convey any emotion.

Text: नाचणाऱ्या मोराचे पाय वाकडे असतात असे म्हणतात
translated_text: It is said that the dancing peacock has crooked legs.
Justification: This is a proverb. The phrase "पाय वाकडे" (crooked legs) suggests a flaw but does not evoke a specific emotional reaction.

Text: दुसर्याबरोबर पळून गेलेली बायको आता इस्टेटीत वाटा मागत आहे
translated_text: The wife who ran away with another man is now demanding a share in the estate.
Justification: The phrase "पळून गेलेली बायको" (wife who ran away) contains judgment, but the sentence remains factual, making "Neutral" appropriate.

Text: हे एवढ्या लेकराला कळतं ते आपल्या थोरा मोठ्यांना कधी कळल ???
translated_text: This is something that only children can understand, but when will our elders understand???
Justification: The phrase "थोरा मोठ्यांना" (elders) questions wisdom but does not carry a strong emotional charge.

Text: होय मान्य, स्पर्धेचा युगात माणूस देशात आणि समाजात काय चालू आहे हे विसरत आहे
translated_text: Yes, I agree, in this era of competition, people are forgetting what is going on in the country and society.
Justification: The phrase "विसरत आहे" (forgetting) indicates concern but lacks strong emotion.

Text: स्क्रिप्ट तयार होती, दसरा मेळावा नंतर घोळ झालाय.
translated_text: The script was ready, but there was chaos after the Dussehra gathering.
Justification: The phrase "घोळ झालाय" (chaos happened) indicates disorder but lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: ते थापा का कोण घरगड्याच काय कौतुक लागलय भक्तांना पक्के खुळ्या लवड्याचे आहेत
translated_text: Why are those applauses so much appreciated by the householders? They are truly loved by the devotees.
Justification: The phrase "खुळ्या लवड्याचे" (crazy idiots) is insulting but does not necessarily evoke "Surprise"; "Disgust" might be more fitting.

Text: ढुंगण दांडा काय ती भाषा आणि काय ते ढोंग आणि कस ते पळणे
translated_text: What kind of language is that, what kind of pretense is that, and how can you run away?
Justification: The phrase "ढोंग" (pretense) suggests mild criticism but does not evoke strong emotion.

Text: सध्या वरचे वर ढग फुटी होती आहे पुण्यात
translated_text: There are clouds overhead in Pune right now.
Justification: The sentence is a factual weather report with no emotional charge.

Text: आम्हाला ऑप्शन असतो का
translated_text: Do we have an option?
Justification: The sentence is a question and does not contain any strong emotional words.

Text: झागल्या, कुळाचा उद्धार करून घेतल्याशिवाय खालची खाज जात नाही का रे भ ????
translated_text: Zagalya, doesn't the itch go away without saving the clan????
Justification: The phrase "खालची खाज" (itch below) is used humorously, making "Joy" appropriate.

Text: देवतांचे विडंबन करतो; पण त्याविषयी कठोर कारवाई मात्र होत नाही.
translated_text: They mock the gods, but no strict action is taken against them.
Justification: The word विडंबन (mocking) indicates an act of disrespect toward deities, evoking disgust.

Text: बंद करा हे थिल्लर चाळे.
translated_text: Close this fucking shop.
Justification: The phrase थिल्लर चाळे (cheap drama) conveys frustration and anger toward something perceived as nonsense.

Text: शिवसेनेला मशाल म्हणजे माकडाच्या हाती कोलीत दुसऱ्याचं घर जाळता जाळता स्वतःच सुद्धा
translated_text: Shiv Sena is a torch in the hands of a monkey, burning down other people's houses while burning down their own.
Justification: The phrase माकडाच्या हाती कोलीत (a torch in a monkey’s hand) implies recklessness, leading to a sense of disgust.

Text: दादा दुसऱ्यांच्या हिंदी वर दात काडत होते आता दातावरच पडले
translated_text: Grandpa was cutting his teeth on other people's Hindi, now he is cutting his teeth on his own.
Justification: The phrase दात काढणे (mocking/criticizing) implies someone ridiculing others and later facing consequences, inducing disgust.

Text: ही आणि दानवे काहीही बोलतात
translated_text: What does this and Danve say?
Justification: No strong emotional words are present; it is a neutral statement.

Text: आगरकर, न्या. रानडे यांची नावे घेणार नाहीत. ते ब्राह्मण होते म्हणून ना !
translated_text: Agarkar, Justice Ranade will not be named. Because they were Brahmins!
Justification: The sentence states a fact without strong emotional language, making it neutral.

Text: प्रशासन हे फक्त लोकांची गैरसोय करण्यासाठी आहे
translated_text: The administration is only there to inconvenience the people.
Justification: The statement criticizes administration but lacks strong emotional language, making it neutral.

Text: “शिवसेनेला सहानुभूती मिळतेय हा भ्रम आहे!”- राज ठाकरे यांचे मनसैनिकांसमोर प्रतिपादन…
translated_text: “It is an illusion that Shiv Sena is getting sympathy!” – Raj Thackeray’s statement to the Mansainiks…
Justification: It presents an opinion without strong emotional words, keeping it neutral.

Text: हा वकील जज ला चूत्या बनवत असेल पण भक्ताना नाही
translated_text: This lawyer may be making fun of the judge, but not the devotees.
Justification: The use of चूत्या (idiot/insult) suggests an offensive tone, leading to disgust.

Text: आम्ही ही एक जणाला खुप मारला..मामीचे गाणे पाहत होता ऑनलाईन..
translated_text: We really beat this guy..I was watching Auntie's song online..
Justification: The phrase खूप मारला (beat up a person) conveys aggression, justifying anger.

Text: बकवास प्रश्न, जो निवडणूक आयोगाच्या कक्षेत येत नाही.
translated_text: Nonsense question, which does not fall within the purview of the Election Commission.
Justification: The word बकवास (nonsense) is critical but not emotional enough to shift from neutrality.

Text: म्हणून तर कमळी ला शिव्या देतो आम्ही नीच लोक आहेत सगळे तुझ्या सारखे
translated_text: That's why I curse Kamali. We are all lowly people like you.
Justification: The phrase शिव्या देतो (curse/abuse) expresses hatred, leading to disgust.

Text: पुणे आजुबाजुने भ्रष्ट लोकांनी वेढलेल आहे.मुंबई आजुबाजुने समुद्र गुजरात बीजेपीने वेढलेल आहे.
translated_text: Pune is surrounded by corrupt people. Mumbai is surrounded by the sea of Gujarat BJP.
Justification: The statement critiques politics but lacks strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: नावाचे सगडे असतात हे मान्य झालाय !
translated_text: It is agreed that there are names!
Justification: The phrase हे मान्य झालंय (it is agreed) expresses acceptance, leading to joy.

Text: प्रश्न ला प्रश्ना ने उत्तर देऊ नका.. काय काम केले ते सांगा
translated_text: Don't answer a question with a question. Tell me what you did.
Justification: The directive tone and frustration imply anger.

Text: काय नष्टर हाय हा पंतप्रधान रा पगार व्हायच्या आत राजीनामा
translated_text: What a shame this Prime Minister has resigned before receiving his salary.
Justification: The word नष्टर (shameful) indicates strong disapproval, leading to disgust.

Text: ह्याला म्हणतात दाणा टाकून घोडा उडवून घेणे चुत्या
translated_text: This is called throwing grain and making a horse fly.
Justification: While चुत्या (idiot) is present, the overall sentence lacks a strong emotional direction, making it neutral.

Text: त्यामूळे आपल्याला त्रास होतो. गर्दी होते तिकिटे मिळत नाहीत गाड्या उशिरा धावतात
translated_text: That's why we suffer. There are crowds, tickets are not available, trains run late.
Justification: The word त्रास (suffering) conveys distress and frustration, leading to sadness.

Text: ज्या काळात कॉंग्रेस सत्तेत होता त्यावेळी होते. संघर्ष करायची वेळ आल्यावर पळून गेले
translated_text: It was during the time when Congress was in power. When it was time to fight, they fled.
Justification: The statement presents an observation without strong emotional words, keeping it neutral.

Text: कोणालाही जनतेशी काही देणं घेणं नाही...... कुठे गेली लोकशाही.....ही तर नुसती मनमानी
translated_text: No one has anything to do with the people...... Where has democracy gone..... This is just arbitrariness.
Justification: The phrase नुसती मनमानी (pure dictatorship) expresses frustration with governance, indicating anger.

Text: म्हणे ठाकरेनी काहीच काम केली नाही ?
translated_text: So you mean Thackeray didn't do any work?
Justification: The rhetorical nature lacks strong emotional weight, making it neutral.

Text: फडनवीस उद्धव साहेबा पर्यंत ठीक आहे, बाळासाहेबाचा नाद नका करू..
translated_text: Fadnavis is fine up to Uddhav Saheb, don't make fun of Balasaheb..
Justification: The statement warns but lacks strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: यांनी देशासाठी केलेला त्याग आहे ,तुम्ही त्यांच्या पाया पडायच्या ही लायक नाही
translated_text: They have sacrificed for the country, you are not worthy of falling at their feet.
Justification: The statement conveys respect and criticism but lacks strong emotions.

Text: दोघे ही न लायक आहे कोणीही भीक घालत नाही निघा ...
translated_text: Both of them are unworthy, no one is begging, go away...
Justification: Though critical, the statement does not contain strong emotional words.

Text: गेल्या महिन्यापासून मी तुम्हाला मेल करीत आहे, एकदा बघून उत्तर द्या साहेब
translated_text: I have been mailing you for the last month, please check it and reply, sir.
Justification: The statement is a request and does not express strong emotions.

Text: मला कोणी बेस्ट फ्रेंड मानत नाही
translated_text: No one considers me a best friend.
Justification: The sentence conveys frustration, as कोणी मानत नाही (no one acknowledges me) implies rejection.

Text: पुढील दिवसात तुमचे सरकार कोसळणार हे नक्की...
translated_text: Your government will surely collapse in the coming days...
Justification: The phrase सरकार कोसळणार (government will collapse) implies an unfortunate outcome, leading to sadness.

Text: बुडाला अंगार लागली का?
translated_text: Did Buda catch fire?
Justification: The phrase is metaphorical, but it lacks strong emotional weight.

Text: अभिनयासाठी मौनी रॉयने शिक्षण अर्धवट सोडून गाठली होती मुंबई…
translated_text: Mouni Roy had left her studies halfway and reached Mumbai to pursue acting...
Justification: A factual statement with no strong emotions.

Text: सगळ्याना भारताचे नमूने म्हणून गौरवा हो आता... तेच बाकी राहणार आहे....
translated_text: May all be glorified as role models of India now... that is all that remains...
Justification: The phrase नमूने म्हणून गौरवा (glorified as examples) may be sarcastic, but it does not indicate strong emotion.

Text: अल्पवयीन मुलीवर अत्याचार करून गर्भवती केल्याप्रकरणी नराधमास वर्षे सक्तमजुरी
translated_text: Man sentenced to years of hard labor for raping and impregnating minor girl.
Justification: The word अत्याचार (atrocity) and नराधम (monster) indicate strong moral repulsion, leading to disgust.

Text: तुमच्या तोंडात डबाभर तुप आणि पोतंभर साखर...
translated_text: A tub of ghee and a bowl of sugar in your mouth...
Justification: A sarcastic phrase, but does not express strong emotion.

Text: बाबू जानू म्हणणारे एक नंबर चे फालतु असतात
translated_text: Those who say "Babu Janu" are number one idiots.
Justification: The word फालतु (idiots) shows disdain, indicating disgust.

Text: म्हणजे आज ही घरा बाहेर काढलं वाटतं तुला वहिनींनी
translated_text: So, you think your sister-in-law kicked you out of the house today?
Justification: The phrase घराबाहेर काढलं वाटतं (kicked out of the house) suggests unexpected action, leading to surprise.

Text: कोल्हापूरमध्ये, रस्त्यात खड्डा आहे की खड्ड्यात रस्ता तेच कळत नाही...
translated_text: In Kolhapur, it's hard to tell whether there's a pothole in the road or the road in the pothole...
Justification: A humorous observation without strong emotion.

Text: राजवाड्यात राहणारा भिकारी देश म्हणजे भारत
translated_text: India is a country of beggars living in palaces.
Justification: A critical statement but lacks direct emotional expression.

Text: ढुंगण सगळ्यांना असतं पण लाथा आणि दांडा खाणारे तुमचं एकच असतं
translated_text: Everyone has a butt, but you're the only one who can take kicks and sticks.
Justification: The phrase लाथा आणि दांडा खाणारे (taking kicks and sticks) implies humiliation, evoking disgust.

Text: हे असल शिकवले का हो तुम्ही तुमच्या शिल्लकसेनेच्या गतीमंदाना
translated_text: Have you really taught this to your balance-swinging army?
Justification: A rhetorical question with sarcasm but lacks strong emotion.

Text: काच जर का खाली केली असती तर कानाखाली सुध्दा बसली असती...
translated_text: If the glass had been lowered, it would have even sat under my ear...
Justification: A metaphorical phrase with no direct emotional charge.

Text: असे पन भाजपाचा पराभव होणारच आहे
translated_text: This is how BJP is bound to be defeated.
Justification: A political prediction without strong emotion.

Text: बाळासाहेबांच्या नावाची ढाल करून मागून भाजपची तलवार चालवणारे गद्दार गट !!
translated_text: A group of traitors who wield the BJP's sword from behind, using Balasaheb's name as a shield!!
Justification: The word गद्दार (traitors) strongly conveys disgust.

Text: राजीनामा द्या आणि निघा इथून महाराष्ट्रातून
translated_text: Resign and leave Maharashtra.
Justification: A demand but without strong emotional charge.

Text: काय हाय का नाही. नुसतच.
translated_text: Why not? Just kidding.
Justification: A short phrase without strong emotion.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात घाण येणार आहे ! म्हणून लोक नाकाला रुमाल लावणार आहे
translated_text: There is going to be dirt in Maharashtra! That's why people are going to put handkerchiefs on their noses.
Justification: The phrase घाण येणार (dirt is coming) metaphorically expresses disgust.

Text: आमच्या जिल्हामध्ये ही संस्कृती विसरले होते... देगलूर नांदेड. हे भाजपावाले
translated_text: This culture was forgotten in our district... Deglur Nanded. These BJP people.
Justification: A political observation, neutral in tone.

Text: ज्यांनी कांड केलेत त्यांनी काळजी करावी तुम्हाला काय करायचं आहे
translated_text: Those who committed the crime should be worried. What do you want to do?
Justification: A factual statement lacking emotional charge.

Text: अबब! स्कूल बसमध्ये हा कोठून आला अजगर? व्हिडिओ पाहून कुणाचाही थरकाप उडेल
translated_text: Wow! Where did this python come from in the school bus? Anyone will be shocked to see the video
Justification: The exclamation "अबब!" (Oh wow!) and "थरकाप उडेल" (will be shocked) are clear indicators of a surprised reaction.

Text: सत्तेचा माज आहे सत्ताधाऱ्यांना!
translated_text: The rulers are obsessed with power!
Justification: सत्तेचा माज (arrogance of power) is a strong phrase reflecting anger and frustration with authority.

Text: धोक्याचा इशारा तर नाही ना सर हा
translated_text: There is no danger warning, sir.
Justification: The phrase "धोक्याचा इशारा" (danger warning) is inquisitive but lacks any emotional tone, making it neutral.

Text: हा खरोखरच मोठा घोटाळा आहे, यावर कडक कारवाई झाली पाहिजे
translated_text: This is really a big scam, strict action should be taken against this.
Justification: मोठा घोटाळा (big scam) and "कडक कारवाई" (strict action) reflect disgust towards corruption or misdeed.

Text: मराठी एकाच विषयावर किती वेळा फिल्म काढतील मागचा वर्षी च तर पावनखिंड आला होता
translated_text: How many times will Marathi make a film on the same subject? Last year, even Pavankhind came out.
Justification: The sentence expresses monotony but lacks emotionally loaded words; hence, it's neutral.

Text: हिच का ती पोळ बाई घरात संडास सुध्दा नाही गंगाबाईची पोरगी.
translated_text: This is why that poor woman, Gangabai's daughter, doesn't even have a toilet in her house.
Justification: संडास सुध्दा नाही (not even a toilet) triggers feelings of pity and disgrace, leading to disgust.

Text: अशी एक तीव्र सणक डोक्यात जाते
translated_text: Such a strong feeling goes to the head.
Justification: The phrase "तीव्र सणक" (sharp impulse) is intense but not tied to a clear emotion category.

Text: पाकिस्तान पेटवायला हवा होता
translated_text: Pakistan should have been set on fire.
Justification: The call to "पेटवायला" (set on fire) is aggressive and hostile, reflecting anger.

Text: याआधी प्रिंसेस हया आणि प्रिंसेस लतीफा यांच्या बंडाची आणि छळाची प्रकरणं समोर आली होती.
translated_text: Previously, cases of rebellion and harassment of Princess Haya and Princess Latifa had come to light.
Justification: While it refers to serious matters, the language is factual and emotionless, making it neutral.

Text: तुमच्या सारखे रडके नाहीत. बाळासाहेबांसोबत गद्दारी केली फावड्याने.
translated_text: There are no crybabies like you. You betrayed Balasaheb with a shovel.
Justification: गद्दारी (betrayal) and "फावड्याने" (with a shovel) show intense aggression and blame, indicating anger.

Text: खरं आहे. पण हे शेणकिड्यांची बुद्धी मानत नाही.
translated_text: True. But this does not take into account the intelligence of dung beetles.
Justification: While "शेणकिड्यांची बुद्धी" (dung beetle’s intelligence) is derogatory, the tone is more sarcastic than emotional, making it neutral.

Text: नगरसेवक चोरानी अस बोलण म्हणजे अतीच झाल
translated_text: It's too much for a corporator to say that.
Justification: The phrase "अतीच झाल" (this is too much) shows criticism, but lacks emotional depth for anger or disgust.

Text: घोषणा झाल्या मग पोलीस कारवाई का नाही?
translated_text: Why is there no police action after the announcement?
Justification: The question "का नाही?" (why not?) following "घोषणा" (announcement) indicates surprise at the lack of action.

Text: हे लाईक करायला तुमच्या आयटी सेल ला तरी कामाला लावा. तासात फक्त लाईक?
translated_text: At least get your IT cell to work on this. Just likes in an hour?
Justification: Sarcastic but light in tone, without emotional intensity — remains neutral.

Text: निषेध, रौत साहेबांचा फोटो का नाही...?
translated_text: Protest, why is there no photo of Raut Saheb...?
Justification: का नाही...? (why not...?) after naming a person implies an element of unexpectedness or surprise.

Text: हे जास्तीत जास्त पर्यंत चालेल.. नंतर अन्नाजी पंत पण वापर करुन फेकून देतील..
translated_text: This will last until the end.. later Annaji Pant will use it up and throw it away..
Justification: वापर करुन फेकणे (use and throw) expresses concern but remains neutral in tone.

Text: त्या मॅडम कांदे खात नाही म्हणून डोक्यात बटाटे भरले आहेत.... असे वाटतं
translated_text: That madam doesn't eat onions, so she has potatoes in her head.... It seems like
Justification: बटाटे भरले आहेत (potatoes in the head) is absurd and figurative, giving it a surprised tone.

Text: असच होत.. वरतून घेतला परत तर मार पण खाव लागतो त्यांचा
translated_text: That's what happens.. If you take it from above, you have to beat them back.
Justification: The phrase is a sarcastic commentary on repayment and lacks specific emotion.

Text: सगळया भाडखाऊ संस्था त्यांनी विकत घेतल्या आहेत म्हणून सांगता येत नाही
translated_text: It is impossible to say because they have bought all the rental institutions.
Justification: Accusatory but devoid of strong affective language, thus neutral.

Text: हींमत असेल तर सरकार पाडून दाखवा म्हणणारे कुठे आहेत आज
translated_text: Where are those today who say, "If you have the courage, overthrow the government?"
Justification: The use of "हींमत" (courage) challenges others but remains rhetorically neutral.

Text: एम, नरू नी बी योगी, मर्द आहेत का.
translated_text: M, are you a Yogi or a Naru? Are you a man?
Justification: The sentence questions masculinity but lacks strong emotional indicators, hence neutral.

Text: एका परप्रांतीयांने सनकन कानाखाली लगावली होती.
translated_text: A migrant had placed a sneer under his ear.
Justification: The phrase "सनकन कानाखाली लगावली" (a sharp slap under the ear) depicts physical aggression, suggesting disgust.

Text: हा तोच पाकीट पत्रकार आहे जो "उद्धव चा स्वभाव रडका आहे" असं म्हणाला होता..
translated_text: This is the same pocket journalist who said "Uddhav has a tearful nature".
Justification: The term "पाकीट पत्रकार" (pocket journalist) implies corrupt, biased media, creating a tone of disgust.

Text: हा गद्दार आमदार विरुद्ध करा पुढे चालून काहीं प्रॉब्लेम व्हायला नको
translated_text: Act against this traitorous MLA and there should be no problems going forward.
Justification: The word "गद्दार" (traitor) shows betrayal, evoking anger.

Text: प्रसंगावधान दाखवून आधी कर्तव्य पूर्ण केलं श्रद्धांजली आणि कुटुंबीयांप्रती सहवेदना.
translated_text: Showing consideration for the situation, he fulfilled his duty first. Tributes and condolences to the family.
Justification: Although solemn, the sentence is factual and composed.

Text: अरे यार हा तर खंडोबा माळ चा रस्ता आहे.
translated_text: Hey man, this is the road to Khandoba Mal.
Justification: Informative with a casual tone, no sentiment expressed.

Text: घंट्याचा कायदेतज्ञ...... छपरी आहे नसानसात द्वेष भरला आहे
translated_text: The lawyer of the hour...... is a coward, his nerves are filled with hatred
Justification: "छपरी" and "नसानसात द्वेष" show disrespect and contempt.

Text: म्हणून डांग फाटती का र केळ्या.....
translated_text: So why are bananas bursting?
Justification: The absurd imagery of "डांग फाटती" (bursting) with "केळ्या" (bananas) leads to surprise.

Text: शिव्या घालण्यात आल्या म्हणुन गेले. पण घातल्या
translated_text: They left because they were insulted. But they were insulted.
Justification: The use of "शिव्या घालण्यात" (swearing) conveys verbal assault.

Text: त्याच्यात दम पण नाही कोणी मुंडकं उडवलं हे सांगायची..
translated_text: He doesn't even have the energy to say that someone blew his head off.
Justification: "मुंडकं उडवलं" (head blown off) is violent and disturbing.

Text: अडीच वर्ष थापा मारल्या. अखेर थापा म्हणाला, आता सहन होत नाही.
translated_text: He beat her for two and a half years. Finally, he said, "I can't stand it anymore."
Justification: "थापा मारल्या" (kept lying or hitting) over time conveys frustration and disgust.

Text: हातभट्टीत गांजा मिसळून ढोसल्यावर एवढी कडक नशा येत असावी. माणसाने थापेबाजी करावी, पण इतकी.
translated_text: It must be so strong that you get so drunk after mixing ganja in a hand-held pot. A person should be able to clap, but that's it.
Justification: The references to "गांजा" (weed) and "थापेबाजी" (boasting) show moral degradation, suggesting disgust.

Text: नीरव मोदी कधीच आत्महत्या करणार नाही तज्ज्ञ मुद्दाम युक्तिवाद करत आहेत?
translated_text: Are experts deliberately arguing that Nirav Modi will never commit suicide?
Justification: The disbelief and question about expert opinion evokes surprise.

Text: त्रास दिला नाही म्हणून तर ही वेळ आलीये.... वेळीच वेसण घालायला पाहिजे होती...
translated_text: Since I didn't bother you, now is the time... I should have put on the veil on time...
Justification: Reflective tone, but lacks strong emotion, hence neutral.

Text: * ब्रेकिंग: हिंदूंचे सण आल्यावरच अतिक्रमण का काढता? बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेनेचे रस्त्यावर ठिय्या आंदोलन...
translated_text: * Breaking: Why are encroachments being removed only when Hindu festivals are coming? Balasaheb's Shiv Sena's protest on the streets...
Justification: "अतिक्रमण" (encroachment) and protest around religious events stir anger.

Text: नाही साहेब हे अत्यंत चुकीचे आहे तुमचे विधान
translated_text: No sir, your statement is very wrong.
Justification: The word "अत्यंत चुकीचे" (completely wrong) carries assertive disagreement, showing anger.

Text: गप रे अक्कल काडीची नाही आणि इथे बडबड करत बसलाय
translated_text: Gosh, you're not smart and you're just sitting here babbling.
Justification: "अक्कल काडीची नाही" (no sense at all) and "बडबड" (babble) express disdain.

Text: खुप कमी असतात असे..
translated_text: There are very few..
Justification: General observation without emotional intensity.

Text: येडझव्या जवांना सोबत करतो लायकी आहे का तुझी
translated_text: Are you worthy of accompanying the twelve barleys?
Justification: The odd expression lacks a clear emotional tone, hence neutral.

Text: सगळा वैचारिक अंधारच आहे....अंधारे कडे
translated_text: All is ideological darkness....towards darkness
Justification: "वैचारिक अंधार" (intellectual darkness) reflects criticism but stays calm in tone.

Text: अरेरे, कोणाकडे दिलाय अर्ज? काय कारवाई होणार जगजाहीर आहे
translated_text: Oh my, who did you submit the application to? It is well known what action will be taken.
Justification: The disbelief in "अरेरे" and rhetorical questioning convey surprise.

Text: आयबॉल च कीबोर्ड आहे. बघा की काही होतंय का? ₹ चुना लागेल हो?
translated_text: The iBall has a keyboard. See if anything happens? Will it cost ₹?
Justification: Mostly a sarcastic observation without direct emotional tone.

Text: मन त्या मृतदेहासारखा झाला आहे ज्याच्या नशिबात अंत्यसंस्कार नाहि
translated_text: The mind has become like a corpse whose fate is not to be cremated.
Justification: Comparison to "मृतदेहासारखा" (like a corpse) evokes a disturbing image, signaling disgust.

Text: स्वतःवर शेकलं की हे बरं आठवतं तुम्हाला
translated_text: You remember this well when you were angry with yourself.
Justification: The sarcastic tone and "शेकलं" (when scolded/criticized) convey blame and frustration.

Text: याचा अर्थ मानवाच्या अस्तित्वाला सर्वाधिक धोका भविष्यात सगळ्याच धर्मापासून आहे.
translated_text: This means that the greatest threat to human existence in the future comes from all religions.
Justification: Although controversial, the sentence is stated analytically without emotional markers.

Text: म्हणजे उद्धव ठाकरे व्हिजनरी नव्हते, राऊतलाच जास्त मुलाखती द्यायचे
translated_text: So Uddhav Thackeray was not a visionary, Raut used to give more interviews.
Justification: Mild criticism using "व्हिजनरी नव्हते", but overall it maintains a neutral tone.

Text: साहेब पण ह्यांच्या गलिच्छ राजकारणाचे भाग होतील असे वाटलं नव्हतं
translated_text: Sir, I never thought I would be a part of their dirty politics.
Justification: Though "गलिच्छ राजकारण" suggests corruption, the overall tone remains reflective.

Text: आता कळाल गाढवांच्या डोक्यावर केस का कमी असतात ती
translated_text: Now you will know why donkeys have less hair on their heads.
Justification: Use of metaphor "गाढवांच्या डोक्यावर केस" is mocking but presented humorously.

Text: दरवर्षी कोटि रोजगार देण्याची घोषणा आखिरकार जुमला साबित झाली.
translated_text: The announcement of providing crores of jobs every year ultimately proved to be a hoax.
Justification: The word "जुमला" (hoax) criticizes policy, yet stays within informative tone.

Text: भाजप सत्तेत वर्षे आणि दोष राष्ट्रवादीचा, अंध भक्त डोक्यात कमी
translated_text: Years in BJP power and the blame is on the NCP, blind devotees are less in the head
Justification: "अंध भक्त" and "डोक्यात कमी" add sarcasm, but no intense emotional content.

Text: इकडे घामाघूम झालो आम्ही इतकं कडाक्याच ऊन आहे
translated_text: We're sweating here, it's so hot.
Justification: "घामाघूम" and exaggeration about heat show light humor and joy.

Text: कडून खूपच होत आहे
translated_text: It's happening a lot.
Justification: Generic statement with no clear emotional content.

Text: गद्दारीचा डाव एकनाथ शिंदे यांनी दीड वर्षांपूर्वीच आखला होता : शिवसेना नेते जी
translated_text: Eknath Shinde had planned the plot of betrayal a year and a half ago: Shiv Sena leader Ji
Justification: Though it uses "गद्दारीचा डाव" (betrayal), it's attributed to someone else in reportive tone.

Text: विषय मागील वर्ष बद्दल सुरू आहे. त्यावर भुंक थोडा.. भाॅव भाॉव्व
translated_text: The topic is about last year. Let's talk a little about it.. Wow wow
Justification: "भुंक थोडा" (bark a little) and "भाॅव" repeated add absurdity, leading to surprise.

Text: आणि मार खाणारा अमर होत असणार
translated_text: And the one who is killed will become immortal.
Justification: Philosophical, lacks emotionally charged words.

Text: असं म्हणू नका कारण जनतेबरोबर तुम्हीच अन्याय आणि गद्दारी केली आहे...!
translated_text: Don't say that because you have committed injustice and betrayal against the people...!
Justification: Use of "अन्याय" (injustice) and "गद्दारी" reflect accusation and anger.

Text: साहेबांचा ह्यावेळी शिंदे साहेबांच्या संगतीत् बोलताना गडबड होत चालली आहे...
translated_text: It's getting awkward for Saheb to be talking in the company of Shinde Saheb at this time...
Justification: The word "गडबड" (awkwardness/mess) in this context shows unease and disgust.

Text: गद्दार नामशेष होणार हे नक्की
translated_text: Traitors will surely be wiped out.
Justification: Though strong, "नामशेष" (wiped out) is used in predictive tone without overt emotion.

Text: तुझ्याच उरावर बसवून घे शाह, मोदीला, हुकूमशाही आहे का राम्या.
translated_text: Put Shah and Modi on your lap, is this dictatorship, Ramya?
Justification: Phrases like "हुकूमशाही" (dictatorship) and "उरावर बसवून" imply humiliation and disgust.

Text: पुण्याची दुर्दशा यांच्यामुळे कशी झाली आहे, हे सध्याच्या पावसातून दिसून येत आहे ढिसाळ कारभार
translated_text: The current rains are showing how Pune's plight is due to their lax governance.
Justification: The phrase "ढिसाळ कारभार" (lax governance) is critical but fact-based.

Text: छगनराव भगतसिंग पन सरस्वती भक्त होते ! तांदुळचोर नव्हते
translated_text: Chhaganrao Bhagat Singh was also a devotee of Saraswati! He was not a rice thief.
Justification: Uses contrast, no emotional triggers.

Text: ही चालू डीपी आहे याची अवस्था बघा.
translated_text: Look at the status of this current DP.
Justification: Comment on status, not emotionally charged.

Text: हरामखोर आहे तो फडणवीस
translated_text: Fadnavis is a traitor.
Justification: "हरामखोर" (scoundrel) is an offensive slur indicating strong disgust.

Text: काकू हे सल्ले भाजप नेत्यांना द्या जे मुलींना जबरदस्तीने वेश्या व्यवसायासाठी प्रवृत्त करतात
translated_text: Aunty, give this advice to BJP leaders who force girls into prostitution
Justification: The phrase "जबरदस्तीने वेश्या व्यवसायासाठी" (forced into prostitution) evokes moral outrage and disgust.

Text: श्वानाला नमन श्वानाला नमन केलाय तुम्हाला नाही नाय तर गैरसमज करून घ्याल
translated_text: Bowing to the dog, bowing to the dog, you will not understand, otherwise
Justification: Poetic sarcasm, but emotionally neutral.

Text: जसे इतके दिवस अंधभक्त मिंधे ची धुणी धूत आहेत
translated_text: Just as blind devotees have been washing Mindhe's clothes for so long
Justification: Use of "अंधभक्त" is critical, but tone remains mockingly neutral.

Text: खरी शिवसेना कोणाची हे आता रस्त्यावर दिसेल. पोटनिवडणूक जिंकून रावणाचा वध होइल हे निश्चित!!
translated_text: Whose real Shiv Sena is will now be seen on the streets. It is certain that Ravana will be killed by winning the by-elections!!
Justification: "रावणाचा वध" (killing of Ravana) is metaphor for destroying evil, symbolizing anger.

Text: भक्तांच जीवनच ढापलेल आहे आज्जी. त्यामुळे दुसर्यांचही ढापलेलंच वाटणार.
translated_text: The lives of the devotees are being ruined, Aunty. Therefore, it seems that others are being ruined too.
Justification: "ढापलेल" (looted/taken away) shows suffering, evoking sadness.

Text: आजपर्यंत देशाची आर्थिक फसवणूक करणारी जमात,,,,,,,आणि हेच आपल्याला देश भक्ती शिकवणार?
translated_text: The people who have been defrauding the country financially till date,,,,,,,,and this is what will teach us patriotism?
Justification: The rhetorical sarcasm and use of "फसवणूक" (fraud) and "देश भक्ती शिकवणार?" (teach patriotism?) conveys anger.

Text: अरे संडास छाप तुमची सत्ता असून असे घडते याचा अर्थ काय चाटू
translated_text: Oh, you bastard, what does it mean that this happens when you have power?
Justification: Words like "संडास छाप" (toilet-grade) and "चाटू" (sycophant) indicate insult and strong anger.

Text: मुर्ख भक्त कशाचे पण समर्थन करतील सांगता येत नाही.
translated_text: There's no telling what foolish devotees will support.
Justification: Use of "मुर्ख भक्त" (foolish devotees) is sarcastic but not emotionally intense.

Text: तुमच्या सारखे डुक्कर आहेत म्हणून आज महाराष्ट्राचे हे हाल आहे, कुत्रं म्हणतो मराठी माणसाला...
translated_text: Maharashtra is in this situation today because of pigs like you, they call Marathi people dogs...
Justification: "डुक्कर" and "कुत्रं" are insults, but the sentence is presented in a resigned tone.

Text: देश खूप बदलला आहे, आधी कबुतर सोडली जात होती; आता बलात्काऱ्यांना सोडलं जात..!!
translated_text: The country has changed a lot, earlier pigeons were being released; now rapists are being released..!!
Justification: The contrast between "कबुतर" and "बलात्काऱ्यांना" heightens moral outrage, expressing anger.

Text: आता चा एवढा सन्मान होतो
translated_text: I feel so honored now.
Justification: "सन्मान" (honor) clearly reflects positive recognition and joy.

Text: अरे बेडका काही हि बोलतोस का ?
translated_text: Hey frog, are you talking?
Justification: The term "बेडका" (frog) is mocking, but overall tone is mildly humorous.

Text: हा तर त्या कुत्र्याचा अपमान होईल...
translated_text: This would be an insult to that dog...
Justification: Use of "अपमान" (insult) and comparison to "कुत्रा" (dog) show anger.

Text: बेअक्कल पत्रकार आहे ही
translated_text: This is a stupid journalist.
Justification: "बेअक्कल" (brainless) directly shows contempt, expressing disgust.

Text: ज्याचं ढुंगण ठोकायला निघाले होते त्यांच्याच ढुंगणावर जाऊन बसलात.. विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी.
translated_text: You sat on the buttocks of the one you were going to kick.. The opposite of wisdom in times of destruction.
Justification: The absurd and degrading imagery of "ढुंगण" (buttocks) expresses disgust.

Text: प्रशासन अधिकारी माजलेले आहेत. तरी मात्र शासन झोफले आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र.
translated_text: The administration officials are busy. However, the government is in a hurry. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: Although "माजलेले" (arrogant) is critical, the sentence is largely factual.

Text: तला पण निस्टांवत शिवसैनिक लागतो तुमच्या सारखा भटकलेला माणूस नाही
translated_text: Even a Shiv Sainik who is not a stray person like you needs to be killed.
Justification: "भटकलेला माणूस" (wandering man) adds insult, but the statement is more critical than emotional.

Text: महाराष्ट्राची आणि देशाची म्हणजे ॽ महाराष्ट्र कोणत्या देशात आहे ॽ
translated_text: Of Maharashtra and the country, which means ॽ In which country is Maharashtra located ॽ
Justification: Use of rhetorical "कोणत्या देशात आहे" is sarcastic but neutral.

Text: मतदारानी निवडून दिल आणि फुटीर झाले असा आमदारना असच धडा जनतेने शिकवला पाहिजे!
translated_text: The people should teach the MLAs a lesson that was chosen by the voters and then divided!
Justification: "धडा शिकवला पाहिजे" (teach a lesson) expresses discontent and anger.

Text: समाजकल्याण विभागाला अद्याप स्वतंत्र मंत्री देण्यात आला नाही. हा भाजपचा सामाजीक अन्याय आहे.
translated_text: The Social Welfare Department has not yet been given a separate minister. This is social injustice by the BJP.
Justification: Use of "सामाजीक अन्याय" (social injustice) is serious but stated in informative tone.

Text: तुझ्यासारखा नाही मी तात्या.
translated_text: I'm not like you, Tatya.
Justification: Comparison using "तुझ्यासारखा नाही" implies contempt, indicating disgust.

Text: असतात काही घरच्या अड़चनी सतत विचिरात पडलेला मुलगा प्रेमात पडलेल्या नसतो...
translated_text: There are some boys who are constantly worried about family problems and are not in love...
Justification: A personal, empathetic reflection with no intense emotion.

Text: अपात्र शिक्षक तुपाशी....आणि प्रामाणिक पात्र असलेले शिक्षणसेवक उपाशी.....वा रे... महाराष्ट्र सरकार...
translated_text: Unqualified teachers are with you....and honest and qualified education workers are starving.....Oh my... Maharashtra government...
Justification: Irony and contrast between "तुपाशी" (with ghee) and "उपाशी" (hungry) provoke surprise.

Text: हे फार काळ चालणार नाही... हिटलरचा अंत वाईट झाला होता... कम्युनिस्ट पक्षही अति साम्यवादामुळे संपला...
translated_text: This won't last long... Hitler had a bad end... The Communist Party also ended due to extreme communism...
