Text: सुज्ञ लोक त्याचा तिरस्कार करतात चाटु लोक अशिक्षित त्याला पाठिंबा देतात
translated_text: Wise people hate him, sycophants support him.
Justification: The word "तिरस्कार" denotes disgust.

Text: आयत्या बिळात नागोबा म्हणजे आदित्य ठाकरे.
translated_text: Nagoba in Aytya Bil is Aditya Thackeray.
Justification: The metaphor "आयत्या बिळात नागोबा" suggests entitlement, tone is satirical but neutral.

Text: कोल्हापूरची जागा मुर्खमंत्रीपद राखण्याकरिता सोडली हे कबूल केलयं कोंबड्याने !
translated_text: Admitted leaving Kolhapur seat for foolish ministry.
Justification: The phrase "कोंबड्याने" implies ridicule and disgust.

Text: असले लोक युवराज ला अक्कल शिकवताय अवघड आहे युवराज च.....!!!
translated_text: These people teaching Yuvraj common sense... impossible!
Justification: The phrase "अक्कल शिकवताय" implies insult and anger.

Text: हे मीपण केलं आहे + रिमोटच फोडून टाकला होता..
translated_text: I also did this, broke the remote...
Justification: The phrase "फोडून टाकला" shows frustration or aggression.

Text: काय हे? परुळेकर, आपणास मातृभाषेचा अभिमान बाळगण्याची आवशक्यता आहे.
translated_text: What is this? Parulekar, have pride in your mother tongue.
Justification: The phrase "काय हे?" conveys surprise.

Text: मेडन फर्माच्या उत्पादनाची चौकशीसाठी समिती नेमण्यात आली
translated_text: A committee has been appointed to investigate the firm.
Justification: The word "चौकशीसाठी" is procedural and factual.

Text: स्वतः च्या मुर्खतेवर स्वतः हसतं आहे. .
translated_text: Laughing at one’s own stupidity.
Justification: The phrase "हसतं आहे" is introspective, emotionally neutral.

Text: केस पडायला नको म्हणून बदलला का??
translated_text: Changed it to avoid hair loss?
Justification: The word "केस" is contextually trivial, keeping tone neutral.

Text: बरं हे पाठ झाल, मग आता पुढे??
translated_text: Okay, that’s done, what’s next?
Justification: The word "पुढे" shows transition, not emotion.

Text: होता होता राहीलेला निवडणूक
translated_text: The election was nearly missed.
Justification: The phrase "होता होता" is descriptive, not emotional.

Text: हा प्रश्न असा आहे की पाकीट शिवाय पत्रकारिता चालेल का ?
translated_text: Can journalism function without a wallet?
Justification: The word "पाकीट" implies funding concerns, tone is critical yet neutral.

Text: केशवा अरे बिकेसी वर फेकले गेले आहात तरी लाज नाही वाटत का भाजपा वाल्याना
translated_text: Thrown at BKC, yet no shame?
Justification: The word "लाज" implies moral questioning, tone is neutral.

Text: ओ काका उरला सुरला म्हणून मनसे ला का डिवचता
translated_text: Oh uncle, why are you criticizing MNS just because it's over?
Justification: The phrase "डिवचता" reflects unexpected provocation, indicating surprise.

Text: कोरोना संकटात राज्या ऐवजी केंद्र सरकारच्या निधीमधे देणगी देणारे भुरटे हे बोलत आहेत...
translated_text: Donating to central fund instead of state during Corona crisis...
Justification: The term "भुरटे" implies criticism, but tone remains factual.

Text: म्हणजे कायदा सगळ्यांसाठी वेगवेगळा आहे हे दाखवून द्यायचे आहे का तुम्हाला ?
translated_text: So the law is different for everyone?
Justification: The word "कायदा" refers to a legal system, tone remains critical but neutral.

Text: गद्दारीला जाळणारी आहे? .....मग आधी स्वतःच्या ढुंगणाला लावा.... हिंदुत्वाचे गद्दार
translated_text: Burn it on your own butt first... traitors of Hindutva.
Justification: The phrase "ढुंगणाला लावा" is vulgar and implies disgust.

Text: कसला अक्कलशून्य मनुष्य आहे हा!
translated_text: What a senseless man he is!
Justification: The word "अक्कलशून्य" reflects disappointment and sadness.

Text: असे पालक असल्यावर सहा लाख पण मिळाले वर्षाचे तर खूप आहेत.
translated_text: With such parents, six lakhs a year is too much.
Justification: The word "पालक" is used neutrally to discuss eligibility.

Text: घंटा उपयोग होणार आहे त्याचा.
translated_text: The bell is going to be useful.
Justification: The phrase "घंटा उपयोग" is sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: राज यांनी आपली गमावली आहे. अयोध्या दौरा आणि भाजपा वरची टीका बंध करून.
translated_text: Raj lost his momentum after stopping the Ayodhya tour and BJP criticism.
Justification: The word "गमावली" shows loss but not emotional emphasis.

Text: भयानक आहे हे..
translated_text: This is terrible..
Justification: The word "भयानक" directly expresses sadness or dread.

Text: छगन भुजबळ चा डोक्यात भुसा भरला आहे का?
translated_text: Is Bhujbal's head filled with straw?
Justification: The phrase "भुसा भरला" is mocking, indicating surprise.

Text: तुळजापूरला जाणा-या भाविकांचे चोरलेले मोबाईल जप्त; दोन अट्टल चोरट्यांना अटक
translated_text: Stolen mobiles of Tuljapur devotees seized
Justification: The term "चोरलेले" is factual in context.

Text: हे सगळे समर्थकांना संभ्रमात टाकणारे आहे.
translated_text: This confuses supporters.
Justification: The word "संभ्रमात" indicates confusion, tone is neutral.

Text: अवघड आहे. मराठी समलोचनाची मागणी केली म्हणून मनसेच्या नेत्यांवर गुन्हे दाखल.
translated_text: It's difficult. Cases filed against MNS leaders for Marathi commentary.
Justification: The phrase "अवघड आहे" indicates a challenging situation neutrally.

Text: रिकामटेकड्या लोकांना बोलवुन केलेल्या कार्यक्रमाला मेळावा नाही म्हणत !!
translated_text: Gathering of jobless people is not a rally!!
Justification: The word "रिकामटेकड्या" conveys disrespect, reflecting anger.

Text: जनतेने मोठ्या साहेबांच्या सख्ख्या पुतण्याला स्वीकारले नाही
translated_text: People didn’t accept the nephew of big boss...
Justification: The phrase "दाढी... सोंगाड्याची" reflects mockery and anger.

Text: अतिशय पावसानं भात शेती सडली आहे कशाला स्वतः ची इज्जत सडवता.
translated_text: Rice fields are rotten, why ruin your dignity?
Justification: The word "इज्जत सडवता" shows disgust.

Text: पत्राचाळ प्रकरणात जे जे आहेत त्यांना शिक्षा ही झालीच पाहिजे...
translated_text: Everyone in the Patrachal case must be punished.
Justification: The word "शिक्षा" expresses a demand for justice, showing anger.

Text: पत्रकारितेचा स्तर ओसरत आहे....
translated_text: Journalism is declining...
Justification: The word "ओसरत" is descriptive, tone is neutral.

Text: हा बघा अंधळा भक्त
translated_text: Look at this blind devotee
Justification: The term "अंधळा भक्त" conveys shock or ridicule.

Text: एक काळातील मनसे नेते हे विशेषण नाही दिलंत
translated_text: Didn’t call them former MNS leaders
Justification: The phrase "विशेषण नाही" reflects neutrality.

Text: अहंकारी आणि लाचारी हे दोन शब्द परफेक्ट तुमच्यासाठी!
translated_text: Arrogant and helpless are perfect words for you!
Justification: The phrase "परफेक्ट तुमच्यासाठी" reflects sarcasm interpreted as mock joy.

Text: भिकार...ट शांत बस मेल्या कशाक उगाच राग आणून देतस
translated_text: Beggar, keep quiet, why make me angry?
Justification: The word "राग आणून" expresses direct anger.

Text: गरज नस्ताना मदित पडु नये याचे जागते जानते उदारण म्हनजे हे
translated_text: Example of unnecessary help.
Justification: The phrase "जागते जानते" implies clarity, neutrally.

Text: ते अजित दादांना गृहमंत्री पद का नाही दिलं पात्रता नव्हती का ?
translated_text: Why wasn't Ajit Dada given Home Minister post?
Justification: The word "पात्रता" questions qualification, showing surprise.

Text: तुमचा आणि लॉजिक चा काही संबंध असेल असे वाटत नाही
translated_text: No connection with logic.
Justification: The word "लॉजिक" reflects criticism, neutral in emotion.

Text: “ही माघार तुमचा दिवाळी फराळ चवदार होऊ देणार नाही, अमोल मिटकरीचा भाजपाला टोला
translated_text: "This withdrawal will not allow your Diwali snacks to be tasty," Amol Mitkari slams BJP
Justification: The phrase "टोला" (slam) signals sharp criticism, reflecting anger.

Text: : टी विश्वचषकापूर्वी इंग्लड संघाला मोठा धक्का, ‘हा’ प्रमुख गोलंदाज स्पर्धेला मुकणार
translated_text: Big blow to England before T20 World Cup, key bowler to miss tournament
Justification: The phrase "मोठा धक्का" (big blow) reflects a sad sporting setback.

Text: इतकं पण समर्थन करू नये, भाजप ला ही निवडणूक तशीही जड झाली होती
translated_text: Don't support it so much; the election was tough for BJP
Justification: The term "समर्थन" (support) is used factually.

Text: तुम्ही कसे खेळता याची तुम्हाला लाज वाटते का?
translated_text: Are you ashamed of how you play?
Justification: The word "लाज" (ashamed) reflects disapproval or disgust.

Text: प्रबोधनकार…बाळासाहेब…उध्वस्तरावांना स्वताचे अस्तित्व नेतृत्व नाही हे मान्य केलेले आहे सगळ्यांनी!
translated_text: Everyone has accepted they have no real leadership
Justification: The phrase "नेतृत्व नाही" expresses a strong lack of respect, showing anger.

Text: च्या कार्यकर्त्यांना अटक केल्यानंतर पुण्यात पाकिस्तान झिंदाबाद, अल्लाहू अकबर अशी घोषणाबाजी
translated_text: Slogans like Pakistan Zindabad raised in Pune after arrests
Justification: The phrase "घोषणाबाजी" (chanting slogans) reflects disgust in this context.

Text: हापापला कुत्रा... ज्याला सर्व हवं आहे हे चिन्ह उत्तम असेल
translated_text: Greedy dog... this would be a perfect sign
Justification: The phrase "हापापला कुत्रा" is clearly offensive and signals anger.

Text: होता म्हणजे ? गेला की काय ?
translated_text: Was it? Did it go or what?
Justification: The phrase "गेला की काय" is a surprised expression.

Text: अरे मग ती एका पक्षातील दोन गट एकमेकाशी कश्यासाठी भांडत आहेत
translated_text: Why are two groups in the same party fighting?
Justification: The phrase "भांडत आहेत" suggests unexpected internal conflict.

Text: कोणालाच नाही कारण दिवंगत नेत्यांच्या घरच्यांना बिनविरोध निवडून देणे ही आपल्या महाराष्ट्राची संस्कृती आहे.!
translated_text: Electing family of deceased leaders unopposed is our culture!
Justification: The phrase "बिनविरोध निवडून" implies nepotism, evoking disgust.

Text: संकट ही संकट
translated_text: A crisis is a crisis
Justification: The word "संकट" is repeated, used neutrally to express a difficult situation.

Text: तेच... स्वतःला काय मंत्री / महत्वाची पदाधिकारी समजते का
translated_text: Does she think she’s a minister or important official?
Justification: The phrase "समजते का" suggests rhetorical questioning, neutral tone.

Text: किती ही बेईज्जती आहे.
translated_text: What an insult.
Justification: The word "बेईज्जती" (insult) directly expresses disgust.

Text: पण मुली शोधतांना त्रास होतो नंतर हे अत्यंत वेदनादायक असतं
translated_text: Searching for girls later becomes painful
Justification: The word "वेदनादायक" (painful) conveys sadness.

Text: भाजप सरकारचे हे चुकीचे पाऊल असून ते खरोखरच अन्यायकारक आहे.
translated_text: BJP's wrong step is truly unjust
Justification: The word "अन्यायकारक" (unjust) is a strong signal of anger.

Text: प्रकल्प गेला त्याच दुःख नाहीये, कमिशन दुबल त्याची खद खद आहे हि.
translated_text: Sad not for project, but weak commission
Justification: The word "खद खद" expresses disappointment, a form of sadness.

Text: कसला उत्तम निर्णय?? आता सगळे गटार भरतील..
translated_text: Great decision? Now sewers will be full
Justification: The sarcasm in "उत्तम निर्णय" suggests bitter joy or irony.

Text: लायकी आहे का रे, भ्रष्टाचाराच्या किड्यांनो
translated_text: Do you deserve it, worms of corruption?
Justification: The phrase "किड्यांनो" is harsh but used without strong emotion.

Text: नाही अपेक्षा कधीच ठेवली नाही फक्त चीड व्यक्त केली सर्वच एका माळेचे मणी
translated_text: Never had expectations, just expressed annoyance
Justification: The phrase "एकाच माळेचे मणी" refers to sameness, neutrally.

Text: आधी लुटायचा मस्त आणि हे नाटक करायची.
translated_text: First robbed happily, then played this drama
Justification: The phrase "नाटक करायची" implies pretension, used flatly.

Text: तुमच्या साहेबांना कधी तरी घरा बाहेर पडायला सांगा.
translated_text: Ask your boss to step outside sometime
Justification: The word "सांगा" is directive but not emotionally charged.

Text: हो का? आतापर्यंत , जणांना अटक दोघांना फाशी झाली?
translated_text: Really? So far two arrested and hanged?
Justification: The phrase "हो का?" clearly expresses surprise.

Text: अर्थ गणित हे तुझ्या डोक्या बाहेरच आहे!
translated_text: Arithmetic is out of your understanding!
Justification: The phrase "डोक्या बाहेर" implies confusion, but is neutrally stated.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस नालायक माणूस आहे. स्वतःच्या पोलिसांवर विश्वास नाही त्याचा. रामखोर लेकाचा
translated_text: Fadnavis is useless. Doesn't trust own police.
Justification: The term "नालायक" is harsh, but the context is matter-of-fact.

Text: आता कळलं, लोकं विश करतात आणि केक का खाऊ घालतात
translated_text: Now I know why people wish and eat cake
Justification: "केक" reflects cultural commentary neutrally.

Text: हे अत्यंत दुर्दैवी आहे. विद्यार्थ्यांना न्याय मिळाला पाहिजे.
translated_text: This is very unfortunate. Students deserve justice.
Justification: "दुर्दैवी" reflects deep sadness.

Text: गृहमंत्री काय उपटताय का कोणाच्या भात्या
translated_text: Whose rice is the Home Minister uprooting?
Justification: "उपटताय" used in rhetorical tone, neutral.

Text: ऊम्मेदवार मागे घेतला पत्र मिळताच …आता जाहीर करणार का ?
translated_text: Will they announce after withdrawal letter?
Justification: "जाहीर करणार" implies procedural neutrality.

Text: तुमचं पण जुनं भाषण पोस्ट करा की गद्दारी करायच्या आधीचा
translated_text: Post your old speech before you betrayed.
Justification: "गद्दारी" mentioned, but stated flatly.

Text: गद्दार पाळला साहेब तुम्ही वेळीच ओळखायला पाहिजे होते
translated_text: You should have identified the traitor earlier.
Justification: "गद्दार" carries a tone of contempt.

Text: श्वेत पत्रिकेसाठी उत्पन्न मर्यादा खूप कमी ठेवली आहे
translated_text: Income limit for white card is too low.
Justification: "उत्पन्न मर्यादा" reflects policy critique neutrally.

Text: ते जनते ला ठरवू द्या शाळा बंदी चा निर्णय मागे घ्या
translated_text: Let the public decide, withdraw school closure
Justification: "शाळा बंदी" represents neutral public concern.

Text: ही अक्कल फक्त शास्त्राच्या परीक्षेला इतिहासाची उत्तर...
translated_text: This is the intelligence of someone who writes history in science exams
Justification: "अक्कल" used sarcastically but neutral.

Text: भाजप. कोल्ह्याला द्राक्ष आंबट.
translated_text: Fox finds grapes sour (used sarcastically).
Justification: "द्राक्ष आंबट" is a Marathi idiom, neutral sarcasm.

Text: संजय राठोडयांचा गुन्हा पदरात घालन्या एवढं सोपं नाही
translated_text: Exposing Rathod’s crime is not easy
Justification: "गुन्हा" implies misconduct but is used neutrally.

Text: तुझ्या पोटात का पोटशूळ उठतोय मग काय भोंगा वाजवायचा काय?
translated_text: Why’s your stomach upset? Should I sound the horn?
Justification: "पोटशूळ" conveys internal anxiety, i.e. fear.

Text: कुठं आहे हे पिस्तूल राजीनामा नाही देणार हे माहीत आहे सर्वाँना
translated_text: Everyone knows they won’t resign
Justification: "राजीनामा" used matter-of-factly.

Text: नितेश राणे नाही हा, हा नितेश थापा आहे.
translated_text: Not Nitesh Rane, this is Nitesh Thapa
Justification: "थापा" reflects name-based wordplay, neutral.

Text: वर्ल्ड चॅम्पियन संघाला हरवलं... आयर्लंडनं उघडलं खातं
translated_text: Ireland opened its account beating world champions
Justification: "उघडलं खातं" reflects neutral reporting.

Text: आयुष्य पुन्हा पुन्हा मिळत नाही... आयुष्याची किंमत...
translated_text: Life isn’t repeated. People don’t value it.
Justification: "किंमत" implies life’s neglected value.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार ही देशाला लागलेली कीड आहे : देवेंद्र फडणवीस
translated_text: Corruption is a national plague: Fadnavis
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचार" framed as societal issue, neutral.

Text: नुसते ट्रोलिंग म्हणजे राजकारण नाही रे .
translated_text: Trolling isn’t politics
Justification: "ट्रोलिंग" criticizes behavior, but neutrally.

Text: राज ठाकरे सारखा सुसंस्कृत नेता... मुख्यमंत्री नसणे... दुर्दैव!
translated_text: Cultured Raj Thackeray not being CM is a misfortune!
Justification: "दुर्दैव" used to show surprise at perceived injustice.

Text: आपल्याला वाटून काय उपयोग आहे त्यांना वाटलं पाहिजेल.
translated_text: They should feel it, not us
Justification: "वाटलं पाहिजेल" reflects resignation, neutral.

Text: हा बघा पडद्या मागचा खरा चेहरा
translated_text: Here’s the true face behind the curtain
Justification: "खरा चेहरा" used metaphorically, neutral.

Text: भातखळकर... कॉमेंट वाचत जा राव.... लाज विकून भजी खाल्ली...
translated_text: Sold shame for fritters — sarcastic but neutral.
Justification: "लाज विकून" reflects mild contempt, flat tone.

Text: सुबोध भावे हे नाव बघितल्यावरच कळाल हा सिनेमा आपल्यासाठी नाही
translated_text: By the name Subodh Bhave, I knew it’s not for me
Justification: "सुबोध भावे" used neutrally to express opinion.

Text: तुम्ही विझलेले दिवे परत का फडफडताय
translated_text: Why are you rekindling the extinguished lights?
Justification: "विझलेले दिवे" symbolizes something past unexpectedly revived.

Text: ला विधानसभाच बरखास्त होणार आहे तू काय राजीनामा देणार चुतिया कुठला
translated_text: The assembly is going to be dissolved, will you resign, you idiot?
Justification: "चुतिया" reflects verbal aggression indicating anger.

Text: ज्याचे पळून गेले तो सल्ले देणार का...
translated_text: Will the one who ran away give advice?
Justification: "पळून गेले" used critically but flatly.

Text: कसलं हरत आहात असे कळल्यार उपरती झाली...
translated_text: Once I realized I was losing, I was shocked...
Justification: "उपरती" implies an unexpected realization.

Text: सेनेमध्ये असताना कधी यांना अभिवादन केले का
translated_text: Did they ever salute when in Sena?
Justification: "अभिवादन" used in rhetorical neutrality.

Text: देवाने याना बावन्न कुळे देण्यापेकक्षा बावनडोकें देयला हवी होती
translated_text: God should've given them 52 heads instead of clans.
Justification: "बावनडोकें" is a term of mockery and disgust.

Text: तुला कुत्र्यागत मारला आहे त्यानी
translated_text: You've been beaten like a dog.
Justification: "कुत्र्यागत" is metaphorical for humiliation.

Text: ह्याचं होणार आहे का हेच काम करणार
translated_text: Will this be done?
Justification: "होणार आहे" carries procedural neutrality.

Text: मग मी काही वेगळं बोललो का?
translated_text: Did I say anything different?
Justification: "वेगळं बोललो" rhetorical but neutral.

Text: भाजप ने तुम्हाला जोकर बनवलं आहे
translated_text: BJP made you a clown
Justification: "जोकर" implies mocking tone as humorous.

Text: तुमच्या बायका उघड्यावरच का अजुनही
translated_text: Why are your wives still out in the open?
Justification: "उघड्यावरच" suggests surprise at lack of progress.

Text: त्याची गरज नाही पडणार हे सरकार कोसळणार
translated_text: No need, this government will fall
Justification: "कोसळणार" predicts collapse with sorrow.

Text: जेनोसाईडची भाषा... गोवारी हत्याकांड...
translated_text: Language of genocide, Gowari massacre...
Justification: "हत्याकांड" evokes disgust through historical reference.

Text: स्वायत्त संस्था नावाला आहेत... दबावाखाली काम
translated_text: Institutions work under pressure
Justification: "दबावाखाली" neutral institutional critique.

Text: मिंदे साहेब हे काय करून बसलात
translated_text: Minde Saheb, what have you done?
Justification: "काय करून बसलात" is questioning, neutral.

Text: आनलेत का इथेही मधात हींदु?
translated_text: Did Hindus meddle here too?
Justification: "मधात" used rhetorically but flat.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार पुन्हा चव्हाट्यावर... ढेकणांच काहीतरी करा
translated_text: Corruption exposed again, do something about the pests.
Justification: "ढेकणांच" is pejorative for incompetents.

Text: येवधा पुळका मागल्या वर्षात येत न्हवता
translated_text: Such sentiment wasn't seen last year
Justification: "पुळका" implies fake sentiment, neutral.

Text: बाप चोरला, शिवसेना चोरली, उमेदवारही...
translated_text: Everything from party to candidate stolen
Justification: "पाकीटमाराचेच गुण" is sarcasm, but stated neutrally.

Text: शिवाजी महाराजांचा बाजार केला
translated_text: Market made of Shivaji Maharaj
Justification: "बाजार" implies commercial disrespect, neutrally.

Text: अभ्यास पण करू वाटतंय पैसे पण कमी पडतात...
translated_text: Want to study but no money
Justification: "पैसे पण कमी" signals emotional struggle.

Text: बालिश पणाचा कळस आहे मनसे हा पक्ष
translated_text: MNS is peak childishness
Justification: "बालिश पणाचा कळस" is a flat insult, neutral.

Text: समोरच्या कडून ऐकायचं तेच वदवून घेणे
translated_text: Forcing others to say what you want
Justification: "वदवून घेण्याचा" is a rhetorical behavior.

Text: जिभ घसरली नाही, हे जाणून बुजून वक्तव्य
translated_text: It was a deliberate statement
Justification: "जाणून बुजून" indicates intent, not emotion.

Text: माघार घ्यायची होती मग उमेदवार पळवण्याचा प्रयत्न का केला?
translated_text: Why try to run candidate if withdrawing?
Justification: "कपटी" expresses betrayal and anger.

Text: त्या सिंधुदुर्ग मधील नेपाळयांचे फोटो
translated_text: Photos of Nepalis from Sindhudurg
Justification: "लाज वाटते" signals nationalistic disgust

Text: हे बघ रे. मी ब्लॉक आहे. टाक बरं
translated_text: Look at this. I'm blocked. Just leave it.
Justification: "ब्लॉक" indicates conversational tone without emotional charge.

Text: आज पुणे पाण्यात का गेल ह्यांच उत्तर द्या आधी
translated_text: First answer why Pune is flooded today.
Justification: "पाण्यात" signals a factual query about a civic issue.

Text: म्हणून एवढा भ्रष्टाचार आहे
translated_text: That's why there is so much corruption.
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचार" directly signals disgust at the system.

Text: आता वेळ आली आहे त्या बीजेपी आरोपिना शिक्षा दया
translated_text: Time to punish BJP accused.
Justification: "शिक्षा" used in an assertive, neutral demand.

Text: धक्कादायक!! ऑस्ट्रेलियाविरुद्धच्या सामन्यापूर्वी...
translated_text: Shocking! Crores demanded before match.
Justification: "धक्कादायक" reflects unexpectedness.

Text: शासनाने तत्काळ हा निर्णय मागे घ्यावा
translated_text: The govt must withdraw this decision.
Justification: "जुलमी निर्णय" shows frustration with governance.

Text: नेत्यांना आमच्या देवदेवतांबद्दल एवढी चीड का?
translated_text: Why such anger about our deities?
Justification: "चीड" shows surprise at religious intolerance.

Text: साहेबांबद्दल अस बोलताना लाज नाही वाटत का
translated_text: No shame talking like this about elder?
Justification: "लाज" signals moral disgust.

Text: ह्याच्यात स्वतःच्या नावाने कंमेन्ट करायची हिम्मत नाही
translated_text: Doesn't dare to comment in own name.
Justification: "हिम्मत" questions integrity, neutrally.

Text: मुर्जीचि भुर्जी होणार म्हणून घेतली माघार
translated_text: Withdrew fearing defeat.
Justification: "भुर्जी" as metaphor, neutral sarcasm.

Text: अति लाड झाले की त्याचे परिणाम दिसतात
translated_text: Over-pampering leads to consequences.
Justification: "अति लाड" signals behavior cause, neutrally.

Text: हा कार्यक्रम बंद करायला हवा
translated_text: This program should be stopped.
Justification: "बंद करायला" is a strong call to action.

Text: हे झाड खूपच धोकादायक स्थितीत
translated_text: The tree is in a dangerous condition.
Justification: "धोकादायक" indicates fear and caution.

Text: वास्तवता आहे ही इथल्या समाजाची
translated_text: This is the reality of our society.
Justification: "वास्तविकता" delivers critique without emotion.

Text: त्यांनी बाप काढला होता काल
translated_text: He lost his father yesterday.
Justification: "बाप काढला" represents personal loss.

Text: केशवाची चांगली करपलेली दिसते
translated_text: Keshav seems exposed.
Justification: "करपलेली" indicates exposure, not emotional.

Text: काही खरं दिसतं नाही
translated_text: Nothing feels right.
Justification: "खरं दिसतं नाही" shows disillusionment.

Text: दरवर्षीच होतं, तुम्ही काय नवीन केलं
translated_text: This happens every year. What's new?
Justification: "खिशातून दिले" is rhetorical neutrality.

Text: असल्या गटार तोंड्या वाचाळ प्रवक्त्या
translated_text: Mouthy spokespersons
Justification: "गटार तोंड्या" is insult expressing disgust.

Text: सर्व भ्रष्टाचारी महाशक्तीकडे आहेत
translated_text: All corrupts are in power.
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचारी" targets governance with disgust.

Text: शिंदे कडून व्हीजन ची अपेक्षा करणं म्हणजे अतिच
translated_text: Expecting vision is too much.
Justification: "अतिच" conveys excess, flatly.

Text: मंग चुत्या तुझ्या आहे का ?
translated_text: Is it yours, idiot?
Justification: "चुत्या" adds crudeness but is in neutral tone.

Text: अंतर्गत मारामारी झाली तरी बाहेरची हत्यारं नको
translated_text: No external weapons despite inner conflict.
Justification: "हत्यारं" refers to escalation, neutral stance.

Text: शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना कोटी कोटी नमन
translated_text: Salute to martyrs.
Justification: "हुतात्म्यांना" is respectful, not emotional.

Text: शंभूल्या लायकी पाहून बोल रे
translated_text: Speak with merit.
Justification: "गद्दार" suggests moral disapproval neutrally.

Text: तानाजी सावंत नंतर अशी विधान केल्यास चड्डित खेकडे सोडण्यात येतील.
translated_text: If Tanaji Sawant makes such a statement later, the evil crabs will be released.
Justification: "खेकडे" is used metaphorically, showing figurative intensity in a neutral context.

Text: नवं चिन्ह मिळालं खरं पण उद्धव ठाकरेंची डोकेदुखी वाढली!
translated_text: It's true they got a new symbol, but Thackeray's headache increased!
Justification: "डोकेदुखी" reveals surprise or worry due to new developments.

Text: दिवसाढवळ्या मराठी दुकानदार आणि महिलांना बेदम मारहाण
translated_text: Marathi shopkeepers and women brutally beaten in broad daylight
Justification: "बेदम मारहाण" indicates physical brutality, evoking disgust.

Text: आत्तापर्यंत हे बोलायला काय तोंडात शेण भरल होत का?
translated_text: Was there dung in the mouth to not speak till now?
Justification: "तोंडात शेण" is sarcastic but delivers neutral criticism.

Text: अतुल सुतार यांना झाले अजीर्ण
translated_text: Atul Sutar got indigestion.
Justification: "अजीर्ण" is literal but used to express weariness.

Text: हा निखिल वागल्या तर कम्युनिस्ट निघाला
translated_text: Nikhil turned out to be a communist.
Justification: "कम्युनिस्ट" is a labeling term, neutrally stated.

Text: कल्माबईचा नवरा उभा केला होता काय
translated_text: Was Kalmabai’s husband raised?
Justification: "उभा केला" is a question without emotion.

Text: हा डोक्यातला अंधार आहे
translated_text: This is the darkness in the head.
Justification: "अंधार" used as metaphor for ignorance.

Text: भाजपच्या पायाखालची जमीन सरकली
translated_text: Ground beneath BJP’s feet shifted.
Justification: "जमीन सरकली" implies change in power dynamics.

Text: जनतेच्या न्यायालयाने दिलेला निकाल आठवला का?
translated_text: Remember the verdict given by people’s court?
Justification: "न्यायालयाने निकाल" is referenced to common sense neutrally.

Text: दुसरे गांडूची औलाद म्हणून जगणारे
translated_text: Living as the child of a worm.
Justification: "गांडूची औलाद" shows extreme contempt and disgust.

Text: हे लाॅजीक जबरदस्त आहे
translated_text: This logic is overwhelming.
Justification: "लाॅजीक" is emphasized neutrally.

Text: आयघाल्याला भर चौकात गोळ्या घालून ठार करा
translated_text: Shoot this idiot in public.
Justification: "गोळ्या घालून" reflects intense anger and violent language.

translated_text: First come up with a plan and then promote it.
Justification: The word "प्रचार" indicates a neutral political statement.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री एकनाथ शिंदे मात्र आपल्या कामात मश्गुल आहेत.
translated_text: CM Shinde is busy with his work.
Justification: The word "मश्गुल" implies involvement, not emotion.

Text: शांत बस मला लय काम आहेत दिवाळी झाली की ये
translated_text: Be quiet, I have work. Come after Diwali.
Justification: The phrase "लय काम आहेत" is logistical, not emotional.

Text: सगळयात पहिलं नाव म्हणजे आशिष जाधव.
translated_text: The first name is Ashish Jadhav.
Justification: The word "पहिलं नाव" is just identification.

Text: हो आता देवा च्या भरवशावरच जगाच.
translated_text: Now we must live with God’s trust.
Justification: The word "भरवशावर" expresses faith, leaning neutral.

Text: मनीष सिसोदिया हे च्या कार्यालयात चौकशीसाठी पोहोचले
translated_text: Manish Sisodia reached the office for questioning.
Justification: The word "चौकशीसाठी" implies investigation, not emotion.

Text: माणूस किती आतला आणि किती बाहेरचा...
translated_text: How much a person is inside or outside.
Justification: The metaphor is philosophical but neutral.

Text: हिच परस्थिती मी हि कित्येकदा अनुभवली आहे
translated_text: I’ve experienced this many times.
Justification: The word "अनुभवली" is reflective, not emotional.

Text: इतभराच हातभर होण्याच्या अगोदर ईलाज केलेला बरं नव्ह का
translated_text: Treatment should have been done earlier.
Justification: The word "ईलाज" is clinical and neutral.

Text: राष्ट्रवादीच्या सिलॅबस आणि अजेंडा वरच ऊबाठा सेने मध्ये काम करत
translated_text: Working in Sena on NCP’s agenda.
Justification: The phrase "अजेंडा वरच" is factual and neutral.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे भाऊ
translated_text: That’s right, brother.
Justification: The phrase "बरोबर आहे" is agreement, neutral.

Text: नागपूरकराणा विचार येत आहे... कोणता पाऊस आहे हा
translated_text: Nagpurkarana is thinking — what kind of rain is this?
Justification: The phrase "पाऊस आहे हा" questions weather conditions neutrally.

Text: हे जनतेचे सरकार
translated_text: This is the people's government.
Justification: The word "जनतेचे" reflects claim of representation, neutral.

Text: आपली माहिती वाहतूक नियंत्रण कक्ष, ठाणे शहर यांना आवश्यक कारवाईसाठी कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Your info has been reported to Traffic Control, Thane.
Justification: "कारवाईसाठी कळविली" indicates procedure, not emotion.

Text: केसगळती का होते? जाणून घ्या कारणं आणि उपाय!
translated_text: Why does hair fall happen? Know causes and solutions!
Justification: "का होते?" expresses curiosity and surprise.

Text: अमोल साहेब रुमण्याचा प्रसाद नाही मनायच रूमण्याचा हाबाडा मानायच आणि तो अमी देणार
translated_text: Not to celebrate Rumna’s prasad, but accept the dhabaad, says Ami.
Justification: "रूमण्याचा हाबाडा" is a colloquial expression with no strong emotion.

Text: कधी आहे महाशिवरात्र , जाणून घ्या पूजेचा मुहूर्त
translated_text: When is Mahashivratri, know the time of worship
Justification: "पूजेचा मुहूर्त" is informative and ritual-based.

Text: विलेपार्लेतील नाल्यालगत झोपड्यांच्या पुनर्वसनाचा प्रश्न ऐरणीवर; मंगळवारी होणार बैठक
translated_text: Slum rehab in Vile Parle to be discussed in a meeting.
Justification: "पुनर्वसनाचा प्रश्न" refers to policy, not emotion.

Text: आता ते दोघं माकड उड्या तर मग झाडं तर सुचणार ना!!
translated_text: If those monkeys jump, trees will respond!
Justification: "माकड उड्या" is mocking, shows anger.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार होत आहे का
translated_text: Is corruption happening?
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचार" is a strong word but here posed neutrally.

Text: बाहेरच्या लोकांनी शिव्या दिल्यावर चालतील का?
translated_text: Will it work if outsiders curse?
Justification: "शिव्या दिल्यावर" is situational and framed as a question.

Text: आजोबा श्रद्धा व सबुरीला पण धरल होत ना त्यांनी..
translated_text: Grandpa held onto faith and patience.
Justification: "श्रद्धा व सबुरी" are spiritual, emotionally calm.

Text: राजेश पाटील नाही येत आता त्यामुळे असंच चालणार कारभार
translated_text: Rajesh Patil not coming, so things continue.
Justification: "कारभार" relates to governance, neutral tone.

Text: ₹ कमी नाही होत $ खूप स्ट्रॉग होतो म्हणून
translated_text: ₹ not falling as $ is strong.
Justification: "₹ कमी नाही" is economic commentary.

Text: विकास का ह्या किरण माने च एवढं ऐकतो?
translated_text: Why does Vikas listen to Kiran Mane so much?
Justification: "ऐकतो?" implies surprise at attention given.

Text: का तुम्हाला काही अडचण आहे का
translated_text: Do you have any problem?
Justification: "अडचण" is mentioned hypothetically.

Text: साहेब म्हणत होते ती हवेली का?
translated_text: Is that the mansion sir spoke of?
Justification: "हवेली" evokes sudden recall, mildly surprising.

Text: सांगणारे आहेत चालतील का...भाऊ तोरसेकर यांना फॉलो करा....
translated_text: Are these advisors okay...follow Bhau Torsekar.
Justification: "फॉलो करा" is directive, emotionally neutral.

Text: गॅस सिलेंडर आता रुपयाला मिळत अस ऐकलं ??
translated_text: Heard gas cylinder now at that rate??
Justification: "ऐकलं ??" clearly marks surprise.

Text: नाही हो काका तुम्ही अजून तरुण आहात..
translated_text: No uncle, you’re still young.
Justification: "अजून तरुण" is compliment but calmly stated.

Text: मंगळवारी अमावस्या आहे की पौर्णिमा?
translated_text: Is Tuesday Amavasya or Pournima?
Justification: "अमावस्या की पौर्णिमा" is a factual query.

Text: मलबार हिल मतदार संघ शाकाहारीं घोषित करण्यासाठी...
translated_text: Plan to declare Malabar Hill vegetarian.
Justification: "शाकाहारीं घोषित" is a policy statement.

Text: सत्तेपेक्षा लोकसेवेला महत्व देणारे म्हणजे देवेंद्रजी
translated_text: Devendraji values public service over power.
Justification: "लोकसेवेला महत्व" shows principle, not emotion.

Text: व्हिडिओचा कमेंट सेक्शन बॉक्स बंद आहे .
translated_text: Comment section is closed.
Justification: "बंद आहे" states a condition, no emotion.

Text: व्वा मित्रांनो, हे आश्चर्यकारक असेल, तुम्ही ते चुकवू नका
translated_text: Wow, this will be amazing, don’t miss it.
Justification: "व्वा मित्रांनो" expresses delight.

Text: नोव्हेंबरपासून दूध स्विकारले जाणार नाही....
translated_text: Milk won’t be accepted from November.
Justification: "स्विकारले जाणार नाही" suggests a loss.

Text: कुठून आणला होता रात्रीचा माल
translated_text: Where did you get the dinner goods from?
Justification: "रात्रीचा माल" is an inquiry, emotionally flat.

Text: हा इगतपुरी...
translated_text: This is Igatpuri...
Justification: "इगतपुरी" is a location, emotionally neutral.

Text: भाऊ ही शकुंतला आहे माझी
translated_text: Brother, this is my Shakuntala.
Justification: "शकुंतला" is a name reference, not emotional.

Text: मग दर का कमी होत नाही?
translated_text: Then why isn’t the rate going down?
Justification: "दर का कमी" is economic, fact-focused.

Text: या मुंबई सोबत प्रामाणिक रहा...या मातीशी गद्दार पणा करू नका...सगळ्यांना पोसते ही मुंबई...
translated_text: Be honest with this Mumbai...don't be a traitor to this land...this Mumbai feeds everyone...
Justification: The emotion anger is triggered by the phrase "गद्दार पणा करू नका" (gaddar pana karu naka), meaning "don't be a traitor." This expresses strong disapproval and condemnation, indicative of anger.

Text: यामध्ये लोहपुरूष सरदार पटेल यांनीच आरएसएसवर बंदी घातली होती, हे लक्षात ठेवायला हवे." -लालूप्रसाद यादव
translated_text: It should be remembered that it was the Iron Man Sardar Patel who banned the RSS." -Lalu Prasad Yadav
Justification: The sentence presents a historical fact ("RSएसवर बंदी घातली होती" - banned the RSS) attributed to Sardar Patel. The overall tone is neutral as it simply states a past event without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: चांगल काम करा म्हणजे ची गरज भासणार नाही.
translated_text: Do a good job and you won't need it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a pragmatic advice ("चांगल काम करा") without strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "चांगल काम करा" (do a good job) indicates a suggestion rather than expressing any particular emotion.

Text: कोण मोजत हा इंडेक्स
translated_text: Who is calculating this index?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the interrogative nature of "कोण मोजत" (kon mojat), which translates to "who is calculating?" and indicates surprise or inquiry rather than any positive or negative feeling.

Text: मि एक कट्टर राजनीतिविरोधक आहे पन आता उद्धव ठाकरे सोबत आहे ।
translated_text: I am a staunch political opponent, but now I am with Uddhav Thackeray.
Justification: The sentence expresses a shift in allegiance. While the person identifies as a "कट्टर राजनीतिविरोधक" (staunch political opponent), suggesting potential negative sentiment towards politics in general, the phrase "आता उद्धव ठाकरे सोबत आहे" (now I am with Uddhav Thackeray) indicates a current state of support, neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे माझ्यावर नाराज नाही होणार ते....!! असंच ना.....??
translated_text: So he won't be angry with me....!! Isn't that right...??
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and seeks confirmation, mitigating any strong sentiment. While the underlying emotion is "anger" (presumably related to the potential anger of the person being discussed), the phrase "नाराज नाही होणार ते....!! असंच ना.....??" (naraz nahi honar te....!! asach na...?? - won't be angry with me...!! Isn't that right...??) indicates a desire to avoid anger and seeks reassurance, leading to a neutral sentiment score.

Text: आदरणीय आशिष सर नमस्कार आपल्या वाढदिवस निमित्त माझे विचार पाहिले का.
translated_text: Respected Ashish Sir, hello, have you seen my thoughts on your birthday?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it consists of respectful greetings ("आदरणीय आशिष सर नमस्कार") and a polite inquiry ("माझे विचार पाहिले का"). There are no overtly positive or negative words or phrases.

Text: बुडीत खोल जाते पण बिनधारेची तलवार! साहेबाला विचार हवं तर!
translated_text: The sword goes deep into the depths, but it is an edgeless sword! If you want to think, sir!
Justification: The assigned disgust stems from the phrase "बिनधारेची तलवार" (bindharechi talwar), meaning "edgeless sword." This implies ineffectiveness and uselessness, evoking a feeling of disgust.

Text: कारण मनमोहन सिंह लसूण खात होते आणि ही खात नाही
translated_text: Because Manmohan Singh used to eat garlic and she doesn't.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual difference ("खात होते आणि ही खात नाही" - used to eat and she doesn't) without expressing any opinion or emotional charge. The difference in eating habits is presented plainly.

Text: | इंग्लंडने टॉस जिंकला, भारत करणार प्रथम फलंदाजी
translated_text: | England wins the toss, India will bat first
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event (England wins the toss, India will bat first). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion; hence, it is neutral. The entire sentence, especially the factual reporting of "इंग्लंडने टॉस जिंकला, भारत करणार प्रथम फलंदाजी" contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरे गट शिवसेनेच्या तेरावा, वर्षश्राद्धाला पण एकत्र जाणार आहेत
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray group will also attend Shiv Sena's thirteenth and annual Shraddha together
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("उद्धव ठाकरे गट शिवसेनेच्या तेरावा, वर्षश्राद्धाला पण एकत्र जाणार आहेत"), describing attendance at a religious ceremony. There are no words expressing positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: आरोग्य विभागाची पुन्हा परीक्षा व्हावी. ड क ज्याने कोरोना काळात काम केले त्यांची नियुक्ती व्हावी..
translated_text: The health department should be re-examined. Those who worked during the Corona period should be appointed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily states facts and desires a specific action ("आरोग्य विभागाची पुन्हा परीक्षा व्हावी," "आरोग्य विभागाची पुन्हा परीक्षा व्हावी") and suggests a course of action ("ज्याने कोरोना काळात काम केले त्यांची नियुक्ती व्हावी"). There's no inherently positive or negative language used.

Text: सुन कशी आहे????? सुरक्षित आहे ना राहत्या घरी
translated_text: How is your son??????? Is he safe at home?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the repeated question marks "??????" and the concern for well-being indicated by "सुरक्षित आहे ना" (surakshit aahe na - is he safe?), suggesting unexpected anxiety.

Text: गो-रक्षेच्या नावाखाली हैदोस माजवणाऱ्या भाजपवाल्यांना आता गायींचा विसर पडला का?
translated_text: Have the BJP people, who are creating havoc in the name of cow protection, now forgotten about cows?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question and expresses a critical observation rather than a strong positive or negative sentiment. While the phrase "हैदोस माजवणाऱ्या" (creating havoc) might suggest negativity, the overall tone is questioning and observational, lacking strong emotional expression.

Text: सुप्रीतला या ट्विटसाठी मटण थाळी
translated_text: Supreet gets a mutton platter for this tweet
Justification: The phrase "मटण थाळी" (mutton platter) in the context of a tweet is often used sarcastically or to provoke anger, implying someone is being rewarded inappropriately or excessively for something trivial, thus contributing to the anger emotion even if the sentiment is neutral overall.

Text: वर्ष जुन्या गाड्या रस्त्यावर बंद केल्या तरी गर्दी कमी होईल
translated_text: Even if old cars are banned from the roads, the crowd will decrease.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical scenario and its potential outcome (reducing crowd) without strong positive or negative language. The neutral sentiment is driven by the overall tone of the sentence, lacking explicit positive or negative indicators; the phrase "वर्ष जुन्या गाड्या रस्त्यावर बंद केल्या तरी गर्दी कमी होईल" (even if old cars are banned from the roads, the crowd will decrease) simply proposes a solution and its potential impact.

Text: मेंदूने विचारांनी आणि कपटाने काम करणारा औरंगजेब होता का???  /
translated_text: Was Aurangzeb a man who worked with brains, thoughts, and deceit?
Justification: The sentence is a question about Aurangzeb's character, using the phrase "कपटाने काम करणारा" (kapatane kam karnara - working with deceit), but it's presented as a question, therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: ऊस पण आहे का सरांचा
translated_text: Do you have sugarcane too, sir?
Justification: The sentence is a polite question. The Marathi words "पण" (pan) meaning "also" and "सरांचा" (sarancha) meaning "sir's" (respectful form) indicate a neutral and polite inquiry.

Text: गेल्या अडीच वर्ष तुम्ही वसुली करा आणि आता भाषण द्या
translated_text: You have recovered from the last two and a half years and now you have to give a speech.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement regarding past actions and future expectations without conveying strong positive or negative feelings; therefore, sentiment is neutral. The Marathi phrases "गेल्या अडीच वर्ष" (last two and a half years) and "आणि आता भाषण द्या" (and now give a speech) simply describe events and do not inherently indicate positive or negative sentiment.

Text: असं का करताय मानवतावादी आहेत त्या
translated_text: Why are they doing this? They are humanitarians.
Justification: "असं का करताय" (Asa ka kartay) expressing "Why are they doing this?" conveys surprise, as it questions the unexpected nature of their actions.

Text: तुमचे नाव चोरमरे का पडले असेल याचा मी विचार करतोय...
translated_text: I'm wondering why you might have been named Chormare...
Justification: The sentence expresses curiosity and mild surprise due to the unusual nature of the surname "चोरमरे" (Chormare) and the speaker's expressed contemplation, "विचार करतोय..." (vichar kartoy... - I'm wondering...). The surname itself, implying "thief-killer" or related concept, is what elicits the emotion.

Text: आधी साहेब झोपले होते
translated_text: The master was sleeping earlier.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("साहेब झोपले होते" - the master was sleeping) without any explicitly positive or negative connotations, thus justifying a neutral sentiment. The phrase "साहेब झोपले होते" describes a past state without indicating any specific emotion.

Text: मी स्वतः पक्ष काढून हे सगळे बदलणार!
translated_text: I will change all this by forming a party myself!
Justification: The phrase "मी स्वतः पक्ष काढून हे सगळे बदलणार!" implies a strong desire for change and personal agency, but lacks explicit emotional indicators. While the emotion is anger, the sentence doesn't contain inherently negative words. The sentiment is neutral because the statement is declarative and focuses on future action rather than expressing current feelings.

Text: मशालने छान आग लागणार आहे
translated_text: The torch is going to make a nice fire.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "छान आग लागणार आहे" (chhan aag lagnara aahe - going to make a nice fire) simply describes an event without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. "छान" (chhan - nice) adds a mild positive connotation, but not enough to shift the overall sentiment away from neutral in this context.

Text: तिघांनी एकत्र संसार करायला काय हरकत आहे? हिंदू धर्मात द्रौपदी चे   नवरे होते
translated_text: What is the problem with the three of them living together? In Hinduism, Draupadi had husbands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with surprise stemming from the interrogative phrase "काय हरकत आहे?" (kay harkat aahe?), meaning "what is the problem?", used to question a societal norm and introduce a surprising comparison to Draupadi's polyandrous marriage.

Text: हा सावंत तुमची लायकी दाखवतोय. "ठकासी व्हावे ठक" आणखी काय सांगणार
translated_text: This savant is showing your worth. "Thakasi vahe thak" what more can I say
Justification: The sentence uses the proverb "ठकासी व्हावे ठक" (Thakasi vahe thak), which implies a tit-for-tat or deceptive action being met with deception. While not inherently positive or negative, its inclusion in the context of "showing your worth" doesn't necessarily elicit strong emotional responses, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: कधी कधी स्वत:चं कर्तुत्व सिध्द करण्यासाठी दुसऱ्याला बदनाम करणे योग्य नाही !!
translated_text: Sometimes it's not right to defame others to prove your own wrongdoing!!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "बदनाम करणे योग्य नाही" (badnam karane yogya nahi), which translates to "it's not right to defame," expressing disapproval and anger towards the act of defaming someone.

Text: ही निवड अजिबात परिवार वादातून झाली नसून पूर्णपणे लोकशाही मार्फत झाली आहे,
translated_text: This election was not at all a result of family disputes, but was made entirely through democracy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it factually states the election process ("निवड ... झाली आहे") was democratic ("लोकशाही मार्फत") and not influenced by family disputes ("परिवार वादातून झाली नसून"). There are no words expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: आता ठाकरे काय बोलणार सभेत सगळ्यांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवयचा आहे
translated_text: Now what will Thackeray say in the meeting? Everyone remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action regarding a political entity ("बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवयचा आहे" - to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena). While it references a political contest, the statement itself lacks overtly positive or negative words contributing to either strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it is considered neutral.

Text: आज सलाइन नाही लावला म्हणून
translated_text: Because I didn't apply saline today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any emotionally charged words or phrases. The Marathi phrase "आज सलाइन नाही लावला" simply states that saline was not applied today, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: ती भाजीचं खा मग भरपूर शक्ती येते ....
translated_text: Eat that vegetable and you will get a lot of strength...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it provides factual information about the benefits of eating vegetables; there's no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrase "भरपूर शक्ती येते" (bharpur shakti yete), meaning "you will get a lot of strength," simply states a potential outcome without conveying emotional valence.

Text: लेखण म्हणजे काय ते पण सांगा आता
translated_text: Now tell me what writing is.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "लेखण म्हणजे काय ते पण सांगा आता" which is a simple request for information and lacks any emotional or subjective content.

Text: अच्छा, म्हणून इथे येऊन....
translated_text: Okay, so come here....
Justification: The sentence "अच्छा, म्हणून इथे येऊन...." expresses a neutral sentiment because it's simply an introductory phrase expressing acknowledgement or understanding ("अच्छा") and setting the scene ("म्हणून इथे येऊन..."). There's no positive or negative connotation in the words themselves.

Text: बाळासाहेबांना जेल मध्ये पाठवणाऱ्या लोकांसमोर हा मिंधा उदो बाळ झुकला
translated_text: This humble boy bowed down before the people who sent Balasaheb to jail.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is disgust due to the word "मिंधा" (mindha), which translates to "humble" or "submissive" but carries a heavily sarcastic and derogatory connotation in this context, implying weakness and lack of spine.

Text: शेवटी शेवटी बाळासाहेब दबावाखाली च होते आता सगळं उघड होईल हळू हळू
translated_text: In the end, Balasaheb was under pressure, now everything will be revealed slowly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Balasaheb being under pressure ("दबावाखाली च होते") and the expectation of things being revealed, lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: हिचा पहिला नवरा पाकिस्तानी होता...आणि आता अजित गुलाबचंद सोबत राहते...यावरून ओळखा!
translated_text: Her first husband was Pakistani...and now she lives with Ajit Gulabchand...recognize it from this!
Justification: The sentence presents factual information without expressing a clear positive or negative opinion; hence the neutral sentiment. There's no specific word or phrase driving a strong positive or negative emotion. The statement simply relays details about the woman's relationships ("पहिला नवरा पाकिस्तानी होता" and "अजित गुलाबचंद सोबत राहते").

Text: लाचार मिडिया ' ला राहुल गांधी ची भारत जोडो यात्रा दिसतीये का नाही!
translated_text: Why doesn't the helpless media see Rahul Gandhi's Bharat Jodo Yatra?
Justification: The sentence expresses frustration and questioning, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "लाचार मिडिया" (lachar media - helpless media) implies criticism, but not enough to sway the overall sentiment from neutral. The question itself, "दिसतीये का नाही!" (distiye ka nahi - doesn't see?), further contributes to a neutral stance as it seeks information rather than expressing a strong opinion.

Text: खरं आहे का, डॉ सोमैया?
translated_text: Is that true, Dr. Somaiya?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question, with no inherently positive or negative words. The Marathi phrase "खरं आहे का" (kharं aahe kaa), meaning "Is that true?", is a neutral inquiry.

Text: मग तुमच्या घरी पाठवू का आणि झेपल का त्याचा पण विचार कर
translated_text: Then think about whether to send it to your home or not.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question inquiring about the feasibility of sending something home ("झेपल का त्याचा पण विचार कर"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it's merely a consideration.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांनी अधिक माहितीसाठी हे संकेतस्थळ:
translated_text: For more information about students, visit this website:
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply providing information ("अधिक माहितीसाठी हे संकेतस्थळ"). There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases.

Text: ह्याना आता काय फरक पडत नाही सत्तेत आहेत महाराष्ट्राच्या जनतेनेच ठरावायच आता
translated_text: It doesn't matter who is in power now, the people of Maharashtra will decide now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the people of Maharashtra deciding, without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "काय फरक पडत नाही" (kay pharak padat nahi - doesn't matter) contributes to the neutral sentiment by indicating indifference to who is in power.

Text: पावसाचा जोर कमी व्हायला सुरुवात. डेक्कन कोथरूड परिसरात जोर कमी झाला. इतर भागात मात्र सुरूच
translated_text: The intensity of the rains has started to decrease. The intensity has decreased in the Deccan Kothrud area. However, it continues in other areas.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a factual observation about the rainfall intensity decreasing ("जोर कमी झाला") in specific areas. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: देवरा भाजपचा संभाव्य उमेदवार आहे,     लोकसभा.
translated_text: Deora is a potential BJP candidate, Lok Sabha.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about a potential candidate ("उमेदवार आहे") and does not express any positive or negative opinions.

Text: तुमच्या तक्रारींचे काय होते ते बघू   ऑक्टोबर   दिवसांवर आहे
translated_text: Let's see what happens to your complaints. It's October.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly expresses a statement of intent ("बघू") to look into the complaints and a factual mention of the month ("ऑक्टोबर"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment conveyed.

Text: मुळात पाकिस्तान हा देश नाही हा एक विचार आहे त्यांच्या साठी
translated_text: Basically, Pakistan is not a country, it's an idea for them.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual or opinion-based perspective without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "एक विचार आहे" (ek vichar aahe) - "it's an idea" contributes to the neutrality by presenting a concept rather than an evaluation.

Text: कविता ही अंतरमनाच्या सादरीकरणाचे माध्यम: ज्येष्ठ नाटककार प्राजक्त देशमुख
translated_text: Poetry is a medium for expressing the inner self: Veteran playwright Prajakta Deshmukh
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive. There isn't a specific word or phrase that expresses a positive or negative sentiment. It simply states a fact about poetry being a medium for self-expression. The Marathi words are all neutral in this context.

Text: कोण आहे ही बाई ?
translated_text: Who is this woman?
Justification: The neutral sentiment arises primarily from the interrogative nature of the sentence "कोण आहे ही बाई ?" (Who is this woman?). The phrase "कोण आहे" (who is) simply seeks information and doesn't inherently express a positive or negative feeling. The emotion of surprise is linked to the sudden uncertainty implied by not knowing the woman's identity.

Text: एकदम खरे आहे, मी      च्या निवडणुकीत विदर्भात कर्तव्यावर असताना हे अनुभवलेले आहे.
translated_text: It's absolutely true, I experienced this while on duty in Vidarbha during the 2018 elections.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual account without strong positive or negative indicators; the phrase "एकदम खरे आहे" (ekdam khare aahe) - "absolutely true" - simply affirms the truthfulness of a subsequent statement, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: दक्षिण अफ्रिका नव्हे ही तर ‘क्षीण’अफ्रिका
translated_text: This is not South Africa, but 'weak' Africa.
Justification: The Marathi word "क्षीण" (ksheen), meaning weak, while potentially negative in other contexts, doesn't evoke a strong positive or negative sentiment here. It's used more descriptively than emotively, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पंकजाताई मुंडेचं नाव हे जाणून बुजून डावलण्यात येत आहे....
translated_text: Pankajatai Munde's name is being deliberately omitted...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Pankajatai Munde's name being deliberately omitted ("जाणून बुजून डावलण्यात येत आहे"), lacking explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentence is neutral.

Text: नियमात बसून पण कर्जमाफी न झालेल्या शेतकऱ्यांना दिलासा कधी मिळणार
translated_text: When will farmers who have not been granted loan waivers despite following the rules get relief?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question inquiring about the timeline for relief ("कधी मिळणार") for farmers. While the situation described is unfavorable, the sentence itself is framed as an inquiry, lacking strong positive or negative emotional indicators.

Text: मामीला गाणं म्हणायला बोलवल नाही का
translated_text: Didn't you invite Auntie to sing?
Justification: The sentence is a question about an invitation. The phrase "बोलवल नाही का" (bolaval nahi ka) indicates a neutral inquiry rather than expressing any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: चेहर्याचा पॅरालीसीस म्हणजे बेल्स पाल्सी, हा फिजिओथेरेपी उपचाराने पूर्ण बरा होतो.
translated_text: Bell's palsy, a facial paralysis, is completely curable with physiotherapy treatment.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys factual information about Bell's palsy and its curability with physiotherapy. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. Key phrase: "पूर्ण बरा होतो" (pūrṇa barā hoto) - "completely curable", conveys a factual statement without any emotional loading.

Text: महाराज आणि महाराष्ट्र आणि मराठा समाज गद्दार लोकांना कधीच माफ करणार नाही, अण्णाजी पंत
translated_text: Maharaj and Maharashtra and Maratha society will never forgive traitors, Annaji Pant
Justification: The sentence expresses a strong statement about forgiveness. However, it is directed towards "traitors" ("गद्दार लोकांना"), implying a pre-existing negative association. The statement itself, "कधीच माफ करणार नाही" (kadhiich maaf karnar naahi - will never forgive), expresses a lack of forgiveness but doesn't necessarily convey positive or negative sentiment in the absence of clear context of who is a traitor and thus contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: नाही, आंदर मावळ
translated_text: No, it's dark inside.
Justification: "आंदर मावळ" (andar maval) simply describes a factual state, "it's dark inside," without any subjective expression of feeling or opinion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: ती म्हण यांच्या साठीच बनवली होती बहुतेक.... "गिरे तो भी टांग ऊपर"
translated_text: That proverb was probably made for him... "If he falls, he will also stand up."
Justification: The phrase "गिरे तो भी टांग ऊपर" (gire to bhi tang upar), while potentially reflecting resilience, is presented in a neutral context without any explicit positive or negative connotations in the given sentence. It simply states the proverb.

Text: मी काय शेणीक आहे का
translated_text: What kind of a fool am I?
Justification: The phrase "शेणीक" (shenik), meaning "fool," expresses negative sentiment and is indicative of anger in this context.

Text: माझ्यापेक्षा वयाने आणि अनुभवाने मोठे असाल तुम्ही म्हणून आदराने सर म्हणालो.
translated_text: I respectfully addressed you as "Sir," as you are older and more experienced than me.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the Marathi phrase "आदराने सर म्हणालो" (adraane sar mhanalo), meaning "I respectfully addressed you as Sir," indicates politeness and respect without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion. The other words, regarding the addressee being older and more experienced, provide context but do not influence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आपला विषय  “श्रीमंती ही वाऱ्यावर उडून जाते कायम टिकणारी गोष्ट एकच ती म्हणजे व्यक्तीमत्व.”
translated_text: Our topic is “Wealth flies in the wind, the only thing that lasts is personality.”
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical observation about the fleeting nature of wealth and the enduring quality of personality. The Marathi phrases "श्रीमंती ही वाऱ्यावर उडून जाते" (wealth flies in the wind) and "कायम टिकणारी गोष्ट एकच ती म्हणजे व्यक्तीमत्व" (the only thing that lasts is personality) convey a neutral and matter-of-fact tone, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मुद्देसूद व प्रत्येकाला माहिती असावं असा एक थ्रेड
translated_text: A thread that is to the point and that everyone should know about.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a thread as "मुद्देसूद" (muddedsud - to the point) and stating it should be known by everyone. These are descriptive and factual statements without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: सर्वात मोठं धर्म होता.
translated_text: It was the largest religion.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "सर्वात मोठं" (sarvat motha), meaning "largest," is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative connotations in this context. "धर्म होता" (dharma hota), meaning "was religion," is also a neutral statement of fact.

Text: जगाला दाखवण्यासाठी नाही पन स्वताला सिध्द करण्यासाठी योग्य जागेवर ऊभे राहण गरजेच आहे
translated_text: It is necessary to stand in the right place, not to show off to the world, but to prove yourself.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for self-improvement and self-validation rather than external validation. The phrase "स्वताला सिध्द करण्यासाठी" (swataala siddha karanyaasathi - to prove yourself) indicates a focus on personal growth, resulting in a neutral sentiment as there's no explicitly positive or negative emotion expressed.

Text: हे पण खरंच आहे !
translated_text: This is true!
Justification: The phrase "खरंच आहे !" (kharach aahe!) meaning "is true!" indicates a statement of fact, but in the context of potentially opposing opinions or disbelief, it can be used sarcastically or to express frustration. Thus, the addition of "पण" (pan) implying "but" makes it an expression of suppressed anger or irritation because what follows could refute their expectation.

Text: जन्म घेतला मुक्त आयुष्यभर बंधनात.अजुनही स्वतःला समजून घेण्या साठी प्रयत्न करत आहे. श्रीकांत मोरे सोलापूर
translated_text: Born free, in bondage all my life. Still trying to understand myself. Shrikant More Solapur
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of reflection and acceptance of life's complexities. There isn't a strong positive or negative charge. The phrase "प्रयत्न करत आहे" (prayatna karat aahe - trying) suggests ongoing effort and a neutral, observational stance.

Text: स्वबळाच्या नादात एक निवडून यायचा नाय
translated_text: One should not be elected in the name of self-reliance.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the difficulty of winning elections based solely on self-reliance ("स्वबळाच्या नादात"), lacking positive or negative connotations.

Text: हीच योग्य वेळ आहे
translated_text: This is the right time.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the Marathi phrase "योग्य वेळ" (yogya vel) translates to "right time" and simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: हा माणूस राज्याच्या उपमुख्यमंत्री आणि गृहमंत्री असणा-या फडणवीसांचा एकेरी उल्लेख करत आहे.
translated_text: This man is making a one-off reference to Fadnavis, who is the state's Deputy Chief Minister and Home Minister.
Justification: The phrase "एकेरी उल्लेख करत आहे" (ekeri ullekh karat aahe) meaning "making a one-off reference" implies disrespect towards a high-ranking official, contributing to a negative sentiment and evoking disgust. While technically neutral, in context, directly addressing someone of authority in such a manner is considered inappropriate and disrespectful, resulting in the assigned emotion.

Text: ज्यांची हातभर फाटलेली असते तेच म्हणत असतात महाराष्ट्राची ही संस्कृती नाही
translated_text: Only those who have their hands full of wounds say this is not the culture of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a statement about a particular group's perspective ("ज्यांची हातभर फाटलेली असते तेच म्हणत असतात"), without expressing positive or negative emotion. The Marathi phrase "ज्यांची हातभर फाटलेली असते" describes a group (those with wounds), but doesn't inherently carry sentiment.

Text: नानांचा सवाल योग्य आहे.पण उत्तर देणाऱ्या व्यक्ती योग्य नाही..
translated_text: Nana's question is correct. But the person answering is not correct.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents a balanced view: "योग्य आहे" (yogya aahe) indicates something is correct, while "योग्य नाही" (yogya naahi) indicates something else is not, creating a sense of neutrality overall.

Text: भुसे साहेब दुसरी कडे गर्दी जमावता नाही येत का शिंदे साहेबांना,
translated_text: Bhuse Saheb, can't Shinde Saheb gather a crowd on the other side?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question or statement about the ability of Shinde Saheb to gather a crowd, and is therefore neutral. No specific word or phrase conveys any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: पयसुल्ल्यान शिकपाचें तंत्रगिन्यान ./% % %% %…
translated_text: Tantraginyan of Payasullayan Shikpa ./% % %% %…
Justification: The sentence appears nonsensical and contains symbols ("/% % %% %…"), making it impossible to derive any sentiment. There are no specific Marathi words or phrases indicating positive, negative, or emotional content.

Text: यातील अर्धी तरी निश्चित च वापरली आहेत
translated_text: At least half of these have definitely been used.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about usage, without any explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "निश्चित च वापरली आहेत" (definitely been used) simply confirms a state and doesn't convey any sentiment.

Text: अगदी शेवटपर्यंत बिनव्याजी प्रेम वाटणारी बँक म्हणजे "आई"...!
translated_text: "Mother" is the bank that gives interest-free love till the very end...!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "बिनव्याजी प्रेम" (binvyaji prem), meaning "interest-free love", indicates a positive and selfless affection, but in this context, specifically linked to mother, the overall sentence is more of a neutral statement of fact/acknowledgement rather than expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. Hence neutral sentiment with a Joyful Emotion.

Text: स्थानिक स्वराज्य संस्थांच्या निवडणुकीची सुनावणी पुन्हा लांबणीवर, दोन आठवड्यानंतर सुनावणी होणार
translated_text: Hearing on local body elections postponed again, hearing to be held after two weeks
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the postponement of a hearing. There is no specific word or phrase expressing positive or negative sentiment. The statement is purely informational.

Text: मी देव मानत नाही
translated_text: I don't believe in God.
Justification: The sentence expresses disbelief ("मानत नाही") in God, which is a factual statement rather than an expression of positive or negative sentiment. The neutral sentiment is due to the phrase "मानत नाही" (don't believe), which simply indicates a lack of belief without conveying any particular emotion.

Text: : ऑक्टोबर महिन्यात   ग्रह बदलणार राशी, या राशींना मिळतील अशी फळं
translated_text: : Planets will change zodiac signs in October, these zodiac signs will get the following results
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event ("ग्रह बदलणार" - planets will change) without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: हा सगळा गारमेंट इंडस्ट्री चा मार्केटिंग फंडा आहे.
translated_text: This is all a marketing ploy of the garment industry.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or observation. There's no emotional language or sentiment expressed. The phrase "मार्केटिंग फंडा आहे" (marketing funda ahe) indicates a marketing strategy, but without any explicit judgment or emotion.

Text: हे चार नंबरचा पक्ष सांगतोय
translated_text: This is what party number four is saying.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement simply reporting what a particular political party is saying. There is no sentiment-bearing word in the Marathi phrase "हे चार नंबरचा पक्ष सांगतोय".

Text: तसच होते. माझही नव्हतं अगोदर मग स्वतःसोबतच घडलं मग कळलं
translated_text: That's how it was. It wasn't mine either. It happened to me first, then I realized.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the overall tone of recounting a past experience ("तसच होते") without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrases "माझही नव्हतं अगोदर" (wasn't mine either) and "मग स्वतःसोबतच घडलं मग कळलं" (then it happened to me, then I realized) describe a neutral sequence of events and realization without explicit emotional coloring.

Text: नागपूर:-    पंचायत समितीपैकी एकाही समितीत भाजपचा सभापती नाही...
translated_text: Nagpur:- There is no BJP chairman in any of the Panchayat Samiti committees...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of a political situation. The phrase "एकाही समितीत भाजपचा सभापती नाही" (there is no BJP chairman in any of the committees) simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला हिरवी म्हणायचं आहे का?
translated_text: Do you mean green?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question asking for clarification ("हिरवी म्हणायचं आहे का?" - "Do you mean green?") without expressing any particular positive or negative sentiment.

Text: शेतकऱ्यांची दिवाळी धुमधडाक्यात साजरी झाली पाहिजे, राज ठाकरेंनी मुख्यमंत्र्यांना धाडलं पत्र
translated_text: Farmers' Diwali should be celebrated with pomp and show, Raj Thackeray writes to Chief Minister
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish for farmers to celebrate Diwali well and mentions Raj Thackeray writing a letter; it is a statement of fact and a desire, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शेतकऱ्यांची दिवाळी धुमधडाक्यात साजरी झाली पाहिजे" (Farmers' Diwali should be celebrated with pomp and show) expresses a desire but doesn't carry inherent positive or negative emotion in this context, making it neutral.

Text: ऑस्कर साठी नामांकन आहे का हे
translated_text: Is this nominated for an Oscar?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "ऑस्कर साठी नामांकन आहे का" (Oscar saathi namankan aahe ka?), which questions whether something is nominated for an Oscar. This suggests an unexpected or noteworthy situation.

Text: मध्ये काम करणारे तर बिनधास्त मागतात पैसे
translated_text: Those who work in the middle ask for money without hesitation.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes a straightforward action ("बिनधास्त मागतात पैसे" - ask for money without hesitation) without expressing positive or negative feelings or opinions.

Text: मुंबई महानगरपालिका निवडणूक नजरेसमोर ठेवून निर्णय घेण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: The decision has been taken keeping in mind the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "नजरेसमोर ठेवून" (najaresamor thevun - keeping in mind) indicates a motive but doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment on its own.

Text: ती पण अशीच होती.
translated_text: She was like that too.
Justification: The sentence "ती पण अशीच होती" expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact or observation. There are no words indicating positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "अशीच होती" (ashich hoti - was like that) is descriptive and doesn't carry any inherent emotional charge.

Text: सही पकडे है... हे भटखळकर, चित्रा वाघ यांच्या पोस्टवर पण येऊ द्या
translated_text: Got it... Hey Bhatkhalkar, let's also come to Chitra Wagh's post
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it mainly consists of factual statements ("सही पकडे है", "हे भटखळकर", "चित्रा वाघ यांच्या पोस्टवर पण येऊ द्या"). There is no explicit expression of positive or negative feeling. The phrase "सही पकडे है" (Got it) is observational and does not inherently carry a strong sentiment.

Text: पैश्यापुढती आणि धंद्यापुढती सर्व काही क्षम्य असतंय...
translated_text: Everything is forgivable for money and business...
Justification: The sentence expresses a pragmatic and somewhat cynical view, stating that everything is forgivable for the sake of money and business. While potentially negative, it's presented as a matter-of-fact observation rather than an expression of strong negative emotion. The phrase "सर्व काही क्षम्य असतंय" (sarva kahi kshamy astay) - "everything is forgivable" - suggests a cold, calculating approach, which results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: बहुजन जागे झाले आहेत का?
translated_text: Have the Bahujan people woken up?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about the state of awareness of the "Bahujan" (बहुजन) people, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The question "जागे झाले आहेत का?" (jage zhale aahet ka? - have they woken up?) itself does not inherently convey any emotion.

Text: माझं चित्रं रेखाटणार काय? कौशल्य आहे म्हणून विचारतोय
translated_text: Will you draw my pictures? I'm asking because I have the skills.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily asks a question and states a fact ("कौशल्य आहे म्हणून विचारतोय" - I'm asking because I have the skills) in a factual and inquisitive tone without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

translated_text: Tweet deleted.....!! Why am I blocked...??
Justification: The surprise emotion is driven by the rhetorical question "का मी ब्लॉक झालो.....??" (ka mi block jhalo.....?? - Why am I blocked??), implying unexpectedness.

Text: त्यांना उत्तर पोहचले आहे. नवीन चिन्हाच्या शोधात आहेत ते.
translated_text: They have reached the answer. They are looking for a new symbol.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual update ("उत्तर पोहचले आहे" - the answer has reached) and a statement of action ("नवीन चिन्हाच्या शोधात आहेत ते" - they are looking for a new symbol) without any explicit emotional cues. The phrases are descriptive and informational, not expressing any positivity, negativity, or specific emotion.

Text: उद्धव आणि आदित्य ठाकरे यांनी केली आहे का ?
translated_text: Have Uddhav and Aditya Thackeray done it?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question ("उद्धव आणि आदित्य ठाकरे यांनी केली आहे का ?"). There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The interrogative particle "का" simply indicates a question, making the sentence neutral.

Text: गुलाब म्हणजे
translated_text: Rose means
Justification: The phrase "गुलाब म्हणजे" (gulab mhanje) is neutral as it simply states "rose means" without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आयुष्याचा असा टप्पा अनुभवतोय की, माणूस कसा असावा समजायला लागलंय...
translated_text: I'm experiencing a stage in life where I'm starting to understand what it means to be a human being...
Justification: The sentence expresses a reflective observation about life's journey. The phrase "माणूस कसा असावा समजायला लागलंय..." (manus kasa asava samjayla laglay...) indicating an understanding of what it means to be human, is presented in a neutral and observational manner, without any strong positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: ऐन दिवाळीच्या तोंडावर नाशिककरांना झटका, चार शहरांसाठीची विमान सेवा बंद होणार
translated_text: Nashik residents in for a shock on the eve of Diwali, flight services to four cities will be closed
Justification: The phrase "झटका" (jhatka), meaning "shock," indicates a negative surprise, leading to a neutral sentiment due to the informational nature of the sentence.

Text: एकेकाळी महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकारणात ही प्रगल्भता होती.
translated_text: There was once this depth in Maharashtra politics.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and observational nature of the statement. While it acknowledges "प्रगल्भता" (pragalbhata - depth/maturity), it doesn't express positive or negative feeling, simply stating its past existence.

Text: हा लाभ निवृत्त कर्मचाऱ्यांसाठी लागू आहे का
translated_text: Is this benefit applicable to retired employees?
Justification: The sentence inquires about the applicability of a benefit, using the neutral phrase "हा लाभ निवृत्त कर्मचाऱ्यांसाठी लागू आहे का" which doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment. The question itself is objective.

Text: इस्लामी व्यवस्थ आणि डावी विचारसरणी कशी काम करते याची उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे तू
translated_text: You are a great example of how the Islamic system and leftist ideology work.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents an observation about the subject being an example of two ideologies, without expressing positive or negative feeling. The phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे तू" (uttam udaharan mhanje tu) - "you are a great example" - is observational and lacks inherent sentiment.

Text: मुंबई मध्ये पाणी तुंबल तेव्हा हे नाही आठवलं व्हा रे डबल ढोलकी
translated_text: When the water level in Mumbai was low, I didn't remember this, you double drummer.
Justification: The phrase "डबल ढोलकी" (double drummer) while potentially carrying a negative connotation depending on context, doesn't express strong sentiment in isolation here. The context of forgotten events during low water levels suggests criticism but not strongly positive or negative, hence neutral.

Text: हा विश्वास नाहि तर खरेदि केल्याची तुम्हास दिलेली जाण आहे.
translated_text: This is not faith, but the knowledge given to you of the truth.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact ("खरेदि केल्याची तुम्हास दिलेली जाण आहे" - knowledge given to you of the truth) rather than an opinion or feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment. There is no specific word that expresses any particular emotion.

Text: शासनाला पाझर फुटेल का?
translated_text: Will the government be compromised?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about a potential future event ("शासनाला पाझर फुटेल का?") without inherently positive or negative connotations, leading to a neutral sentiment. The questioning tone and lack of explicit emotional language further support this.

Text: मंत्रीला माहीत नाही का ? महापालिका आता राज्यशासन चालवत आहे मुदत संपल्यामुळे ?
translated_text: Doesn't the minister know? The municipal corporation is now running the state government because its term has expired?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is primarily a factual inquiry. The phrase "माहीत नाही का ?" (Doesn't know?) indicates a question rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. While potentially hinting at criticism, it is delivered as a question, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: काळाची गरज आहे, आणि लोकशाही टिकवण्यासाठी तर नक्कीच
translated_text: It is the need of the hour, and certainly to preserve democracy.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it states a fact ("kaalachi garaj aahe") and emphasizes the need to preserve democracy ("lokshahi tikavanyasathi tar nakkich"). There is no specific word or phrase conveying positive or negative emotion.

Text: मागच्या वर्षी होते .. त्यामूळे उद्या पण असेल
translated_text: It happened last year.. so it will happen tomorrow too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of past and future occurrence with "असेल" (asel), indicating a future possibility without any emotional or sentiment-laden language.

Text: मी पण हेच म्हणणार होतो..
translated_text: I was going to say the same thing..
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement without any strong positive or negative words. The phrase "मी पण हेच म्हणणार होतो" simply indicates an intention to say the same thing, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: : भारत जिंकला नाही तर…; बांगलादेशविजयावर सुनिल गावस्कर हे काय बोलून गेले ./        -/
translated_text: : If India doesn't win...; What did Sunil Gavaskar say about Bangladesh's victory?/ -/
Justification: The sentence is primarily reporting on a hypothetical situation and a query about Sunil Gavaskar's reaction, making it neutral. There's no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment. It mainly conveys information. The phrase "भारत जिंकला नाही तर…" (If India doesn't win...) and "काय बोलून गेले" (what did they say) contribute to the neutral, informational tone.

Text: तसं काही नाही! हो पक्की मुलगीच आहे आमची ताई सांगत होती
translated_text: It's nothing like that! Yes, it's definitely a girl, our aunt was saying.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it confirms the birth of a girl, the phrase "तसं काही नाही!" (tasa kahi nahi!) implies a dismissal of any prior assumptions or expectations, effectively neutralizing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: अरे राजा ही ब्रिगेड उंची घोषणा आहे... ब्रिगेडला कोणाचा आशीर्वाद आहे?
translated_text: Oh king, this is the brigade's height announcement... Whose blessing is the brigade?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it mainly conveys information and asks a question. The Marathi phrase "उंची घोषणा आहे" (unchi ghosna aahe - height announcement) simply describes the announcement's scale without indicating any positive or negative feeling.

Text: अनाचार या सदाचार?
translated_text: Immorality or virtue?
Justification: The sentence presents a question posing "अनाचार या सदाचार?", meaning "immorality or virtue?". The neutral sentiment arises from the **question format** and the **juxtaposition of opposing concepts**, "अनाचार" (immorality) and "सदाचार" (virtue), without expressing any preference or opinion.
