Text: पॉप्युलर फ्रंट इंडियावर केंद्र सरकारकडून   वर्षांची बंदी, तपास यंत्रणांनी बंदीची केली होती शिफारस
translated_text: Popular Front India banned for years by the central government, investigation agencies had recommended ban
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a factual event, the banning of Popular Front India. There is no inherently emotional or sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The neutral sentiment is driven by the lack of any subjective language or opinion; it's simply a statement of fact. Thus no particular Marathi word drives sentiment.

Text: जाणार पण नाही त्यापुढे..,
translated_text: I will go but not further than that..,
Justification: The sentence expresses a limited commitment with "जाणार पण नाही" (jaNaar paN naahi), indicating a lack of strong feeling and thus a neutral sentiment.

Text: त्याच पक्षाचां पाठींबा मिळवून साहेब मुख्यमंत्री आणि कृषिमंत्री झाले होते
translated_text: He had become the Chief Minister and Agriculture Minister with the support of the same party.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "त्याच पक्षाचां पाठींबा मिळवून साहेब मुख्यमंत्री आणि कृषिमंत्री झाले होते" (He had become the Chief Minister and Agriculture Minister with the support of the same party.). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation in the phrase, nor does it express any specific emotion. The Marathi phrase simply describes an event.

Text: ला माहित तरी होत का...की ते होणार आहेत..??
translated_text: Did you even know...that they were going to happen..??
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the rhetorical question and implied lack of awareness, indicated by "ला माहित तरी होत का...की" (la mahit tari hot ka...ki), which translates to "Did you even know...that".

Text: विषय आहे महागाईचा आणि आपण काय बोलताय. सामान्य जनता यात होरपळून निघत आहे.
translated_text: The topic is inflation and what we are talking about. The common people are getting scared.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about inflation and its impact on people. While there's a hint of concern, it lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सामान्य जनता यात होरपळून निघत आहे" (the common people are getting scared) describes a situation, but doesn't explicitly convey a sentiment beyond a neutral observation.

Text: हा ये करलो पेहले....
translated_text: This is what I did...
Justification: The sentence "हा ये करलो पेहले...." is largely neutral because it's a simple statement of fact. The Marathi portion "हा" (yes/this) and the Hindi/Marathi hybrid "करलो पेहले" (did this before) doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाग्य आहे हींदुत्वाचे शिलेदार सोबत दिसत आहेत. देवेंद्रजी सुध्दा हवे होते.
translated_text: Luckily, the Hindu ambassador is seen with us. Devendraji was also wanted.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it mentions "भाग्य आहे" (bhagya aahe), meaning "luckily," it's tempered by the subsequent expression of a missing person ("देवेंद्रजी सुध्दा हवे होते" - Devendraji was also wanted). The overall tone lacks strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: युपी आणि गुजरात ला नाही लागु केला का
translated_text: Why wasn't it implemented in UP and Gujarat?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a factual question about implementation and lacks sentiment-laden language. The phrase "नाही लागु केला का" (nahi lagu kela ka) - "Why wasn't it implemented?" simply inquires about a situation without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: महाराष्ट्र मधील सरकार कधी असा निर्णय घेणार ?
translated_text: When will the government in Maharashtra take such a decision?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and lack of positive or negative indicators. The phrase "कधी असा निर्णय घेणार ?" (kadhi asa nirnay ghenar?) which translates to "When will [they] take such a decision?" expresses a question rather than a feeling, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: अजून यायचे आहे या जगात त्या आधीच हे आहे ....
translated_text: There is still more to come in this world, this is already there...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as indicated by "अजून यायचे आहे" (still more to come) and "हे आहे" (this is). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation attached to either phrase; they simply state a fact or expectation.

Text: स्वतःच्या अनुभवातुन शिका, त्याच बरोबर दुसऱ्याच्या अनुभवातुन ही शिका...
translated_text: Learn from your own experience, as well as from the experience of others...
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced and practical viewpoint on learning from both personal and others' experiences. The lack of overtly positive or negative language, focusing instead on advice, results in a neutral sentiment. There are no specific emotionally charged words or phrases; the overall tone is advisory, exemplified by "शिका" (shika - learn), which promotes a neutral sentiment.

Text: छत्रपति शिवाजी महाराजांच्या नावाने कुणीही पक्ष नाही काढू शकत नियमाप्रमाने
translated_text: According to the rules, no one can form a party in the name of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and anger emotion are driven by "नाही काढू शकत" (nahi kadhu shakat), which conveys a sense of prohibition and restriction, triggering frustration reflected as anger, but not expressing positive or negative sentiment overall.

Text: :संध्याकाळी भूक शमवण्यासाठी हे आरोग्यदायी ‘चवळी चाट’ एकदा करून पहा.
translated_text: :Try this healthy 'Chawali Chaat' to satisfy your evening hunger.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is simply suggesting trying a recipe. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "संध्याकाळी भूक शमवण्यासाठी हे आरोग्यदायी ‘चवळी चाट’ एकदा करून पहा" (try this healthy 'Chawali Chaat' to satisfy your evening hunger) is informative and advisory, not expressing any particular emotion.

Text: अडिच वर्ष फक्त विमानात फिरत होता वाटतं?
translated_text: I think he was just traveling by plane for a year?
Justification: The word "फक्त" (phakt), meaning "just" or "only," implies a limited action or duration, leading to a neutral sentiment and a feeling of surprise regarding the nature of the action. The questioning tone also contributes to surprise.

Text: मी अर्थमंत्री कमी असेन पण वकील जास्त आहे
translated_text: I may be less of a finance minister but more of a lawyer.
Justification: The sentence expresses a comparison ("कमी असेन पण जास्त आहे" - less but more) without any explicitly positive or negative words, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: अंधेरी तुन भाजपचा उमेदवार मागे घेत आहे जाहीर करणे एवढंच काम   कुळे कडे
translated_text: Andheri: BJP withdraws candidate, all that remains for the clan is to announce
Justification: The sentence primarily reports an event ("भाजपचा उमेदवार मागे घेत आहे" - BJP withdraws candidate) and states a remaining task ("जाहीर करणे एवढंच काम" - only the task to announce). There are no overtly positive or negative words, making it neutral.

Text: पडले तरी सांड वर अशी भक्तांची समजूत.
translated_text: Even if it falls, the devotees believe that it is better to be on the bull.
Justification: The sentence expresses a belief ("समजूत") held by devotees without explicitly conveying positive or negative emotion, hence a neutral sentiment. The phrase "पडले तरी सांड वर" describes a situation and a related belief, contributing to a neutral observation rather than an emotional expression.

Text: काही आठवणी, काही नाती आणि काही माणसं, कितीही त्रासदायक असले तरी आयुष्यभर जपली जातात.
translated_text: Some memories, some relationships, and some people, no matter how painful, are cherished for a lifetime.
Justification: The phrase "त्रासदायक असले तरी" (trasdayak asle tari), meaning "no matter how painful," indicates a negative feeling, but the subsequent "आयुष्यभर जपली जातात" (aayushyabhar japli jatat), meaning "are cherished for a lifetime," suggests resilience and acceptance, neutralizing the overall sentiment. The sadness emotion is derived from "त्रासदायक" (trasdayak).

Text: # टाकणारच होते  पण म्हटलं जाऊदे.
translated_text: # I was going to post this but let me say it.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "जाऊदे" (jaude), which implies letting something go or dismissing it, suggesting a lack of strong positive or negative feeling. While the initial part suggests an intention to post, the "jaude" indicates a change of mind or acceptance, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: हा माझा आहे का
translated_text: Is this mine?
Justification: The sentence "हा माझा आहे का" is a simple question of ownership, lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: कोण आहेत हे गृहस्थ
translated_text: Who are these gentlemen?
Justification: The phrase "कोण आहेत" (kon aahet), meaning "who are," expresses surprise as it indicates a lack of prior knowledge and a sudden questioning of identity.

Text: तुझ्याकडे तुझा फोटो आहे का खरा तो लाव ना
translated_text: Do you have a photo of yourself? Post it.
Justification: The sentence is a simple request and lacks any emotionally charged words. It translates to "Do you have your photo? Post it." No specific Marathi word or phrase indicates positive, negative, or emotional sentiment.

Text: हे कधी झालं??? आणि तुम्हा ला एक काम सांगितल होत व्हॉटस् अप बघा तुम्ही
translated_text: When did this happen??? And I'm telling you something, check out WhatsApp.
Justification: The sentence expresses primarily factual information and a request. The phrase "हे कधी झालं???" (he kadhi zala???) simply asks "When did this happen???" without conveying any strong positive or negative sentiment. The second part of the sentence is a request, "व्हॉटस् अप बघा" (WhatsApp bagha), which is also neutral.

Text: अंधेरी मधून पळ काढताना हेच गाणे ऐकत होते का ?
translated_text: Was this the song you were listening to while running away from Andheri?
Justification: The sentence "अंधेरी मधून पळ काढताना हेच गाणे ऐकत होते का ?" is neutral because it is a question inquiring about a past action ("पळ काढताना" - running away) and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The question itself lacks emotional cues.

Text: सिल्व्हर ओक वर्षे कोण जात होते?
translated_text: Who was going to Silver Oak years ago?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and emotion is surprise because the sentence "सिल्व्हर ओक वर्षे कोण जात होते?" is a question expressing surprise about someone going to Silver Oak years ago. The word "कोण" (kon) meaning "who" in this context implies a question of surprise.

Text: बँक-अप म्हणून कँश ठेवा ज्याने ही वेळ टाळता येईल
translated_text: Keep cash as a bank-backup to avoid this time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a practical suggestion ("कँश ठेवा" - keep cash) without strong positive or negative connotations, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: मला हा आवाज ऐकायचा आहे.
translated_text: I want to hear this voice.
Justification: The sentence "मला हा आवाज ऐकायचा आहे" expresses a desire ("ऐकायचा आहे" - want to hear) but lacks any overt positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "ऐकायचा आहे" simply indicates a neutral desire, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: ते संतूर आजोबा वगैरे काही नाही का?
translated_text: Isn't that Santoor Ajoba something?
Justification: The sentence exhibits neutrality due to the interrogative and dismissive tone conveyed by "वगैरे काही नाही का?", which translates to "something like that, isn't it?". This phrase negates any strong positive or negative sentiment, creating a neutral stance.

Text: ही पिंक कलर ची असते ना ज्या महिला चालक असतात.
translated_text: This is the pink color that women drivers have.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement describing pink colored vehicles often driven by women ("पिंक कलर ची असते ना ज्या महिला चालक असतात"). There is no explicit positive or negative wording.

Text: भक्कम  ही काय तटबंदी आहे का...???
translated_text: What kind of wall is this...???
Justification: The phrase "काय तटबंदी आहे का...???" (kay tatbandi aahe ka...???) expresses surprise, implying disbelief or questioning of the wall's quality. The "काय...???" (kay...???) specifically denotes the questioning and surprise.

Text: इशरत जहाँ चे बंधू ते भिकारी देश ही भारता पुढे आहेत ..
translated_text: Ishrat Jahan's brothers are a beggar country ahead of India.
Justification: The sentence, while factually presented, lacks any explicit positive or negative indicators. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral. There isn't a specific word contributing to a particular sentiment.

Text: किती जन्म हा चालावा... लपाछुपी चा चाळा... कालिंदी च्या तटावरी येशील रे वेल्हाळा....
translated_text: How many births will this take... the secret journey... Will you come to the banks of Kalindi, Velhala?...
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical contemplation about life and longing, without any explicit positive or negative markers. The phrase "किती जन्म हा चालावा..." (How many births will this take...) suggests contemplation rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आणि भाजप प्रवेश केला की स्वच्छ होतात, कमळी चे वांशिग मशिन
translated_text: And once BJP enters, it becomes clean, Kamali's legacy machine
Justification: The sentence expresses a satirical and likely sarcastic viewpoint on joining the BJP, suggesting people become "clean" upon entry. While potentially negative in implication, without explicit negative words or phrases, the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0). There isn't a specific word that conveys a particularly strong emotion but the phrase "कमळी चे वांशिग मशिन" (Kamali's legacy machine) which uses a washing machine metaphor contributes to the satirical and potentially critical nature, stopping it from being positive.

Text: तरी पण     बाकी आहेत अजून
translated_text: But there are still some left.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तरी पण बाकी आहेत अजून" (tari pan baaki aahet ajun) simply states that some things remain, without implying any particular feeling.

Text: समीर वानखेडे पुन्हा वादात; आता हे आहे कारण
translated_text: Sameer Wankhede in controversy again; now this is the reason
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("समीर वानखेडे पुन्हा वादात"), stating that Sameer Wankhede is in controversy again. While the topic might evoke negative emotions in some, the sentence itself is presented neutrally. The phrase "पुन्हा वादात" (again in controversy) simply describes a situation without expressing a positive or negative opinion, therefore contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: एकनाथ शिंदे यांच्या बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना या पक्षाला निवडणूक आयोगाकडून ढाल-तलवार हे चिन्ह
translated_text: The Election Commission has given the symbol of the Shiv Sena, the party of Eknath Shinde and Balasaheb, a shield and sword.
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event (election symbol allocation) without expressing positive or negative sentiment. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative emotion. The entire sentence is simply stating information ("निवडणूक आयोगाकडून ढाल-तलवार हे चिन्ह").

Text: जनता हेच घालणार आहे तुमच्या पार्श्वभूमीवर थोडं थांबा प्रत्येक गोष्ट वेळेनुसारच होते
translated_text: This is what the public is going to wear, wait a minute, everything happens in time.
Justification: The sentence contains a seemingly innocuous statement about the public's future actions and emphasizes timing ("प्रत्येक गोष्ट वेळेनुसारच होते"), lacking any strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "प्रत्येक गोष्ट वेळेनुसारच होते" suggests a patient, neutral observation, rather than a judgment or feeling.

Text: आता छट पूजा पण करायला लावणार काय ..आपलेच दात आपलेच ओठ..
translated_text: Now will you make me do Chhath Puja too..my own teeth, my own lips..
Justification: The phrase "आता छट पूजा पण करायला लावणार काय" expresses anger due to the implied imposition and sarcastic tone of "काय" at the end of the sentence, suggesting resentment towards being forced to do something.

Text: पाटी पुसत आहे
translated_text: The board is being wiped.
Justification: The sentence "पाटी पुसत आहे" (The board is being wiped) expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a simple, everyday action without any inherent positive or negative connotation. There isn't a specific Marathi word or phrase that contributes to a particular sentiment; it's a factual statement.

Text: हा    वाला स्किनशॅट टाका ना कोणी तरी आमचे पण मनोरंजन होउद्या
translated_text: Put a skinshot of this one or someone, let us be entertained too
Justification: "मनोरंजन होउद्या" (manoranjan houdeya), meaning "let us be entertained," indicates a desire for amusement and enjoyment, directly contributing to the joy emotion. The overall sentiment is neutral as the statement is just an expression of wanting entertainment, not necessarily positive or negative.

Text: अपर, कोणाच अकाऊंट ब्लॉक झाल?
translated_text: Upper, whose account was blocked?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the question "कोणाच अकाऊंट ब्लॉक झाल?" (konach account block zhal?), inquiring about whose account was blocked. This expresses surprise and seeks information without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: शेळीब्रेटी होतील सर तसं तर ते आधीच आहेत
translated_text: There will be goats, sir, but they already are.
Justification: The sentence expresses a matter-of-fact statement and doesn't contain any words or phrases conveying positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शेळीब्रेटी होतील सर तसं तर ते आधीच आहेत" is neutral in tone.

Text: गद्दारी करताना आपल्याला ते समजले नाही का आता लोकांना शहाणपण नका शिकवू
translated_text: Didn't we understand that when we betrayed them? Now let's not teach people wisdom.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because while the sentence expresses betrayal ("गद्दारी") and a dismissive tone ("शहाणपण नका शिकवू"), it's delivered in a questioning, almost resigned manner, lacking strong positive or negative emotional markers. The overall impact is more of a statement of fact and implied criticism rather than a display of strong emotion.

Text: निळु ला साधा प्रश्न विचारला होता
translated_text: Nilu was asked a simple question.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The Marathi phrase "साधा प्रश्न विचारला होता" (sadha prashna vicharla hota - was asked a simple question) is purely descriptive and does not convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सारे भक्त सुत्ये का असतात?
translated_text: Why are all the devotees sleeping?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and expresses surprise due to the word "सुत्ये" (sleeping) in the context of devotees, implying an unexpected or unusual situation.

Text: तुला किती मुले आहेत ते सांगशील का लोकांला.
translated_text: Will you tell people how many children you have?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The Marathi phrase "किती मुले आहेत" (kiti mule aahet) - meaning "how many children are" - is a factual inquiry, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: नाही प्रत्येकाला अभिव्यक्ति स्वातंत्र्य आहे सर  तुम्हाला ही स्वताचे असे विचार आहेत.
translated_text: No, everyone has freedom of expression, sir, you have your own thoughts.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply acknowledges freedom of expression and differing viewpoints. The phrase "अभिव्यक्ति स्वातंत्र्य आहे" (abhivyakti swatantraya aahe - freedom of expression) is a factual statement and doesn't convey any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: : सरकार दरबारी संत्रा-माेसंबीची उपेक्षा का?
translated_text: : Why is the government neglecting the orange-seasoning issue?
Justification: The phrase "उपेक्षा का?" (upeksha ka?) meaning "why neglect?" expresses surprise at the perceived neglect, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: वडिलांसारखी पलटी मारणार की ठाम राहणार हे निवडणूक आल्यावर कळेलच.
translated_text: Whether he will turn against his father or stand firm will be known after the election.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the presence of "कळेलच" (kalech), which implies a statement of fact or future event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The sentence is simply observing the uncertainty of the future.

Text: मी मनातल्या मनात देतो
translated_text: I give it to you in my heart.
Justification: The sentence conveys an internal act rather than an external one. The phrase "मनातल्या मनात देतो" (manatalya manat deto - in my heart I give) indicates an internal feeling or intention, lacking any overt expression of positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: आणि अटक व निर्धोष सुटका पण सर्वात जास्त केलेत
translated_text: And arrests and acquittals have been made the most.
Justification: The sentence reports factual information about arrests and acquittals without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सर्वात जास्त केलेत" (sarvat jast kelet - have been made the most) simply describes quantity, not an opinion or feeling.

Text: घरचा आहे का चहा सर...
translated_text: Is there any homemade tea, sir?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple, polite inquiry about tea. There's no emotional charge or sentiment-bearing phrase in "घरचा आहे का चहा सर...".

Text: मेहबुबा मुफ्तीच्या पक्षासोबत काश्मीर मध्ये सत्तेसाठी युती कोणी केली होती
translated_text: Who formed an alliance with Mehbooba Mufti's party for power in Kashmir?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The phrase "कोणी केली होती" (koni keli hoti - who did it) simply inquires about a past action, lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: नाही त्यांचे बाँड असतील, बाकी तर असणारच...नाही का
translated_text: No, they will have bonds, the rest will be there...right?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the uncertainty and inconclusive nature of the sentence. The phrase "नाही का" (nahi ka - right?) indicates a question or seeking confirmation, preventing a definitive positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सावधान! पुढील काही दिवसांसाठी असा आहे हवामान विभागाचा पावसाचा अंदाज
translated_text: Warning! This is the Meteorological Department's rainfall forecast for the next few days
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "हवामान विभागाचा पावसाचा अंदाज" (hawamaan vibhagacha pavasacha andaj - Meteorological Department's rainfall forecast) simply states a fact without conveying a specific emotion. "सावधान!" (savdhaan! - warning!) is a cautionary word, not necessarily indicating a negative sentiment, but a preparedness for a situation.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत काय असत माहिती आहे का
translated_text: Do you know what a Gram Panchayat is?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question: "ग्रामपंचायत काय असत माहिती आहे का" (Do you know what a Gram Panchayat is?). The phrase "माहिती आहे का" (do you know?) simply inquires about knowledge and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: इकडे तर    मध्ये मरण यावं ही इच्छा बाळगणारे भरपूर भेटतील
translated_text: Here, you will find many who wish to die in the middle.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "मरण यावं ही इच्छा बाळगणारे भरपूर भेटतील" (you will find many who wish to die) presents a potentially negative concept, but without expressing positive or negative feeling towards that concept. It's a statement of possibility rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: मटन आणायला कोणती गाडी घेऊन आला होता ते पहा मटण खाणाऱ्याचा नाद करायचा नाय
translated_text: Look at the car he brought to bring mutton. He doesn't want to sound like a mutton eater.
Justification: The phrase "मटण खाणाऱ्याचा नाद करायचा नाय" (He doesn't want to sound like a mutton eater) implies a negative perception of someone who eats mutton, contributing to a sense of disgust.

Text: आधी होणार आहे कि नाही याची ग्यारंटी नाही
translated_text: There is no guarantee that it will happen first.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and lack of assurance, indicated by the phrase "ग्यारंटी नाही" (guarantee nahi - no guarantee), leading to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a factual absence of guarantee without expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: मुख्य मुद्द्यावरून लक्ष्य विचलित करणे हे, संघ आणि भाजपचे अंगभूत लक्षण आणि गुणधर्म आहे.
translated_text: Diverting focus from the main issue is an inherent characteristic and trait of the RSS and the BJP.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a statement of fact or an opinion about the RSS and BJP's behavior, without expressing strong positive or negative emotions. The phrase "अंगभूत लक्षण आणि गुणधर्म आहे" (angbhut lakshan aani gundharm aahe - is an inherent characteristic and trait) is descriptive rather than emotionally charged.

Text: आणि हे ईमोजी त्यांच्या योगदानामुळे आपल्या वापरात आले आहे- मंदिर -
translated_text: And this emoji has come into our use because of their contribution - temple -
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive. The phrase "योगदानामुळे आपल्या वापरात आले आहे" (yogdanamule aaplya vapraat aale aahe - has come into our use because of their contribution) is neutral, indicating the emoji's adoption due to contribution, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ते भक्तांना खूश करण्यासाठी होते
translated_text: It was to please the devotees.
Justification: The sentence expresses an action intended to please someone, lacking inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "खूश करण्यासाठी" (khush karnyasathi - to please) indicates the purpose of the action but doesn't convey any strong sentiment or emotion on its own.

Text: झालं? म्हणजे
translated_text: Done? I mean
Justification: The phrase "झालं? म्हणजे" (Zala? Mhanje?) expresses surprise due to the questioning tone ("झालं?" - Done?) followed by a clarifying "म्हणजे" (Mhanje - I mean), implying unexpected completion.

Text: बाळासाहेबांना ज्याच्या हातचं जेवणं आवडायचं ते 'थापा शिंदेगटात का गेले?' यावर शिवसेनेची पहिली प्रतिक्रिया
translated_text: Shiv Sena's first reaction to the question 'Why did Thapa join Shinde's group, from whom Balasaheb used to love to eat?'
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive, reporting Shiv Sena's reaction to a political defection. The phrase "'थापा शिंदेगटात का गेले?'" (Why did Thapa join Shinde's group?) poses a question but doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: त्या घुघंट घालतात .. दोन्ही सारखेच नाही का वाटत तुम्हाला ?
translated_text: They wear a ghughanta.. Don't you think both are the same?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly describes an action ("घुघंट घालतात" - wear ghughanta) and poses a question about similarity ("सारखेच नाही का वाटत" - don't you think both are the same?) without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: महाशक्ती पण एका विधवा स्त्रीला घाबरते..!
translated_text: Even a superpower is afraid of a widow..!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "एका विधवा स्त्रीला घाबरते" (is afraid of a widow) contributes to surprise, as it is unexpected that a superpower would fear such a figure.

Text: सुपारी मिळत नाही तोपर्यंत नाही जागे होणार ते
translated_text: He won't wake up until he gets the betel nut.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact or condition for action. There is no sentiment expressed. The phrase "सुपारी मिळत नाही तोपर्यंत नाही जागे होणार ते" (supari milat nahi toparyant nahi jage honar te) is a factual statement and does not express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: आरे काँगेसविसर्जित करायला सांगितली होती ती आज होत आहे.
translated_text: The Aarey Congress was asked to dissolve, and it is happening today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about an event occurring ("आज होत आहे" - "is happening today") without any overt emotional or subjective language, thus indicating neutrality.

Text: म्हणून मी कमेंट्स बंद करून बसते.. दांडा बाई
translated_text: So I turn off the comments.. Danda Bai
Justification: The phrase "दांडा बाई" (Danda Bai) is an interjection expressing frustration or exasperation. While potentially negative in other contexts, here it seems more habitual or resigned, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it is likely a common expression of the speaker.

Text: हिंदुत्ववादी सरकार नवरात्री मधे दारूची दुकाने बंद ठेवणार आहे का ?
translated_text: Will the Hindutva government keep liquor shops closed during Navratri?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about a potential policy decision ("दारूची दुकाने बंद ठेवणार आहे का?") and does not contain overtly positive or negative language, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री शिंदे यांची पंतप्रधानांकडे पत्राद्वारे 'ही' मागणी
translated_text: Chief Minister Shinde's 'this' demand in a letter to the Prime Minister
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: Chief Minister Shinde made a 'this' demand ('ही मागणी') to the Prime Minister through a letter. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the action itself. The phrase "ही मागणी" is a general reference to a demand, and without further context, does not express any specific sentiment.

Text: गेले तब्बल दीड महिना लटकलेली पालकमंत्र्यांची नियुक्ती थोड्याच वेळात जाहीर होणार आहे
translated_text: The appointment of the Guardian Minister, which has been pending for the past one and a half months, will be announced shortly.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily reports a factual event. The phrase "जाहीर होणार आहे" (jahir honar aahe - will be announced) indicates a future event without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling.

Text: कारण...गेलेला दिवस परत कधीच येत नाही आणि उद्याचा काही भरवसा नाही...! प्रणाम,
translated_text: Because...the past never comes back and there is no hope for tomorrow...! Greetings,
Justification: The phrase "गेलेला दिवस परत कधीच येत नाही आणि उद्याचा काही भरवसा नाही...!" (the past never comes back and there is no hope for tomorrow) expresses a sense of loss and uncertainty, leading to the sadness emotion and a neutral sentiment overall.

Text: हे स्वतः तर त्याच्याही पेक्षा चार पावल़ं पुढं गेले आहेत ....
translated_text: This guy himself has gone four steps further than even him...
Justification: The phrase "चार पावल़ं पुढं गेले आहेत" (chaar paavala pudhe gele aahet - gone four steps ahead) implies excessive or over-the-top behavior, contributing to a feeling of disgust.

Text: हे खूपच होतंय
translated_text: This is happening a lot.
Justification: The sentence "हे खूपच होतंय" expresses a factual observation about frequency without any positive or negative connotations. The phrase "खूपच होतंय" (khupach hotay - happening a lot) simply indicates quantity or degree, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: शरद पवारांनी आशिष शेलारांबरोबर युती का केली?, संदीप पाटील म्हणाले…
translated_text: Why did Sharad Pawar form an alliance with Ashish Shelar?, Sandeep Patil said…
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and reporting of a statement. There are no inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The phrase "शरद पवारांनी आशिष शेलारांबरोबर युती का केली?" (Why did Sharad Pawar form an alliance with Ashish Shelar?) simply poses a question, and "संदीप पाटील म्हणाले…" (Sandeep Patil said…) reports information without expressing any sentiment.

Text: काय काम केला किती विकास केला त्यावर बोल.
translated_text: Talk about what work you did and how much development you made.
Justification: The sentence "काय काम केला किती विकास केला त्यावर बोल." expresses a neutral sentiment because it's simply a directive asking someone to discuss their work and development ("बोल" - talk/speak), without any inherently positive or negative words or phrases. There's no specific word or phrase conveying sentiment; it's the overall neutral framing of the request.

Text: दिवाळी आहे करायला च पाहिजे मदत
translated_text: It's Diwali, I need help.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for help ("मदत") without conveying strong positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion, keeping it neutral.

Text: ही जेन्ट्स हुडी आहे
translated_text: This is a gents hoodie.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("ही जेन्ट्स हुडी आहे" - This is a gents hoodie) with no inherently positive or negative connotations. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase present that expresses any sentiment or emotion.

Text: मुळे सर्वांना आता बोलवत आहेत..
translated_text: The roots are calling everyone now..
Justification: The sentence "मुळे सर्वांना आता बोलवत आहेत.." is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "बोलवत आहेत" (bolavat aahet) which means "calling" is used in a general, non-emotional way.

Text: टॅग केलेल्या सगळ्यांना पाब्लो सरांन कडून फराळाचे निमंत्रण देण्यात येत आहे
translated_text: Everyone tagged is being invited to a snack from Pablo Saran.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is simply an announcement of an invitation. The phrase "फराळाचे निमंत्रण देण्यात येत आहे" (faralache nimantran denyat yet aahe) which translates to "being invited to a snack" is a factual statement conveying information, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काहो ती आइसक्रीम च काय झाल घेतली होती का तोंडात
translated_text: I wonder if she had taken ice cream in her mouth
Justification: The word "काहो" expresses surprise and uncertainty, contributing to the neutral sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: आता बस झाल हातातोंडाशी आलेला घास काढून घेऊ नको
translated_text: Now, stop picking up the grass that has grown in your hands and mouth.
Justification: The phrase "हातातोंडाशी आलेला घास काढून घेऊ नको" (haatatondashi aalela ghas kadhun gheu nako) which translates to "don't take away the food that has come to my hands and mouth" implies a sense of injustice or being deprived, hence the neutral sentiment and a possible undertone of disgust. While the sentence carries a strong emotional load, the explicit expression of positive or negative feeling is absent, leading to the neutral sentiment. The implied feeling of being violated or unjustly deprived contributes to the emotion of disgust.

Text: तुम्हिच राहिले होते सांगायच
translated_text: You were the only one left.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "तुम्हिच राहिले होते सांगायच" (tumhich rahile hote sangayach) simply states a fact with no inherent positive or negative connotation. It expresses a statement of who was left to tell, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: याचा मराठी मध्ये अर्थ कोण सांगू शकेल? मला समजलेला नाही आहे
translated_text: Who can tell me the meaning of this in Marathi? I don't understand.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) because the sentence primarily expresses a request for information ("कोण सांगू शकेल?") and an expression of lack of understanding ("समजलेला नाही आहे"), neither of which strongly implies positive or negative sentiment. The emotion of surprise is weakly suggested by "समजलेला नाही आहे" (I don't understand), implying an unexpected lack of comprehension.

Text: आकाश वाणी, झालेली होती.
translated_text: The sky was full of voices.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive and factual nature of the statement "आकाश वाणी, झालेली होती". There are no inherently positive or negative connotations in simply stating that the sky was full of voices.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस ह्यांनी उद्योग खाते स्वतःकडे ठेवायला हवे होते.
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis should have kept the Industries Department with him.
Justification: The sentence expresses an opinion or suggestion about a political decision ("ठेवायला हवे होते" - should have kept) without strong positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कोणत्या आणि किती बाळासाहेबांचा आहे तू?
translated_text: Which and how many Balasahebs do you belong to?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question about affiliation ("कोणाच्या आणि किती बाळासाहेबांचा आहे तू?"), lacking any inherently positive or negative sentiment. It is not emotionally charged because it does not use any words of emotion, or phrases to denote emotion, but rather is simply asking for what group the addressee belongs to.

Text: इथे महत्त्वाचा मुद्दा कर्तृत्व आहे कर्तुत्व नसेल तर घराणेशाहीच कामाला येते
translated_text: The important point here is competence. If there is no competence, only nepotism can work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it presents a factual observation about the importance of competence versus nepotism. The phrases "महत्वाचा मुद्दा कर्तृत्व आहे" (important point is competence) and "घराणेशाहीच कामाला येते" (only nepotism can work) present a balanced view without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

translated_text: Came, came, came,....... went,...... came back, came,...
Justification: The sentence uses repetitive, simple action verbs ("आला", meaning "came" and "गेला" meaning "went") without additional context or emotional cues, making it sentimentally neutral.

Text: बाई तुम्ही तुम्हाचे बघा तुम्हाला का मिर्ची लागते
translated_text: Woman, look at yourself, why do you need chili?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "तुम्हाला का मिर्ची लागते" (tumhala ka mirchi lagte), while potentially confrontational, is a common idiom meaning "why are you so bothered?" or "why are you feeling the heat?". It doesn't necessarily convey strong positive or negative sentiment on its own without further context.

Text: त्यामुळे आपण त्या कुटुंबावर व भटक्या कुत्र्यावर योग्य ती कारवाही करावी ही नम्र विनंत्ती.
translated_text: Therefore, it is our humble request that we take appropriate action against that family and the stray dog.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request for action, and uses the phrase "नम्र विनंत्ती" (namra vinanti), meaning "humble request," which indicates politeness and neutrality rather than strong emotion or sentiment.

Text: ... शिवरायांच्या गड किल्ल्यांच्या संवर्धनाचे काम झालेच पाहिजे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: ... The work of preserving the forts of Shivaji Maharaj must be done. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: While "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) expresses pride and cultural affiliation, and advocating for fort preservation is positive, the sentence lacks strong emotional cues to push it beyond neutral. The call for preservation is presented as a necessity ("झालेच पाहिजे") rather than an enthusiastic expression, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: सोनाली चा आला की नाही
translated_text: Sonali's arrival or not?
Justification: The sentence "सोनाली चा आला की नाही" expresses a question about Sonali's arrival. The phrase "आला की नाही" (ala ki nahi - arrived or not) indicates uncertainty and a lack of emotional loading, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: अजून पण आपण ब्रिटिशांचेच कायदे आणि कानून वापरत आहोत
translated_text: But we are still using the laws and regulations of the British.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the continued use of British laws, without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings. The phrase "अजून पण" (ajun pan - still/even now) simply indicates continuation, and the rest of the sentence describes the situation objectively. No specific Marathi word or phrase signals a clear positive or negative emotion.

Text: सर्वपित्री अमावास्या शुभ की अशुभ?अमावस्या वाईट असते का? अमावास्येला नकारात्मक घटना जास्त घडतात का?
translated_text: Is Sarvapitri Amavasya auspicious or inauspicious? Is Amavasya bad? Do negative events happen more on Amavasya?
Justification: The sentence presents questions exploring the perceived negativity associated with Amavasya. The phrases "वाईट असते का?" (is it bad?) and "नकारात्मक घटना जास्त घडतात का?" (do negative events happen more?) express uncertainty and inquiry, not a definitively positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral sentiment score.

Text: जानवं' हे हिंदुत्व नसून एकमेकांना जाणून घेणं, जातीभेद, वर्णभेद न करणं हे हिंदुत्व आहे.
translated_text: Hinduism is not about 'knowing', but about knowing each other, not discriminating on the basis of caste or colour.
Justification: The sentence expresses a definition of Hinduism focusing on unity and equality, using the phrase "जातीभेद, वर्णभेद न करणं" (not discriminating on the basis of caste or colour) to convey a neutral and descriptive tone.

Text: प्रार्थना करतो की पावसाने विश्रांती घ्यावी जेणेकरून बळीराजाला ही दिवाळी आणखी आनंदी जाईल
translated_text: I pray that the rains will take a break so that Baliraja will have an even happier Diwali.
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish ("प्रार्थना करतो की पावसाने विश्रांती घ्यावी") and hope ("आनंदी जाईल") which are generally neutral in sentiment as they don't express explicit positive or negative feelings.

Text: भाजपची ब टीम आहे आय आय एम् हे विसरलात वाटते आपण
translated_text: I think you have forgotten that IIM is the B team of BJP.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a statement of opinion or observation about IIM being the B team of BJP. There isn't any explicitly positive or negative sentiment expressed through the words used. The Marathi phrases used don't carry intrinsic positive or negative connotations; it is purely a statement of political affiliation, “भाजपची ब टीम आहे आय आय एम् हे” simply states the supposed association.

Text: तरी पण मोदींपेक्षा कमी आहेत
translated_text: Still, they are less than Modi.
Justification: The sentence expresses a comparison ("कमी आहेत") implying a neutral assessment rather than a positive or negative feeling towards Modi or the comparison subject. The phrase "कमी आहेत" (less than) signals a comparison, not necessarily a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अक्षय कुमार अभिनित राम सेतू या चित्रपटाचा ट्रेलर प्रदर्शित झाला आहे.
translated_text: The trailer of the film Ram Setu starring Akshay Kumar has been released.
Justification: The sentence is factual and descriptive, simply stating the release of a movie trailer. There is no Marathi word or phrase that expresses a positive or negative opinion, hence the neutral sentiment. The sentence focuses on objective information and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: आता महाराष्ट्र जेलमधुन कधी येणार बाहेर?
translated_text: When will Maharashtra come out of jail?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a factual question about someone's release from jail; there isn't any specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative feeling. The phrase "कधी येणार बाहेर?" (kadhi yenar baher? - when will [someone] come out?) is simply asking for information.

Text: हे हिंदुशक्ति-संभूत-दीप्तितम-तेजा हे हिंदुतपस्या-पूत ईश्वरी ओजा हे हिंदुश्री-सौभाग्य-भूतीच्या साजा हे हिंदु-नृसिंहा प्रभो शिवाजीराजा
translated_text: O Hindushakti-Sambhuta-Diptitam-Teja O Hindu-Tapasya-Put Ishwari Oja O Hindushri-Saubhagya-Bhooti Saja O Hindu-Nrisimha Prabho Shivajiraja
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral as the sentence is a devotional address. While containing elements of praise and admiration, signaled by words like "श्री" (Shri), "तेजा" (Teja), "ओजा" (Oja), and addressing Shivaji Maharaj as "प्रभो" (Prabho), it's primarily reverential rather than expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment. The overall tone is of respect and reverence.

Text: निवडणुकीत मोठमोठी आश्वासने देतात लोकांमध्ये या, आणि जिंकल्यानंतर बेरोजगारांना रोजगारही देऊ शकत नाही.
translated_text: They make big promises during elections to attract people, and after winning, they cannot even provide jobs to the unemployed.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "देऊ शकत नाही" (deu shakat nahi - cannot give/provide), which expresses an inability to fulfill promises, but does not explicitly convey negativity, positivity, anger, or other strong emotions in this context. It simply states a factual limitation.

Text: तात्या सर काय म्हणती ही बघा जरा...
translated_text: See what Tatya sir says...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply an observation or a request to observe what "Tatya sir" is saying. The phrase "काय म्हणती ही बघा जरा..." (kay mhanti hi bagha zara...), meaning "see what he says," is a neutral request for information.

Text: सत्तेसाठी लाचार, तिथं नाही चालणार ढाल तलवार!
translated_text: Helpless for power, no shield or sword will work there!
Justification: "लाचार" (lachar), meaning helpless or desperate, suggests a negative state and fuels anger towards the situation described.

Text: हे लावून बघा भाऊ, नक्किच फायदा होईल आणि फॉलोवर वाढतील
translated_text: Try this, brother, it will definitely benefit you and increase your following.
Justification: The sentence conveys a helpful suggestion, with "नक्किच फायदा होईल" (nakich fayada hoil - will definitely benefit) suggesting a positive outcome, but without strong emotional expression, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: खाण्यामुळे नाही तर, ‘या’ आजारामुळे वाढू शकतो तुमचे वजन
translated_text: Not because of eating, but because of this disease, your weight can increase
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual possibility. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The sentence discusses weight gain due to a disease ("आजारामुळे"), which is neither inherently positive nor negative in this context.

Text: म्हणजे रामदास आठवलेना सर्व माफ आहे का?
translated_text: So, is everything forgiven for Ramdas Athawale?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question implying possible unfairness, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "म्हणजे...आहे का?" (mhanje...aahe ka?) indicating a questioning or speculative tone, contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: शासकीय कर्मचाऱ्यांप्रमाणे कमीत कमी वीस वर्षाची अट टाका
translated_text: Set a minimum requirement of twenty years like government employees
Justification: The sentence expresses a proposition ("Set a minimum requirement of twenty years like government employees") without overtly positive or negative language. There's no emotional charge detectable. "शासकीय कर्मचाऱ्यांप्रमाणे कमीत कमी वीस वर्षाची अट टाका" is a factual statement, leading to the neutral sentiment.

Text: वेगवान गोलंदाज पॅट कमिन्स हा ऑस्ट्रेलियाचा नवा एकदिवसीय कर्णधार असणार आहे.
translated_text: Fast bowler Pat Cummins will be Australia's new ODI captain.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative opinions. The sentence "वेगवान गोलंदाज पॅट कमिन्स हा ऑस्ट्रेलियाचा नवा एकदिवसीय कर्णधार असणार आहे" contains factual information about Pat Cummins becoming Australia's ODI captain, with no sentiment expressed.

Text: जेव्हा सम्राट अशोक होते तेव्हा एक ही मुस्लिमच ची हिम्मत झाली नाही.
translated_text: When Emperor Ashoka was king, not a single Muslim dared.
Justification: The sentence expresses a historical observation without explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जेव्हा सम्राट अशोक होते तेव्हा एक ही मुस्लिमच ची हिम्मत झाली नाही" simply states a lack of Muslim daring during Ashoka's reign, lacking emotional inflection. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: हा महाराष्ट्र आहे आमचा , गुजरात नाही . गुजरात ला जायचं
translated_text: This is our Maharashtra, not Gujarat. I want to go to Gujarat.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of belonging and a desire to travel, with no inherently positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "हा महाराष्ट्र आहे आमचा" (this is our Maharashtra) simply states affiliation.

Text: म्हणून मी घरातून अजुन बाहेर नाही आलो....
translated_text: So I haven't left the house yet...
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("म्हणून मी घरातून अजुन बाहेर नाही आलो...") without any explicit emotional indicators. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is justified as there are no words or phrases conveying positivity, negativity, joy, sadness, anger, or any other identifiable emotion. The phrase "बाहेर नाही आलो" (haven't left) simply describes an action not taken, rather than expressing a feeling about it.

Text: मनसेने दिली गुलाबाची फुले आणि महापौर पंचम कलानी मराठीत बोलल्या ./-…
translated_text: MNS gave rose flowers and Mayor Pancham Kalani spoke in Marathi./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("गुलाबाची फुले दिली आणि मराठीत बोलल्या"), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तीन महिन्यात हे बांधुन झाले का?किती वर्षे लागली ते ही सांगा ना...
translated_text: Was this built in three months? Tell me how many years it took...
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "तीन महिन्यात हे बांधुन झाले का?", which translates to "Was this built in three months?". The incredulity about the short timeframe suggests surprise.

Text: आता राजकीय परिस्थती बघता तुमच्या सारखा पत्रकाराची गरज आहे .
translated_text: Given the current political situation, we need journalists like you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for journalists, reflecting a neutral sentiment. The phrase "गरज आहे" (garaj aahe - need is) indicates a requirement or necessity without expressing positive or negative emotion, thus contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: घेतो का तुझ्यावर उडवून
translated_text: Do you take it and throw it at me?
Justification: The sentence "घेतो का तुझ्यावर उडवून" is neutral as it is a question about a hypothetical action ("उडवून" - throwing) and lacks inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase is simply descriptive without expressing any particular feeling.

Text: जाधव, त्याला प्रीतीमा नाही प्रतिमा म्हणतात..
translated_text: Jadhav, it is called Pratima, not Preetima.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple correction of a name: "प्रतिमा म्हणतात" (pratima mhanatat) indicates a factual statement of what something is called, lacking any emotional or opinionated tone.

Text: त्याला आता गावालाच पाठवायचा आहे
translated_text: He wants to send him to the village now.
Justification: The sentence "त्याला आता गावालाच पाठवायचा आहे" is neutral because it simply states a fact or intention without any emotionally charged words. There is no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment; it's a statement of planned action.

Text: तरीही मालकाकडे सुरक्षा मागितली होती...आणि आता तर ब्लॅक बेल्ट!
translated_text: Still, I asked the owner for protection...and now I have a black belt!
Justification: The phrase "आणि आता तर ब्लॅक बेल्ट!" ("and now I have a black belt!") expresses surprise because it implies an unexpected positive development after initially seeking protection, indicating a newfound self-sufficiency. The "आता तर" (now, even) emphasizes this unexpectedness.

Text: सुप्रीम लिडर मोदीजी पण या लोकांना घाबरतात मग शिंदे कुठं लागलं...
translated_text: Supreme Leader Modiji is also afraid of these people, so where is Shinde?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a rhetorical question ("शिंदे कुठं लागलं...") implying a comparison and questioning someone's standing, without exhibiting explicitly positive or negative feelings. There's no inherently positive or negative word, making it sentimentally neutral.

Text: माझ्यासाठी हा महाराष्ट्र फक्त छत्रपती शिवराय आणि छत्रपती शंभूराजेंचा आहे
translated_text: For me, this Maharashtra belongs only to Chhatrapati Shivaji and Chhatrapati Shambhuraj.
Justification: The sentence expresses ownership and reverence towards historical figures ("छत्रपती शिवराय आणि छत्रपती शंभूराजेंचा आहे" - belongs to Chhatrapati Shivaji and Chhatrapati Shambhuraj), indicating a neutral sentiment rather than positive or negative. There's no explicit positive or negative language.

Text: आज नवरात्रीचा पहिला दिवस, अशी करा देवी शैलपुत्रीची पूजा
translated_text: Today is the first day of Navratri, worship Goddess Shailputri like this
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys factual information about the start of Navratri and a suggestion on how to worship. There are no inherently positive or negative words. The Marathi phrase "आज नवरात्रीचा पहिला दिवस" (aaj navratricha pahila diwas - today is the first day of Navratri) is a statement of fact.

Text: राज साहेबानी गोटी टाकली पाहू सामोर काय होते तर..
translated_text: Raj Saheb threw the coin, let's see what happens..
Justification: The sentence describes an action and anticipation ("गोटी टाकली पाहू सामोर काय होते तर" - threw the coin, let's see what happens). It doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: तो हार्दिक पटेल भाजप मधे आला त्यावेळी शोक सभा झाली की नाही त?
translated_text: Was there a condolence meeting when Hardik Patel joined the BJP?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and questioning nature of "शोक सभा झाली की नाही त?" (shok sabha jhali ki nahi t? - was there a condolence meeting?), which lacks any explicit positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: यातील परस्पर सहमती आणि बळजबरी चे निर्णय कोणते हे शोधने संशोधनाचा विषय आहे..!
translated_text: It is a subject of research to find out which decisions are based on mutual consent and which are based on coercion..!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it objectively states that identifying consensual vs. coerced decisions is a research topic, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The Marathi phrase "संशोधनाचा विषय आहे" (subject of research) indicates a neutral observation rather than any specific sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन : यशस्वी आणि पियूष
translated_text: Raksha Bandhan: Yashwashi and Piyush
Justification: The sentence is simply listing names ("यशस्वी आणि पियूष" - Yashwashi and Piyush) associated with the Raksha Bandhan festival and does not contain any words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: या मुळेच विश्वगुरु पत्रकार परिषद घेत नाही
translated_text: This is why Vishwaguru does not hold press conferences
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the Vishwaguru's actions (or inaction). The phrase "या मुळेच... घेत नाही" (yaa mulech... ghet naahi) implying a simple cause-and-effect relationship and the absence of press conferences, carries no inherent sentiment or emotion.

Text: अगदीच बरोबर. विरोधकांनी एकत्र येऊन लढा द्यायलाच हवा आहे.
translated_text: Absolutely right. The opposition must come together and fight.
Justification: While the sentence expresses agreement with the opposition uniting and fighting, the phrase "अगदीच बरोबर" (absolutely right) doesn't inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment in this context. It's a statement of agreement and advocacy rather than a display of intense emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: पुरुषोत्तम ला मी जाऊन आलोय
translated_text: I have been to Purushottam.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("पुरुषोत्तम ला मी जाऊन आलोय" - I have been to Purushottam.) with no indicators of positive or negative sentiment or any specific emotion. The phrase "जाऊन आलोय" (went and came) indicates a completed action with no additional emotional coloring.

Text: आमच्या येथील सार्वजनिक शौचालयं साफ होत नाहीत वेळेवर.. प्रयत्न केला तर बरं होईल
translated_text: Our public toilets here are not cleaned on time.. It would be better if we tried.
Justification: The phrase "साफ होत नाहीत" (saaf hot nahit - are not cleaned) indicates a negative state, contributing to the disgust emotion as it describes an unpleasant situation.

Text: तास कष्ट करून हा फोटो मिळाला.. भाया, आर्थिक मदत अपेक्षित आहे
translated_text: I got this photo after hours of hard work.. Brother, financial help is expected.
Justification: The phrase "तास कष्ट करून" (taas kasht karun - after hours of hard work) suggests effort and subsequent achievement, potentially linked to the joy emotion, though the overall sentiment is neutral as the request for help balances this out.

Text: शिंदे गटाला ढाल आणि तलवार निवडणूक चिन्ह; निवडणूक आयोगाचा निर्णय
translated_text: Election Commission decides on shield and sword election symbol for Shinde group
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a factual decision made by the Election Commission. There is no explicit positive or negative wording. The phrase "निवडणूक आयोगाचा निर्णय" (niwadnuk aayogacha nirnay - Election Commission's decision) indicates a factual announcement, lacking any emotional tone.

Text: त्या हाताने खाल्ले होते वाटते तुझ्या नमोने
translated_text: It seems that you were eating with that hand, with your praise.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it describes a past action ("खाल्ले होते") and attributes it to the person ("तुझ्या नमोने"), without any overt positive or negative connotation. The phrase "खाल्ले होते वाटते" simply indicates an observation or deduction.

Text: मोफत धान्यवाटप कार्यक्रम सुरु करण्यात आले आहे हे कार्य अविरतपणे तीन दिवस चालणार आहे.
translated_text: A free food distribution program has been started and will continue for three days continuously.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes an event (free food distribution program) without expressing positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrases "मोफत धान्यवाटप कार्यक्रम सुरु करण्यात आले आहे" (a free food distribution program has been started) and "अविरतपणे तीन दिवस चालणार आहे" (will continue for three days continuously) are factual and descriptive, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: कोल्हापूर उत्तर पोटनिवडणूकीत पण हेच केलं चंपा ने.
translated_text: Champa did the same in the Kolhapur North by-election.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "हेच केलं" (hech kelं) - "did the same" - is a descriptive statement and doesn't carry any inherent sentiment or emotion.

Text: होय असे बऱ्याचदा होते
translated_text: Yes, that often happens.
Justification: The sentence expresses a common occurrence without strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "होय असे बऱ्याचदा होते" simply acknowledges a frequent event and doesn't carry any significant sentiment or emotional weight, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: भुजबळांनी भुजबळ नाॅलेज सिटीला महात्मा फुलेंचे किंवा सावित्रीबाई फुले यांचे नांव का दिले नाही...?
translated_text: Why didn't Bhujbal name Bhujbal Knowledge City after Mahatma Phule or Savitribai Phule...?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the interrogative nature questioning Bhujbal's decision: "का दिले नाही...?" (ka dile nahi...? - Why didn't [he] give...?). This implies an unexpected deviation from the norm or expectation, resulting in surprise.

Text: ही पण रिझवी कॉलेज ला गेलेली का....
translated_text: Did she also go to Rizvi College?...
Justification: The sentence "ही पण रिझवी कॉलेज ला गेलेली का...." is neutral because it is simply a question, lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases. The question word "का" (ka - meaning "why" or in this case, used to form a question) doesn't inherently carry any sentiment.

Text: आता नानाच एकसारखे बोलत होते, तर एकनाथजी काय बोलतील?
translated_text: Now that everyone was talking the same way, what would Eknathji say?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question that simply states a scenario ("आता नानाच एकसारखे बोलत होते, तर एकनाथजी काय बोलतील?") without expressing any positive or negative emotion. There are no specific words or phrases indicating sentiment.

Text: काळे कपडे नसतील तर संक्रांतीला तिळगुळ ही वाटायला जायला बंदी असते का?
translated_text: Is it forbidden to go and distribute Tilgul on Sankranti if one does not wear black clothes?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the implied social pressure and potential judgment associated with not wearing black clothes during Sankranti, expressed in the question regarding a potential "बंदी असते का?" (bandi aste ka? - is it forbidden?). This phrase suggests a feeling of being forced or restricted, leading to the emotion of disgust.

Text: आता तुम्हीच साहेबांचा अपमान करायला लागल्यावर कसं होणार
translated_text: Now what will happen when you start insulting the boss?
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the phrase "अपमान करायला लागल्यावर कसं होणार" (apman karayla laglyavar kasa honar), which conveys a sense of dismay and disapproval regarding the disrespect towards the boss. The implication of negative consequences further reinforces the disgust emotion and a neutral sentiment.

Text: हा ट्रॅक्टर कोणत्या देशात आहे सांगा आणि बक्षिस मिळवा !
translated_text: Tell us which country this tractor is from and win a prize!
Justification: The emotion "joy" is indicated by the phrase "बक्षिस मिळवा" (bakshis milva), which means "win a prize," suggesting excitement and happiness related to the possibility of winning.

Text: आता महाविद्यालयेच ठरवणार अभ्यासक्रम; ची सुधारित नियमांना मंजुरी
translated_text: Now colleges will decide the curriculum; revised rules approved
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a change in college regulations ("आता महाविद्यालयेच ठरवणार अभ्यासक्रम; ची सुधारित नियमांना मंजुरी"), lacking any emotionally charged or subjective language, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: एखाद्याला मेसेज करून त्याने तो रीड केलाय का नाही हे दर    मिनिटांनी तपासणे...
translated_text: Sending someone a message and checking every minute to see if they have read it...
Justification: The sentence describes a common behavior, "एखाद्याला मेसेज करून त्याने तो रीड केलाय का नाही हे दर मिनिटांनी तपासणे" (sending someone a message and checking every minute to see if they have read it), without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. Hence, the overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: सीट कोणाची होती ???
translated_text: Whose seat was it???
Justification: The sentence "सीट कोणाची होती ???" is neutral because it is a simple question ("Whose seat was it?") and does not express any particular emotion or sentiment. The phrase "कोणाची होती" (konachi hoti - whose was it) is a neutral inquiry.

Text: रिक्त पदे आहेत.
translated_text: There are vacant positions.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "रिक्त पदे आहेत" (rikta pade aahet), meaning "there are vacant positions," simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ट्विट ने तेवढं च मनाचं समाधान
translated_text: That tweet is so satisfying.
Justification: The word "समाधान" (samadhan), meaning "satisfaction," indicates a positive feeling, and in this context, its intensity isn't strong enough to register a strong positive sentiment, placing it at a neutral sentiment of 0.0 with "joy" as the associated emotion.

Text: : मातोश्री नाही तर राज ठाकरेंचं शिवतीर्थ सत्तेचं केंद्र बनतंय का?
translated_text: : Is Raj Thackeray's Shivtirth becoming the center of power instead of Matoshree?
Justification: The neutral sentiment arises from the questioning nature of the sentence. The phrase "सत्तेचं केंद्र बनतंय का?" (sattech kendra bantaay ka?) which translates to "becoming the center of power?" indicates an inquiry rather than a statement of positive or negative sentiment. The surprise element stems from the implied shift in power dynamic being questioned.

Text: सर यात आधी काँग्रेस आणि राष्ट्रवादी तसेच संभाजी ब्रिगेड यांचाही सामावेश आहे.
translated_text: Sir, this includes Congress and NCP as well as Sambhaji Brigade.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual inclusion of political parties; there is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The sentence primarily uses factual Marathi words like "काँग्रेस" (Congress), "राष्ट्रवादी" (NCP), "तसेच" (as well as), and "समावेश" (inclusion).

Text: दरारा हा वाघांचा असतो करणाऱ्यांचा नसतो त्याचा फक्त मुजरा असतो
translated_text: Fear belongs to the tiger, not to the doer, it is only a greeting.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it contrasts "darara" (fear) belonging to tigers with a "mujrra" (greeting) for doers. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation in the contrast presented; "mujrra asto" implying respect is balanced with "darara" belonging to tigers.

Text: त्यांना मोफत प्रवास होता
translated_text: They had free travel.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about free travel and lacks any emotional or opinionated content. The Marathi phrase "मोफत प्रवास" (moft pravas) simply indicates "free travel," contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: लेकभूषण असणं हे उद्योगभूषण असण्यापेक्ष्या मोठं आहे.
translated_text: Being a Lake Bhushan is bigger than being an industrial Bhushan.
Justification: The sentence presents a comparison between two types of awards ("लेकभूषण" and "उद्योगभूषण"). The Marathi word "मोठं" (bigger) simply indicates a relative size or importance, without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: रस्ते कशे बांधावे , शहर कसे रचावे हे महापालिका ठरवते
translated_text: The municipal corporation decides how to build roads and how to design the city.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the municipal corporation's responsibilities. There's no emotional language or subjective opinion expressed. The Marathi phrase "महापालिका ठरवते" (mahapalika tharavate - municipal corporation decides) is a factual statement and contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुला पण वेदु    चे   कधी होणार यावर फोकस कर
translated_text: Focus on when Vedu will be yours too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or direction ("फोकस कर" - focus) without inherently positive or negative connotations, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या सत्ता संघर्षावर उद्या सुप्रीम कोर्टात सुनावणी; सुनावणीचे थेट प्रक्षेपण होणार.....
translated_text: Hearing on Maharashtra's power struggle in Supreme Court tomorrow; Hearing will be telecast live.....
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of an upcoming court hearing ("सुनावणी") with no explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: या छळातूनच नव्या क्रांतीच्या ठिणग्या उडतील; सेनेच्या ढाण्या वाघाचे आईला कोठडीतून पत्र
translated_text: This torture will spark a new revolution; Army's Dhana Wagh's letter to his mother from custody
Justification: "छळातून" (chhalatun), meaning "from torture," evokes disgust due to the implication of suffering and injustice, contributing to the negative emotional response. The sentence lacks a clear positive or negative leaning when considering overall sentiment, yielding a value of 0.0

Text: कपिवा हेअर केअर ज्यूस वापरकर्त्यांची केसगळती कमी करण्यास कशी मदत करते ते इथे वाचा.
translated_text: Read here how Kapiva Hair Care Juice helps users reduce hair loss.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply informative and descriptive, stating a fact that one can read about the Kapiva Hair Care Juice. The phrase "कशी मदत करते ते इथे वाचा" (kashi madat karte te ithe vacha - read here how it helps) is a neutral statement prompting the reader to find out more, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मले आधी वाटलं तुम्ही सोता सोंगलेल्या सोयाबीन चा फोटु टाकलं का काय?
translated_text: I thought you posted a photo of the soybeans that were wrapped in silk.
Justification: The sentence expresses a thought or inquiry without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "मले आधी वाटलं" (male adhi vatla - I initially thought) simply introduces a statement of belief, and the rest of the sentence is a neutral observation about the photo's subject.

Text: लोकांना आणी पत्रकार या नात्याने तुम्हालाही अधिकार आहेच.अग्रलेखातुन आवाज़ उठवा
translated_text: As people and journalists, you also have rights. Raise your voice from the front page.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it focuses on stating rights ("अधिकार आहेच") and encouraging action ("आवाज़ उठवा") without expressing any strong positive or negative emotions. The phrase "अधिकार आहेच" (have rights) contributes to the neutral tone by simply stating a fact.

Text: गुन्हे दाखल झाले का? या औलादी झोडून काढायला हव्यात.
translated_text: Have any charges been filed? These children should be thrown out.
Justification: The phrase "औलादी झोडून काढायला हव्यात" (These children should be thrown out) expresses anger and a desire for harsh action, contributing to the negative sentiment and anger emotion.

Text: , नेहमी ज्यात आवड आहे आणि समाधान मिळत तेच काम करत रहायचं.
translated_text: Always do what you love and what gives you satisfaction.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general positive sentiment towards pursuing work that provides satisfaction and enjoyment. However, without more emotionally charged words, the sentiment is considered neutral (0.0). No specific word drives a particularly positive or negative emotion.

Text: भाई तुझ्या सारखं रिंगण तर नाही केलं ना?
translated_text: Brother, you didn't do the same thing as me, did you?
Justification: The phrase "भाई तुझ्या सारखं रिंगण तर नाही केलं ना?" implies the speaker is questioning the listener's actions with a hint of anger, based on a potential previous negative experience ("माझ्या सारखं"). Although the sentence can be seen as a simple question, the phrase "रिंगण तर नाही केलं ना?" hints towards something that the speaker perceives as potentially wrong or undesirable, triggering an emotional reaction.

Text: हे सर्व एका घरातले आहेत परंतू एकनाथ शिंदे मध्येच कुठेतरी
translated_text: All of them are from the same family, but somewhere in between is Eknath Shinde.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about Eknath Shinde's position relative to others, lacking sentiment or emotional charge. The phrase "एका घरातले आहेत परंतू एकनाथ शिंदे मध्येच कुठेतरी" (from the same family, but Eknath Shinde is somewhere in between) simply describes a relationship and doesn't express a positive, negative, or emotional viewpoint.

Text: राजस्थानमध्ये काँग्रेसचं काय होणार असा प्रश्न निर्माण झाला होता. पण, रात्री अनेक घडामोडी घडल्यानंतर
translated_text: The question arose as to what would happen to the Congress in Rajasthan. But after many developments that night,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes a situation and poses a question ("काय होणार असा प्रश्न निर्माण झाला होता") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तीन झाले का?  म्या दोघच समजत होतो
translated_text: Is it three? I thought it was two.
Justification: The phrase "तीन झाले का?" (Is it three?) indicates surprise, hence the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment. The "का?" directly translates to "why?" or "is it?" in a surprised manner, confirming unexpectedness.

Text: : कोल्हापूरपासून वणीपर्यंत, ही आहेत महाराष्ट्रातील साडेतीन शक्तिपीठे
translated_text: : From Kolhapur to Wani, these are the three and a half Shakti Peethas in Maharashtra
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement describing locations of Shakti Peethas. There is no specific word or phrase expressing a positive or negative emotion; it's simply informative. Hence, no specific Marathi word contributes to a particular sentiment.

Text: भाजप मध्ये घराणेशाही नाही बर बर का....
translated_text: There is no dynasty in BJP, why not...
Justification: The phrase "बर बर का...." ("bar bar ka....") indicates mild affirmation or a rhetorical question, neutralizing any potential sentiment.

Text: नंबर या बारकोड
translated_text: Number or barcode
Justification: The sentence simply lists options ("Number or barcode"), and lacks any emotional or opinionated language. The neutral sentiment is driven by the absence of any sentiment-bearing Marathi words or phrases; "नंबर" (number), "या" (or), and "बारकोड" (barcode) are all objective terms.

Text: भोंडल्याची भुलाबईची गाणी पण ह्या अश्या स्लो रॅप मध्ये येतात का
translated_text: Do Bhondla's Bhulabai songs also come in slow rap like this?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a question asking about the style of Bhondla songs; there isn't any overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "भोंडल्याची भुलाबईची गाणी" (Bhondla's Bhulabai songs) simply refers to a type of song and doesn't carry any inherent sentiment.

Text: हा उत्तम कोण आहे.?
translated_text: Who is this good?
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam - good) suggests a positive attribute, but the interrogative structure ("कोण आहे.? - kon aahe? - who is?") creates uncertainty and surprise, neutralizing any strong positive sentiment and leading to surprise.

Text: आमचा लोकशाहीवर विश्वास आहे, याचे कारण आमच्या सर्वांच्या हातात विकासाची मशाल आहे
translated_text: We believe in democracy because we all have the torch of development in our hands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a belief in democracy and the idea of collective progress ("विकासाची मशाल आहे"), which is factual and aspirational, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe, meaning "believe in") indicates a statement of belief, which, in this context, does not inherently carry a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: योग्य वेळेची वाट बघण्यासाठी संयम असणे, हीच खरी जिवनातली अवघड परीक्षा आहे.
translated_text: Having the patience to wait for the right time is the real test of life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general philosophical observation about life and patience, without overtly expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "अवघड परीक्षा" (avghad pariksha) - meaning difficult test or challenge - describes a situation but doesn't inherently carry a strong positive or negative sentiment, contributing to the neutral score.

Text: तुमच्या मधे आहे का पाऊस???
translated_text: Is there rain in your house???
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question about the presence of rain. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases; "तुमच्या मधे आहे का पाऊस???" simply inquires about weather conditions.

Text: हे कळण्यासाठी माणसात थोडीतरी प्रगल्भता असावी लागते
translated_text: One needs to have some depth to understand this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a requirement of maturity or understanding without overtly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "प्रगल्भता असावी लागते" (pragalbhata asavi lagate - needs to have depth/maturity) indicates a necessary quality for comprehension, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: तरी सरकार काही करत नव्हते?निवडणुकीची वाट पाहत होते?मधेच "भारत जोडो" अले?
translated_text: Yet the government was not doing anything? Was it waiting for the elections? In the meantime, "Bharat Jodo" was added?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily consists of questions and factual statements about the government's inaction and the occurrence of "Bharat Jodo". There is no explicit positive or negative word or phrase that clearly expresses sentiment. The questions "तरी सरकार काही करत नव्हते? निवडणुकीची वाट पाहत होते?" and the statement "मधेच "भारत जोडो" अले?" are presented without any emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: जर्मनीच्या शांतीदुतांचे निवेदन जाहीर कराल का? म्हणजे जनतेला सुध्दा दिसेल.
translated_text: Will you make the statement of the German peace envoys public? So that the public can see it too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple request for information. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase; it simply asks "जर्मनीच्या शांतीदुतांचे निवेदन जाहीर कराल का?" (Will you make the statement of the German peace envoys public?).

Text: लोकांनी ओळखून घ्यावे ह्यांनी अंधेरीत का माघार घेतली
translated_text: People should know why they retreated to Andheri.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about a political retreat ("माघार घेतली"), lacking overtly positive or negative phrasing.

Text: तुमच्या करता तो सेटलमेंट चा वारसा असतो म्हणे खरं आहे का ?
translated_text: Is it true that you say it is a legacy of settlement?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and uncertain tone conveyed by "म्हणे खरं आहे का ?" which translates to "is it true?". This indicates a query or a report of hearsay rather than a statement of fact or feeling.

Text: आता शिवसेना कोणाची होणार ? निवडणूक आयोग आयुक्तांनी सांगितली शक्यता
translated_text: Who will Shiv Sena belong to now? Election Commission Commissioner has mentioned the possibility
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("आता शिवसेना कोणाची होणार ?") and reports a factual possibility ("निवडणूक आयोग आयुक्तांनी सांगितली शक्यता") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अनंत कुरमुसेलाही अभिव्यक्ति स्वातंत्र्य होते, पण..............
translated_text: Anant Kurmuse also had freedom of expression, but.........
Justification: The sentence ends with "पण (pan)", which translates to "but." This conjunction introduces a potential shift or contrast, preventing a positive or negative sentiment and resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: विशेष म्हणजे अंगणात एक कडेवर एक आणि पोटात एक असताना
translated_text: Especially when there's one on the side and one in the stomach in the yard.
Justification: The phrase "पोटात एक असताना" (potat ek astana - one in the stomach) is the most indicative of disgust, implying pregnancy in a potentially unwelcome or burdensome context.

Text: गुरुवान खाऊन पण टाकला असात तो नारळ...
translated_text: Guruwan would have eaten that coconut...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact or speculation without any inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "गुरुवान खाऊन पण टाकला असात" (Guruwan would have eaten) is a neutral observation about a possible action.

Text: : टीम इंडियाला मिळणार नवा उपकर्णधार, रोहितच्या जागी हा खेळाडू करणार नेतृत्व
translated_text: : Team India will get a new vice-captain, this player will lead in place of Rohit
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event, "टीम इंडियाला मिळणार नवा उपकर्णधार" (Team India will get a new vice-captain), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वीस पैशाच्या पुढे जे नाणे ठेवलेले आहे ते नाणे मी वापरलेले नाही
translated_text: I haven't used the coin that is placed next to the twenty paise.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about not using a coin ("मी वापरलेले नाही"). There are no sentiment bearing words or phrases in the sentence. The words "वीस पैशाच्या पुढे जे नाणे ठेवलेले आहे ते नाणे" simply describe the coin. Thus, the sentence is neutral.

Text: दडपशाही विरूद्ध सर्वपक्षानी एकत्र येणे क्रमपात्र आहे
translated_text: It is imperative for all parties to unite against oppression.
Justification: The sentence expresses a necessary action against oppression, focusing on unity ("एकत्र येणे") rather than expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "विरुद्ध दडपशाही" (against oppression) describes the context, but the sentence itself is a statement of necessity and action, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही का हवा आणि देता
translated_text: Why do you want and give?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral question ("तुम्ही का हवा आणि देता?"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed within the Marathi words themselves.

Text: माझा थ्रेड हा हिंदुधर्म म्हणजे काय हाच असेल
translated_text: My thread will be about what Hinduism is.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the topic of a thread ("माझा थ्रेड हा हिंदुधर्म म्हणजे काय हाच असेल" - My thread will be about what Hinduism is). There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative feelings, opinions, or evaluations. The sentence is factual and descriptive.

Text: हे जिल्ह्याचे नाही तर विभागाचे झाले.
translated_text: This happened not at the district level but at the department level.
