Text: महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री म्हणून तुम्हाला कोण आवडेल? क्लिक करा आणि वोट द्या
translated_text: Who would you like to be the Chief Minister of Maharashtra? Click and vote
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about preferences ("कोन आवडेल?") and encourages participation ("क्लिक करा आणि वोट द्या") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बाबा आत्ता पर्यंत कुठे होता
translated_text: Where has Dad been until now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple question about location and time ("कुठे होता"), lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: इतकं मोठं पोत आहे का तुझ्याकडे
translated_text: Do you have such a big vessel?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "इतकं मोठं" (itka motha), which translates to "such a big". The implication of size creates a sense of unexpectedness, hence the surprise emotion and a neutral sentiment as it is simply a question expressing wonder.

Text: यांना बाळासाहेब यांचा फोटो वापरण्याची परवानगी आहे का.
translated_text: Do they have permission to use Balasaheb's photo?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature of "परवानगी आहे का" (paravangi aahe ka), which simply inquires about permission and does not express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वाह वाह वाह म्हणून भाड्याने देता पक्ष नै का
translated_text: Why do you rent it out as a party?
Justification: The phrase "वाह वाह वाह" expresses sarcasm and disbelief, leading to a neutral sentiment. This is coupled with rhetorical questioning ("पक्ष नै का"), further contributing to the lack of strong positive or negative sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: संडास साफ करणारा होता मग तुझे काय मत आहे
translated_text: He was a toilet cleaner, so what do you think?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily poses a question ("काय मत आहे") following a statement of fact. While the job mentioned ("संडास साफ करणारा") might evoke negative feelings in some contexts, the overall phrasing lacks explicit emotional indicators or value judgements. The phrase "काय मत आहे" simply seeks an opinion without inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: यही न्युइंडीया हे
translated_text: This is New India
Justification: The sentence "यही न्युइंडीया हे" is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "न्युइंडीया हे" (New India is) presents a neutral observation.

Text: व्यक्त झाल्याने नात तुटण्याचे प्रमाण अधिक आहे
translated_text: There is a higher rate of relationship breakdown due to expressing
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual observation ("प्रमाण अधिक आहे" - rate is higher) without expressing any particular positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "व्यक्त झाल्याने नात तुटण्याचे प्रमाण अधिक आहे" simply states a correlation between expression and relationship breakdown.

Text:
महाशिवरात्रीला उपवास नेमका कसा करावा? जाणून घ्या...
 
./-…
translated_text:
How to fast on Mahashivratri? Find out...

./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply posing a question ("कसा करावा?") and inviting the reader to learn more, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (find out) further reinforces this informational, rather than emotional, tone.

Text: शिवसैनिकांचं मातोश्रीवर शक्तीप्रदर्शन, उद्धव ठाकरे म्हणाले...
translated_text: Shiv Sainiks' show of strength at Matoshree, Uddhav Thackeray said...
Justification: The sentence describes a "shakti pradarshan" (शक्तीप्रदर्शन), or show of strength, which in itself is a neutral description of an event and doesn't carry inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बॉलिवूडचा ‘हा’ कलाकर अमिताभ बच्चनमुळे शिकला शाळा, अभिनेत्याने स्व:च केला खुलासा
translated_text: Bollywood's 'Ha' artist studied at school because of Amitabh Bachchan, the actor himself revealed
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it mainly conveys information about an actor's education. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating any positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is a factual statement.

Text: एक कुत्रा होता तो पण आता आत आहे
translated_text: There was a dog, but now it's inside.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment (0.0) because while it mentions a past presence ("होता" - was) and a current location ("आत आहे" - is inside), it lacks any explicit emotional coloring. The emotion of surprise stems from the implied shift in the dog's location ("पण आता" - but now"), suggesting an unexpected change. The core sentiment remains neutral as there is no positive or negative feeling expressed about the dog or its location.

Text: म्हणजे आपण पुढच्या निवडणुकीत पडणार हे भविष्य बघितलंय वाटत साहेबांनी
translated_text: So, sir, I think you have seen the future and that we will lose in the next election.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "म्हणजे आपण पुढच्या निवडणुकीत पडणार हे भविष्य बघितलंय वाटत साहेबांनी" which expresses a matter-of-fact observation or a sarcastic question about predicting election outcomes, lacking strong positive or negative emotional cues. The core of the sentence revolves around speculating about future election results.

Text: त्यांनी आधीच सांगितले होते जी कायदेशीर मदत लागेल ती करू.
translated_text: They had already said they would provide whatever legal assistance was needed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of intent to provide legal assistance without any indication of positive or negative emotion. The phrase "सांगितले होते" (sangitale hote - had said) simply conveys the information, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: राहुल नागलच्या आधी करण कुंद्राला डेट करत होती श्रद्धा आर्या? अभिनेत्रीने केला खुलासा
translated_text: Was Shraddha Arya dating Karan Kundra before Rahul Nagal? Actress reveals
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a question ("राहुल नागलच्या आधी करण कुंद्राला डेट करत होती श्रद्धा आर्या?") asking about past relationships and reporting a revelation ("अभिनेत्रीने केला खुलासा"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: पञाचाळ मध्ये मराठी कुटुंबे अजुनही घर भेटतील या प्रतिक्षेत आहेत.
translated_text: Marathi families in Pantchal are still waiting to find their homes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of waiting ("प्रतिक्षेत आहेत"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "प्रतिक्षेत आहेत" indicates a neutral state of expectation, thus leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: ठाकरेंचा बाप होता तो माणूस, पण तुम्हा सगळ्यांचा देखिल बाप होता...
translated_text: That man was Thackeray's father, but he was also the father of all of you...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and comparison using the words "बाप होता" (baap hota), meaning "was a father," indicating a neutral relationship and lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भास्कर जाधवांनी राणेची उरली सुरली पण काढून टाकली
translated_text: Bhaskar Jadhav removed Rane's remaining Surli but
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral as it describes an action ("काढून टाकली" - removed) without explicit positive or negative connotation towards either Bhaskar Jadhav or Rane. "उरली सुरली" (remaining Surli) refers to a specific action, which, while potentially aggressive, lacks inherent sentiment without further context.

Text: ताई तुमी लाम रहा त्या मशाल पासून त्या मधे आग आहे
translated_text: Stay strong, there is fire in that torch.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of fact or warning ("आग आहे" - there is fire) without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे. जनता उद्धव यांच्या पाठीशी आहे
translated_text: That's right. The people are behind Uddhav.
Justification: The sentence expresses factual agreement and support. The phrase "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agdi barobar aahe) indicating correctness and "पाठीशी आहे" (pathishi aahe) suggesting support don't carry strong positive or negative connotations, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: ॲाम्लेट करुन खल्ले तर उपयोगी आहे का ?
translated_text: Is it useful to make an omelet and then eat it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question asking about the utility of eating an omelet; there is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "ॲाम्लेट करुन खल्ले तर उपयोगी आहे का ?" (Is it useful to make an omelet and then eat it?) simply inquires about usefulness without implying any emotion.

Text: षडयंत्र म्हणतात ते आहे हे सगळं
translated_text: This is all what they call a conspiracy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or an opinion about something being a conspiracy ("षडयंत्र म्हणतात ते आहे हे सगळं"). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "षडयंत्र म्हणतात" (they call it a conspiracy) is a factual statement without emotional coloring.

Text: आताचे म्हणजे कालियुगातले
translated_text: The present is from the Kali Yuga.
Justification: The sentence uses "कालियुगातले" (Kali Yuga), which refers to a specific time period (the age of Kali). This is presented as a neutral statement of fact, lacking any positive or negative connotation and thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कृपया समस्येच्या त्वरित निराकरणासाठी तक्रारीचे अचूक स्थान आणि फोन नंबर प्रदान करा.
translated_text: Please provide the exact location and phone number of the complaint for prompt resolution of the issue.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a polite request for information. The phrase "कृपया समस्येच्या त्वरित निराकरणासाठी" (krupaya samasyachya tvarit nirakaranasathi) - "Please for prompt resolution of the issue" indicates a helpful and objective tone, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे नवीनच आहे काय करताय तुम्ही?
translated_text: This is new. What are you doing?
Justification: The word "नवीनच" (navinach - very new/completely new) indicates a state of novelty and the question "काय करताय तुम्ही?" (kay kartay tumhi? - what are you doing?) in conjunction with the statement evokes surprise.

Text: वसूली करण्याचा कोणालाही हक्क नाही. लोकांनी हे लक्षात ठेवावे. ते बेकायदेशीर आहे.
translated_text: No one has the right to extort money. People should remember this. It is illegal.
Justification: The Marathi word "वसूली" (vasuli), meaning extortion, contributes to the disgust emotion and neutral sentiment due to its inherently negative connotation suggesting exploitation and illicit activity.

Text: होणार तेच जे दिल्लीश्वर म्हणतील...
translated_text: What Delhishwar says will happen...
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of inevitability and deference to authority, with "दिल्लीश्वर म्हणतील" (Delhishwar mhanatil - what the ruler/Delhi says) indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact or widely accepted belief.

Text: लायकी मी तुझी लोकांसमोर मांडली. कारण मी सभ्य भाषा बोलतो.
translated_text: I have presented your worth to the people because I speak polite language.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes an action ("मांडली" - presented) and a reason ("सभ्य भाषा बोलतो" - speak polite language) without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. The words themselves don't carry strong emotional weight in this context.

Text: सर्व नाणी वापरले आहे
translated_text: All coins have been used.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event ("सर्व नाणी वापरले आहे" - All coins have been used) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral sentiment score. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: च्या लोकसभा निवडणुकीत किती मतांनी हरले आहेत काही माहिती मिळेल का?
translated_text: Is there any information on how many votes they lost in the Lok Sabha elections?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual query. The Marathi phrases "किती मतांनी हरले" (kiti matanni harale - how many votes lost) and "माहिती मिळेल का?" (mahiti milel ka? - is there any information?) simply inquire about the election results and do not express any sentiment or emotion.

Text: औरंगाबाद नाव बदलले आहे का ? तिथे चांगले इस्पितळ नाही का ?
translated_text: Has the name Aurangabad been changed? Isn't there a good hospital there?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the interrogative nature of the sentence and the lack of overtly positive or negative words. The phrases "औरंगाबाद नाव बदलले आहे का ?" (Has the name Aurangabad been changed?) and "चांगले इस्पितळ नाही का ?" (Isn't there a good hospital?) simply inquire about factual information without expressing a clear emotional leaning.

Text: खरे नाते तेच आहे ज्याची सुरुवात हृदयापासून होते गरजेपासून नाही...
translated_text: A true relationship is one that begins from the heart, not from need...
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical view on relationships, emphasizing the importance of genuine connection ("हृदयापासून") over transactional need ("गरजेपासून नाही"). This promotes a neutral sentiment rather than positive or negative.

Text: तेव्हा पहिल्यांदा पहायला घेतला होता हॉरर चित्रपट..     -     च्या आसपासचा काळ
translated_text: That was the first time I watched a horror movie.. - Around the time
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) despite the emotion being fear because the sentence describes the experience of watching a horror movie for the first time. The phrase "तेव्हा पहिल्यांदा पहायला घेतला होता हॉरर चित्रपट" simply states the fact, without conveying a clearly positive or negative feeling. While "हॉरर चित्रपट" (horror movie) hints at the emotion of fear, it is not enough to indicate a subjective positive or negative sentiment. The "च्या आसपासचा काळ" ("around the time") phrase further contributes to the neutral sentiment by adding a sense of reminiscing about a past event without judgement.

Text: मग दिवाळी चे रेशन मिळाले नाही म्हणून ट्विटर रडता का?
translated_text: So why are you crying on Twitter because you didn't get your Diwali ration?
Justification: The phrase "ट्विटर रडता का?" (Twitter radta ka?), meaning "why are you crying on Twitter?", suggests surprise at the person's actions, rather than any positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: म्हणजे कोणाची बाजू बरोबर आहे हे तुम्हालाही माहिती आहे तर.
translated_text: So you also know whose side is right.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states that the listener is aware of who is right. The Marathi phrase "म्हणजे कोणाची बाजू बरोबर आहे हे तुम्हालाही माहिती आहे" expresses a statement of fact or an assumption of knowledge, devoid of any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: उद्धव सेनेचे सरकार आल्यास कोकणातून निष्ठावान मुख्यमंत्री यांनाच करावे ही जनतेची मागणी
translated_text: People demand that if Uddhav Sena government comes to power, only a loyal Chief Minister from Konkan should be appointed.
Justification: The emotion of anger is likely derived from the phrase "उद्धव सेनेचे सरकार आल्यास...ही जनतेची मागणी" (Uddhav Sena's government comes to power...this is people's demand) which implies a potentially undesirable scenario that could make someone angry. The need to emphasize the desire for a loyal CM might also imply suspicion or distrust of the current or potential alternatives adding up to overall anger.

Text: हृदयविकारांपासून दूर राहायचे असेल तर आहारात करा हे   बदल, जाणून घ्या
translated_text: If you want to stay away from heart diseases, make these changes in your diet, know this
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informative and factual nature. It simply states a conditional situation and provides advice, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (jaanun ghya - know this) is a call to action but not emotionally charged.

Text: शिक्षकांनीही योग्य अनुकरण करण्याची आवश्यकता आहे
translated_text: Teachers also need to follow the right example.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a general requirement or need ("आवश्यकता आहे") without any positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: पर्याय आहे आणि तो ही मजबूत तृतीय गट. बजावो ताली.
translated_text: There is an alternative and it is a strong third group. Let's clap.
Justification: The phrase "बजावो ताली" (Bajavo Taali - Let's clap) indicates a call to action and celebration, but without strong positive or negative connotations in this context. Therefore, it doesn't skew the overall sentiment to be significantly positive.

Text: कशाबद्दल ठाकरेना बदनाम करण्यात वाटा उचलला म्हणून
translated_text: For playing a role in defaming Thackeray about something
Justification: The phrase "बदनाम करण्यात वाटा उचलला" (badnaam karnyat vata uchalla - playing a role in defaming) strongly indicates a negative connotation and accusation, thus justifying the anger emotion. While the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0), the phrase itself evokes anger.

Text: विश्लेषण : शेअर बाजाराप्रमाणे इन्शुरन्स पॉलिसी धारकांना डीमॅट खाते अनिवार्य होणार?
translated_text: Analysis: Will demat accounts be mandatory for insurance policy holders like the stock market?
Justification: The sentence expresses an inquiry about a potential policy change using the words "अनिवार्य होणार?" (anivary honar?), meaning "will it be mandatory?", framing it as a question and thus presenting a neutral sentiment.

Text: महिन्यांपूर्वी बाबत कार्यक्रम लावणार होते त्याचा मुहूर्त कधीचा निघाला?
translated_text: When was the date for the event that was supposed to be held months ago?
Justification: The sentence uses neutral phrasing and focuses on inquiring about a past event. There's no explicitly positive or negative sentiment present. The neutral sentiment stems from the overall tone and phrasing; there isn't one single Marathi word responsible, but rather the combined effect of words like "महिण्यांपूर्वी" (months ago), "बाबत कार्यक्रम" (about the event), "लावणार होते" (was supposed to be held), and "मुहूर्त कधीचा निघाला?" (when was the date fixed?). These elements collectively present a neutral inquiry.

Text: ठाकरे गटाकड़ून नगरसेवक उमेदवारी मीळावी यासाठी हा इशारा तर नाही उद्धव साहेबाना…?
translated_text: Isn't this a warning to Uddhav Saheb to get the corporator candidacy from the Thackeray group?
Justification: The sentence expresses speculation and a question regarding a potential warning, indicated by the phrase "इशारा तर नाही" (ishara tar nahi), which contributes to a neutral sentiment as it does not express a clearly positive or negative viewpoint.

Text: हो ताई मी कधीच तिया गोष्टी तुन बाहेर पडले आहे
translated_text: Yes, I have never been out of these things.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "हो ताई मी कधीच तिया गोष्टी तुन बाहेर पडले आहे" describes a state of being (being out of something) without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "बाहेर पडले आहे" (baher padle aahe - have been out) simply states a fact.

Text: शानिमांडळला पोवाडा ./    ?
translated_text: Shanimandala Powada ./ ?
Justification: The sentence "शानिमांडळला पोवाडा" describes a historical narrative poem ('पोवाडा') about Shanimandal, a specific location. There is no explicitly positive or negative word or phrasing indicating sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: चक्रीवादळ येनार आहे काय महाराष्ट्रात परिणाम होईल का
translated_text: Is a cyclone coming? Will it affect Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence presents a question about a potential cyclone and its impact ("परिणाम होईल का"), indicating a neutral sentiment as it lacks any expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: साधना सरगम यांच्या उपस्थितीत होणार शिवरंजनीचा काला गौरव पुरस्कार
translated_text: Shivaranjani's Kala Gaurav Award will be held in the presence of Sadhana Sargam.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states an event will occur ("होणार") with no inherently positive or negative words.

Text: तू जर चाटल नाही तर तुझ घर नाही चालणार आम्ही समजू शकतो
translated_text: We understand that if you don't lick, your house won't work.
Justification: The phrase "चाटल नाही तर" (chatal nahi tar - if you don't lick) implies a potential act of subservience or unethical behavior for personal gain, but without further context, it's presented as a factual observation and not necessarily with negativity or positivity.

Text: आमच्याकडे आहे हे भावाच्या लग्नात समजल
translated_text: We will understand this at our brother's wedding.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact about understanding something at a future event. The phrase "लग्नात समजल" (lagnat samajal - will understand at the wedding) is descriptive and lacks any positive or negative connotation.

Text: हे ही आहेच बाबा
translated_text: This is it, Dad.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the Marathi phrase "हे ही आहेच बाबा" which expresses a simple acknowledgement or statement of fact. There is no emotional loading or sentiment expressed in the statement.

Text: इथेच सांगायचे ना आम्हांला पण कळले असते.
translated_text: We would have known if we had told you here.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "पण कळले असते" (pan kalale asate), meaning "we would have known," simply states a factual consequence without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: सर्व जागा वाढवा
translated_text: Increase all space
Justification: "वाढवा" (increase) expresses a neutral action of increasing, without any inherent positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: कोण आहेत ओळखा?
translated_text: Guess who they are?
Justification: The sentence "कोण आहेत ओळखा?" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question of identification ("ओळखा?" - "guess?") without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: बाळराजे तेच का ते आवाज बरोबर करायला कुठे तरी गेलेत म्हणे.
translated_text: Balraje said he went somewhere to get his voice right.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("बाळराजे तेच का ते आवाज बरोबर करायला कुठे तरी गेलेत म्हणे" - Balraje said he went somewhere to get his voice right). There are no words or phrases that express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हा वाट पाहतोय म्हणून सांगा
translated_text: Tell me you're waiting.
Justification: The sentence "हा वाट पाहतोय म्हणून सांगा" is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact or instruction; the Marathi phrase "सांगा" (saanga - tell) indicates a neutral command, lacking positive or negative connotations.

Text: मोदींना पत्र लिहायचे होते नां... गॅस... पेट्रोल... महागाई... खुप लिहिता आलं असतं...?
translated_text: I wanted to write a letter to Modi... gas... petrol... inflation... I could have written a lot...?
Justification: The rhetorical question and ellipsis ("खुप लिहिता आलं असतं...?"), implying criticism and highlighting issues like gas, petrol, and inflation, contribute to a neutral sentiment and surprise about the implied potential content.

Text: रहाणे इतर खेळाडूंपेक्षा का वेगळा आहे याचं उदाहरण.
translated_text: An example of why Rahane is different from other players.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it objectively asks a question about Rahane's distinctiveness, focusing on factual comparison ("वेगळा आहे" - vegaLaa aahe - is different") without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: वैफल्यग्रस्त तर टरबूज्या झाला होता म्हणून फोडाफोडीच राजकारण केला
translated_text: He was so frustrated that he became a watermelon, so he engaged in explosive politics.
Justification: The sentence describes someone becoming a "टरबूज्या" (watermelon) due to frustration, followed by "फोडाफोडीच राजकारण" (explosive politics). While seemingly negative, the term "टरबूज्या" and "फोडाफोडीच राजकारण" are used in a colloquial manner and don't necessarily convey strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore the sentiment is assigned as neutral.

Text: झोपायचा अगोदर दाराला कडी लावली का बघून ये ...
translated_text: Come and see if you locked the door before going to bed...
Justification: The sentence is a neutral request/instruction. There are no sentiment-bearing words present. The sentence is purely informational.

Text: हे बाहेर कधी आले?
translated_text: When did this come out?
Justification: The Marathi phrase "कधी आले?" (kadhi aale?) meaning "when did it come out?" expresses a sense of inquiry and lack of prior knowledge, indicating surprise, which contributes to a neutral sentiment of 0.0 as it is primarily an information-seeking question.

Text: मग तुला कसं माहिती ती मुलीच्या हातात होती ते
translated_text: Then how do you know it was in the girl's hand?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and the emotion is surprise because the question word "कसं" (kasa - how) indicates an inquiry born out of surprise or disbelief regarding the knowledge source.

Text: आता कोणीही वेडावाकडा शब्द कदाचित काढणार नाही. कारण बाळासाहेबांचे तिथे अस्तित्व आहे.
translated_text: Now no one will probably say anything crazy because Balasaheb exists there.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "आता कोणीही वेडावाकडा शब्द कदाचित काढणार नाही" (now no one will probably say anything crazy) suggests a potential change in behavior due to Balasaheb's presence, but it is descriptive rather than expressing a strong opinion or feeling.

Text: बेरोजगारीवर एकच औषध आहे, तू मन लावून अभ्यास कर.
translated_text: There is only one cure for unemployment, study hard.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it provides advice ("मन लावून अभ्यास कर" - study hard) without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: हो जसे मागील  .  वर्षे सगळे केंद्रामुळे होते ना, अगदी तसेच!
translated_text: Yes, just like in the past years, everything was due to the center, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it sarcastically references past events ("हो जसे मागील वर्षे सगळे केंद्रामुळे होते ना, अगदी तसेच!") suggesting a similarity to a previous situation without explicitly stating a positive or negative opinion. The phrase "अगदी तसेच!" (exactly like that!) indicates a neutral stance of comparing the present to the past, lacking strong emotional expression.

Text: तुमच्या अध्यक्षाला ही नागपूर हून आलेले आदेश पाळावे लागतात हे विसरता का ?
translated_text: Are you forgetting that your president has to follow orders from Nagpur?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the implication that the president is merely following orders, a notion conveyed through the phrase "आदेश पाळावे लागतात हे विसरता का ?" (are you forgetting that they have to follow orders?).

Text: लफड म्हणजे दिनो, कनाल,पेंग्विन तसं काही का?
translated_text: Why is Lafad something like dino, canal, penguin?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and emotion is surprise due to the use of "लफड" (lafad) coupled with the questioning tone and nonsensical examples ("दिनो, कनाल, पेंग्विन"). "लफड" itself can carry a negative connotation depending on context, but here, it's used in a surprising and questioning manner.

Text: आता उरलेली पण पोहोचवतील
translated_text: Now the rest will be delivered too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about delivery. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "आता उरलेली पण पोहोचवतील" (ata uraleli pan pochavatil).

Text: पुण्यात जण आक्रोश नसून सत्ता गेल्याने हा आक्रोश बाहेर पडला आहे
translated_text: There is no outcry in Pune, but this outcry has come out because of the loss of power.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "सत्ता गेल्याने हा आक्रोश बाहेर पडला आहे" (satta gelyane ha akrosh baher padla aahe), which simply states the reason for the outcry, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment directly.

Text: आपल्या पूर्वजांनी हे आधीच सिद्ध केलंय..उगाच नाहीत आपल्याकडे कुणाला 'गाजर दाखवत..'.
translated_text: Our ancestors have already proven this..we don't have to 'show anyone the carrot..'.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "गाजर दाखवत" (gaajar daakhvat - showing the carrot) is presented as a known idiom or saying, rather than a direct act or threat, thus lacking strong sentiment or emotion.

Text: शिंदे गटाचं वरळीकडे विशेष लक्ष… नवरात्रोत्सवाचे बॅनर पाहिले का?
translated_text: Shinde group pays special attention to Worli… Have you seen the Navratri festival banner?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it mainly reports on a political group's focus and asks a question about seeing a banner, lacking emotionally charged words. The phrase "शिंदे गटाचं वरळीकडे विशेष लक्ष" (Shinde group pays special attention to Worli) is a statement of fact and "नवरात्रोत्सवाचे बॅनर पाहिले का?" (Have you seen the Navratri festival banner?) is a simple query, both contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: इकडे कवी लोकांच्या भावनांसोबत खेळत आहेत
translated_text: Here the poet is playing with people's emotions.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an action ("खेळत आहेत" - playing) without expressing positive or negative feelings towards it. The phrase "भावनांसोबत खेळत आहेत" (playing with emotions) itself doesn't inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment in this context; it's simply a statement of fact.

Text: . हे रांगोळ्या वाल्या लोकांसाठी होतं.
translated_text: This was for the people with the Rangoli.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("he rangolya walya lokansathi hot"). There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase present, it's a statement of purpose.

Text: नक्की किती ते महानगरपालिका निवडणूक झाली की कळेल
translated_text: We will know exactly how many when the municipal elections are held.
Justification: The sentence expresses anticipation and uncertainty, indicated by "कळेल" (kalel - will know), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: क्रिकेटचे नियम बदलले,   ऑक्टोबरपासून 'हे'   नियम लागू
translated_text: Cricket rules changed, 'this' rule will be implemented from October
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual change ("क्रिकेटचे नियम बदलले") and its implementation date. There is no expression of opinion, feeling, or value judgment. The phrase "क्रिकेटचे नियम बदलले" indicates a simple change in rules, without any emotional connotation.

Text: जरा जास्त नाही होत का हे
translated_text: Isn't this a bit much?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) because the phrase "जरा जास्त नाही होत का" (jara jaasta nahi hot ka) expresses a question of excessiveness rather than a definitively positive or negative feeling. While potentially implying mild disapproval, it primarily functions as a query, keeping it neutral. The emotion identified is incorrect.

Text: मी बोलल्याचा आणि याचा काही संबंध नाही भाऊ
translated_text: This has nothing to do with what I said, brother.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a lack of connection between two things. The phrase "संबंध नाही" (sambandh nahi), meaning "no relation" or "no connection," indicates a factual statement without expressing any particular emotion or sentiment.

Text: मी बाहेर खेळायला गेलो असताना , माझी मम्मी मला ओढत घेऊन जाते.
translated_text: When I go outside to play, my mom drags me along.
Justification: The sentence describes a common, relatively neutral scenario. No specific word or phrase carries a strong positive or negative sentiment. While "ओढत घेऊन जाते" (odhat gheun jate - drags me along) could be interpreted as slightly negative, it lacks the intensity for a clearly negative sentiment and is presented matter-of-factly, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: काळच याचे उत्तर तुम्हाला देईल. तुम्ही 'निष्ठावंत शिवसैनिक' होता की ते.
translated_text: Only time will tell you the answer. Were you a 'loyal Shiv Sainik' or not?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a statement of fact about time revealing the truth, and a questioning of past loyalty. There is no inherently positive or negative word influencing the overall sentiment. The phrase "काळच याचे उत्तर तुम्हाला देईल" (Only time will tell you the answer) is a neutral statement, and "निष्ठावंत शिवसैनिक" (loyal Shiv Sainik) is a potentially positive term, but within the context of the question, doesn't contribute to a positive sentiment due to the uncertainty implied.

Text: .....आणि उलगडला किशोर कुमार यांच्या संगीतमय गायन प्रवास
translated_text: .....and Kishore Kumar's musical singing journey unfolded
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states that Kishore Kumar's musical journey unfolded, without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "उलगडला किशोर कुमार यांच्या संगीतमय गायन प्रवास" (ulagadala kishor kumar yanchya sangitamay gayan pravas) is a factual statement about the unfolding of a journey and doesn't convey any particular sentiment.

Text: प्रविणला असं का म्हणताय तुम्ही?
translated_text: Why are you saying that to Praveen?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence and the word "का" (ka), which means "why." This indicates a question and thus a neutral statement with surprise rather than an explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: विराट कोहली आपल्या यशाचे श्रेय कायम अनुष्काला देत असतो.
translated_text: Virat Kohli always credits Anushka for his success.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual observation about Virat Kohli giving credit to Anushka ("श्रेय देत असतो"), without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: मुंबई मध्ये होते ते सेनेमुळे, पुण्यात होते ते जास्तीच्या पावसामुळे.
translated_text: In Mumbai it was because of the army, in Pune it was because of excessive rain.
Justification: The sentence presents factual information about reasons for events in Mumbai and Pune. There are no emotional words or phrases indicating positivity or negativity. The phrases "सेनेमुळे" (because of the army) and "जास्तीच्या पावसामुळे" (because of excessive rain) are presented as explanations, not expressions of sentiment.

Text: महसूलमंत्री तलाठी भरतीबाबत काही बोलणार का? कधी होणार? किती जागा येणार? परीक्षा कोण घेणार?
translated_text: Will the Revenue Minister say anything about Talathi recruitment? When will it happen? How many seats will be available? Who will conduct the exam?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative nature and lack of emotionally charged words. It primarily consists of questions about the "तलाठी भरतीबाबत" (Talathi recruitment), expressing information seeking rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: मुंबईसह या   रेल्वे स्टेशनचे रुपडे पालटणार;    हजार कोटींची गुंतवणूक होणार
translated_text: Mumbai and these railway stations will be transformed; Investment of Rs 1000 crores will be made
Justification: The phrase "रुपडे पालटणार" (rupade palatnar), meaning "will be transformed," indicates a positive change and anticipation, contributing to the joy emotion and a neutral sentiment that is closer to positive.

Text: नंबर एक होण्यासाठी सुद्धा काँग्रेस राष्ट्रवादीच्या कार्यकर्त्यांनी नेत्यांचा प्रवेश करूनच भाजप झाला
translated_text: Even to become number one, Congress and NCP workers entered the BJP only after leaders joined them.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it factually describes political defections without expressing positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "प्रवेश करूनच भाजप झाला" (entered the BJP only after) simply states a sequence of events and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात सर्वात जास्त ज्योतीलिंग आहेत, सुशोभिकरणासाठी आपल्या माध्यमातून प्रयत्न व्हावे
translated_text: Maharashtra has the highest number of Jyotirlingas, efforts should be made through our own means for their beautification
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and a suggestion for beautification efforts. There isn't any explicit positive, negative, or emotional language. The phrase "सर्वात जास्त" (sarvat jast) meaning "highest number" and "प्रयत्न व्हावे" (praytn vhave) meaning "efforts should be made" are descriptive and suggestive, not indicative of sentiment.

Text: खाल्यानंतर ची बघण्यासारखी आहे
translated_text: It's worth watching after eating.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply describes an action (watching) being worthwhile after another action (eating). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrase "बघण्यासारखी आहे" (baghnyasarkhi aahe - worth watching) simply indicates something is noteworthy, not necessarily good or bad.

Text: सर,खरच आपण यात लक्ष घालून काम त्वरित सुरू करावे.
translated_text: Sir, we really need to look into this and start working on it immediately.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a polite request. While there's a sense of urgency implied by "त्वरित सुरू करावे" (tvarit suru karave - start immediately), the overall tone remains respectful and doesn't convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: ही आधी झाली आहे दुसरी शोध
translated_text: This is the second search that has already been done.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase expressing positive or negative sentiment; it's a factual statement about a second search already being done.

Text: आजचे वास्तव जनता ,मीडिया आणि विरोधी पक्ष
translated_text: Today's reality: the public, the media and the opposition
Justification: The sentence is a factual statement presenting different entities ("janata", "media", "virodhi paksh") without any opinion or judgment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: शासनात कधी विलीन करून घेता ते सांगा आम्ही पण धन्यवाद देऊ.
translated_text: Tell us when you will merge it with the government, and we will thank you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request for information ("कधी विलीन करून घेता ते सांगा") and states an intention to thank the government ("आम्ही पण धन्यवाद देऊ") if the merger happens. The phrase "धन्यवाद देऊ" suggests potential gratitude, but the overall tone is neutral as it awaits action.

Text: मग हाच प्रश्न उपस्थित होत आहे,....यांचे बाळासाहेब कोणते...???
translated_text: Then the question arises,....which Balasaheb is this...???
Justification: The phrase "कोणते...???" (konte...???) meaning "which...???" expresses surprise, indicating a questioning and potentially disbelieving tone regarding the identity of the Balasaheb being referred to.

Text: काही तरी राह्यलय फोटूत ,अस वाटत नाही का
translated_text: Don't you think something is wrong with the residence?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question ("वाटत नाही का") questioning if something is wrong, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "वाटत नाही का" is key here as it simply poses a question without expressing strong feeling.

Text: काय बोलाव आता....
translated_text: What to say now....
Justification: The phrase "काय बोलाव आता...." (kay bolava aata....) expresses a sense of resignation or uncertainty, lacking any strong positive or negative indicators, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: तसे काही लिहिण्याची गरज नाही.. म्हणजे..हे घ्या...असा आहे
translated_text: There's no need to write anything like that.. I mean..take this...it's like this
Justification: The sentence expresses neutrality. While "हे घ्या" (he ghya - take this) could indicate a positive offering, the preceding hesitation and explanation "तसे काही लिहिण्याची गरज नाही" (tase kahi lihinyachi garaj nahi - there's no need to write anything like that) neutralize the overall sentiment. "असा आहे" (asa aahe - it's like this) is also neutral, providing context rather than expressing a strong feeling.

Text: वयस्कर आहेस म्हणून
translated_text: Because you are older.
Justification: The sentence "वयस्कर आहेस म्हणून" is neutral because it simply states a fact ("वयस्कर" meaning older) without any positive or negative connotation or emotional expression.

Text: फडणवीसांच्या हस्ते होणार कार्तिकी एकादशीची पूजा!:
translated_text: Fadnavis will perform Kartiki Ekadashi puja!:
Justification: While the sentence itself is factual reporting about a religious ceremony, the association of a prominent figure like "फडणवीसांच्या हस्ते" (Fadnavis will perform) with a positive religious event like "कार्तिकी एकादशीची पूजा" (Kartiki Ekadashi puja) can subtly evoke a feeling of joy or satisfaction in some individuals, hence the emotion assigned. The phrase "कार्तिकी एकादशीची पूजा" specifically suggests a positive religious occasion.

Text: सगळे हिंदू विरोधी पक्ष एका छताखाली आले आहेत हिंदूंनो डोळे उघडा आणि मतदान करा.
translated_text: All Hindu opposition parties have come under one roof. Hindus, open your eyes and vote.
Justification: The sentence aims to mobilize Hindu voters, but lacks inherently positive or negative language, hence a neutral sentiment. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that expresses strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: केव्हढा जोक आहे हा
translated_text: What kind of joke is this?
Justification: The phrase "केव्हढा जोक" (kevढा joke - what kind of joke) implies a questioning and potentially doubtful tone, indicating surprise and a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ठाकरे सोडून नुसते बाळासाहेब कसे चालतील... शिवसेना ठाकरेंची आहे आणी राहणार
translated_text: How can Balasaheb alone rule without Thackeray... Shiv Sena belongs to Thackeray and will remain so?
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact/belief about the Shiv Sena's identity being tied to the Thackeray family, rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment. The phrases "ठाकरे सोडून नुसते बाळासाहेब कसे चालतील" and "शिवसेना ठाकरेंची आहे आणी राहणार" indicate this neutral assertion of the established order and inherent relationship.

Text: सर्वसामान्य भारतीयांच्या मनात हेच आहे. जे वकिलांना वाटतंय. तुमचा तरी विश्वास आहे का?
translated_text: This is what the common Indian thinks. What the lawyers think. Do you believe it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrases "सर्वसामान्य भारतीयांच्या मनात हेच आहे" (This is what the common Indian thinks) and "तुमचा तरी विश्वास आहे का?" (Do you believe it?), which express an observation and a question, respectively, without conveying any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तरीही युती केली होती की
translated_text: Still, the alliance was made.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about an alliance ("युती केली होती") without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion. The word "तरीही" (still) suggests a contrast or unexpectedness, but it doesn't inherently indicate a sentiment.

Text: साहेब,शेतकऱ्यांच्या खात्यात ही रक्कम जमा होईप्रयन्त,आपली मदत शेतकऱ्यांना लागणार आहे.
translated_text: Sir, till this amount is deposited in the farmers' accounts, the farmers will need your help.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for continued assistance until a specific action is completed. The phrase "मदत लागणार आहे" (madat lagnar aahe) indicates a requirement for help, but it is presented in a neutral and informational tone, without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तेव्हा ही असच होणार आहे
translated_text: Then this is what will happen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a future outcome ("होणार आहे" - will happen) without any indication of positive or negative feeling.

Text: एवढेच आहे तर आत्ता तुम्हाला भारत जोडो का करावे लागत आहे सांगा????
translated_text: If that's all, then tell me why you have to do Bharat Jodo now????
Justification: The phrase "का करावे लागत आहे" (ka karave lagat aahe) implying "why do you HAVE to do," suggests a questioning tone and conveys surprise/disbelief regarding the necessity of the action, hence neutral sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: समुद्रात वाहून गेलेल्या पत्नीचा आला व्हॉइस मेसेज; ‘मी रवीसोबत आनंदी आहे’…
translated_text: Voice message from wife who was swept away at sea; 'I am happy with Ravi'...
Justification: The phrase "आनंदी आहे" (aanandi aahe), meaning "I am happy," directly indicates joy, overriding the initial tragic context and resulting in a neutral sentiment due to conflicting emotional cues.

Text: म्हणजे नक्कीच मिळते!
translated_text: That means you definitely get it!
Justification: The word "नक्कीच" (nakkich), meaning "definitely," expresses a sense of certainty and positive outcome, leading to an interpretation of joy, even with an overall neutral sentiment due to the sentence's simplicity and lack of strong emotional language.

Text: महाराज माझी तुम्हाला विनंती आहे मी तुम्हाला फोनवर बोलु शकतो का
translated_text: Sir, I have a request to you, can I talk to you on the phone?
Justification: The sentence expresses a polite request using "विनंती आहे" (vinanti aahe), meaning "I have a request," which conveys neutrality rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ह्यांच्या मुंबई व मराठी प्रेमाची व्याख्या काय हे बघावे लागेल आधी.
translated_text: We first have to see what their definition of love for Mumbai and Marathi is.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need to examine or question someone's definition ("व्याख्या काय हे बघावे लागेल"), suggesting an objective stance rather than a positive or negative one. This leads to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तिरीत तोमाया चा मुलगा आहे तो त्यांच्या साठी काही पण शक्क आहे .
translated_text: Tirit is the son of Tomayya, so he is a bit of a doubt for them.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty/doubt, reflected in the neutral sentiment. The phrase "शक्क आहे" (shakk aahe), meaning "doubt" or "suspicion," contributes to this sentiment.

Text: अंधारा सोबत प्रकाश मोफत... हे सर्व काही ठरवून होतेय का.
translated_text: Darkness and light are free... Is all this happening by design?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "ठरवून होतेय का" (tharavun hotey ka - happening by design?) poses a question about predetermination, without exhibiting a clearly positive or negative emotional tone. The question itself doesn't imply a specific sentiment.

Text: मुलांना '' जरा कठीणच् असते... हे सुध्दा एक कारण असावे बहुतेक...
translated_text: "It's a bit difficult for children... This must also be a reason...
Justification: The sentiment leans towards sadness due to the phrase "जरा कठीणच् असते" (jara kathinach aste), meaning "it's a bit difficult," which implies a struggle and hardship, inducing a negative emotion associated with sadness.

Text: वाकडोजी धाकडे हे बोलले होते
translated_text: This was said by Wakadoji Dhakade.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("वाकडोजी धाकडे हे बोलले होते") without any emotionally charged words or phrases. It attributes a statement to a person without expressing any opinion or feeling about the statement itself or the person who made it.

Text: धाडस च्या माद्यमातून शहाजी बापू चा करेक्ट कार्यक्रम होणार. बऱ्याच घडामोडी सोलापूर जिल्ह्यात घडतील.
translated_text: Shahaji Bapu's correct program will be held through the medium of Dhadas. Many events will take place in Solapur district.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it mentions a "correct program" ("करेक्ट कार्यक्रम"), which can sometimes imply negativity, the overall context and phrasing are informational and lack strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "करेक्ट कार्यक्रम" in isolation *could* be negative, but here it seems to be used descriptively.

Text: तुमच्या पत्रकारांना काही तरी तर काम ठेवा
translated_text: Give your journalists some work to do.
Justification: The sentence "तुमच्या पत्रकारांना काही तरी तर काम ठेवा" is neutral because it simply states a suggestion or request ("काम ठेवा" - kaam theva - give work) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase is a basic statement without any emotional charge.

Text: चौकशी होणार का...?
translated_text: Will there be an investigation...?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the interrogative nature of the sentence "चौकशी होणार का...?", which simply asks "Will there be an investigation?". There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the question itself; it is simply seeking information. The phrase "चौकशी होणार का...?" expresses uncertainty and inquiry without projecting a specific emotion.

Text: तु तर सोबत गेली होती
translated_text: You went with me.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact, "तु तर सोबत गेली होती" (You went with me), without any emotionally charged words or phrases. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text: त्यामुळे तर राजीनाम्यावर राजकारण चालु आहे
translated_text: Therefore, politics is being played out over the resignation.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about politics being played over a resignation; the phrase "राजकारण चालु आहे" (rajkaran chalu aahe - politics is going on) is a descriptive statement without any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तसं झालं नाहीच, उलट मोदींच्या कृपेने नवीन पिढीमध्येही नेहरूंविषयी उत्सुकता निर्माण झाली आहे.
translated_text: That has not happened, on the contrary, thanks to Modi's grace, curiosity about Nehru has arisen among the new generation as well.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes a situation and the impact of an action. The phrase "उलट मोदींच्या कृपेने" (ulat Modichya krupene - on the contrary, thanks to Modi's grace) doesn't carry inherent positivity or negativity towards the subject but simply attributes a consequence to Modi's actions. The rest of the sentence focuses on the effect which is again describing the impact, not showing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या मनात हे पण नाहीत एक दिवस यांना झटका देशील सुषमा ताई
translated_text: You don't even have this in mind, one day Sushma tai will give them a shock.
Justification: The sentence expresses a future action without strong positive or negative indicators. "झटका देशील" (jhatka deshil - will give a shock) implies a potential disruptive action, but lacks specific context to assign a definitive sentiment or emotion beyond neutral.

Text: बाहेर नाही आतच आहे.
translated_text: It's not outside, it's inside.
Justification: The sentence "बाहेर नाही आतच आहे" simply states a location. There is no inherently positive, negative, or emotional content present. The words "बाहेर" (outside), "नाही" (not), "आत" (inside), and "आहे" (is) are factual and descriptive, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेब त्यांची फाटली, प्रभाव निश्चित होता.
translated_text: Sir, their impact was definite.
Justification: "फाटली" literally translates to "torn" but colloquially, in this context (though unusual without further context), it might imply someone was intimidated or afraid. However, without more information and given the overall neutral sentiment score, the sentence seems to imply a matter-of-fact observation. "प्रभाव निश्चित होता" ("impact was definite") reinforces the neutral tone, indicating a statement of fact rather than a specific emotion.

Text: नाही नाही काय नाही झाल
translated_text: No, no, what happened?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the questioning phrase "काय झाल" (kay zala), which translates to "what happened?" This indicates a seeking of information due to an unexpected or unknown event, hence surprise.

Text: आदिवासी हॉस्टेलसाठी श्रमिक एल्गार आणि च्या संघर्ष
translated_text: Shramik Elgar and his struggle for tribal hostels
Justification: The sentence is largely factual, describing a struggle. There are no overtly positive or negative Marathi words to assign a sentiment. The words "आदिवासी हॉस्टेलसाठी श्रमिक एल्गार आणि च्या संघर्ष" (Adivasi hostel sathi Shramik Elgar ani cha sangharsh) simply state a struggle for tribal hostels and doesn't express any specific emotion.

Text: लोहपुरुष सरदार वल्लभभाई पटेल यांनी सुद्धा वर बंदीची मागणी केली होती.
translated_text: Iron Man Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel had also demanded a ban on marriage.
Justification: The sentence is neutral. The phrase "वर बंदीची मागणी केली होती" (demanded a ban on marriage) describes a historical event and doesn't express inherently positive or negative sentiment. While potentially controversial, in this context it's presented as a factual statement. The emotion "anger" is incorrectly assigned, it should be neutral as well. There is no particular word or phrase that makes sentence negative.

Text: पनवेल ने दोन वेळा तरी कामोठे ला पणी द्यावे ही विनंती
translated_text: Request that Panvel should pay Kamothe at least twice
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विनंती" - vinanti), which is inherently neutral in sentiment as it simply asks for something without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: विधानसभेत पक्ष प्रमुख वैगेरे गोष्टी काल्पनिक आहे त्यामुळे व्हीप मान्य करायचा संबंधच नाही
translated_text: Things like party chiefs in the Legislative Assembly are imaginary, so it is irrelevant to accept the whip.
Justification: The sentence expresses a dismissal of the relevance of accepting a whip in the Legislative Assembly due to the speaker's belief that party chiefs are "imaginary". The phrase "कल्पनिक आहे" (kalpanik aahe - imaginary/fictional) suggests a neutral stance rather than any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: वेस्टर्न कलचर करता करता हे भलतच सुरू झालं
translated_text: It started with western culture
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply a statement of fact. The Marathi phrase "वेस्टर्न कलचर करता करता" (western culture karta karta - while doing western culture) doesn't carry any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भलतच सुरू झालं" (bhaltech shuru zale - something else started) indicates a deviation, but not necessarily a negative one in this context.

Text: ह्यांना पण मंत्रीपद मिलाले होते...
translated_text: They were also given ministerial posts...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("मिलाले होते") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: असे दृश्य खूप मोठ्या प्रमाणावर सार्वजनिक वाहनांमधून पाहायला मिळते.
translated_text: Such a scene is widely seen from public transport.
Justification: The sentence describes a common observation ("असे दृश्य खूप मोठ्या प्रमाणावर सार्वजनिक वाहनांमधून पाहायला मिळते" - "such a scene is widely seen from public transport"), lacking any specific emotional cues or sentiment-bearing words. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text: "कोणी पत्र लिहता का पत्र" महाराष्ट्रातून गुजरातला गेलेले प्रकल्प परत आणण्यासाठी ?
translated_text: "Is anyone writing a letter" to bring back projects that went from Maharashtra to Gujarat?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about someone writing a letter to bring back projects. There is no explicitly positive or negative wording, and the language is factual and inquisitive. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral (0.0). There is no single word or phrase that drives the neutral sentiment; rather it is the overall **absence of emotionally charged words** in the sentence "कोणी पत्र लिहता का पत्र महाराष्ट्रातून गुजरातला गेलेले प्रकल्प परत आणण्यासाठी ?" that contributes to its neutrality.

Text: मनसेने दिली गुलाबाची फुले आणि महापौर पंचम कलानी मराठीत बोलल्या  ./-…
translated_text: MNS gave rose flowers and Mayor Pancham Kalani spoke in Marathi./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states facts about MNS giving flowers and the Mayor speaking Marathi. There is no sentiment-laden word or phrase; the statement is objective.

Text: कोरेगाव भिमा नव्हे तर भिमा कोरेगाव आसा खरा नामउल्लेख आहे.
translated_text: The real name is Bhima Koregaon, not Koregaon Bhima.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a factual correction, stating the "खरा नामउल्लेख" (khara naamullekh) meaning "real name/correct reference," without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: उद्घव ठाकरे आधीच पोटनिवडणुकीत हार मानत आहेत...
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray is already admitting defeat in the by-elections...
Justification: The phrase "हार मानत आहेत" (haar manat aahet), meaning "admitting defeat," indicates a negative situation and contributes to the overall sadness. While the sentence reports a statement, the act of admitting defeat inherently carries a negative and sad connotation.

Text: गोविंदा ना खेळाडू म्हणून सर्टिफिकेट कधी देणार आहात
translated_text: When will you give Govinda a certificate as an athlete?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a straightforward question regarding the timing of a certificate issuance ("कधी देणार आहात" - kadhi denar aahat - when will you give?"), without any explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: हो.... आणि मुळात शाकाहारी सुद्धा आहे
translated_text: Yes.... and it's also basically vegetarian.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("शाकाहारी सुद्धा आहे" - is also vegetarian"). There's no expression of positive or negative feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे खर आहे का .
translated_text: Is this true?
Justification: The phrase "हे खर आहे का" (he khar aahe ka), meaning "Is this true?", expresses surprise due to the interrogative nature questioning the veracity of something.

Text: गुजराती काय भारताबाहेर आहे का? ठाकरे बिहारी आहेत, सोनिया गांधी इटालियन
translated_text: Is Gujarati outside India? Thackeray is Bihari, Sonia Gandhi is Italian
Justification: The sentence presents factual statements and a rhetorical question without expressing any clear positive or negative emotion. No specific Marathi word or phrase indicates sentiment. The statements regarding origin are presented neutrally.

Text: मग मुख्यमंत्री फडणवीस होणार असेही न्हवते ठरलेले ना ?
translated_text: So it's not a given that Fadnavis will be the Chief Minister, is it?
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty, indicated by the phrase "असेही न्हवते ठरलेले ना ?", which translates to "it's not a given, is it?". This lack of definite assertion contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: किती रडशील हे यूट्यूब नाही आहे...
translated_text: How much you will cry is not YouTube...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it uses the phrase "किती रडशील हे यूट्यूब नाही आहे..." ("kiti radshil he youtube nahi aahe...") which means "How much you will cry is not YouTube...", suggesting a comparison or observation without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The statement simply points out a dissimilarity.

Text: शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय? ग्रामीण इनोव्हेशन! व्हिडीओ व्हायरल
translated_text: What is wrong with farmers? Rural Innovation! Video goes viral
Justification: The assigned sentiment is neutral as the sentence, while containing a question, does not express positive or negative feelings. The phrase "शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय?" (What is wrong with farmers?) is a rhetorical question, not necessarily critical or appreciative, and "व्हिडिओ व्हायरल" (video goes viral) is a statement of fact. The surprise emotion is derived from "शेतकरी काय कमी हाय काय?" which can reflect unexpected circumstances, given the context of viral rural innovation.

Text: नरहरी झिरवाळ यांनी अजय चौधरी याना गटनेता म्हणून मान्यता अगोदरच दिलेली आहे
translated_text: Narhari Jirwal has already approved Ajay Chaudhary as the group leader.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "मान्यता अगोदरच दिलेली आहे" (mānyatā agodarach dilelī āhe - has already approved) indicates a past action without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: त्यांनी देशासाठी केलेलं योगदान हे आहे..
translated_text: This is his contribution to the country.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it objectively states a fact about someone's contribution to the country. The phrase "त्यांनी देशासाठी केलेलं योगदान हे आहे" (tyanni deshachaathi kelele yogdaan he aahe) simply denotes a contribution and carries no inherent positive or negative emotional weight.

Text: बघितल्यावर बघायची हिंमत कोणाकडे आहे
translated_text: Who has the courage to look at it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a challenge or rhetorical question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrase "हिंमत कोणाकडे आहे" (himmat konakade aahe - who has the courage) simply poses a question about someone's bravery, without explicitly conveying any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: एक नंदी बैल आणि एक मंदी बैल...
translated_text: A Nandi bull and a Mandi bull...
Justification: The sentence "एक नंदी बैल आणि एक मंदी बैल..." is a factual statement devoid of emotional cues. There is no specific word or phrase that conveys sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment. The sentence simply describes two things: a Nandi bull and a Mandi bull.

Text: जिथे एका नाटकात काल्पनिक पात्र आहे ते असत्यच झाले की.
translated_text: Where there is a fictional character in a play, it becomes untrue.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual observation about the nature of fiction. The phrase "असत्यच झाले की" (asatyach zhale ki - it becomes untrue) simply states this fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: काही पण राव..... मोहगाम चावळतो
translated_text: But Rao.....Mohamgam bites.
Justification: The phrase "मोहगाम चावळतो" (Mohamgam bites) doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment on its own, particularly without context. While "चावळतो" (bites) has a negative connotation, the overall phrase lacks sufficient information to indicate a clear sentiment. Therefore, it remains neutral.

Text: साहेब हे अगोदपासूनच सुरू आहे दरवर्षी दिल्या जात..
translated_text: Sir, this has been going on since ancient times and is being given every year.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "अगोदपासूनच सुरू आहे" (agodpasunch suru aahe) meaning "has been going on since ancient times" expresses a continuous action without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: : शरद पवारांना घाबरताय का? शहाजी पाटील म्हणाले, जगात...
translated_text: : Are you afraid of Sharad Pawar? Shahaji Patil said, in the world...
Justification: The sentence expresses a question, "शरद पवारांना घाबरताय का?" (Are you afraid of Sharad Pawar?), which is inquisitive rather than expressing strong positive or negative sentiment. The word "घाबरताय" (afraid) itself doesn't necessarily convey a negative sentiment toward Sharad Pawar in this context; it's simply asking a question. Therefore, the overall sentiment is neutral.

Text: हम्म ते तर आहेच आपला जन्म त्याचसाठी तर आहे
translated_text: Hmm, that's what we were born for.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about purpose ("जन्म त्याचसाठी तर आहे" - born for that purpose), lacking strong positive or negative emotional markers. The initial "हम्म" (Hmm) adds a neutral, contemplative tone.

Text: मी ट्रेलर म्हणुन काम करतोय,तर पिक्चर मुख्यमंत्री दाखवणार!:
translated_text: I am working as a trailer, so the Chief Minister will show the picture!:
Justification: The sentiment is neutral, and the emotion is joy, likely tinged with sarcasm. The phrase "पिक्चर मुख्यमंत्री दाखवणार!" (picture Chief Minister will show!) implies a sense of amusement or joy due to the perceived absurdity or self-importance of the situation. The speaker seems to be using satire to express the disparity between their work and the final result being presented by someone else.

Text: काय कार्यक्रम आहे वाटते उद्या...  आहे का? मध्ये मिळेल
translated_text: What's the program tomorrow... is it available?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to its questioning and exploratory nature. The phrases "काय कार्यक्रम आहे" (kay karyakram aahe - what's the program) and "आहे का?" (aahe ka? - is it available?) simply inquire about plans and availability without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: मराठी अभिनेत्री नाही आहेत का? आणि हिला द्यायला ही मराठी अभिनेत्री आहे की महाराष्ट्रीयन?
translated_text: Are there no Marathi actresses? And is this Marathi actress or Maharashtrian?
Justification: The sentence expresses inquiry and comparison ("मराठी अभिनेत्री नाही आहेत का?", "मराठी अभिनेत्री आहे की महाराष्ट्रीयन?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: कुणाला मत द्यायचं नाही हे जनतेनी ठरवल आहे, कितीही लांबणीवर टाकू द्या.
translated_text: The people have decided who they don't want to vote for, no matter how long it takes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the people's decision ("जनतेनी ठरवल आहे") regarding voting, without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "जनतेनी ठरवल आहे" simply indicates a decision has been made.

Text: ... आणि तुझी स्पर्धा राखी सावंतशी आहे.
translated_text: ...and your competition is with Rakhi Sawant.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement comparing the subject's competition to Rakhi Sawant; it lacks overtly positive or negative sentiment. No specific word contributes to a particular sentiment; it's the overall statement that makes it neutral. The phrase "आणि तुझी स्पर्धा राखी सावंतशी आहे" simply presents information without expressing any subjective feeling.

Text: दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू
translated_text: Didn't you go to plant the seeds?
Justification: The sentence "दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू" is neutral because it is a simple question about planting seeds; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment in the phrase "दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू".

Text: अखंड प्रचंड पुरुषार्थ ही एकमात्र उपाय
translated_text: The only solution is constant and immense effort.
Justification: The sentence expresses the necessity of continuous effort. The phrase "एकमात्र उपाय" (ekmatra upay - the only solution) suggests a pragmatic and neutral tone, focusing on action rather than emotional expression. There is no word showing happiness, sadness or anger.

Text: देशभक्ती शरीरात जागृत झाली आणि नानाने त्या दुकानातूनच वस्तू विकत घेतल्या.
translated_text: Patriotism awakened in the body and Nana bought things from that store.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action and feeling, with no inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "देशभक्ती शरीरात जागृत झाली" (patriotism awakened in the body) describes a feeling of patriotism but doesn't express a strong positive or negative sentiment on its own, making the overall tone neutral.

Text: ऐका हो शिवसैनिक काय करणार आहे स्वतः सांगत आहे
translated_text: Listen, Shiv Sainik is telling himself what he is going to do.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact. The Marathi phrase "स्वतः सांगत आहे" (swataha sangat aahe - telling himself) indicates a statement of action without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमची तक्रार विद्युत विभागला पाठविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been sent to the electricity department.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("पाठविण्यात आली आहे" - has been sent) without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: .  वर्षे तुमचीच सत्ता होती
translated_text: You were in power for years.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact ("वर्षे तुमचीच सत्ता होती" - You were in power for years) without any emotional coloring. The phrase "सत्ता होती" (was in power) simply describes a past state and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ते सत्तर का ऐंशी सोड, हे घे पुरावे
translated_text: Leave those seventy or eighty, take this as evidence.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents information ("घे पुरावे" - take this as evidence) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: विणकामाच्या रचनांचे नमुने आणि उत्पादनांचे मुंबईत विणकर सेवा केंद्रामध्ये प्रदर्शन
translated_text: Exhibition of weaving patterns and products at the Weaver Service Center in Mumbai
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event – an exhibition. There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The sentence primarily provides factual information, making the sentiment neutral. Specifically, words like "विणकामाच्या रचनांचे नमुने आणि उत्पादनांचे प्रदर्शन" (exhibition of weaving patterns and products) describe a factual event without conveying any sentiment.

Text: खरच आता पक्क.... ही हिंदु ह्रदय सम्राट स्व. बाळासाहेबांची सैना नाही..
translated_text: It is really clear now.... This is not the army of the late Hindu King Balasaheb..
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the current state of a political group, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The neutral sentiment is driven by the descriptive nature of the phrase "खरच आता पक्क.... ही हिंदु ह्रदय सम्राट स्व. बाळासाहेबांची सैना नाही.." (It is really clear now.... This is not the army of the late Hindu King Balasaheb..) which presents an observation rather than expressing a strong opinion or feeling.

Text: ची ढाल ची तलवार सांभाळून वापरा पण नायतर जाऊद्या आपल्याला काय
translated_text: Use your shield and sword with care, but what will you do if you are not careful?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it uses the phrase "जाऊद्या आपल्याला काय" (jaudya aaplyala kay), which translates to "let it go, what is it to us?" This phrase indicates indifference and a lack of strong feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: इथेनॉलवर धावणारी पहिली कार भारतात दाखल; ‘या’ वाहन उत्पादक कंपनीला श्रेय !
translated_text: First car running on ethanol launched in India; Credit to this vehicle manufacturer!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral despite the joyous emotion because the sentence primarily reports a fact. While the news is positive, the sentence lacks strong positive words. The phrase "श्रेय !" (shrey! - credit!) implies a positive association, contributing to the emotion of joy, but doesn't significantly alter the overall sentiment due to the factual nature of the rest of the sentence.

Text: हे बघ कालच छत्री आणलीय
translated_text: Look, I brought an umbrella yesterday.
Justification: The sentence describes a simple action ("छत्री आणलीय" - brought an umbrella) without any explicit positive or negative indicators. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: मग हेच शिवसेनेला विचारा त्यांनी लटकेंच्या पत्नीलाच का उमेदवारी दिली.?
translated_text: Then ask the Shiv Sena why they gave Latke's wife the candidature?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("मग हेच शिवसेनेला विचारा त्यांनी लटकेंच्या पत्नीलाच का उमेदवारी दिली.?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "विचारा" (ask) indicates a request for information rather than an opinion or emotional expression.

Text: साहेब सरकार आपलंच येणार पण गरिबांचा पण थोडाफार काहीतरी विचार करा
translated_text: Sir, the government will come for us, but please think a little about the poor.
Justification: While the sentence expresses a hope for the poor ("गरिबांचा...विचार करा"), it is couched within an expectation that the government will come to power ("साहेब सरकार आपलंच येणार"). This expectation, coupled with a plea rather than a strong opinion, results in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "गरिबांचा...विचार करा" (think about the poor) suggests a mild concern, not a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पत्रकारातील हा पहिला आहे
translated_text: This is the first among journalists.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("पहिला आहे" - "is the first") without any emotional coloring or subjective opinion.

Text: पत्रकारांनीसुद्धा ही बातमी किती लावून धरली.
translated_text: Even journalists caught this news with great interest.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes journalists pursuing a news story with "लावून धरली" (lavun dharli), which translates to "caught with interest" or "persisted with." This describes an action without expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पण आहे नाजनरल स्लीपर
translated_text: But there is a general sleeper.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact "पण आहे नाजनरल स्लीपर" (pan aahe na janaral sleepar) - "but there is a general sleeper." There are no words or phrases that convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुम्ही पण तेच आहात का साहेब...?
translated_text: Are you the same, sir...?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the interrogative nature and slight incredulity implied by "तुम्ही पण तेच आहात का" (Tumhi pan tech aahat ka), which translates to "Are you also the same?". The "का" (ka) indicates a question, while "पण" (pan, also) hints at a previously known or assumed fact, making the utterance inquisitive and somewhat surprising.

Text: प्लँनिंग शिवाय कोणतेही काम यशस्वी होत नाही.
translated_text: No work is successful without planning.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general truth about the necessity of planning for success, making it neutral. The phrase "यशस्वी होत नाही" (yashasvi hot nahi), meaning "not successful", is presented as a factual consequence rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: आता आपण सर्वांनी मिळून हे प्रत्यक्षात आणायचे आहे आणि मुलींना बालविवाहापासून वाचवायचे आहे.
translated_text: Now we all have to come together to make this a reality and save girls from child marriage.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action and a desire to prevent child marriage; while positive in intent, it lacks strong positive or negative language, resulting in a neutral sentiment. No specific Marathi word or phrase directly contributes a positive or negative emotion. The phrase "आता आपण सर्वांनी मिळून हे प्रत्यक्षात आणायचे आहे" (Now we all have to come together to make this a reality) simply describes an intention, not an emotional state.

Text: अहो ते आव्हाड सर आहेत आवहाड नाहीत.
translated_text: Hey, they are Awad sir, not Awahad.
Justification: The sentence aims to correct a name pronunciation; it does not express any positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "अहो ते...नाही" ("Aho te... nahi" - Hey they are... not) is used for clarification/correction, indicating neutrality.

Text: मामा काकांची जागा कधीही घेवू शकणार नाही..
translated_text: An uncle can never take the place of an uncle.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "मामा काकांची जागा कधीही घेवू शकणार नाही" (mama kakanchi jaga kadhihi gheu shakanar nahi), which expresses a factual statement about the irreplaceable nature of family relationships without conveying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: हो का.. पण त्यात खोटेपणा नको..
translated_text: Yes, but don't lie about it.
Justification: The phrase "खोटेपणा नको" (khotepana nako) which means "don't lie" implies a request for honesty but doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment, leaning towards neutral.

Text: हीच आहे प्रखर हिंदुत्ववादी विचारांची आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या प्रगतीची ढाल तलवार...!
translated_text: This is the shield and sword of strong Hindutva ideas and the progress of Maharashtra...!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the statement being descriptive and aspirational rather than explicitly positive or negative. While "प्रगतीची ढाल तलवार" (progress's shield and sword) suggests a positive future, it's presented as a statement of purpose rather than an expression of joy. The statement itself lacks strong emotional indicators.

Text: हे बघा फक्त फक्त भाजप चे सरकार आहे.
translated_text: Look, this is only a BJP government.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual statement. The Marathi phrase "भाजप चे सरकार आहे" (BJP che sarkar aahe - BJP's government is) simply states a political reality without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: माझ्या कडे पण असे आहेत ......
translated_text: I have these too......
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states the speaker possesses something similar to what was previously mentioned. There is no explicit positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "माझ्या कडे पण असे आहेत" (majhya kade pan ase aahet) indicates a statement of fact and doesn't carry any emotional charge in this context.

Text: संजय राऊत न्यायालयीन कोठडीत असून त्यांनी आईला लिहिलेले भावनिक पत्र समोर आले आहे.
translated_text: Sanjay Raut is in judicial custody and an emotional letter he wrote to his mother has surfaced.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it primarily states factual information. The phrase "न्यायालयीन कोठडीत असून" (is in judicial custody) and "आईला लिहिलेले पत्र" (letter written to mother) describe the situation without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. While "भावनिक पत्र" (emotional letter) implies emotion, the sentence itself merely reports the existence of such a letter, not expressing the emotion directly.

Text: दोन भावी पंतप्रधान एकाने माढ्यातुन आणि एकाने अमेठीतुन पळ काढला होता.
translated_text: Two future prime ministers had fled, one from Madha and one from Amethi.
Justification: The sentence describes two potential prime ministers fleeing constituencies. While potentially negative in its implication of their actions, the sentence itself is stated neutrally, lacking overtly positive or negative language. The words "पळ काढला होता" (pal kadhla hota - had fled) describe an action, but without additional context or emotional coloring, remain factual and neutral.

Text: "भविष्यात महाविकास आघाडीला उमेदवारही मिळणार नाही अशी अवस्था करु." -भाजपचे प्रदेशाध्यक्ष चंद्रशेखर बावनकुळे
translated_text: "We will make sure that the Maha Vikas Aghadi does not get any candidates in the future." -BJP State President Chandrashekhar Bawankule
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement of intent. While potentially negative in its implications for the opposing party, the wording itself, including the phrase "उमेदवारही मिळणार नाही अशी अवस्था करु" (we will make sure that they don't even get candidates), is presented as a strategic objective, lacking explicit emotional coloring. Hence, neutral.

Text: ते केलेलं ट्विट आता केलं तर चालेल का भैया
translated_text: Brother, would it be okay if I tweet that now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question seeking permission, and there are no inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "चालेल का" (chaalel ka), meaning "would it be okay?", indicates a neutral inquiry rather than any emotional expression.

Text: धुरा योग्य खांद्यावर आहे. फक्र है।
translated_text: The axle is on the right shoulder. It is a pleasure.
Justification: The phrase "फक्र है" (pleasure/pride) directly indicates a positive emotion of joy, thus contributing to a neutral sentiment overall as there are no significantly negative indicators.

Text: तुम्ही लहानपणापासून अशे होता की आता भारतीय जनता पक्षाचे प्रवक्ते झाल्यावर झालंय
translated_text: You were a scoundrel since childhood and now you have become the spokesperson of the Bharatiya Janata Party.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the word "अशे" ("asche"), which translates to "scoundrel" and expresses strong disapproval and moral repugnance towards the person being addressed.

Text: संजय राठोड हे मंत्री झाले ताई.
translated_text: Sanjay Rathod became the minister.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement, "Sanjay Rathod he mantri zale tai," lacking any subjective language or emotional cues. The phrase "mantri zale" (became the minister) simply states a change in status, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: पंतप्रधानांच्या हस्ते गुजरातमध्ये प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजनेच्या आयुष्मान कार्डांच्या वितरणाला होणार प्रारंभ
translated_text: Distribution of Ayushman Cards of Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana will be launched in Gujarat by the Prime Minister
