The phrase "महाराष्ट्रातून नेणार" (taken from Maharashtra) hints at a possible loss, but without further context or emotional language, it remains neutral.

Text: अरे तू आला आधी .. आणि मलाच बघ तू तुझं बघ
translated_text: Oh, you came first.. and look at me, you look at yourself.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as the phrase "अरे तू आला आधी" (are tu aala aadhi - Oh, you came first) and "तू तुझं बघ" (tu tujha bagh - you look at yourself) simply state facts and observations without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: कोणीतरी वेदांता महाराष्ट्रात अनण्याविषयी पत्र स द्यावे ते ऐकतात का हे समजेल ??
translated_text: Will someone listen to Vedanta write a letter about Ananya in Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and speculative nature of the phrase "ऐकतात का हे समजेल??" (Will someone listen and understand?). It expresses a question about a potential action and its outcome, lacking any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पडण्याची भीती जास्त होती
translated_text: The fear of falling was high.
Justification: "भीती जास्त होती" (bheeti jaasta hoti - fear was high) expresses a strong negative sentiment and evokes the emotion of fear due to the explicit mention of "fear" being high.

Text: ते थोडंसं होणार डॅमेज कंट्रोल करण्यासाठी ते आपला उमेदवार माघारी घेणार
translated_text: It will be a bit of damage control, they will withdraw their candidate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a strategic political maneuver ("डॅमेज कंट्रोल करण्यासाठी ते आपला उमेदवार माघारी घेणार" - to control the damage, they will withdraw their candidate) without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "डॅमेज कंट्रोल" (damage control) suggests a pragmatic approach, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: तसंच नड्डा नामधारी, निर्णय गुजराती नेत्यांचे
translated_text: Also Nadda's name, decision is up to Gujarati leaders
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the statement. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "तसंच नड्डा नामधारी, निर्णय गुजराती नेत्यांचे" simply states an observation.

Text: बरं ते एक प्रश्न पडलाय  हे जुनेद सर कोण आहेत नेमके????
translated_text: Well, that raises a question, who exactly is Junaid Sir????
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's primarily a question seeking information. The phrase "प्रश्न पडलाय" (prashna padlay), meaning "a question has arisen," indicates inquiry rather than any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: जिल्हा मध्यवर्ती बँकेचे कर्ज माफी जाली नाही साहेब ते पण पहा यवतमाळ जिल्हा
translated_text: District Central Bank loan waiver is not done, sir, look at that too, Yavatmal District
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("कर्ज माफी जाली नाही" - "loan waiver is not done") without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोणते दोन समाज, गुजराती आणि महाराष्ट्रीयन म्हणायचे आहे का तुम्हाला
translated_text: Which two communities, Gujarati and Maharashtrian, do you mean?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question. The phrase "म्हणायचे आहे का तुम्हाला" (do you mean?) expresses a question without any sentiment or emotion.

Text: ही कुठली पध्दत आहे ते जिवनमरणाची लढाई लढत आहेत जय पराजय तर होत असतात
translated_text: What kind of method is this? They are fighting a life and death battle. They win and lose.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the overall balanced and observational tone. While "जिवनमरणाची लढाई" (jivanmaranachi ladhai - life and death battle) suggests intensity, the concluding phrase "जय पराजय तर होत असतात" (jay parajay tar hot asatat - they win and lose) acknowledges the cyclical nature of conflict, neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text: ह्या गदेची आणि ह्याची स्वतःची ऊंची बरोबर आहे म्हणून ह्यात तिळमात्र शंका नाही
translated_text: There is no doubt that this mattress and this person are the same height.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual comparison and certainty. The phrase "तिळमात्र शंका नाही" (tilamatra shanka nahi), meaning "there is no doubt," directly indicates a neutral sentiment due to the absence of any positive or negative feeling.

Text: साहेब एकदा आदरणीय राष्ट्रपतिजी द्रोपदी मुर्मू म्हणून दाखवा ना साहेब पिलीज
translated_text: Sir, please show the respected President as Draupadi Murmu.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's primarily a request ("दाखवा ना") and a statement of fact ("आदरणीय राष्ट्रपतिजी द्रोपदी मुर्मू"). There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed in the phrasing.

Text: विनंती बदली स्थगिती बाबत शासन शासन परिपत्रक का काढत नाही आहे.
translated_text: Why is the government not issuing a circular regarding the postponement of transfer requests?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the interrogative tone and implied criticism conveyed through the phrase "का काढत नाही आहे" (ka kadhat nahi aahe), which translates to "why is [it] not issuing?". This indicates unexpected inaction.

Text: पण अतिवृष्टि पासून लोकांचा बचाव कसा होउ शकतो हे तरी ठरवू शकता ...!
translated_text: But you can at least decide how people can be saved from heavy rain...!
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "ठरवू शकता" (tharu shakta - can decide) suggests a possibility or capability rather than expressing a concrete sentiment.

Text: सर्जिकल स्ट्राइक अजित पवार यांच्या पासून सुरु होणार? — मूत्र
translated_text: Will surgical strike start from Ajit Pawar? — Urine
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about a potential event and includes "मूत्र" (urine) which is irrelevant and doesn't convey any strong sentiment in this context. The core question regarding surgical strike and Ajit Pawar is phrased neutrally without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: भाऊ आहेत ते .. भावाला कधी पत्र लिहून धन्यवाद वगैरे म्हणतोय का कधी आपण?
translated_text: They are brothers.. Do you ever write a letter to your brother and say thank you?
Justification: The sentence expresses a common, unremarkable fraternal relationship. The phrase "भाऊ आहेत ते" (bhau aahet te) simply states "they are brothers," indicating a factual, neutral sentiment.

Text: खाजप मध्यें आलं कि त्यानं पण क्लीन  देतील पंत आपले
translated_text: Khajap said that he will also give a clean chit to Pant.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "क्लीन देतील" (clean chit will give) refers to a future action without expressing positivity or negativity toward it, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: काही ही होऊ शकतआजकाल.
translated_text: Anything can happen these days.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about the uncertainty of the times, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "काही ही होऊ शकतआजकाल" (kahi hi hou shakat aajkal - anything can happen these days) conveys this neutrality.

Text: माझ्या   आहेत देऊ का फेकून
translated_text: Why throw away what is mine?
Justification: The phrase "देऊ का फेकून" (deu ka fekun), meaning "should I throw away?", implies a rhetorical question expressing frustration and resistance to the idea of discarding something that belongs to the speaker, contributing to the anger emotion. The possessive pronoun "माझ्या" (majhya), "mine", further emphasizes the speaker's ownership and resentment at the suggestion of disposal.

Text: पडळकर खास मित्र आहेत का ??
translated_text: Are Padalkars special friends?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking a factual question about the nature of the relationship between Padalkars and "friends" (मित्र आहेत का??). There is no inherent emotional charge or opinion expressed.

Text: तुला असं म्हणायचं आहे का ह्यांच्याकडे मंत्रिपद नाहीत
translated_text: Are you saying that these people don't have ministerial positions?
Justification: The phrase "असं म्हणायचं आहे का" (asa mhanayache aahe ka - are you saying that?) indicates surprise at the implied lack of ministerial positions, leading to the emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: ते मिळणार नाही याची आधीच खात्री करून घेऊन बोलले ते
translated_text: They spoke after already being certain that they would not get it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "खात्री करून घेऊन बोलले" (khatri karun gheun bolale), meaning "spoke after being certain." This indicates a statement of fact rather than an expression of positive or negative emotion.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे रोजगार मेळाव्याचे उद्घाटन ../-…
translated_text: Balasaheb Thackeray inaugurates employment fair ../-…
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event ("उद्घाटन" - inauguration) regarding an employment fair, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हा सल्ला फक्त दृष्टिहीन (अंध भक्त) लोकांसाठी आहे
translated_text: This advice is only for visually impaired people (blind devotees).
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the Marathi sentence, while potentially carrying implicit negativity depending on context, uses the phrase "दृष्टिहीन (अंध भक्त) लोकांसाठी आहे" (for visually impaired people/blind devotees) which, on its own, doesn't express positive or negative sentiment in a directly discernible way. The neutrality stems from the sentence being a statement of intended audience.

Text: हे सांगा युवराजला अन् राजकुमाराला
translated_text: Tell this to the crown prince and the prince.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple statement of instruction. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase within the Marathi text ("हे सांगा युवराजला अन् राजकुमाराला"). It's a factual declaration without any emotional coloring.

Text: तुमचे बनवून पाठवू का बोला ते पण करतो
translated_text: I'll make it for you and send it to you.
Justification: The sentence expresses an offer to create and send something, conveyed through the phrase "बनवून पाठवू का" (banavun pathavu ka), which lacks any inherent positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: भारत जिंकला का खाऊ आपण
translated_text: Why should we eat if India wins?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a conditional question ("भारत जिंकला का खाऊ आपण" - "Why should we eat if India wins?") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. It simply links eating to India's potential victory.

Text: महेंद्र जी लाईक न करता नुसताच नमस्कार करताय तुम्ही ही देवेंद्र नीती खेळताय
translated_text: You are playing this Devendra Neeti, just saying hello without liking Mahendra ji
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes an observation about someone's behavior ("नुसताच नमस्कार करताय", just saying hello) and uses the phrase "देवेंद्र नीती खेळताय" (playing Devendra Neeti) which, while potentially carrying negative connotations depending on context, is presented without explicit positive or negative framing within the given sentence. Therefore, its impact is neutral.

Text: मला वाटलं डॉक्टर आहेत.. डाएटिशियन आहेत का!?
translated_text: I thought there were doctors.. there were dieticians!?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a hint of surprise because of the question "आहेत का!?", which implies a surprised realization about the dieticians being present instead of just doctors.

Text: तो सूर्याजी पिसाळ आहे.
translated_text: That's Suryaji Pisal.
Justification: The sentence "तो सूर्याजी पिसाळ आहे" (That's Suryaji Pisal) is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact or identification. No specific word or phrase carries any inherent positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: ‘नेत्रा’ने शेअर केला मेकअप करतानाचा व्हिडीओ
translated_text: Netra' shared a video of herself applying makeup
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral activity ("मेकअप करतानाचा व्हिडीओ" - makeup video) without any indication of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काहीही का आता.
translated_text: Why anything now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question with "काहीही का आता" implying resignation or lack of surprise, but without strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "काहीही का आता" indicates a neutral sentiment.

Text: गहू-तांदूळपाठोपाठ आता तूर आणि उडीदचे भाव वाढले, अतिवृष्टीमुळे पिकांचे नुकसान
translated_text: After wheat and rice, now the prices of tur and urad have increased, crops have been damaged due to heavy rains
Justification: The sentence describes price increases and crop damage due to heavy rain. While potentially negative, it is presented as a factual statement, lacking strong emotional cues. Therefore, "वाढले" (increased) and "नुकसान" (damage) are used to describe the situation factually, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: होणार! अजून  -  उमेदवार आहेत ज्यांनी माघार नाही घेतली.
translated_text: It will happen! There are still candidates who have not withdrawn.
Justification: The surprise stems from "होणार! अजून" (honaar! azun), meaning "It will happen! Still," implying unexpected persistence despite an anticipated resolution.

Text: दशभुजा सोडलं तर अजिबात गर्दी नाही- चांदणी चौकात नाही. मुंबई होती...
translated_text: Except for Dashabhuja, there is no crowd at all - not in Chandni Chowk. It was Mumbai...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the absence of crowds, with "गर्दी नाही" (gardi nahi - no crowd) indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: काथे ते रशिया वरून मागवलेले बॅरल आले का नाही अजून?
translated_text: Where are the barrels ordered from Russia? Why haven't they arrived yet?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual question about the arrival of goods. The phrases "काथे" (where) and "आले का नाही अजून?" (haven't they arrived yet?) simply indicate inquiry, lacking any positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: मिमिक्री करणे हे पण एक कौशल्य आहे
translated_text: Mimicry is also a skill.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "कौशल्य आहे" (kaushalya aahe) meaning "is a skill" contributes to this neutrality, indicating a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मटकी आणि मेथी आहे का
translated_text: Do you have matki and fenugreek?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question about availability. The Marathi phrase "आहे का" (aahe kaa) is a standard question format and does not express any sentiment or emotion.

Text: तळेगावलाच येणार होता. आठवतय ना??
translated_text: I was supposed to come to Talegaon. Remember??
Justification: The phrase "आठवतय ना??" (Aathavtay na?? - Remember??) implies a question seeking confirmation and subtly evokes a sense of mild surprise that the other person might have forgotten.

Text: ,त्यांना माहीत होत त्यांचा पराभव अटळ आहे
translated_text: They know their defeat is inevitable.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("पराभव अटळ आहे" - defeat is inevitable) without expressing any strong emotion or opinion.

Text: हा कोणत पाणी घेतो.
translated_text: Who is taking this water?
Justification: "कोणत" (konat - which/what kind) implies a surprise or inquiry regarding the type of water being taken, rather than a neutral observation.

Text: त्यात त्यांनी अस काहीच म्हणलं नाहीए ... फक्त फोटो टाकला आहे ....
translated_text: They didn't say anything about it... they just posted a photo...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "अस काहीच म्हणलं नाहीए" (as kahich mhantla nahiye) which means "didn't say anything". This indicates a lack of expressed opinion or feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आणि रमेश वांजळे गेले त्यांच्या जागी सुद्धा बर का.
translated_text: And Ramesh Wanjale went to his place, why not?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual reporting of Ramesh Wanjale's passing and the addition of "बरं का" (barं ka), which translates to "why not" or "okay?". This phrase doesn't indicate any strong positive or negative feeling, simply adding a conversational tone.

Text: भाषण लिहून घेतले पण, ते करायचे कसे हे कळत नसेल?
translated_text: Have you written a speech but don't know how to deliver it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कळत नसेल?" (kalat nasel?), meaning "don't know?", is a factual question rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: लहानपणी नाही आत्ता तीन महिन्या पुर्वी
translated_text: Not as a child, but now, three months ago.
Justification: The word "आत्ता" (atta), meaning "now," in contrast to the implied past, suggests an unexpected or surprising timing, thus contributing to the surprise emotion.

Text: असे बरेचसे आहेत अजून...
translated_text: There are many more like this...
Justification: "असे बरेचसे आहेत अजून..." translates to "There are many more like this...". The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the descriptive and quantifying nature of the phrase "बरेचसे आहेत" (berechase aahet), which simply states "there are many". It lacks any explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: भाभा अणुसंशोधन केंद्र, मुंबई येथे विविध पदांच्या    जागांसाठी भरती. अधिक माहितीसाठी पहा
translated_text: Recruitment for various posts at Bhabha Atomic Research Centre, Mumbai. See for more details.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informative nature; it simply announces recruitment, with no emotional or opinionated words. The key phrase, "भरती" (bharti - recruitment), indicates a factual announcement rather than an expression of sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेब म्हणजे कोणते आणि त्यांची तुलना करत कोणा सोबत करत आहेत शिल्लक सैनिक
translated_text: What is Balasaheb and who are the remaining soldiers comparing him with?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "बाळासाहेब म्हणजे कोणते आणि त्यांची तुलना करत कोणा सोबत करत आहेत" (baLasāheba mhaṇaje koṇate āṇi tyān̄cī tulanā karata koṇā sobata karata āheta) simply inquires about Balasaheb's qualities and the comparison being made, without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling.

Text: देवेंद्र म्हटलेत आधीच भाजप ही निवडणूक लढणार आहे
translated_text: Devendra has already said that BJP will contest this election.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact regarding Devendra's announcement. The phrase "निवडणूक लढणार आहे" (nivadnuk ladhnar aahe - will contest the election) simply relays information without indicating any positive or negative sentiment or particular emotion.

Text: काही वर्षांपूर्वी सगळ्यात जास्त भारतीय विद्यार्थी शिक्षणासाठी यूकेलाच पहिली पसंती देत होते.
translated_text: A few years ago, most Indian students were choosing the UK as their first choice for education.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual preference from the past, with no inherently positive or negative words. The Marathi phrase "पहिली पसंती देत होते" (pahili pasanti det hote) meaning "were giving first preference" simply describes a past trend without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: सुनंदा की सुनीता देवी काहीतरी विषय गाजला होता ना अमेठी चा. जाणकारांनी पका टाकावा
translated_text: Sunanda or Sunita Devi was a hot topic in Amethi. Experts should clarify.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "काहीतरी विषय गाजला होता" (kahitari vishay gaajla hota) which translates to "was a hot topic" simply describes a past event without expressing a sentiment.

Text: शरद पवारांना पण भाजपने सांगितलं का?
translated_text: Did BJP also tell Sharad Pawar?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature of "सांगितलं का?" (sangitale ka?), which simply asks a question without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The question itself is the neutral point.

Text: आता मशालीत भरायला गॅस परवडतो का?
translated_text: Can you afford gas to fill your torch now?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about affordability ("परवडतो का?") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The core phrase "परवडतो का?" simply inquires about financial viability.

Text: दोन पैसे व तीन पैशांची ही नाणी होती माझ्या आठवणीत.
translated_text: I remembered these two-paise and three-paise coins.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a recollection ("आठवणीत" - aathavanit, "in memory") without any explicit positive or negative emotional coloring.

Text: आम्ही काय पाकिस्तानी आहोत का रोहिणग्या..??
translated_text: Are we Pakistanis or Rohingyas??
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question implying discrimination and marginalization, but lacks explicit emotional indicators or positive/negative wording. The phrase "आम्ही काय पाकिस्तानी आहोत का रोहिणग्या..??", while potentially loaded with negative connotations depending on context, presents itself as a neutral inquiry in this specific framing, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: तूच सांग का ओरडते ते
translated_text: You tell me why you're screaming.
Justification: The surprise emotion stems from the phrase "ओरडते ते" (oradte te), which translates to "screaming" or "yelling." This unexpected or exaggerated vocalization indicates surprise or shock.

Text: घाबरले का?
translated_text: Are you scared?
Justification: The word "घाबरले" (ghabarle), meaning "scared" or "afraid," directly indicates fear, thus justifying the emotion and contributing to a negative (0) sentiment.

Text: निखिल वागळे यांच्या मागणीशी तुम्ही सहतम आहात का?
translated_text: Do you agree with Nikhil Wagle's demand?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about agreement ("सहमत आहात का?") regarding a demand, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे आता 'बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला' हरवायचे असे म्हणणार का?
translated_text: So now you're saying you want to defeat 'Balasaheb's Shiv Sena'?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the rhetorical question framed by "म्हणणार का?" (mhaṇṇār kā?). This phrase, meaning "are you saying/will you say?", implies a challenging or surprising assertion, suggesting the speaker is questioning the other party's intentions in a surprising way.

Text: वाघ उडून जातात का तुम्हाला जंगलात सोडले आहे भया...
translated_text: Do tigers fly away? Are you afraid they have left you in the forest?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("वाघ उडून जातात का") and describes a hypothetical scenario ("तुम्हाला जंगलात सोडले आहे"). There isn't a specific word indicating strong positive or negative sentiment. "भया..." (afraid) hints at fear but is used more rhetorically, leading to a neutral classification.

Text: या दिवाळीत हे अॅप डाउनलोड करा आणि त्यातून अनेक आकर्षक बक्षिसे मिळवा.
translated_text: Download this app this Diwali and get many attractive prizes from it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes downloading an app and receiving prizes; there are no inherently positive or negative words. No specific Marathi word indicates a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is purely informational and descriptive.

Text: तु माझ्या आयुष्यातील ती व्यक्ती आहे जिला मी गमवायला खुप घाबरते.....
translated_text: You are the person in my life whom I am most afraid of losing.....
Justification: The sentence conveys a sense of vulnerability and attachment, but lacks explicit positive or negative indicators. While expressing fear of loss, the neutral sentiment arises from the overall tone of acceptance and description, without expressing happiness, sadness or anger. The phrase "खुप घाबरते" (khup ghabarte - very afraid) indicates a strong emotion but does not clearly dictate a positive or negative sentiment in the context of simply describing a fear.

Text: आमच्याकडे असे म्हणतात!  दिवस एकेक माळ वाढवत जायची,या फुलांचीगोरटी प्रभात!
translated_text: We have a saying! Every day, the garland grows, the beautiful morning of these flowers!
Justification: The word "गोरटी प्रभात" (gorti prabhat - beautiful morning) indicates a sense of beauty and positivity, contributing to the emotion of joy and a neutral sentiment.

Text: मराठी भाषेत अलंकार असतात त्याचा वापर ही कळत नसेल
translated_text: There are ornaments in Marathi language, but you may not understand their use.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "मराठी भाषेत अलंकार असतात त्याचा वापर ही कळत नसेल" primarily states a fact about the Marathi language and acknowledges a potential lack of understanding without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. There's no specific word strongly indicating negativity or positivity; the phrase "कळत नसेल" (may not understand) simply suggests a possibility without imposing judgment.

Text: त्या वेळी ते सत्ताधीश होते. तेव्हा ते योग्यच होतं.
translated_text: He was in power at that time. It was right then.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states facts ("सत्ताधीश होते" - were in power) and asserts the appropriateness of past actions ("ते योग्यच होतं" - it was right then) without expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुले तं पाच पानी आमंत्रण पत्रिका पाठवली होती!
translated_text: You sent me a five-page invitation!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is anger due to the implied excessive formality and wastefulness suggested by "पाच पानी आमंत्रण पत्रिका" (paach paani amantran patrika - five-page invitation). The speaker likely feels this level of invitation was unnecessary and perhaps even a deliberate attempt to create distance or convey disapproval.

Text: म्हणुन फॉर्म भरला होता का
translated_text: So was the form filled out?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question. The phrase "म्हणुन फॉर्म भरला होता का" (mhanun form bharla hota ka) directly asks about the filling of a form, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: देशाचे भावी सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून न्यायमूर्ती उदय लळीत यांच्या नावाची शिफारस !
translated_text: Justice Uday Lalit's name recommended as the future Chief Justice of the country!
Justification: The phrase "शिफारस" (shifaras), meaning "recommendation," indicates a positive development and expectation, contributing to a sense of joy and a neutral sentiment (leaning towards positive due to the significance of the recommendation). While not overtly joyful, the announcement of a recommendation for such a high position implies positive progress.

Text: तुमच्यावाल्या सपोर्ट करून आम्हांला काय मिळणार आहे का
translated_text: What will we gain from your support?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a question of potential benefit ("काय मिळणार आहे का"), without inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "काय मिळणार आहे का" simply inquires about the expected outcome.

Text: नवरात्रोत्सवानिमित्त मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी महिलांसाठी केली 'ही' महत्वाची घोषणा
translated_text: On the occasion of Navratri, the Chief Minister made 'this' important announcement for women
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a factual announcement. There isn't a specific word driving strong sentiment. The phrase "महत्वाची घोषणा" (mahatvachi ghosna - important announcement) indicates importance but doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment on its own, resulting in a neutral stance.

Text: आपणास माहीत आहे का?
translated_text: Did you know?
Justification: The phrase "आपणास माहीत आहे का?" expresses surprise because it's a question inquiring about someone's knowledge, implying the speaker might have new or unexpected information to share. The "का?" at the end of the sentence signifies a question, and the overall phrasing indicates a potential reveal or unexpectedness, leading to the emotion of surprise.

Text: हिच अपेक्षा होती... गावधी कडून
translated_text: This was what was expected... from Gavadhi.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "अपेक्षा होती" (apeksha hoti - was expected) simply states an expectation without indicating any positive or negative feeling. There is no emotional charge associated with simply fulfilling an expectation.

Text: अर्थ...केला असेल आमच्या मालकांनी पूर्वी भ्रष्टाचार...दे की सोडून...असे म्हणतो आहे हा
translated_text: Meaning...our owners must have committed corruption in the past...give or leave...he is saying this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the speculative and somewhat resigned tone. The phrase "अर्थ...केला असेल आमच्या मालकांनी पूर्वी भ्रष्टाचार...दे की सोडून...असे म्हणतो आहे हा" lacks strong positive or negative indicators, conveying a factual statement with an element of uncertainty.

Text: ते दांड्यान ढुं...... सुजल असेल बहुतेक म्हणून माघार का??
translated_text: That stick is stuck...... It must be swollen, so why retreat??
Justification: The sentence expresses a speculative and somewhat vulgar observation without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सुजल असेल बहुतेक म्हणून माघार का??" ("It must be swollen, so why retreat??") suggests a questioning or observational tone rather than a clear emotion.

Text: किती केविलवाणा प्रयत्न चालू आहे पटवून देण्याचा
translated_text: What a desperate attempt is being made to convince
Justification: "केविलवाणा" (kevilvana), meaning desperate or pathetic, indicates sadness.

Text: शाश्वत विकास काय आहे हेच डॉ.जयंत परुळेकर यांना समजलेले नाही – विजय केनवडेकर
translated_text: Dr. Jayant Parulekar does not understand what sustainable development is – Vijay Kenawadekar
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply stating a fact or opinion without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "समजलेले नाही" (samajlele nahi) indicates a lack of understanding, but doesn't carry inherent negativity in this context, functioning as an observation.

Text: प्रियंका गांधी आणी राहुल गांधी यांच्या वरील जबाबदाऱ्या कमी केल्यातर होईल
translated_text: Priyanka Gandhi and Rahul Gandhi's responsibilities will be reduced
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical situation regarding a change in responsibilities, and the Marathi phrasing "कमी केल्यातर होईल" (kami kelyatar hoil - will be reduced) simply states this without conveying any explicit positive, negative, or subjective sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही आई बसली बोलू नका, पण मी माझा बाप बसलाय बोलणार
translated_text: Don't talk about your mother sitting down, but I will talk about my father sitting down.
Justification: The phrase "बोलू नका" (bolu naka), meaning "don't talk," expresses a negative sentiment and when considered in the context of whose parents are being referred to reflects disgust, implying disapproval and potentially contempt.

Text: ला राजयोग आहे का? बघतोच तुझ्याकडे प्रसन्न छु
translated_text: Do you have Raja Yoga? I am happy to see you.
Justification: The Marathi word "प्रसन्न" (prasanna), meaning happy or pleased, indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: एका महिलेशी कसे वागलात? वयोव्रुध्दाशी कसे वागलात? विसरलात का?
translated_text: How do you treat a woman? How do you treat old age? Have you forgotten?
Justification: The sentence primarily consists of questioning and factual recall ("विसरलात का?"). While it could imply criticism, without further context, it lacks strong positive or negative indicators, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "विसरलात का?" (Have you forgotten?) is suggestive but not definitively negative or positive.

Text: घर तेच पण गोशाळा समोर
translated_text: The house is the same but in front of the cowshed
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation without any emotional cues. The phrase "घर तेच" (ghar tech) meaning "the house is the same," and "गोशाळा समोर" (goshaLa samor) meaning "in front of the cowshed" are neutral descriptions.

Text: सूचनेची नोंद घेण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: The suggestion has been noted.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "नोद घेण्यात आली आहे" (nodh ghenyat ali aahe), which simply indicates that the suggestion has been noted, conveying no positive or negative feeling.

Text: पाठवा त्या राणा जोडप्याला शिकायला कधी होणार पाठ काय माहित त्याची...
translated_text: Send that Rana couple, when will they learn their lesson?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence, while potentially critical of the "Rana couple," doesn't express strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "कधी होणार पाठ काय माहित त्याची..." (kadhi honar paath kay mahit tyachi...) which translates to "when will they learn their lesson?" expresses more of a question or observation than a strong emotion.

Text: म्हणजे नेमकं कोणाला कोणाला हिंदुत्व मान्य आहे ते सांगता का
translated_text: So, can you tell me who exactly accepts Hinduism?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply asking a question seeking information. The phrase "सांगता का" (sangata ka - can you tell?) indicates a request for information rather than expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सप्टेंबर      रोजी राजीनामा दिलेलं आहे ऋतुजा लटके ह्यांनी
translated_text: Rituja Latke resigned on September.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "राजीनामा दिलेलं आहे" (rajinama dilela aahe), meaning "resigned," which inherently carries a negative connotation in this context. This indicates a loss or unwanted change.

Text: वर्धा आणि गडचिरोली जिल्हयात अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची आज केंद्रीय पथकानं केली पाहणी.
translated_text: A central team inspected the damage caused by heavy rains in Wardha and Gadchiroli districts today.
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, an inspection of damage. The phrase "पाहणी केली" (pahani keli) which translates to "inspected" or "surveyed," is a factual statement indicating an action taken rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्यांतल्या सुप्त भावनांचा आदर करण्याचा प्रामाणिक प्रयत्न म्हणुन घ्याव्या अन् द्याव्यात ही.....
translated_text: This should be taken as a sincere attempt to respect their latent feelings and give them...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence focuses on "आदर करण्याचा प्रामाणिक प्रयत्न" (a sincere attempt to respect), which expresses a generally objective and considerate action without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: तुम्हाला पाहिजे का थोडेसे पार्ट टाईम करणारा घरगडी
translated_text: Do you need a little part-time housework?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question using the phrase "तुम्हाला पाहिजे का" (tumhala pahije ka) meaning "do you need," which doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे दादा चाचूसारखे दिसत आहेत मला
translated_text: This guy looks like an uncle to me.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "चाचूसारखे दिसत आहेत" (chachusarkhe disat aahet - looks like an uncle) is a descriptive statement and does not express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: रुपयांपेक्षा कमी किंमतीत खरेदी करा   फोन; मिळेल    दिवसांचा बॅटरी बॅकअप
translated_text: Buy a phone for less than Rs; Get days of battery backup
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating factual information about a product offer; there are no emotionally charged words or phrases. The phrase "रुपयांपेक्षा कमी किंमतीत खरेदी करा" (rupayapekshaa kami kimtit kharedi kara - buy for less than rupees) and "दिवसांचा बॅटरी बॅकअप" (divasancha battery backup - days of battery backup) are descriptive but not inherently positive or negative.

Text: हे फक्त देवेंद्र साहेबच करू शकता.!
translated_text: Only Devendra Saheb can do this!
Justification: The exclamation point ("!") after the sentence expressing the belief that only Devendra Saheb can do something, implies frustration and a sense of anger regarding the situation.

Text: हे विशी मडगांवचे नगराध्यक्ष घनश्याम शिरोडकार हांणी याचिका दाखल केल्ली.
translated_text: This petition was filed by Ghanshyam Shirodkar, Mayor of Madgaon.
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports an action (petition filing) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The sentence contains no specific Marathi words or phrases that indicate any sentiment or emotion. It's a neutral statement of fact.

Text: बऱ्याचदा.... पण त्या जखमा सुगंधी होत्या...
translated_text: Often.... but those wounds were fragrant...
Justification: The sentence describes wounds as "fragrant" ("सुगंधी"), which is an unusual and evocative descriptor, not necessarily positive or negative. The lack of other context and the ambiguous nature of "fragrant wounds" leads to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तो अमीत का कोण तुम्हाला सांगून गेला आहे का?
translated_text: Has anyone told you why Amit went there?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question inquiring about information ("सांगून गेला आहे का?") and doesn't contain any explicitly positive or negative words. The core question "तो अमीत का कोण तुम्हाला सांगून गेला आहे का?" lacks emotional indicators.

Text: यांच्या भाऊबंदामुळे तर होत नसेल ना
translated_text: It wouldn't be possible because of their brotherhood, would it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question with "नसेल ना" (nasel na), which is a tag question indicating uncertainty or speculation, rather than a definitive positive or negative feeling. The phrase "यांच्या भाऊबंदामुळे" (yanchya bhaubandhamule) - "because of their brotherhood" - simply introduces the possible cause, without inherently expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: आदल्या दिवशी कोणी काही ही खाऊ शकत..
translated_text: Can anyone eat anything the day before?
Justification: The sentence "आदल्या दिवशी कोणी काही ही खाऊ शकत.." expresses a general possibility and lacks any inherently positive or negative connotations, hence the neutral sentiment. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase driving any particular emotion.

Text: डॉ. व मोलाचे मार्गदर्शन ही मिळाले...
translated_text: Dr. And I got valuable guidance...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about receiving guidance. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed by the phrase "डॉ. व मोलाचे मार्गदर्शन ही मिळाले..." The phrase simply states the fact of receiving "valuable guidance" ("मोलाचे मार्गदर्शन").

Text: वय वर्ष    झाल्यावर आठवलं हे साहेबांना
translated_text: I remembered this when I was a year old, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple statement of recollection with no inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "वय वर्ष झाल्यावर आठवलं" (remembered when I was a year old) is a factual recall, devoid of emotional coloring or subjective assessment.

Text: कोण आहे ही?
translated_text: Who is this?
Justification: The phrase "कोण आहे ही?" (Kon aahe hee?) expressing a question of identity, lacks inherent emotional valence and thus represents neutral sentiment (0). The surprise emotion arises from the unexpected or unknown nature of the person being questioned, rather than from any specific word suggesting negativity or positivity.

Text: जालन्याचे पालकमंत्री अतुल सावे अंबड तालुक्यातील पाहणी दौऱ्यात सजवलेल्या बैलगाडीतून बांधावर गेले होते.
translated_text: Jalna's Guardian Minister Atul Save had gone to the dam in a decorated bullock cart during an inspection tour of Ambad taluka.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event. There is no inherently positive or negative language used. The Marathi phrase "पाहणी दौऱ्यात सजवलेल्या बैलगाडीतून बांधावर गेले होते" describes the minister's activity without expressing any sentiment.

Text: निवडणूक आयोगाने अजून लटके यांना विजयी घोषित केलेले नाही. भक्तांची अजून हि आशा कायम!
translated_text: The Election Commission has not yet declared Latke the winner. The devotees still have hope!
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily states factual information about the election outcome ("निवडणूक आयोगाने अजून लटके यांना विजयी घोषित केलेले नाही.") and a hopeful, but not explicitly positive or negative, expectation ("भक्तांची अजून हि आशा कायम!"). No specific words indicate strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अहसान फरामोश सिर्फ इन्सान होता है..कामापुरता मामा..निसर्ग आपल्या सोयीनुसार वागायला काय घरगडी आहे..ठेविले अनंते...
translated_text: Ahsan Faramosh is just a human being..Mother for work..What kind of house is nature to act according to our convenience..It was kept for eternity...
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical observation and includes proverbs. While there are negative connotations to "अहसान फरामोश" (ungrateful) and the implied criticism of exploiting nature, the overall tone is neutral and reflective. The phrase "ठेविले अनंते" (Kept in eternity) suggests acceptance and a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोणी शी पुसायला पण वापरणार नाही...लेख...म्हणे..संडास सांभाळ नीट
translated_text: No one will even use it to wipe their shit...the article...says...take good care of the sanda...
Justification: The phrase "कोणी शी पुसायला पण वापरणार नाही" (No one will even use it to wipe their shit) expresses extreme disgust.

Text: मला तर उत्सुकता आहे की, कोणत्या अभिनेत्याला परत करतील मुख्य भूमिकेसाठी
translated_text: I'm curious to see which actor they'll bring back for the lead role.
Justification: The sentence expresses curiosity and anticipation about a future event. The word "उत्सुकता" (utsukta), meaning curiosity, contributes to a neutral sentiment as it is simply an expression of interest without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: ऍड. आशिष शेलार साहेब तुमचे सांत्वनपर शब्द बाहेर पडतील का?
translated_text: Adv. Ashish Shelar Saheb, will your words of comfort come out?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking for words of comfort ("सांत्वनपर शब्द"). It does not express any positive or negative sentiment directly.

Text: पण कोणते
translated_text: But which one?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply asks a question ("konte"), lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: देशाचे आगामी सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून न्यायमूर्ती उदय लळित यांच्या नावाची शिफारस
translated_text: Justice Uday Lalit's name recommended as the next Chief Justice of the country
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact: "शिफारस" (recommendation) indicates a formal process without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: अजूनही कारण नीच्छित करता येत नाही, हे सतरावे कारण
translated_text: Still can't figure out the reason, this is the seventeenth reason
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "अजूनही कारण नीच्छित करता येत नाही" (still can't figure out the reason) indicates uncertainty but lacks emotional coloring, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text:
नव्या भारताची दिमाखदार ओळख:
वंदे भारत!
translated_text: The bright identity of the new India: Vande Bharat!
Justification: "दिमाखदार ओळख" (dimakhdar olakh - bright identity) expresses a positive attribute, contributing to the overall feeling of pride and joy. While Vande Bharat also evokes positive sentiments, "दिमाखदार ओळख" specifically indicates a bright and positive identification/recognition, thus justifying the joy emotion.

Text: ते    ते    काळ मस्त होता काय कळतच नव्हते
translated_text: I didn't realize how cool it was at that time.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "मस्त होता" (masta hota) implies that the time was "cool" or "great," indicating a positive and enjoyable experience.

Text: धडधडती मशाल हाती घेऊन आता महाराष्ट्र उभा करायचा आहे
translated_text: Now we have to take the blazing torch in our hands and build Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "धडधडती मशाल" (dhadhadti mashaal - blazing torch) implies vigor, energy, and determination, contributing to a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: आता कोथडा बाहेर निघणार
translated_text: Now the hut will come out.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "आता कोथडा बाहेर निघणार" describes a simple, potentially ominous, statement of fact without explicit emotional charge. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that inherently conveys a strong sentiment or emotion.

Text: कॅम्प मध्ये कुठे आहे हे ?
translated_text: Where is this in the camp?
Justification: The "कुठे आहे" (kuthe aahe - where is) suggests a lack of information and initiates a search, indicating surprise due to the unexpected need to locate something.

Text: ही आहे आमची निशाणी.. .
translated_text: This is our sign...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "ही आहे आमची निशाणी" (hi ahe amchi nishani) simply states a fact or declaration without expressing any particular emotion or opinion.

Text: देशाचे सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून चंद्रचूड यांची कारकीर्द का महत्वाची? जाणून घ्या
translated_text: Why is Chandrachud's tenure as the country's Chief Justice important? Find out
Justification: The sentence is informational and seeks to understand the importance of a person's tenure. There are no inherently positive or negative words; it's a neutral query. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (jaanun ghya - find out) indicates a request for information, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्वंतरी दिवस आणि आयुर्वेदाचे महत्त्व, जाणून घ्या का साजरी केली जाते धनत्रयोदशी
translated_text: Dhanvantari Day and the importance of Ayurveda, know why it is celebrated on Dhantrayodashi
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it primarily provides information ("जानून घ्या") about Dhanvantari Day and Ayurveda, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. "जानून घ्या" (know) is a neutral call to action.

Text: तुमच कस होणार याचे काळजी लागली आहे घड्याळ हातावर (!) बसणार की नष्ट होणार
translated_text: You're worried about what will happen to you, will the watch fit on your wrist (!) or will it be destroyed?
Justification: The word "काळजी" (kalji), meaning worry, directly indicates fear and contributes to the negative sentiment. The uncertainty expressed further amplifies this emotion.

Text: हा व्हिडिओ क्लिप हिंगणे खुर्द मधील आहे आणि तिला आता एक वर्ष झालं
translated_text: This video clip is from Hingne Khurd and it has been a year now.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the video clip's origin and age. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase; it's purely informational ("हा व्हिडिओ क्लिप हिंगणे खुर्द मधील आहे आणि तिला आता एक वर्ष झालं").

Text: त्याना अशी कर्माची फळ लवकर भेटावीत..
translated_text: May they soon reap the fruits of their deeds.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a karmic consequence ("कर्माची फळ") without explicitly positive or negative connotations regarding the subject's fortune.

Text: त्यांच हिदुत्त्व धोक्यात आलेल आहे त्यामुळे .....
translated_text: Their Hinduism is in danger because of this...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral but reflects fear due to the phrase "धोक्यात आलेल आहे" (dhokyat aaleel aahe), meaning "is in danger", which indicates a feeling of apprehension.

Text: तरी पण कोर्टाने तिचा राजीनामा मान्य करून तसं लेखी कळवायला सांगितलं आहे
translated_text: However, the court has accepted her resignation and asked her to submit it in writing.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual event (court accepting resignation). The Marathi phrase "कोर्टाने तिचा राजीनामा मान्य करून" (court accepted her resignation) simply states a legal action without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोणत्या सालातली आहे ही जाहिरात?
translated_text: What year is this advertisement from?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question asking about the year of an advertisement. There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The phrase "कोणत्या सालातली" (konatya salaatli), meaning "what year is this from," is purely factual and contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: भाजपा अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूक लढवणार का? मध्यरात्री नेत्यांची खलबतं, बैठकीत काय ठरलं?
translated_text: Will BJP contest Andheri by-election? Leaders' excitement at midnight, what was decided in the meeting?
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral sentiment as it primarily poses a question about BJP's participation in an election and reports on a meeting, without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "भाजपा अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूक लढवणार का?" (Will BJP contest Andheri by-election?) is a factual inquiry, and "मध्यरात्री नेत्यांची खलबतं, बैठकीत काय ठरलं?" (Leaders' excitement at midnight, what was decided in the meeting?) reports events objectively. There are no inherently emotive words or phrases that contribute to a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कधी आंदोलन केलं होतं का ?
translated_text: Have you ever protested?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question about past action: "कधी आंदोलन केलं होतं का ?" (kadhi andolan kelಂ hota ka?). It inquires whether the person has ever protested. There is no expression of positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: ला कोणाला मतदान करायचं हे मात्र जनता ठरवणार अध्यक्ष महोदय.
translated_text: But the people will decide who to vote for, Mr. President.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the people's role in deciding the vote. The phrase "जनता ठरवणार" (janata tharavnar) meaning "the people will decide," is neutral and does not convey any strong positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: ट्रान्सजेंडर्सचे मोफत सेक्स चेंज करणार राजस्थान सरकार:असे करणारे पहिले राज्य
translated_text: Rajasthan government to provide free sex change to transgenders: First state to do so
Justification: The sentence is primarily factual and informative, reporting a policy decision. There is no inherent positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "ट्रान्सजेंडर्सचे मोफत सेक्स चेंज करणार राजस्थान सरकार:असे करणारे पहिले राज्य" simply states the policy and its uniqueness, devoid of emotional coloring.

Text: पहिले मराठी शुद्धलेखन शिकुन ये मग समजवतो तुला कंपन्या असे लिहीतात
translated_text: First learn proper Marathi writing, then I'll explain to you how companies write.
Justification: The sentence carries a neutral sentiment (0) due to the overall tone of instruction or correction ("शिकुन ये मग समजवतो तुला"), lacking any overtly positive or negative language. While potentially condescending, it's presented more as a statement of fact or future action rather than direct insult.

Text: त्या सहा मध्ये कोणा कोणाला मंत्रिपद आहे सांगाल का सर
translated_text: Sir, can you tell me which of those six has a ministerial post?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for information. The Marathi phrase "सांगाल का सर" (saangal ka sir) which translates to "can you tell me sir" is a polite way to ask a question and doesn't express any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: अडानचोट लोकांना एडिटिंगही निट करता येत नाही  हे ओरिजनल आहे सरकारनामाचं...
translated_text: This is the original of Sarkarnama, people who are stubborn and can't even edit...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it objectively describes a lack of editing skill ("एडिटिंगही निट करता येत नाही") and attributes the original work to "सरकारनामाचं" (Sarkarnama) without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion.

Text: *कृपया या पोस्टचा अधिक प्रसार व्हावा, ही अपेक्षा*
translated_text: *Please share this post more widely*
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "अपेक्षा" (apeksha), meaning "expectation" or "hope," simply indicates a desire for wider sharing without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: भाजप ला मत देण्यापेक्षा चालेल ते, असे वाटते आम्हाला.
translated_text: We think it would be better than voting for the BJP.
Justification: The phrase "चालेल ते" (chaalel te), meaning "it would be better/acceptable," expresses a neutral preference rather than a strong positive or negative feeling, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: ‘ढाल-तलवार’ चिन्ह मिळाल्यावर उदय सामंताची प्रतिक्रिया; म्हणाले, “अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीनंतर धनुष्यबाण…”
translated_text: Uday Samanta's reaction on getting the 'shield-sword' symbol; said, "After the Andheri by-election, bow and arrow..."
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily reports a factual event (Uday Samanta receiving a symbol) and quotes his statement. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi words "मिळाल्यावर" (upon receiving) and "म्हणाले" (said) are neutral reporting verbs and contribute to the overall lack of sentiment.

Text: खर तर रेल्वे स्टेशन वर झोपायला व्यवस्था करायला हरकत नाही..
translated_text: Actually, there's no harm in making arrangements to sleep at the railway station.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral suggestion; the phrase "हरकत नाही" (harakat nahi) which translates to "no harm" or "no objection," indicates a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment, making the overall tone neutral.

Text: हे कोनत्या रिंग चे आहेत
translated_text: What ring are these from?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question ("हे कोनत्या रिंग चे आहेत" - What ring are these from?) without any emotionally charged or subjective language. The question "कोनत्या" (which) is simply seeking information.

Text: आपली तक्रार वरिष्ठ पोलीस निरीक्षक,वर्तकनगर पोलीस ठाणे यांना आवश्यक कारवाईसाठी कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been reported to the Senior Police Inspector, Vartaknagar Police Station for necessary action.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply stating a fact: "आपली तक्रार ... कळविली आहे" (your complaint has been reported). This phrase indicates a notification or passing of information, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: सगळ..ईडी ,यांच्या.।घरचे पाणी भरते असे नाही का वाटत...
translated_text: Don't you think that all this... ED's... fills the house with water...
Justification: The phrase "घरचे पाणी भरते" (gharche paani bharte), meaning "fills the house with water," implies a negative outcome or problem, evoking a feeling of disgust in this context, rather than being an indicator of the sentiment.

Text: मग भारतातील सध्याच्या हुकूमशाही मधे दुसऱ्या पक्षांना मत द्यायला हरकत आहे का तुमची?
translated_text: So, do you have any objection to voting for other parties in the current dictatorship in India?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the interrogative nature of the question. The Marathi phrase "हरकत आहे का" (harakat aahe ka) which translates to "is there any objection?" indicates a neutral inquiry rather than a positive or negative assertion.

Text: क्षेत्रात जबरदस्त पैसा आहे. तुमची परिश्रम घेण्याची तयारी आहे का, ते पहा.
translated_text: There is a lot of money in the field. See if you are willing to work hard.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about the potential for wealth ("जबरदस्त पैसा आहे") and poses a question about willingness to work, lacking any explicit positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: सायच्या कार्तिक स्नान सुरू आहे  आता सक्काळी आंघोळ करतं असतो मी
translated_text: The Kartik bath is underway, now I am taking a bath regularly.
Justification: The sentence describes a routine activity (taking a bath regularly during Kartik month), and lacks any words conveying positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the emotion is neutral. The phrase "आंघोळ करतं असतो" describes a habitual action, without any emotional coloring.

Text: मागील अडीच वर्षे कुणाकडे मदत मागितली होती.
translated_text: I had asked someone for help for the past two and a half years.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "मागील अडीच वर्षे कुणाकडे मदत मागितली होती" (I had asked someone for help for the past two and a half years) simply states a past action without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "मदत मागितली होती" (asked for help) indicates an action, but without further context, it doesn't convey any particular emotion.

Text: "सत्तेच्या खुर्चीवर तुमच्यापैकी   असेल, मी स्वत: दुसऱ्याच्या खुर्चीवर बसणार नाही"
translated_text: "One of you will be in the seat of power, I myself will not sit in someone else's chair"
Justification: The phrase "सत्तेच्या खुर्चीवर" (sattechya khurchivar - in the seat of power) suggests a sense of resentment and competition for authority, contributing to the emotion of anger. The speaker implies a rejection of vying for power.

Text: ह्यात "मराठी रोजगार " ही येतो का?
translated_text: Does this include "Marathi employment"?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question. The Marathi phrase "मराठी रोजगार" (Marathi employment) itself doesn't carry any inherent sentiment or emotion. The question "येतो का?" (does it include?) is also neutral.

Text: हे देश धर्म सर्वोपरि असल्याचे प्रतिक आहे.
translated_text: This country is a symbol of religion being paramount.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact/belief about the country being a symbol of religious paramountcy. The phrase "सर्वोपरि असल्याचे प्रतिक आहे" ("sarvopari aslyache pratik aahe" - a symbol of being paramount) simply describes a state and does not convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: राहुल देशपांडेला कार्यक्रमाचे ठरलेले पैसे मिळाले झालं काम
translated_text: Rahul Deshpande received the money agreed for the program and the work was done.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "मिळाले झालं काम" (milale zale kaam - work is done once received) simply states a fact about the completion of work after payment, without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: डायबेटिज आहे? नवरात्रीमध्ये उपवास करताना 'ही' काळजी घ्याच
translated_text: Do you have diabetes? Take these precautions while fasting during Navratri
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a question and offers advice ("काळजी घ्याच" - take precautions), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "काळजी घ्याच" is simply informational and advisory.

Text: हिंदी का बरं वापरत आहेत तुम्ही ???
translated_text: Why are you using Hindi???
Justification: The word "बरं" (bara), used in this context, implies surprise or mild annoyance at the speaker's choice of using Hindi, hence the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: “महाराष्ट्राच्या भविष्यासाठी, सर्व ठाकरेंनी, आता तरी एकत्र यायला हवं”
translated_text: “For the future of Maharashtra, all Thackerays should come together now at least”
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for unity among the Thackerays for the sake of Maharashtra's future. While it implies a potentially positive outcome, the word "हवं" (havan/should) indicates a suggestion or necessity, not a definitive positive or negative sentiment. It is a call for action, hence it is rated as neutral.

Text: आपल्याकडे जे आहे ते खुप आहे. म्हणून जगता आलं की नाही त्याच दुःख होत नसतं....!
translated_text: What we have is abundant. So, it doesn't matter if we can't live or not....!
Justification: While the overall sentiment is neutral (0), the implied joy stems from the phrase "खुप आहे" (khup aahe), meaning "is abundant." The feeling of having enough can create a sense of contentment, subtly influencing a positive emotion.

Text: व यांच्या चढाओढीत ने आपले नुकसान करुन घेऊ नये
translated_text: And don't let your losses get in the way of their struggle.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it provides advice without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "नुकसान करुन घेऊ नये" (nuksan karun gheu naye) meaning "don't let losses get in the way," is a statement of caution or advice, not inherently positive or negative in isolation.

Text: म्हणजे तो श्रेय घेण्यासाठी लेटर होता का....
translated_text: So was that a letter to take credit?...
Justification: The sentence expresses doubt and sarcasm, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "म्हणजे तो श्रेय घेण्यासाठी लेटर होता का...." questions the motive behind the action, implying skepticism but without explicitly expressing a positive or negative sentiment. The "?" at the end also contributes to the neutral tone, indicating a question rather than a statement of opinion.

Text: तुम्ही सांगितलेल्या गोष्टींनाच दंत कथा म्हणतात का
translated_text: Are the things you said called dental stories?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the unexpected connection implied between "तुम्ही सांगितलेल्या गोष्टींना" (the things you said) and "दंत कथा" (dental stories/legends). The literal interpretation creates an absurd and surprising association.

Text: आपण महाराष्ट्रातील जनतेला पत्र लिहिले आहे का राऊत साहेब?
translated_text: Have you written a letter to the people of Maharashtra, Raut Saheb?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The phrase "आपण महाराष्ट्रातील जनतेला पत्र लिहिले आहे का" (Have you written a letter to the people of Maharashtra?) poses a question without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मतदानातून दिसेलच असे काही नाही...
translated_text: There is nothing that can be seen from the vote...
Justification: The phrase "असे काही नाही" (ase kahi nahi), meaning "nothing like that" or "not necessarily," indicates uncertainty and lack of a strong opinion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: राज्यातल्या सत्तांतराची गोष्ट... मुख्यमंत्र्यांच्या तोंडून, वाचा काय आहे बातमी,
translated_text: The story of the change of power in the state... from the mouth of the Chief Minister, read what is the news,
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive, reporting on a change in power and directing the reader to news. No specific Marathi words or phrases elicit a strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: मला पहिल्यांदा यांचे अकाउंट आहे असे वाटत होतं....
translated_text: I thought I had an account at first...
Justification: The sentence expresses a thought or belief, and the phrase "असे वाटत होतं" (ase vaatat hoto) indicating "I thought" or "it seemed" contributes to a neutral sentiment as it simply describes a past impression without expressing a positive or negative emotion.

Text: गुन्हे दाखल करणे यांचं काम आहे रोज नवीन नवीन गुन्हे दाखल करणार
translated_text: It is their job to file crimes. New crimes will be filed every day.
Justification: The sentence describes a routine task ("गुन्हे दाखल करणे यांचं काम आहे"), and the neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the factual and unemotional description of filing crimes, devoid of any subjective opinion or emotional coloring.

Text: आज अस म्हणाल व उद्या न्याय व्यवस्था दावणीला बांधली गेली आहे
translated_text: You say this today and tomorrow the justice system is tied to the fence.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about a hypothetical future situation. There is no explicit sentiment or emotion expressed. While the situation itself (justice system being "tied to the fence") could be interpreted negatively, the phrase "आज अस म्हणाल व उद्या न्याय व्यवस्था दावणीला बांधली गेली आहे" simply describes the potential occurrence without expressing a strong opinion or feeling. The neutral sentiment is derived from the absence of emotionally charged words and the overall factual presentation, even though the topic itself can be negatively perceived.

Text: राजकिय संस्कृती ही फक्त सोय आहेनायतर हे महाभारत घडलंच नसतं
translated_text: Political culture is just a convenience, otherwise this Mahabharata would not have happened.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a conditional statement ("घडलंच नसतं") about a hypothetical scenario without conveying strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सोय आहेनायतर" (convenience, otherwise) simply frames the political culture as a factor influencing events, lacking emotional coloring.

Text: पण हा का बाहेर येईल?
translated_text: But why will this come out?
Justification: The question "का बाहेर येईल?" (ka baher yeil?) expresses surprise about the possibility of something coming out. "का" (ka) which means "why" in this context is used to indicate surprise rather than simply requesting information.

Text: त्यांना सिडको अध्यक्षपदाचे गाजर दिले आहे, अशी बातमी आहे ठाण्यात.
translated_text: There is news in Thane that he has been offered the post of CIDCO chairman.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "गाजर दिले" (gajar dile) is used metaphorically, meaning to give a false promise or something worthless as a reward, but in this context, it's simply reporting the news of such an alleged offering. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment towards the action itself, just a statement of fact.

Text: म्हणून तर मुख्यमंत्री झाला.....
translated_text: So he became the Chief Minister...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "म्हणून तर मुख्यमंत्री झाला" (mhanun tar mukhyamantri jhala) simply states a fact (he became the Chief Minister) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase itself is purely descriptive.

Text: इतिहास वाचावा लागेल अभ्यास करून घे
translated_text: You have to read and study history.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("इतिहास वाचावा लागेल अभ्यास करून घे" - it will be necessary to read and study history) without any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: बामण जवा भंग्याची काम करायला चालू करतीन तवा
translated_text: The baman started working on the barley and sorghum.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement about someone (baman) starting work; there is no explicit positive or negative emotion expressed. The Marathi phrase "काम करायला चालू करतीन" (kam karayla chalu kartin - started working) is a simple description of an action.

Text: तू ही व्हिडिओ बघ आधी
translated_text: You should watch this video first.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of any overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "तू ही व्हिडिओ बघ आधी" simply expresses a suggestion or direction to watch a video, devoid of emotional coloring.

Text: आता काही दिवस हे निर्बंध लॉकडाउन सारख पाळलं जाणार आहे म्हणून जपून रहा.
translated_text: These restrictions will be followed like a lockdown for a few days, so be careful.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it mentions "निर्बंध लॉकडाउन सारख" (restrictions like a lockdown), it primarily focuses on advising caution with "जपून रहा" (be careful), lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: लागू असतांना कमी होता का
translated_text: Was it less when it was applied?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple query about a potential decrease ("कमी होता का") without any emotional loading, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: भविष्यात अशीच वेळ येऊ शकते....... म्हणून कदाचित ही तयारी चालू आहे अत्ता पासून...
translated_text: Such a time may come in the future.......so perhaps this preparation has been going on since now...
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility and a subsequent action (preparation) stemming from it. The Marathi phrase "कदाचित" (kadachit - perhaps) indicates uncertainty and lacks strong positive or negative connotations, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: अर्धा मिळेल, कारण हे खेळण आहे
translated_text: You will get half, because it is a toy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and unemotional statement "खेळण आहे" (kheln aahe - is a toy), which expresses a simple explanation without conveying any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: इतकं दिवस सत्ता कुणाची होती दादा
translated_text: Who was in power for so long, Grandpa?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in asking "इतकं दिवस सत्ता कुणाची होती दादा" (itka divas satta kunachi hoti dada) - "Who was in power for so long, Grandpa?". It's a query for information, not an expression of opinion or feeling.

Text: काय सांगू यांचा बद्दल बाळासाहेबांचे शिवसैनिक आहे हे
translated_text: What can I say about Balasaheb's Shiv Sainiks?
Justification: The sentence "काय सांगू यांचा बद्दल" (kay sangu yancha baddal - What can I say about them?) expresses a neutral sentiment as it's simply an introductory phrase that doesn't convey any positive or negative feelings.

Text: श्रीक्षेत्र माळेगाव यात्रा परिसरातील हालचालीवर ड्रोन कॅमेऱ्याची नजर  ./?=   …
translated_text: Drone camera keeps an eye on the movement in the Shrikshetra Malegaon Yatra area./?= …
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral observation about drone camera surveillance; there are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "ड्रोन कॅमेऱ्याची नजर" (drone camera keeps an eye) simply states a fact.

Text: बाळ अनिकेत  चुका सांगितल्या की नाहीस का हे बरोबर आहे
translated_text: Is it right to tell Aniket that he made mistakes or not?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about the appropriateness of pointing out mistakes, using the neutral phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) which translates to "is it right?". It doesn't convey any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: जसे कोविड काळात म्हणून किताब दिला होता कोणाला तरी!
translated_text: Just like someone was given a title during the Covid period!
Justification: While seemingly sarcastic, the sentence uses "जसे...म्हणून किताब दिला होता कोणाला तरी!" which implies a sense of absurd or humorous recognition, suggesting a lighthearted, albeit potentially ironic, joy. The exclamation mark further supports this interpretation.

Text: बघ मी सुरू करून अर्ध्या तासात झोपले..
translated_text: Look, I fell asleep within half an hour of starting..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a hint of surprise because the phrase "झोपले" (zhopale - fell asleep) suggests an unexpected outcome within a short timeframe ("अर्ध्या तासात" - ardhya taasat - half an hour) after starting something. There is no negative or positive opinion expressed and the emotion is appropriate in this context.

Text: काय हे कसले फोटो दाखवतात
translated_text: What kind of photos show what
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "काय हे कसले" ("kay he kasle"), which translates to "what kind of," indicates a question or observation without expressing a positive or negative feeling. The statement is primarily inquisitive, rather than expressing a strong opinion or emotion.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा
translated_text: Kojagiri full moon
Justification: The sentence "कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा" is neutral as it simply refers to a specific full moon festival. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the phrase itself.

Text: इतिहास साक्षी आहे, खवळलेल्या समुद्राचा आणि शांत दिसणाऱ्या माणसाचा, कधीच नाद करू नये..!!
translated_text: History is a witness, of the turbulent sea and the seemingly calm man, never to make a sound..!!
Justification: The sentiment is subtly positive despite the warning due to the proverb-like quality of the sentence. While the warning itself ("कधीच नाद करू नये..!!") implies caution, the overall statement has a sense of established wisdom and understanding. This wisdom inspires a muted joy.

Text: फैजलला हा कंटेंट ने दिलेला तेव्हा.
translated_text: When Faisal was given this content.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("फैजलला हा कंटेंट ने दिलेला तेव्हा" - When Faisal was given this content) without any emotionally charged words or phrases. There is no Marathi word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: घालून घे गार गार वाटेल , तसं पण मशालीने तुझी झिलगर्ली असेलच
translated_text: It may feel cold to wear it, but your torch will be lit.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents two opposing sensations ("गार गार वाटेल" - it may feel cold) and ("मशालीने तुझी झिलगर्ली असेलच" - your torch will be lit), without indicating a clear positive or negative leaning.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे हा बाप आहे. केशव
translated_text: Balasaheb Thackeray is the father. Keshav
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual opinion or comparison using the phrase "बाप आहे" (father is), which doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: अरे भाजप मध्ये तर निवडणूक देखील होत नाही त्याबद्दल बोल
translated_text: Oh, BJP doesn't even hold elections, talk about it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply stating a fact/opinion about BJP not holding elections ("निवडणूक देखील होत नाही") and suggesting discussion on the topic ("त्याबद्दल बोल"). There is no inherent positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: मराठी युवकांना सबळ करायचे पण आम्हीच मग यांना काय फक्त मतं द्यायची का?
translated_text: We want to empower Marathi youth, but should we just give them votes?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the rhetorical question "काय फक्त मतं द्यायची का?" (kay fakt mate dyayachi ka?), which questions the extent of empowerment offered to the Marathi youth and doesn't lean towards a positive or negative stance.

Text: कारण हातात ब्रेसलेत होत
translated_text: Because I was wearing braces on my hands.
Justification: The sentence "कारण हातात ब्रेसलेत होत" is neutral because it simply states a fact - the speaker was wearing braces. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the phrase "हातात ब्रेसलेत होत" (wearing braces on hands).

Text: हा पर्याय होता की नाही, तुमच्या लोकशाहीमध्ये??
translated_text: Was this an option or not, in your democracy??
Justification: The sentence ends with a rhetorical question ("तुमच्या लोकशाहीमध्ये?? - in your democracy??") without any explicit positive or negative words, indicating neutrality.

Text: नाशिकच्या दरेवाडीच्या विद्यार्थ्यांच्या आंदोलनानंतर शाळा पुन्हा सुरु होणार, इतर कमी पटसंख्येच्या शाळांचं काय?
translated_text: Schools will reopen after the student protest in Darewadi, Nashik, but what about other schools with low enrollment?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it mainly conveys information about the reopening of schools and raises a question about the future of other low-enrollment schools. The phrase "शाळा पुन्हा सुरु होणार" (schools will reopen) indicates a factual announcement, while "इतर कमी पटसंख्येच्या शाळांचं काय?" (what about other schools with low enrollment?) poses a neutral question rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: आशिष शेलार यांनी नुकताच मुंबई क्रिकेट संघटनेच्या अध्यक्षपदासाठी अर्ज दाखल केला होता
translated_text: Ashish Shelar had recently filed his application for the post of President of the Mumbai Cricket Association.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("अर्ज दाखल केला होता" - filed his application) without any emotionally charged language.

Text: याने तर आज    जुलै चा दिवस आठवण करून दिला आहे
translated_text: This reminds me of July today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a comparison to a specific date, "जुलै चा दिवस आठवण करून दिला आहे" (July cha divas aathvan karun dila aahe - reminds me of July). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative emotion.

Text: घटस्थापनेच्या दिवशी मी बोकडाचे मटण खाल्ले, माझ्यावर देवीचा कोप होईल का ?
translated_text: I ate goat meat on the day of Ghatasthapana, will the goddess be angry with me?
Justification: The phrase "देवीचा कोप होईल का ?" (devi cha kop hoil ka?), meaning "will the goddess be angry?", expresses a fear of divine anger, justifying the emotion and contributing to a negative sentiment (0).

Text: ले.जनरल अनिल चव्हाण देशाचे नवीन होणार
translated_text: Lt. General Anil Chavan will be the country's new
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "नवीन होणार" (navin honar - will be new/becoming new) is a factual statement without any indication of positive or negative emotion.

Text: मजेत आला आहेस तर दिवाळी नंतरच जा
translated_text: If you're having fun, go after Diwali.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply suggests a timeframe for departure ("दिवाळी नंतरच जा" - "go after Diwali") based on the person having fun, without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: आश्चर्यकारक बातम्या तुम्हाला पुन्हा पुन्हा ऐकायला मिळणार नाहीत म्हणून तुम्ही हे पहावे
translated_text: You won't get to hear amazing news again and again, so you should watch this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact and recommendation, with no inherently positive or negative words. While "आश्चर्यकारक बातम्या" (aashcharyakaarak baatmya - amazing news) could be positive, the overall context presents it as a call to action rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: पण तुमच्याकडे इमान नाही.
translated_text: But you have no faith.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "इमान नाही" (iman nahi) - "no faith" - expresses a lack of something without inherent negativity.

Text: ह्यावर काही शासन निर्णय आला का? तसेच आजच्या मंत्रीमंडळात ह्यावर काही चर्चा झाली का?
translated_text: Has there been any government decision on this? Also, was there any discussion on this in today's cabinet meeting?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks informational questions using words like "शासन निर्णय आला का?" (has there been a government decision?) and "चर्चा झाली का?" (was there discussion?), indicating an objective inquiry rather than a positive, negative, or emotional statement.

Text: मुबंई आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकारणात बाळ ठाकरेंचे स्थान ध्रुव तार्यासारखे अढळ आहे .
translated_text: Bal Thackeray's place in Mumbai and Maharashtra politics is as unwavering as the North Star.
Justification: The phrase "ध्रुव तार्यासारखे अढळ" (dhruv taryasarkhe adhal - as unwavering as the North Star) indicates a stable and constant presence, which doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: होतील, हे पाकने कायम लक्षात ठेवावे !
translated_text: Pakistan should always remember that it will happen!
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a statement of fact or a warning, lacking overt emotional content. "होतील" (will happen) and "लक्षात ठेवावे" (should remember) are objective and don't convey any specific emotion.

Text: फडणवीसांना राज ठाकरेंचे पत्र : अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूकीत ऋतुजा लटके आमदार होतील हे पहावे
translated_text: Raj Thackeray's letter to Fadnavis: Let's see if Rituja Latke will become an MLA in the Andheri by-election
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about a letter from Raj Thackeray to Fadnavis regarding the Andheri by-election. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूकीत ऋतुजा लटके आमदार होतील हे पहावे" (Let's see if Rituja Latke will become an MLA in the Andheri by-election) is a factual statement and carries no inherent emotion or sentiment.

Text: या ट्विट खाली हे ट्विट दिसलं!
translated_text: This tweet appeared below this tweet!
Justification: The emotion "surprise" is derived from the unexpected or coincidental nature of the tweet appearing below another, as indicated by the descriptive phrase "या ट्विट खाली हे ट्विट दिसलं!" highlighting the unexpected juxtaposition.

Text: * * *घुग्गुस शहरात आला मगर* *वनविभागाने केले रेस्क्यू*
translated_text: * * *Alligator came to Ghuggus city* *Forest department rescues it*
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports factual information about an alligator entering a city and being rescued. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed in the words "आला" (came), "रेस्क्यू" (rescue), or any other part of the sentence. It's a news report.

Text: जुना पटनाईक नाही का
translated_text: Isn't it old Patnaik?
