Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple question about Patnaik's age ("जुना पटनाईक" - "old Patnaik"). There's no emotional coloring in the question itself.

Text: मानापमानाच्या पुढे म्हणजे उपकार का
translated_text: Why is gratitude more important than respect?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a philosophical question using the phrase "मानापमानाच्या पुढे म्हणजे उपकार का" ("why is gratitude more important than respect?") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आपल्याला मिळते पण, कोणाची हे नाय सांगितल!
translated_text: We get it, but who cares?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "कोणाची हे नाय सांगितल!", which translates to "who cares?" or "it's not specified by whom," expressing indifference or a lack of interest, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: एक वर्तुळ पूर्ण
translated_text: A circle complete
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a completed circle ("वर्तुळ पूर्ण") without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: सर्वोच्च न्यायालयाने आज तीन गोष्टींवर निर्णय देणे अपेक्षित होते – उल्हास बापट- घटनातज्ज्ञ
translated_text: The Supreme Court was expected to give a decision on three things today – Ulhas Bapat- Constitutional expert
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting tone and lack of emotional language. The phrase "सर्वोच्च न्यायालयाने आज तीन गोष्टींवर निर्णय देणे अपेक्षित होते" (The Supreme Court was expected to give a decision on three things today) simply states an anticipated event without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: पवन माधव भंडारी हा नैराश मधुन बोलतो
translated_text: Pawan Madhav Bhandari speaks from despair
Justification: The sentiment is negative and emotion is sadness because the phrase "नैराश मधुन" (nairash madhun), meaning "from despair," indicates a state of sadness and negativity.

Text: व्वा! हा व्हिडीओ बघा, एवढीशी पोरं, कसं जमतं? व्हायरल व्हिडीओ
translated_text: Wow! Watch this video, how do you have so many kids? Viral video
Justification: The word "व्वा!" (Vva!) expresses surprise, aligning with the emotion.

Text: धर्माच्या दलालांनो प्रेमास जात नसते..  उत्कर्ष शिंदे गाणं आहे ऐका
translated_text: The brokers of religion do not go to love.. This is a song by Utkarsh Shinde, listen to it
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's stating a fact ("प्रेमास जात नसते" - love has no caste) and inviting the listener to listen to a song. There is no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: सर्कस चालू झाल्यावर जोकर नको का बाहेर काढायला
translated_text: Why don't you take out the clown when the circus starts?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question inquiring about a standard circus procedure. The phrase "नको का बाहेर काढायला" (nako ka baher kadhayala) is a neutral question about whether or not to bring the clown out, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: याने तर ट्वीट सेव करायला सांगितले होते.
translated_text: He even asked me to save the tweet.
Justification: The sentence "याने तर ट्वीट सेव करायला सांगितले होते" is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact. There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The phrase "सांगितले होते" (sangitale hote) simply states that someone "asked" or "told" something, which is neutral in tone.

Text: जावईशोध लावणे असा एक वाक्प्रचार आहे मराठीत.
translated_text: There is a phrase in Marathi called "javaishod lakvane".
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the existence of a Marathi phrase "जावईशोध लावणे" (javaishod lakvane) without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: हे हाल आहेत खांग्रेसी सोणिया शेणकेंचे
translated_text: This is the plight of Congress member Sonia Shenke.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative words. While it describes a situation ("हे हाल आहेत"), the description is presented factually and without emotional coloring. There is no specific word indicating sentiment; it's simply a statement of circumstances.

Text: ढाल तलवारीला असा काही प्रॉब्लेम येणार नाही..
translated_text: The shield and sword will not have such a problem.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a lack of problem ("येणार नाही") for the shield and sword. There's no indication of positivity, negativity, or any strong emotion.

Text: विचार सारखेच आहेत...
translated_text: The thoughts are the same...
Justification: The sentence expresses similarity without any explicit positive or negative connotations. The phrase "सारखेच आहेत" (sarkhech aahet - are the same) simply indicates a neutral comparison, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ते पण असू शकेल...यु क्नो हीम बेटर...
translated_text: It could be that...you know him better...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a possibility ("असू शकेल...") and acknowledges another person's potentially better knowledge ("यु क्नो हीम बेटर..."), lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "असू शकेल..." suggests uncertainty rather than a definite opinion.

Text: ते अनुराग ठाकूर आणि ज्योतिरादित्य सिंधिया नाही आहेत ना महाराष्ट्रात.
translated_text: They are not Anurag Thakur and Jyotiraditya Scindia in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact/questioning a presence. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating sentiment, it's a factual inquiry.

Text: एक फडफडाता गाना..
translated_text: A fluttering song..
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "फडफडाता" (phadphadata - fluttering) is a descriptive word without inherent positive or negative sentiment. It simply describes the nature of the song.

Text: यांना भेटणार का?
translated_text: Will you meet them?
Justification: The sentence "यांना भेटणार का?" expresses a simple question about a future meeting. The lack of emotionally charged words or phrases, like the neutral verb "भेटणार" (meet), contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: मशाल निवडून येणार हे कळल्यावर आत्म्याला शांती वैगरे आठवलं असावं
translated_text: The soul must have felt peace and tranquility after learning that Mashal would be elected.
Justification: The word "शांती" (shanti), meaning peace, suggests a positive feeling and contributes to the overall joy.

Text: आता पक्ष आणि चिन्ह भेटल असेल तर शेतकर्यांचा विचार करा आणि त्यांना मदत करा
translated_text: Now if you meet the party and the symbol, think of the farmers and help them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विचार करा आणि त्यांना मदत करा") but lacks any strong positive or negative indicators. It focuses on the neutral act of considering and helping farmers. Therefore, there is no particular word conveying emotion, and the sentence as a whole remains neutral.

Text: आपण एक काम करू
translated_text: Let's do a job.
Justification: The sentence "आपण एक काम करू" expresses a suggestion or proposition in a neutral tone. The phrase "काम करू" (kam karu - let's do/shall we do) indicates action but without any specific emotional coloring or positive/negative connotation, hence the neutral sentiment.

translated_text: Why is this...??
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with surprise primarily driven by the "का....??" (ka....??) which expresses a questioning and surprised tone. The elongated question marker emphasizes the speaker's disbelief or questioning attitude.

Text: फक्त ठाकरे परिवार वाचवण्याची धडपड बाकी काही नाही
translated_text: There is nothing else but the struggle to save the Thackeray family.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it objectively describes an action ("फक्त ठाकरे परिवार वाचवण्याची धडपड") without expressing positive or negative feeling towards it. The phrase simply states the focus is on saving the Thackeray family.

Text: मा.बाळासाहेबांचं पोरग आहे म्हण हे
translated_text: This is said to be the son of Mr. Balasaheb.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "म्हण हे" ("mhan he"), which indicates reported speech or hearsay. It presents information without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling or emotion.

Text: ह्या निवडणुका महा विकास आघाडी करून लढले होते का?
translated_text: Were these elections contested by Maha Vikas Aghadi?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question about whether the elections were contested by a specific political alliance ("महा विकास आघाडी"). The interrogative nature and lack of evaluative words result in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "ह्या निवडणुका महा विकास आघाडी करून लढले होते का?" simply inquires about a fact.

Text: लायकी आहे का ?
translated_text: Is it worth it?
Justification: The sentence "लायकी आहे का ?" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question asking about worthiness or capability ("लायकी"). It doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: नातेवाईकांना सांगतो फोटो पाठवायला आला की.मी ठाण्यात आहे.
translated_text: I tell my relatives that I came to send photos. I am in Thane.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and unemotional content; specifically, "मी ठाण्यात आहे" (I am in Thane) simply states a location, contributing to the lack of sentiment.

Text: निवडूनुकीच्या तोंडावर का भारत पाकिस्तान मुदद्दे येतात ओ.
translated_text: Why do India-Pakistan issues come up on the eve of elections?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question and a common observation, lacking any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "निवडूनुकीच्या तोंडावर का भारत पाकिस्तान मुदद्दे येतात ओ" simply inquires about the recurring timing of India-Pakistan issues, making it neutral.

Text: भाजप च्यां संगती चा असर. भाजप हा गुजराती पक्ष आहे
translated_text: The effect of BJP's association. BJP is a Gujarati party.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states factual information and doesn't express any particular opinion or feeling. The phrases "भाजप च्यां संगती चा असर" (the effect of BJP's association) and "भाजप हा गुजराती पक्ष आहे" (BJP is a Gujarati party) are simply declarative statements, lacking any emotionally charged language.

Text: या द्वेषाच्या युगात एकतेचा हा समूह, शतकानुशतके स्मरणात राहील.
translated_text: This group of unity in this age of hatred will be remembered for centuries.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hopeful sentiment despite acknowledging a negative context ("द्वेषाच्या युगात" - "in the age of hatred"), but ultimately focuses on the enduring nature of unity. No single word expresses a strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is justified.

Text: राजकारण्यांबरोबर काही पत्रकारांची देखील चौकशी केली पाहीजे नाही का ??
translated_text: Shouldn't some journalists also be questioned along with politicians?
Justification: The sentence expresses anger due to the implied criticism and suspicion conveyed by the phrase "राजकारण्यांबरोबर काही पत्रकारांची देखील चौकशी केली पाहीजे नाही का ??" (Shouldn't some journalists also be questioned along with politicians?), suggesting distrust towards journalists alongside politicians.

Text: ते आहे आधीच लावलेल, दर पावसाळ्यात काही नवीन झाडे लावत असतो
translated_text: It's already planted, we plant some new trees every monsoon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a matter-of-fact statement about tree planting activities. The phrases "ते आहे आधीच लावलेल" (it's already planted) and "दर पावसाळ्यात काही नवीन झाडे लावत असतो" (we plant some new trees every monsoon) indicate a routine activity without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

translated_text: If everyone thought like this...........??
Justification: The phrase "तर...........??" implies a questioning and speculative tone, suggesting the speaker is considering a hypothetical situation with an element of surprise or uncertainty about the potential outcome.

Text: मी नवीन मोबाईल घेतल्यामुळे
translated_text: Because I bought a new mobile phone.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "नवीन मोबाईल घेतल्यामुळे" (Navin mobile ghetlyamule) which translates to "because I bought a new mobile phone".  "नवीन" (Navin - new) and the action of buying a new phone implies a positive experience, leading to feelings of joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: प्रत्येकाला असा अनुभव येतोच
translated_text: Everyone experiences this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "प्रत्येकाला असा अनुभव येतोच" (pratyekala asa anubhav yetoch) which simply states a common occurrence and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: पंचनामे कधी होणार तारीख द्या तलाठ्यांना
translated_text: Tell the Talathas when the Panchnama will be held.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual request for information ("तारीख द्या"), without any explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: हे काय आहे फोटो
translated_text: What is this photo?
Justification: The phrase "हे काय आहे" (he kay aahe), meaning "what is this," expresses surprise, indicating a neutral sentiment in this specific context as it's a simple question of inquiry.

Text: तेवढी अकाऊंट डिलिट करून झालीत माझी आणि आणि त्या पेक्षा जास्त पण आहेत
translated_text: I have deleted that many accounts and there are more than that.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about deleting accounts without any explicit emotional or opinionated language. The phrase "तेवढी अकाऊंट डिलिट करून झालीत माझी आणि आणि त्या पेक्षा जास्त पण आहेत" (I have deleted that many accounts and there are more than that) simply conveys information, lacking any sentiment.

Text: आता तर अंघोळही पावसातच होत आहे..
translated_text: Now even bathing is done in the rain.
Justification: The sentence describes a commonplace action ("आता तर अंघोळही पावसातच होत आहे"), with no specific words indicating positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: "वृक्शरोपण" ही "वृक्शतोडीच्या" कित्येक पटीने जास्त करता येईल. त्यामुळे पर्यावरणाचीही हानी होणार नाही.
translated_text: "Tree planting" can be done many times more than "tree felling". Therefore, there will be no harm to the environment either.
Justification: The sentence discusses the possibility of increasing tree planting over tree felling and preventing environmental harm. This is a factual statement and does not convey any strong positive or negative sentiment. There is no explicit emotional expression; therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: धुलाई चालू आहे नोयडा के चरणचुंबको का...
translated_text: Washing is going on, why are you walking in Noida...
Justification: The word "नोयडा के चरणचुंबको" which translates to "walking in Noida" implies a location-specific action in a sarcastic way, contributing to surprise as to why someone would be walking there.

Text: दुर्दैव ... बाळासाहेबांना प्रत्यक्ष-अप्रत्यक्षपणे कमी लेखण्याचा प्रयत्न ...
translated_text: Unfortunately... an attempt to directly or indirectly belittle Balasaheb...
Justification: The sentiment is negative (0) and the emotion is sadness due to the word "दुर्दैव" (durdaiw), which translates to "unfortunately." This expresses a sense of misfortune and regret, triggering sadness.

Text: हे खरंच आमदार आहेत का?
translated_text: Are these really MLAs?
Justification: The word "खरंच" (kharch), meaning "really," indicates surprise, implying disbelief that they are actually MLAs.

Text: दलित व बंडखोर साहित्य अण्णा भाऊ शिवाय पुर्ण होऊच शकत नाही हे नक्की
translated_text: It is certain that Dalit and rebel literature cannot be complete without Anna Bhau.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Anna Bhau's importance to Dalit and rebel literature, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हे नक्की" (he nakki - it is certain) simply confirms the statement, not adding to the sentiment. Therefore the sentiment is neutral.

Text: पण भाजपा ने लढू दिले तर?नाहीतर नुसते कागदी, तात्पुरते.
translated_text: But what if the BJP lets him fight? Otherwise, it's just on paper, temporary.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and skepticism. The phrase "नुसते कागदी, तात्पुरते" (nusate kagadi, tatpurte) implying "just on paper, temporary," indicates a neutral sentiment as it lacks strong positive or negative emotional tone, simply questioning the authenticity of a potential action.

Text: दोघांनाही बरोबर बसता यावं पुन्हा संशय नको आतमध्ये जाऊन फोन वर चर्चा केली!!!?
translated_text: Both of them should sit together, so that there is no doubt again, they went inside and discussed it on the phone!!!?
Justification: The exclamation marks and question mark at the end "!!!?" coupled with the phrase "संशय नको" (sanshay nako - no doubt), suggest frustration and suspicion, leading to anger. The questioning tone implies disbelief and annoyance.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र.... सारा महाराष्ट्र पिंजून काढायचा आहे
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra.... I want to capture the entire Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common salutation and "सारा महाराष्ट्र पिंजून काढायचा आहे" (sara maharashtra pinjun kadhaycha aahe) which translates to "I want to capture the entire Maharashtra" while potentially suggestive of an action, lacks any inherently positive or negative connotations in this isolated context.

Text: तस काही नाही हा कळसूत्री बाहुली आहे...
translated_text: It's nothing like that, it's a keyhole doll...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the statement being a factual description using the phrase "कळसूत्री बाहुली" (keyhole doll), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मुंबई महापालिका प्रभाग रचनेत हस्तक्षेपास सर्वोच्च न्यायालयाचा नकार; याचिकाकर्त्यांना दिला ‘हा’ आदेश
translated_text: Supreme Court refuses to interfere in Mumbai Municipal Corporation ward structure; gives 'this' order to petitioners
Justification: The emotion of anger is indicated by the phrase "नकार" (nakar), meaning refusal or rejection. This suggests frustration and potential anger towards the Supreme Court's decision.

Text: ते चार शब्द: येवा कोकण आपलंच असा.
translated_text: Those four words: May Konkan be ours.
Justification: "आपलंच असा" (aaplanch asa - be ours) expresses a sense of belonging and wishing, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मला पण कर फोन
translated_text: Call me too.
Justification: The sentence "मला पण कर फोन" is neutral because it is a simple request. There is no inherent emotional loading. The word "पण" (pan) meaning "too/also" simply adds the speaker to the group of recipients, not implying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement about forwarding a complaint. The Marathi phrase "पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" (pohachavinyat aali aahe), meaning "has been forwarded," indicates a process completion without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: अग बाई बाळासाहेब लाखांनी आहेत पण ठाकरे मात्र एकच
translated_text: Oh my god, Balasaheb is in the millions, but Thackeray is only one.
Justification: The phrase "अग बाई" expresses surprise, similar to "Oh my god" in English.

Text: हे सरता संपत नाही चांदणे तुझ्या स्मरणाचे -- ग्रेस
translated_text: This moonlit night of your memory never ends -- Grace
Justification: The sentence evokes a sense of longing and remembrance but lacks explicitly positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हे सरता संपत नाही चांदणे तुझ्या स्मरणाचे" (He Sarata Sampat Nahi Chandane Tuzya Smaranache - This moonlit night of your memory never ends) while poetic, doesn't carry inherent positivity or negativity, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: इथे बिनविरोध होते
translated_text: It was unopposed here.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "बिनविरोध होते" (binvirodh hote), meaning "was unopposed," simply states a fact without any emotional coloring or positive/negative connotations.

Text: आणी मोहन भगवत ला मजीतीत जाऊन नमाज पडणे स्वाभाविक आहे
translated_text: And it is natural for Mohan Bhagwat to go to the mosque and offer prayers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the statement being a factual observation about a potential or hypothetical action, without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling. The phrase "स्वाभाविक आहे" (swabhavik aahe - is natural) indicates a neutral assessment of the situation.

Text: अतु आणि तुमचा पण शिंदे साहेबांवर पुतणा मावशीच प्रेम आहे...
translated_text: Atu and you also have the same love for Shinde Saheb as a nephew and aunt...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "पुतणा मावशीच प्रेम" (putna mavshich prem), meaning "love like a nephew and aunt," is a common expression and doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: जगातील सर्वात सुंदर महिलांमध्ये आली दीपिका, अशी आहे परफेक्ट फेस निवडण्याची प्रक्रिया
translated_text: Deepika is among the most beautiful women in the world, this is the process of choosing the perfect face
Justification: The sentence reports a neutral fact about Deepika Padukone being included in a list of beautiful women. There is no overtly positive or negative language. Words like "जगातील" (jagatil - world), "सर्वात" (sarvat - most), "सुंदर" (sundar - beautiful), and "महिलांमध्ये" (mahilamadhye - among women) simply state the fact, not expressing any strong emotion.

Text: "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a political goal. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" (harvayache aahe - have to defeat) expresses an intention but doesn't inherently carry positive or negative sentiment on its own in this context.

Text: तुम्ही वाचावे सर्व अशी इच्छा असेल त्यांची..
translated_text: They will want you to read everything.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire or expectation without indicating any positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "अशी इच्छा असेल" (ashi ichha asel - will want) signals a neutral statement of intent.

Text: बीड मध्ये पण पाळायला हवी होती !
translated_text: It should have been observed in Beed too!
Justification: The phrase "पाळायला हवी होती !" (palayala havi hoti!) which translates to "should have been observed!" expresses a feeling of resentment and anger because something was lacking or not done, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: अरे काय राव...तुला बहीण आहे का रे??
translated_text: Oh my god...do you have a sister??
Justification: The sentiment leans towards neutral/slightly negative (0) with surprise due to the phrase "अरे काय राव..." ("Are kay rao..."), which expresses mild shock or disbelief and can sometimes carry a slightly irritated or mocking tone depending on the context.

Text: मी म्हटलं च रस्त्यावर एवढा धुरुळा कसं आला..स्वागत.
translated_text: I said, "How come there's so much dust on the road?" Welcome.
Justification: The emotion of surprise stems from the phrase "एवढा धुरुळा कसं आला" (evadha dhurula kasa aala), which expresses astonishment at the sudden appearance of so much dust.

Text: लहानपणी ट्राय केली होती, आता कोण पकडणारेच नाहीत
translated_text: I tried it as a child, but now no one catches it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a past experience and a present observation without strong positive or negative connotations. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "कोण पकडणारेच नाहीत" (kon pakadnarech nahit) which implies a lack of consequence or attention, but doesn't express joy, sadness, or anger.

Text: या सदस्यांनी घटनास्थळावर असलेल्या अपघातग्रस्त बसची बारकाईने पाहणी करून निरीक्षणे नोंदवून घेतली.
translated_text: These members carefully inspected the accident-affected bus at the scene and recorded their observations.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual observation and inspection; there are no words indicating positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "पाहणी करून निरीक्षणे नोंदवून घेतली" (pahani karun nirikshane nondavun ghetli - inspected and recorded observations) simply describes a neutral action.

Text: भाऊ..कधी भेटले नाही..
translated_text: Brother..never met..
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("कधी भेटले नाही" - "never met") without any explicit emotional markers, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आमच्याकडे पण बालासाहेब आहेत पण ठाकरे एकच आहेत.
translated_text: We also have Balasaheb, but there is only one Thackeray.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "पण ठाकरे एकच आहेत" ("but there is only one Thackeray"), which expresses a factual statement rather than any positive or negative feeling. While "आम्हीकडे पण बालासाहेब आहेत" (We also have Balasaheb) could potentially hint at political affiliation, the overall sentence lacks emotional charge, rendering it neutral.

Text: मला नाय देत कोण आणि मी घेत पण नाही नको असेल तर
translated_text: Who gives me no and I take it but I don't want it?
Justification: The phrase "नको असेल तर" (nako asel tar - if not wanted) expresses a sense of resentment and refusal, suggesting the speaker is angry they are not valued.

Text: विषय तुला माहिती नाही अगोदर तो माहिती करून घे विशाल
translated_text: If you don't know the subject, find out about it first, Vishal.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion to gather information. The phrase "माहिती करून घे" (mahiti karun ghe - find out about it) is a neutral directive, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: अरु थाहा भएन! हौर चै सांच्चै राम्री हो! धरोधर्म!
translated_text: Did not know otherwise! Haur chai is really nice! Heritage!
Justification: The phrase "सांच्चै राम्री हो!" (saanchchai ramri ho!), meaning "really nice!", expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall joy.

Text: यांनी पण घ्यावी का?
translated_text: Should they take it too?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "यांनी पण घ्यावी का?" (Should they take it too?) is a simple question, expressing no inherent positive or negative feeling. The question marker "का?" (ka?) contributes to the neutrality by indicating a request for information rather than an expression of opinion or emotion.

Text: खाजगी वाहतुकदारांनी निर्धारीत करण्यात आलेल्या दरापेक्षा अधिक दर आकारल्यास मोटार वाहन कायद्यान्वये होणार कारवाई
translated_text: Action will be taken under the Motor Vehicles Act if private transporters charge more than the prescribed rate.
Justification: The phrase "अधिक दर आकारल्यास" (adhik dar aakarlyas - charge more than the prescribed rate) implies exploitation and unfairness, leading to a negative sentiment and specifically eliciting anger.

Text: म्हणून तुम्हाला यायला सांगितले अजून काय पाहिजे न्यायमूर्ती मोडक!
translated_text: So I asked you to come, what more do you need, Justice Modak!
Justification: The sentence exhibits a neutral sentiment (0) due to the phrase "म्हणून तुम्हाला यायला सांगितले" (So I asked you to come). While it addresses someone directly and includes a question ("अजून काय पाहिजे" - what more do you need?), it lacks any strong positive or negative indicators and appears simply informative or transactional in tone. The context is needed to provide emotion.

Text: ही आमची अक्कल...भक्त प्रजाती
translated_text: This is our common sense...the devotee species
Justification: The phrase "अक्कल...भक्त प्रजाती" (common sense...devotee species) alone, without further context, is presented in a neutral and descriptive manner without expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तो टिल्लू कुठे दिसतं नाही
translated_text: That Tillu is nowhere to be seen.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "तो टिल्लू कुठे दिसतं नाही" (To Tillu kuthe dista nahi) simply states a fact - that Tillu is not seen. There's no expression of positive or negative feeling. The phrase "कुठे दिसतं नाही" (kuthe dista nahi) - nowhere to be seen - indicates a statement of observation, not an opinion or emotional response.

Text: तुमचा नंबर दिलाय, आधार कार्ड मागत होती.. एक येईल तुमच्या नंबर वर..
translated_text: I gave you my number, I was asking for an Aadhaar card.. Someone will come to your number..
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a series of actions and requests, without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The phrase "तुमचा नंबर दिलाय, आधार कार्ड मागत होती" (tumcha number dilay, aadhar card magat hoti) describes giving a number and a request for an Aadhaar card, which is presented without added sentiment.

Text: तो सांगू शकतो का स्वतः ला वाला
translated_text: Can he tell me who he is?
Justification: The sentence "तो सांगू शकतो का स्वतः ला वाला" is neutral as it's a simple question. The phrase "सांगू शकतो का" (sangu shakto ka - can tell) expresses an inquiry rather than a feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुमची हिंदी ही देवनागरी उर्दू आहे.
translated_text: Your Hindi is Devanagari Urdu.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact or opinion regarding the style of Hindi, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. There isn't a specific word that indicates sentiment; the entire phrase "तुमची हिंदी ही देवनागरी उर्दू आहे" presents a comparative statement rather than an emotional expression.

Text: आदित्य कोण आहे रे
translated_text: Who is Aditya?
Justification: The sentence "आदित्य कोण आहे रे" is neutral because it is a simple question asking for information ("कोण आहे रे" - who is it?), lacking any inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: बर सांग ते अरे कडी लावून कोण लपल होत
translated_text: Well, tell me, who was hiding behind a chain?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is derived from the word "लपल" (lapal), meaning "hiding," indicating an unexpected or concealed action. The question "कोण" (kon) - who - further emphasizes this surprise, as it indicates the speaker's lack of knowledge about who was hiding.

Text: अंधेरीची मशाल आता पूर्ण महाराष्ट्रात पेटणार. सत्यमेव जयते.
translated_text: The torch of Andheri will now burn throughout Maharashtra. May Satyamev win.
Justification: "सत्यमेव जयते" (May Satyamev win) expresses a hopeful and positive sentiment, contributing to joy. This phrase is traditionally associated with truth and victory, evoking a feeling of optimism.

Text: सहमत, आमच्या कडून काही चुकत असल की तू नेहमीच आम्हाला टोकत असतो.
translated_text: Agreed, you always scold us when we do something wrong.
Justification: The phrase "टोकत असतो" (tokat asto), meaning "scolds us," indicates a neutral sentiment as it describes a common or expected behavior (correcting mistakes) rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: म्हणजे बीजेपी ने असेच सगळ्या जागा सोडून द्यायला पाहिजे..
translated_text: This means that BJP should give up all the seats.
Justification: The sentence expresses anger (Emotion: anger) due to the implication and slightly sarcastic tone indicated by "असेच सोडून द्यायला पाहिजे" (asech sodun dyayla pahije), implying a negative sentiment towards BJP's potential actions and expressing frustration. The phrasing suggests the speaker is angered by the perceived unfairness of the situation.

Text: स्वागत करेंगे...नो शक.. षंढ गोडसेच्या भक्तांनी सांगण्याचं कारण नाही...
translated_text: Welcome...no doubt..there is no reason for the devotees of Shandha Godse to say...
Justification: The phrase "षंढ गोडसेच्या भक्तांनी" (Shandha Godse's devotees) is highly derogatory and provocative, but within the sentence structure it acts as a statement about a group and does not explicitly express a positive or negative sentiment toward the subject of the sentence, maintaining neutrality. While the phrase is offensive, its presence doesn't dictate a positive or negative sentiment toward the action "स्वागत करेंगे" (welcome).

Text: अरे माझ्या घरा जवळ आहे हा प्रकार
translated_text: Oh, this is close to my house.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of any overtly positive or negative words. "जवळ आहे" (jawal aahe - close to) simply indicates proximity and doesn't express an opinion or feeling. "अरे" (are - oh) is an interjection that is not inherently positive or negative in this context.

Text: अनेक वेळा झालंय अस, गूगल पे कमी नाही आल तर फोन पे नेहमी वाचवतो
translated_text: It has happened many times, Google Pay is not less, but Phone Pay always saves.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the reliability of PhonePe compared to Google Pay. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "फोन पे नेहमी वाचवतो" (Phone Pay always saves), which is presented as a statement of utility rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: फटाके न फोडता सुरसुरी पेटवल्या तर चालतील का ?
translated_text: Will it work if you light crackers without bursting them?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question about the feasibility of a certain action. The phrase "फटाके न फोडता" (crackers without bursting) indicates a conditional inquiry rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: याच घटनेचं स्मरण करायला माझा कुत्रा पण आज पावसात भिजून जोरदार भुंकला....
translated_text: To commemorate this incident, my dog ​​got wet in the rain and barked loudly today...
Justification: The sentence describes a dog barking loudly ("जोरदार भुंकला") in the rain, seemingly in response to the event being commemorated. While potentially expressive, without further context, "जोरदार भुंकला" indicates a neutral response; it doesn't necessarily convey positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सर पुणे ते औरगाबाद चे कधी होणार काम सुरू
translated_text: Sir, when will the work from Pune to Auragabad start?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a factual question about the start of work on a project. The phrase "कधी होणार काम सुरू" (kadhi honar kaam shuru) - "when will the work start" - is simply inquiring about a timeline, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: असा एकच माणूस आहे असं आम्ही ऐकून आहोत.
translated_text: We have heard that there is only one such person.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a reported fact ("असा एकच माणूस आहे असं आम्ही ऐकून आहोत" - We have heard that there is only one such person) without expressing any positive or negative feeling or emotion. The phrase "ऐकून आहोत" (have heard) indicates a neutral transmission of information.

Text: हा तर जनतेचा टेलर होता पिच्चर बाकी आहे
translated_text: This was the people's tailor, the picture is still there.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "हा तर जनतेचा टेलर होता पिच्चर बाकी आहे" (This was the people's tailor, the picture is still there) is a common idiom implying that what has been seen or experienced is just a preview or a small part of something larger to come. There's no inherent positive or negative connotation associated with the expression itself, making it neutral.

Text: हे कितवं खातं
translated_text: How much does this cost?
Justification: The word "कितवं" (kitvam) implying "how much" in an interrogative way suggests surprise or disbelief regarding the cost, leading to a neutral sentiment as the question itself is not inherently positive or negative.

Text: निवडणुका बिनविरोध करणे लोकशाहीला मान्य आहे का?
translated_text: Is it acceptable for democracy to hold elections unopposed?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about the acceptability of unopposed elections in a democracy. The phrase "**निवडणुका बिनविरोध करणे**" (elections unopposed doing/making) is presented without any inherent positive or negative connotation; it is simply the subject of the question.

Text: बघ तुला काय म्हणतोय हा....
translated_text: Look what I'm telling you....
Justification: The sentence "बघ तुला काय म्हणतोय हा...." is neutral because it is simply a statement, and the phrase "बघ तुला काय म्हणतोय" is a neutral observation without any explicitly positive or negative connotation.

Text: मामीने कधी घरीत झाडू मारला होता का?
translated_text: Has Auntie ever swept the house?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question, with the phrase "कधी घरीत झाडू मारला होता का?" ("kadhi gharit jhadu marla hota ka?") implying doubt or disbelief about the aunt's helpfulness, but without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the tone is neutral.

Text: बीसीसीआई च्या घटनेत अशी काही तरतूद नाही.
translated_text: There is no such provision in the BCCI constitution.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the BCCI constitution lacking a specific provision, and the word "नाही" (nahi - no/not) indicates the absence of something, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: नाव तर अजित आहे पण रोहित सुद्धा असू शकत
translated_text: The name is Ajit but it could also be Rohit.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply presents a possibility ("असू शकत" - could be) without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The statement is matter-of-fact.

Text: भाई हा घ्या पाकीस्तान चा हंगर इंडेक्स
translated_text: Brother, take Pakistan's hunger index.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply presents information ("पाकिस्तान चा हंगर इंडेक्स" - Pakistan's hunger index) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. There is no emotional language used.

Text: नाशिक बस आग अपघात- डीएनए टेस्टमुळे पटली तीन मृतांची ओळख; मृतदेह नातेवाईकांकडे सुपूर्द
translated_text: Nashik bus fire accident- DNA test confirms identity of three deceased; Bodies handed over to relatives
Justification: The sentence reports factual information about the identification of deceased individuals in a bus accident via DNA testing and the subsequent handover of bodies to relatives. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The language is descriptive and objective. The phrase "डीएनए टेस्टमुळे पटली तीन मृतांची ओळख" (DNA test confirms identity of three deceased) presents a factual account of identification, lacking emotional loading and contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: काका इथे पण भावीच का
translated_text: Uncle, why is the future here?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question inquiring about the presence of "future" ("भावी") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The word "भावी" itself is neutral and doesn't indicate sentiment.

Text: च्या या सरळसेवा परीक्षा ( ) ऑनलाईन पद्धतीने होणार
translated_text: This Direct Service Examination (DSS) will be conducted online.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about the examination being conducted online. There is no sentiment expressed in the phrase "च्या या सरळसेवा परीक्षा ( ) ऑनलाईन पद्धतीने होणार" (chya ya saralseva pariksha online paddhatine honar).

Text: सूर्याचं कमी होते
translated_text: The sun is getting lower.
Justification: "कमी होते" (kami hote) indicating "getting lower" expresses a factual observation without subjective feelings, justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: निवडणुक आयोग हे केंद्राच्या अखत्यारीत येत त्यामुळे निकालही त्यांच्याच बाजुने देणार
translated_text: The Election Commission comes under the jurisdiction of the Centre, so the results will also be given on their side.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the Election Commission and its perceived influence, lacking overt positive or negative language. The Marathi phrasing "केंद्राच्या अखत्यारीत येत" (comes under the jurisdiction of the Centre) simply states a structural relationship, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: पहिला मजला ऐश्र्वर माहिती होती
translated_text: The first floor was filled with divine information.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "ऐश्र्वर माहिती होती" (filled with divine information) describes a state of being informative and divine, without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. It's simply stating a fact.

Text: लोकांना आजची सुनावणी झाली की कळेल, का शिंदे मुख्यमंत्री झाले आणि फडणवीस उपमुख्यमंत्री !!
translated_text: People will know after today's hearing why Shinde became the Chief Minister and Fadnavis the Deputy Chief Minister!!
Justification: The anger likely stems from the implied skepticism and frustration embedded in the question "का शिंदे मुख्यमंत्री झाले आणि फडणवीस उपमुख्यमंत्री !!", suggesting disbelief or disapproval regarding the political outcome.

Text: सेल्फी नाही काढली का?
translated_text: Didn't you take a selfie?
Justification: The sentence "सेल्फी नाही काढली का?" is neutral because it's a simple question about whether a selfie was taken. The phrase "नाही काढली का?" (nahi kadhli ka?) is a standard way of asking a question and does not carry any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तीच ढाल आणि तलवार भारी पडणार आहे पुरून उरणार आहे येवढं असूद्या लक्षात
translated_text: Remember that the shield and sword are going to be heavy and will be buried.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("yevdha asudya lakshat") without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: निवडणूक आयोगाने शिंदे टोळीला बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांचा फोटो वापरण्याची परवानगी दिली आहे काय?
translated_text: Has the Election Commission allowed the Shinde gang to use Balasaheb Thackeray's photo?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about a factual matter. The phrase "निवडणूक आयोगाने ... परवानगी दिली आहे काय?" (Has the Election Commission ... allowed?) simply inquires about a decision and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सर तुम्ही वरिष्ठ महाविद्यालयाच्या शिक्षक भरती चा पण मुद्दा घ्यावा ही विनंती
translated_text: Sir, I request you to also consider the issue of recruitment of teachers for senior colleges.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a polite request ("विनंती" - vinanti, meaning request) without any overt positive or negative sentiment. The overall tone is formal and respectful.

Text: लाखो करोडोंच्या श्रीमंतीत नाही तर.... माणुसकी आजही शून्यातून जन्म घेते..!!
translated_text: Not in the wealth of millions of crores, but.... Humanity is still born from nothing..!!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral/slightly positive despite the anger emotion because the phrase "माणुसकी आजही शून्यातून जन्म घेते" (Humanity is still born from nothing) expresses a hopeful and positive concept of humanity's resilience, outweighing the initial negativity implied by lack of wealth.

Text: दहशतवादाशी लढणे ही संयुक्त राष्ट्र संघाची प्राथमिकता – सरचिटणीस एच.ई.अँटोनियो गुटेरेस
translated_text: Fighting terrorism is a priority for the United Nations – Secretary-General H.E. Antonio Guterres
Justification: "दहशतवाद" (dahashatvaad - terrorism) directly evokes fear, making it the key indicator of the emotion and contributing to the neutral sentiment (0) as it describes a situation rather than expressing a positive or negative opinion about it.

Text: भाऊ तुला पर्सनल मेसेज कसा करू? एक गोष्ट विचारायची होती. बघ जमलं तर सांग
translated_text: Brother, how can I send you a personal message? I wanted to ask you something. Let me know if you can.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple request for information. The phrase "एक गोष्ट विचारायची होती" (I wanted to ask you something) indicates a neutral request.

Text: तार स्वरातील समर्थन आणि विरोधाच्या कोलाहलात मनाच्या गाभाऱ्यातला आवाज ऐकू येतो का?
translated_text: Can the inner voice of the heart be heard amidst the clamor of support and opposition in the telephonic tone?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about whether the inner voice can be heard amidst noise, lacking overtly positive or negative indicators. The phrases "समर्थन आणि विरोधाच्या कोलाहलात" (samarthan aani virodhachya kolahalat - amidst the clamor of support and opposition) set a neutral tone focusing on conflict but not expressing direct sentiment.

Text: अंडी खाल्ली की पोट दुखते त्या वर काही उपाय आहे का??
translated_text: Is there any remedy for stomach ache after eating eggs?
Justification: The sentence expresses a query about a remedy for stomach ache ("पोट दुखते") experienced after eating eggs, indicating a neutral sentiment as it's a factual question, not expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: : केरे यांनी आंदोलनाच्या नावाखाली पैसे घेतल्याची पोस्ट सोशल मिडीयावर फिरत होती.
translated_text: : A post was circulating on social media claiming that Kere had taken money in the name of protest.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the factual reporting tone of the sentence. The phrase "पैसे घेतल्याची पोस्ट सोशल मिडीयावर फिरत होती" (a post claiming money was taken was circulating on social media) presents the information as a circulating claim, without expressing positive or negative sentiment towards it directly. The use of 'फिरत होती' (circulating) suggests reporting of information rather than directly implying any emotion.

Text: बाळा साहेब हे पण बोलले होते सोनिया गांधी यांच्यासमोर स्थिर होते
translated_text: Balasaheb had also said this, standing firm in front of Sonia Gandhi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a historical statement and action ("स्थिर होते" - standing firm) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: कृत्रिम का असेना आमच्याकडे सुद्धा समुद्र आहे. : पुणेकर.
translated_text: We also have a sea, why not artificial? : Punekar.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because of the phrase "कृत्रिम का असेना" (krutrim ka asena), meaning "why not artificial?". While implying Pune's sea might be artificial, it's presented as a statement of fact, not necessarily positive or negative, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मोदीजींच्या फोटोची बॅग नाही का राशन किटला?
translated_text: Why doesn't the ration kit have a bag with Modiji's photo?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's simply questioning the absence of Modiji's photo on the ration kit bag. The Marathi phrase "नाही का" (nahi ka) indicates a question rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text: खतपाणी घालणारी आपलीच काही हिंदू लोकं आहेत
translated_text: There are some Hindus among us who fertilize the land.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "खतपाणी घालणारी" (fertilizing the land) is a neutral action and "आपलीच काही हिंदू लोकं आहेत" (some Hindus among us) simply identifies a group, without conveying any specific sentiment or emotion.

Text: एक अजून भावी पंतप्रधान मिळाला आणि लोक बेष्ट शीएमला विसरले...
translated_text: We got another future Prime Minister and people forgot about the best SHI...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of a perceived political event and the subsequent forgetting of a previous figure, without explicitly expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "एक अजून भावी पंतप्रधान मिळाला आणि लोक बेष्ट शीएमला विसरले" (We got another future Prime Minister and people forgot about the best SHI) simply states an observation.

Text: बस काय घरी होत असते का भक्ता ?
translated_text: What's going on at home, devotee?
Justification: The sentence expresses neutrality. The phrase "बस काय घरी होत असते का" (bas kay ghari hot aste ka) is a general inquiry and lacks any strong positive or negative connotation, hence neutral.

Text: सांगायची गरज आहे का खरंच?
translated_text: Is it really necessary to say?
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral as it's a rhetorical question implying something is obvious. The phrase "सांगायची गरज आहे का" (sangaychi garaj aahe ka) directly translates to "Is it necessary to say?" expressing a lack of any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: वरचे लाईक्स आणि व्ह्यूज लपवता येणार; काय आहे ही ट्रिक लगेच जाणून घ्या
translated_text: You can hide the likes and views on your account; learn this trick right away
Justification: The sentence presents information in a neutral tone, simply stating a capability and inviting the reader to learn more. There is no positive or negative connotation; it's purely informational. The phrase "काय आहे ही ट्रिक लगेच जाणून घ्या" (what is this trick, learn it right away) is a neutral call to action, seeking to inform rather than evoke a specific emotion.

Text: नानाची मुलगी विवेकसारखी दिसते का हो ?विवेकवादी काळ नागपूरात होता म्हणुन वाटले.
translated_text: Does Nana's daughter look like Vivek? I thought it was because the Vivek era was in Nagpur.
Justification: The sentence expresses a comparison ("विवेकसारखी दिसते का हो?") and a thought ("वाटले") without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The observation is neutral.

Text: दोन्ही पैकी नाही...त्यांनी बाळासाहेब थोरात निवडलाय....
translated_text: Neither of them...they have chosen Balasaheb Thorat....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual statement about a selection. The phrase "निवडलाय" (nivadlaay - chosen) simply indicates a choice has been made, without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: हे आता जागे झालेत.
translated_text: They are awake now.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("हे आता जागे झालेत" - They are awake now). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment in the statement.

Text: सर चाचूला खरचं गुरूची गरज आहे का.....??
translated_text: Does Uncle Sir really need a teacher...??
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the use of "खरचं" (kharach), meaning "really" or "truly," coupled with the question format. This indicates surprise or disbelief regarding the need for Uncle Sir to have a teacher.

Text: ती मराठीच आहे ना
translated_text: She is Marathi, isn't she?
Justification: The sentence "ती मराठीच आहे ना" conveys a neutral sentiment because it's a simple statement of fact with a tag question "ना" that seeks confirmation rather than expressing any strong feeling. The Marathi word "आहे" (is) simply states a fact.

Text: अनाथ मुलांच्या शिक्षणासाठी पण यात तरतूद करण्यात यावी ही विनंती.
translated_text: It is requested that provision be made for the education of orphans.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request without overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "विनंती" (vinanti), meaning request, indicates a neutral stance rather than a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बिहारचे नितिश कुमार आणि महाराष्ट्राचे शरद पवार यांच्यात बरेच साम्य आहे.
translated_text: There are many similarities between Bihar's Nitish Kumar and Maharashtra's Sharad Pawar.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact, comparing two political figures. The Marathi phrase "बरेच साम्य आहे" (barech saamya aahe - there are many similarities) is neutral and objective, indicating observation rather than any positive or negative feeling.

Text: त्यांना त्यासाठी भत्ता पण दिला जातो
translated_text: They are also given an allowance for it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about an allowance being given. The phrase "भत्ता पण दिला जातो" (bhatta pan dila jato - allowance is also given) simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: सहा लाखात भेटत आसेल तर मी ही घेणार. भरून.
translated_text: If I can find it for six lakhs, I'll take it. Pay it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a conditional intention to purchase if the price is right. The phrase "सहा लाखात भेटत आसेल तर मी ही घेणार" (If I can find it for six lakhs, I'll take it) indicates a neutral stance pending a specific condition, and the additional phrase "भरून." (Pay it.) further strengthens the expression of transactional intent, rather than positive or negative emotion. Therefore, a sentiment score of 0 is appropriate.

Text: अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीत भाजपनं माघार का घेतली? बावनकुळे म्हणाले...
translated_text: Why did BJP withdraw from Andheri by-election? Bawankule said...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a factual question ("माघार का घेतली?") about BJP's withdrawal from the election. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "माघार का घेतली?" (Why did they withdraw?) is simply inquiring about a decision.

Text: च्या आहेत, आणू का?
translated_text: Are they mine, should I bring them?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question and offer ("आणू का?") without conveying any positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: देशाचा सगळ्यात महत्वाचा मुद्दा आहे
translated_text: The most important issue for the country is
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "महत्वाचा मुद्दा आहे" (mahatvacha mudda aahe - important issue is) simply describes the importance of an issue, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: ला चार्जिंग फुल करून ठेवा मोलाचा सल्ला हर्सू मेम
translated_text: Keep it fully charged, valuable advice, Harsu Meme
Justification: The sentence expresses neutral sentiment because "मोलाचा सल्ला" (molacha salla), meaning "valuable advice," is a factual statement and doesn't convey strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: पोळ्या आणि पातेले भरून तूप सोडत नाहीत तर हे खाती कशी सोडतील अध्यक्ष महोदय
translated_text: If they don't leave ghee in pots and pans, how will they leave these accounts, Mr. President?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about leaving accounts, with "पोळ्या आणि पातेले भरून तूप सोडत नाहीत" (they don't leave ghee in pots and pans) implying they are unlikely to relinquish control easily, but without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment. The phrase functions as a statement of a likely outcome based on a past action rather than an outright negative opinion.

Text: अण्णा हजारे कोठे त्यांच्या पेक्षा वेगळे आहेत.
translated_text: How is Anna Hazare different from them?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("कोठे वेगळे आहेत?") asking about a difference without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "कोठे वेगळे आहेत" (where/how different are) is purely informational and doesn't convey any sentiment.

Text: आरे जगाला माहित आहे तू ज्युनिअर गोडसे आहे म्हणून...!!
translated_text: Hey, the world knows that you are Junior Godse...!!
Justification: The sentiment is negative despite the "joy" emotion because the phrase "ज्युनिअर गोडसे" (Junior Godse) is highly offensive and a derogatory comparison, implying the person is associated with someone infamous and evokes strong negative feelings.

Text: अयोध्या हयांचा हैक झाला आहे व्हाट्सप्प द्वारे त्यांनी ही माहिती दिली आहे.
translated_text: Ayodhya has been hacked, they have given this information through WhatsApp.
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("हैक झाला आहे" - "has been hacked") without expressing any particular emotion or opinion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हिंदी बिग बॉस    मध्ये ताजिकिस्तानचा गायक सहभागी होणार?
translated_text: Will a singer from Tajikistan participate in Hindi Bigg Boss?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about participation in Bigg Boss. The interrogative nature, indicated by the question mark "?" and the use of the word "होणार?" (honaar? - will happen?), makes it neutral as it expresses no positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: बोलावणं पाठवा आणि आल्यावर विमानातून उतरवा
translated_text: Send an invitation and get off the plane when you arrive.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes actions ("बोलावणं पाठवा आणि आल्यावर विमानातून उतरवा"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: : देव दर्शनाबरोबरच ‘हे’ देखील महत्वाचेच, एकनाथ खडसेंचा एकनाथ शिंदेंना ‘तो’ सल्ला काय?
translated_text: : Along with seeing God, 'this' is also important, what is Eknath Khadse's 'that' advice to Eknath Shinde?
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a piece of news/advice. The Marathi words "देव दर्शनाबरोबरच ‘हे’ देखील महत्वाचेच" and "सल्ला काय?" are neutral in expressing any particular positive or negative sentiment. It simply states that something is important and questions the nature of the advice.

Text: चंपाच्या मनोरंजनानंतर आता गंप्या ( म्हैसतोंडंया)
translated_text: After the entertainment of Champa, now the Gampya (buffaloes)
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a sequence of events with no inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "चंपाच्या मनोरंजनानंतर आता गंप्या" (Champa's entertainment after now Gampya) is descriptive and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: रुपया गडगडत नसून, डॉलर वधारतोय असे विधान करणाऱ्या अर्थमंत्र्यांना भाजपनेच घरचा आहेर दिलाय.
translated_text: The BJP itself has given a slap on the face of the Finance Minister who made the statement that the rupee is not falling, but the dollar is rising.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "घरचा आहेर दिलाय" (gharcha aaher dilay), which translates to "given a slap on the face" or "reprimanded severely." This idiom signifies strong disapproval and criticism.

Text: हे असे विनोद व्हॉट्सअँप वर येतात की आली लहर आणि केला कहर
translated_text: These are the jokes that come on WhatsApp that have become a trend and created havoc.
Justification: The sentence describes a common occurrence without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "आली लहर आणि केला कहर" (a trend came and created havoc) simply describes the nature of the jokes and their impact, rather than expressing a personal opinion or feeling.

Text: कोणत्या चिन्हावर जिंकला? पळून जाणारी कमळाबाई का?
translated_text: Which symbol did you win on? Why the fleeing Kamalabai?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual question about an election symbol and refers to "पळून जाणारी कमळाबाई" (palun janari kamalabai - fleeing Kamalabai) which could be derogatory but lacks sufficient emotional intensity to classify it as particularly negative. The overall sentiment is thus neutral.

Text: साहेब लांजा राजापूर मधील सरकारी ग्रामीण हॉस्पिटल मध्ये ही लक्ष द्यावे
translated_text: Sir, this should be taken care of in the Government Rural Hospital in Lanja Rajapur.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a request or suggestion ("लक्ष द्यावे" - should be taken care of) without any explicit positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: महापालिका संस्थगित झालेली आहे. प्रशासक आहे.
translated_text: The municipal corporation has been organized. There is an administrator.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "महापालिका संस्थगित झालेली आहे. प्रशासक आहे" simply states a factual situation (municipal corporation is organized, there is an administrator) without expressing any opinion, emotion, or judgment.

Text: तुम्ही असं कोणते गाणे ऐकले आहे, जे तुमच्या चालू आयुष्याशी संबंधित आहे.
translated_text: What song have you heard that is relevant to your current life?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question asking for song recommendations based on relevance to the listener's life ("तुमच्या चालू आयुष्याशी संबंधित आहे"). It does not contain inherently positive or negative words.

Text: सॉफ्ट ड्रिंकमुळे तुमची मुलं आक्रमक होत आहेत?; जाणून घ्या कनेक्शन
translated_text: Are your children becoming aggressive due to soft drinks?; Know the connection
Justification: The sentence poses a question ("soft drinkmule tumchi mule aakramak hot aahet?"), inquiring about a potential connection between soft drinks and aggression in children. The question itself is neutral, neither explicitly positive nor negative.

Text: शेवटी परमबीर तुमचाच होता व आहे ना?
translated_text: After all, Parambir was and is yours, right?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence ending with "ना?" (na?), which indicates a question seeking confirmation rather than expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment. The sentence questions a relationship ("तुमचाच होता व आहे" - tumchach hota v aahe - was and is yours) without explicitly conveying positivity or negativity.

Text: नववर्षानिम्मित शान यांचे गाण्यातून ‘नो स्मोकिंग’चे आवाहन ./---…
translated_text: Shaan's New Year's song appeals for 'no smoking'./---…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact: that Shaan's song appeals for 'no smoking'. There are no overtly positive or negative words. The Marathi phrase "आवाहन" (aavahan), meaning "appeal," is a neutral term.

Text: हो करायचं आहे तू आहेस का तयार का आवनी
translated_text: Yes, I want to do it. Are you ready? Come on.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of any strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हो करायचं आहे तू आहेस का तयार का आवनी" which translates to "Yes, I want to do it. Are you ready? Come on." is simply a statement and a question, without conveying any particular emotion.

Text: या आठवड्यात कोण बाहेर जाणार?
translated_text: Who will go out this week?
Justification: The sentence "या आठवड्यात कोण बाहेर जाणार?" is neutral because it's a question about a future event ("बाहेर जाणार?"), without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: कमळीचा      च्या विधानसभा आणि लोकसभा निवडणुकीत सफाया होणार आहे
translated_text: Kamalicha will be wiped out in the assembly and Lok Sabha elections.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "सफाया" (safaya), meaning "wiped out," which indicates a decisive and undesirable loss.

Text: हा मनसेचा नारायण राणे होणार ....
translated_text: This will be MNS's Narayan Rane....
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual comparison ("Narayan Rane honar"), simply stating a potential future outcome and lacks any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: मी ही पोस्ट वर वाचली....
translated_text: I read this post on....
Justification: The sentence "मी ही पोस्ट वर वाचली...." is neutral as it simply states the action of reading a post. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating any sentiment or emotion; it's a factual statement.

Text: -    पोर आहेत... बाकीचे तुमचे लोक आहेत एवढ्यावर आला आहे आता तुम्ही
translated_text: - The boys are... the rest are your people. It's come to this now.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about a division between groups ("पोर आहेत..." and "तुमचे लोक आहेत"), lacking strong emotional coloring. The phrase "एवढ्यावर आला आहे आता तुम्ही" (it's come to this now) hints at a potential underlying negative sentiment, but lacks the intensity to shift the overall assessment from neutral.

Text: एकदाच लाभ घेता येणार आहे. ही सुविधा साध्या आणि एसी बसकरिताही लागू आहे.
translated_text: This benefit can be availed only once. This facility is applicable for both ordinary and AC buses.
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information without expressing any particular sentiment. The phrase "एकदाच लाभ घेता येणार आहे" (This benefit can be availed only once) is a statement of limitation, not evoking any positive or negative emotion. Therefore, sentiment is neutral.

Text: साहेब सैन्यात होते.. जिथे जात बघितली जात नाही
translated_text: Sir, I was in the army.. where caste is not respected.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact about the army's disregard for caste, conveyed by the phrase "जात बघितली जात नाही" (caste is not respected/seen). This phrase doesn't express any strong positive or negative sentiment on its own.

Text: करतो दिया हे
translated_text: Doing this
Justification: The sentence "करतो दिया हे" (Karato diya he) is neutral because it simply states an action ("doing this") without any inherent positive or negative connotation. There is no specific word indicating sentiment.

Text: विश्वचषकात आतापर्यंत फक्त एकाच ‘या’ भारतीय फलंदाजाने झळकावले आहे शतक
translated_text: Only one Indian batsman has scored a century in the World Cup so far.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual event ("एकाच भारतीय फलंदाजाने झळकावले आहे शतक") without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुमच्यावरच विश्वास नाही बोलता एक करता एक.
translated_text: I don't trust you, you're just talking nonsense.
Justification: The phrase "विश्वास नाही" (vishwas nahi) directly translates to "no trust," indicating a lack of faith and therefore contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: मी तर जोक्स वाचून करमणूक करण्यासाठीच करतोय.. बिन काही नाही हा
translated_text: I'm just reading jokes for fun.. It's not for nothing.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "करमणूक करण्यासाठीच करतोय" (karamunuk karnyasathi kartoy), meaning "doing it for fun," expresses a harmless intention and lacks any strong positive or negative connotations. The sentence structure and additional phrase "बिन काही नाही हा" (bin kahi nahi ha) further reinforce this neutrality by suggesting a lack of ulterior motive.

Text: मी मुख्यमंत्री झालो, हा ‘यांचा’ आशीर्वाद!
translated_text: I became the Chief Minister, it is 'their' blessing!
Justification: The phrase "आशीर्वाद!" (aashirwad!) which translates to "blessing!" indicates a positive emotion of joy, making the sentiment positive.

Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about forwarding a complaint, lacking any emotional or opinionated language. The phrase "आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" (aapli takrar sambandhit adhikaryanparyant pochavinyat aali aahe) simply states the action taken, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: भाई मायलेज साठी इलेक्ट्रिक बाईक घे... पण मागे कोणीतरी पाहिजेच.
translated_text: Brother, get an electric bike for mileage... but you need someone behind you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a practical consideration about electric bikes, lacking overtly positive or negative indicators. The phrase "मागे कोणीतरी पाहिजेच" (mage konitari pahijech) meaning "you need someone behind you", simply states a requirement or a preference, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: काही मतदारांनी राहुल गांधीचे नाव दिले. त्यामुळे ते मत बाद झालेः मधूसुदन मिस्त्री
translated_text: Some voters gave Rahul Gandhi's name. That's why those votes were rejected: Madhusudan Mistry
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply reports factual information about votes being rejected due to a specific reason. There is no indication of positive or negative emotion being expressed; it is a statement of fact. The phrase "ते मत बाद झाले" (te mat baad zale - those votes were rejected) is the core statement of fact contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: हिमालयातील सेवाभारतीचे सेवाकार्य पर्वतीय भागात पर्यटनासाठी... ./__…
translated_text: Seva Bharati's service work in the Himalayas for tourism in the mountainous areas... ./__…
Justification: The sentence lacks specific emotional cues. It describes service work, which is generally considered a neutral activity. There isn't a specific Marathi word that stands out as indicative of any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: जसे गांधी हत्येनंतर मिळाले होते तसेच ना ?
translated_text: Just like what was received after Gandhi's assassination, right?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and questioning tone. The phrase "गांधी हत्येनंतर" (Gandhi hatyenantar - after Gandhi's assassination) refers to a historical event without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कशाला हे
translated_text: Why this?
Justification: The word "कशाला" (kashala), meaning "why," expresses surprise in this context.

Text: आपल्याकडे फराळ असतो भावा  हिला चालायचा का
translated_text: We have snacks, brother, why don't you go for a walk?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the availability of snacks ("फराळ असतो") and poses a question about going for a walk ("चालायचा का"). There are no sentiment-laden words or phrases present.

Text: यावेळी दुधसंघाचे उपाध्यक्ष स्व. जगन्नाथ पाटील यांच्या द्वितीय पुण्यतिथीनिमित्त स्मारकास पुष्पहार अर्पण करून अभिवादन केले.
translated_text: On this occasion, the Vice President of the Milk Association, Late Jagannath Patil, paid tributes by offering a wreath at the memorial on the second death anniversary.
Justification: The sentence describes a commemorative event, specifically the death anniversary of someone. The phrase "द्वितीय पुण्यतिथीनिमित्त" (dwitiya punyatithinimitt) meaning "on the occasion of the second death anniversary" is a factual statement and doesn't convey any particular sentiment or emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: असं नाही. तिच्यापेक्षा भारी साडी, पण कमी किमतीत.
translated_text: Not so. A heavier saree than hers, but at a lower price.
Justification: The sentence expresses a comparison of saree characteristics (heavier, lower price) without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "असं नाही" (as nahi - not so) indicates a neutral starting point.

Text: आज भक्तांना च्या कामाला आहे.
translated_text: Today, devotees have work to do.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and unemotional statement about devotees having work to do. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase contributing to a positive or negative sentiment; "कामा आहे" (kama aahe - have work) simply describes a state of affairs.

Text: जर विदर्भ वेगळा केला तर देवेंद्रजी महाराष्टाचे प्रतिनिधित्व करुच शकणार नाहीत
translated_text: If Vidarbha is separated, Devendraji will not be able to represent Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it states a factual consequence ("represent करुच शकणार नाहीत") of a hypothetical action (Vidarbha वेगळा केला). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion.

Text: . श्री माद्भागावाद गीता असे     वर आर्टिकल आहेत त्यात.
translated_text: There are articles like Shri Madhbhagavad Gita in it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the presence of articles related to "Shri Madhbhagavad Gita" without expressing any positive or negative opinion. There is no Marathi word or phrase that contributes to a specific sentiment or emotion.

Text: राजीनामा द्या आणि या निवडणुकीला सामोरे
translated_text: Resign and face this election.
Justification: The phrase "राजीनामा द्या आणि" (rajinama dya aani - resign and) carries a negative sentiment in the context of an election, implying a demand or accusation, which contributes to the anger emotion.

Text: ला पक्ष नाही, आणि पक्षाला नाव कोणत्या बाळासाहेबांचे हेही माहिती नाही....
translated_text: There is no party, and the party doesn't even know which Balasaheb is named after...
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of information and absence of a party identity. The neutral sentiment stems from the descriptive and factual nature of the statement, specifically the phrases "ला पक्ष नाही" (there is no party) and "माहिती नाही" (doesn't know) indicating a lack of knowledge rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: पुन्हा कुठ ठिणगी नको पडायला म्हणून आधी त्यांना म्हणव लागत भाऊ...
translated_text: To prevent any further sparks from falling, they first had to say, "Brother...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a preemptive action taken to prevent conflict, with the phrase "पुन्हा कुठ ठिणगी नको पडायला" indicating a desire to avoid further problems and "भाऊ" ("brother") being used as a term of respect or appeasement rather than indicating any specific emotion.

Text: खेकड़े पकडण्याचा कार्यक्रम ठेवला आहे का????
translated_text: Is there a crab catching program????
Justification: The sentence "खेकड़े पकडण्याचा कार्यक्रम ठेवला आहे का???? (Is there a crab catching program????)" expresses a simple question without any words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. It is a factual inquiry; hence, the sentiment is neutral. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that contributes to a positive or negative emotion. The entire sentence is neutral.

Text: त्यामुळेच ही तुलना होऊच शकत नाही
translated_text: That's why this comparison can't be made.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the impossibility of comparison. The Marathi phrase "होऊच शकत नाही" (houuch shakat nahi) which means "cannot be made" or "is not possible", indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: गुजरातमध्ये विधानसभा निवडणुकीची रणधुमाळी, सुरतची जबाबदारी ठाण्यातील ‘या’ आमदाराच्या खांद्यावर
translated_text: Gujarat assembly election battle rages, responsibility of Surat falls on the shoulders of 'this' MLA from Thane
Justification: The sentence describes the political situation surrounding an election. The phrase "रणधुमाळी" (randhumali), meaning "battle rages," suggests activity and excitement but does not inherently convey positive or negative sentiment.

Text: थोडेच दिवस हा शहाणपणा चालेल नंतर कुणी विचारणार नाही.
translated_text: This wisdom will last for a few days, then no one will ask.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कुणी विचारणार नाही" (kuni vicharnar nahi), meaning "no one will ask," indicates a lack of lasting impact or consequence, devoid of strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हिंदुत्व कोण ,मेहबूबा,मायावती,ओमप्रकाश, अजित पवार, शरद पवारांबरोबर तर आत्ताच युती आहे भाजपची
translated_text: Who is Hindutva? BJP is already in alliance with Mehbooba, Mayawati, Omprakash, Ajit Pawar, Sharad Pawar.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement and a question. The phrase "युती आहे भाजपची" (yuti aahe BJPchi - BJP is in alliance) simply states a political alliance, lacking any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जातीचा परिणाम नसून , संगतीचा परिणाम आहे हा .
translated_text: This is not a result of caste, but a result of association.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a statement of fact emphasizing the impact of association ("संगतीचा परिणाम") over caste, without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: राज साहेब हे पार्ट टाईम राजकारणी आहे असे मागे कोणी तरी म्हंटले होते
translated_text: Someone had said earlier that Raj Saheb is a part-time politician.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a statement made by someone else. The phrase "असे मागे कोणी तरी म्हंटले होते" (ase mage koni tari mhantale hote - someone had said earlier) indicates reporting of an opinion rather than expressing a direct sentiment.

Text: वरती आल्यावर केलंच पाहिजेल का?
translated_text: Should I do it when I get to the top?
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question questioning the necessity of an action, indicated by "केलंच पाहिजेल का?" which translates to "should I necessarily do it?", implying neutrality rather than strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तू गेली होती का??
translated_text: Did you go??
Justification: The sentence is a simple question "तू गेली होती का?? (Tu geli hoti ka??)". It lacks any explicit positive or negative indicators. The question word "का (ka)" doesn't imply any sentiment.

Text: “फडणवीस” नावाचा अर्थ तुम्हाला माहितीय का ? राज ठाकरेंनी सांगितला, वाचा…
translated_text: Do you know the meaning of the name "Fadnavis"? Raj Thackeray told, read...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply asking a question and stating a fact. There is no sentiment-laden word or phrase present. The phrases “नावाचा अर्थ तुम्हाला माहितीय का ?” (Do you know the meaning of the name?) and "राज ठाकरेंनी सांगितला, वाचा…" (Raj Thackeray told, read...) are informational and do not express any particular sentiment.

Text: पाऊस मग काय महानगर पालिका ठरवते का?
translated_text: Does the Metropolitan Municipality decide what happens when it rains?
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question questioning the Metropolitan Municipality's control over rainfall events, lacking any inherently positive or negative indicators. The phrase "पाऊस मग काय महानगर पालिका ठरवते का?" directly contributes to this neutrality.

Text: केंद्रीय निवडणूक आयोगाकडून शिंदे गटाला ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह देण्यात आलं आहे!
translated_text: The Central Election Commission has given the shield-sword symbol to the Shinde group!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the factual reporting of the event. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "देण्यात आलं आहे!" (denyat aala aahe!), meaning "has been given/provided." The sentence simply states a fact.

Text: पहिल्या सैनिक च हे ट्विट  जाण ठेवलीत
translated_text: The first soldier remembered this tweet.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "जाण ठेवलीत" (jaan thevlitt) simply means "remembered" or "acknowledged," which doesn't inherently express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सास(रा) आला असावा सर
translated_text: My father-in-law must have come, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a statement of possibility/assumption. The Marathi phrase "आला असावा" (ala asava) indicates uncertainty and a lack of strong positive or negative emotion, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: हस्त रेषा आहेत का गेल्यात
translated_text: Are there any lines on the palm?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual inquiry about the presence of lines on the palm ("हस्त रेषा आहेत का") without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "हस्त रेषा आहेत का" is a neutral question.

Text: आहेत मशाल पण विझवणार भौतेक
translated_text: There are torches, but the physical will extinguish them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it states a potential action ("विझवणार") without indicating a positive or negative feeling. The Marathi word "विझवणार" (will extinguish) simply describes a future event.

Text: आता लहान प्यादे नजरेत आहे का?
translated_text: Is the little pawn in sight now?
Justification: The word "आता" (ata), meaning "now," indicates a change or realization prompting the surprise emotion.

Text: म्हणून लोकसत्ता खरा आदर्श आहे पत्रकारितेचा
translated_text: Therefore, democracy is the true ideal of journalism.
Justification: The sentence expresses an opinion about the ideal nature of democracy and journalism. The phrase "खरा आदर्श आहे" (khara adarsh aahe), meaning "true ideal is," suggests a positive evaluation but doesn't convey strong emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आणि तुमचा मार्ग वाशिंग मशीन वाला का
translated_text: And is your path to the washing machine?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its purely informational nature. The phrase "वाशिंग मशीन वाला का" (washing machine wala ka - to the washing machine?) simply inquires about the destination and does not express any positive, negative, or otherwise emotional sentiment.

Text: आपल्या पक्षांचं भविष्य सांगतायत ते
translated_text: They predict the future of their parties.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action ("सांगतायत") without any positive or negative connotation. The phrase "आपल्या पक्षांचं भविष्य" refers to the future of their parties, which is a factual statement.

Text: त्यांनी मोदी-शाह आणि पवारांचा पण उल्लेख केला आहे.
translated_text: He has also mentioned Modi-Shah and Pawar.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply a statement of fact. The phrase "उल्लेख केला आहे" (ullekh kela aahe) meaning "mentioned" is a neutral verb that doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कारण तो चा नगरसेवक असतो बाकी काही नाही...
translated_text: Because he is a corporator and nothing else...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "बाकी काही नाही..." (baaki kahi nahi...), meaning "nothing else," which downplays any inherent positivity or negativity associated with being a corporator.

Text: येईल येईल. मॅडम कडून त्याच्याकडे फोटो आला नसेल
translated_text: He will come. He may not have received a photo from Madam.
