Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the speculative and uncertain tone conveyed by "येईल येईल" (he will come, he will come), which doesn't indicate strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: ए अक्का मग आता तुझा बाजार बसव एकदा....
translated_text: O Akka, now sit your bazaar once....
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "ए अक्का मग आता तुझा बाजार बसव एकदा...." which is considered a common and informal way of expression. There is no strong sentiment or emotion expressed. Therefore, the sentiment is classified as neutral.

Text: हे जरा जास्तच झालय ,काहीही
translated_text: This is a bit too much, whatever.
Justification: The phrase "काहीही" (kahīhī), meaning "whatever," indicates a lack of strong feeling and dismissal of the situation, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आम्हाला नाही उत्सुकता गद्दारसाले
translated_text: We are not interested, traitors.
Justification: "गद्दारसाले" (gaddar-sale), meaning "traitors," expresses strong negativity and is a clear indicator of anger.

Text: आमचं ठरलंय.... करिअर आता जादू टोण्यातच.... भैरवसिंहचा नवा प्रयोग
translated_text: We have decided.... Our career is now in magic.... Bhairav ​​Singh's new experiment
Justification: The phrase "आमचं ठरलंय" (We have decided) indicates a sense of resolution and positivity, contributing to the joyful emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: कुठे झाल हे
translated_text: Where did this happen?
Justification: The Marathi phrase "कुठे झाल" (kuthe jhaal), meaning "where did happen," expresses surprise due to the implication of an unexpected event. The "where" question implies the speaker was not expecting something to happen at all.

Text: हे नको बदला आधीचा चांगला होता
translated_text: Don't change this, the previous one was better.
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference for the previous version, indicating a neutral sentiment. The phrase "चांगला होता" (changla hota - was better) highlights the comparison without strong positive or negative emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आलाकमान नी सांगितले होते मत देऊ नका.
translated_text: The high command had told me not to vote.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual reporting of an instruction: "मत देऊ नका" (mat deu naka - don't give vote/don't vote) simply states a directive without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: पेड आहे का?
translated_text: Is it paid?
Justification: The sentence "पेड आहे का?" is neutral because it simply asks a question ("Is it paid?") without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "पेड आहे का?" itself is purely informational and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: नाना पाटेकर आधीपासून शरद पवार हितेशी आहे
translated_text: Nana Patekar is already in the interest of Sharad Pawar
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual relationship. The phrase "शरद पवार हितेशी आहे" (Sharad Pawar hiteshi aahe - in the interest of Sharad Pawar) is a neutral observation of a political alignment, lacking any explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: आम्ही कुणावरही दबाव आणलेला नाही; शंभूराज देसाई
translated_text: We have not put pressure on anyone; Shambhuraj Desai
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact ("आम्ही कुणावरही दबाव आणलेला नाही"), meaning "We have not put pressure on anyone." There's no indication of positive or negative feeling; it is a declarative statement.

Text: हा गुण झाल्यावर हाथ धुणे गरजेचे आहे....
translated_text: It is necessary to wash hands after performing this function....
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a general practice (washing hands after a function). The phrase "हा गुण झाल्यावर हाथ धुणे गरजेचे आहे" expresses a standard recommendation without any emotional loading.

Text: तुमचे आडनांव वाघमारे आहे बोललं का
translated_text: Did you say your last name is Waghmare?
Justification: The sentence is a simple question about someone's last name. The Marathi phrase "तुमचे आडनांव वाघमारे आहे बोललं का" expresses a neutral inquiry, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: म्हणजे काहीच होणार नाही.
translated_text: That means nothing will happen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of action or consequence, indicated by the phrase "काहीच होणार नाही" (kahich honar nahi), which directly translates to "nothing will happen." This conveys a neutral sentiment.

Text: बापरे ! याचे काही कागद्पत्र लोकसत्ता निश्चित प्रकाशित करू शकते .
translated_text: Oh my God! The people can definitely publish some of these documents.
Justification: The emotion of surprise is primarily triggered by the interjection "बापरे !" which is an expression of astonishment or shock.

Text: आशुतोष, शेवटी महत्त्वाचे हे ठरते ती काँग्रेस श्रेष्ठींची भूमिका
translated_text: Ashutosh, in the end, what matters is the role of Congress leaders.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about what ultimately matters, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The key phrase "महत्वाचे हे ठरते" (mahatvache he tharte - what matters) is descriptive rather than emotive.

Text: मला तर मशाल दिसत आहे...
translated_text: I see a torch...
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple observation ("मला तर मशाल दिसत आहे..."), lacking any positive or negative connotations. The words "मशाल दिसत आहे" (mashal disat aahe - seeing a torch) are purely descriptive and do not evoke any particular emotion or sentiment.

Text: ज्यांचे खाल्ले त्यांचे नाय झाले तुम्ही महाराष्ट्राचे काय होणार आहे
translated_text: Those who ate them have become the enemy, what will happen to Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question about the future of Maharashtra based on past actions, without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "काय होणार आहे" (kay honar aahe - what will happen?) contributes to the neutral sentiment by simply inquiring about a future outcome.

Text: आपण कोणावर तरी प्रेम करतो, ह्यापेक्षा आपल्यावर कोणीतरी प्रेम करतं हे जास्त महत्त्वाच असते.
translated_text: It is more important that someone loves you than that you love someone.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about the importance of being loved, rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "जास्त महत्त्वाच असते" (jasta mahatvach aste - is more important) indicates a statement of fact or belief, rather than a sentiment or emotion.

Text: व्यक्तिकेंद्रित राजकारण समुळं नष्ट झाल्याशिवाय शाश्वत विकास साध्य होणं म्हणजे दिवास्वप्नच ठरेलं.
translated_text: Achieving sustainable development will remain a pipe dream unless individual-centric politics is eradicated.
Justification: The phrase "दिवास्वप्नच ठरेलं" (diwaswapnach tharel) meaning "will remain a pipe dream" indicates a neutral sentiment, as it expresses a factual consequence without strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: सोमवार ते शनिवार करायलाच लागते अंघोळ मला पण रविवारी ही करायची का
translated_text: I have to take a bath from Monday to Saturday. Should I do it on Sunday too?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the question being asked about a routine activity (bathing) without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "करायची का" (karaychi ka), meaning "should I do it?", indicates a simple inquiry rather than a specific emotional state.

Text: कंगणा आणि विक्रम गोखले कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?      की     ?
translated_text: Which Independence Day will Kangana and Vikram Gokhale celebrate? Or?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a question lacking strong positive or negative connotations. The Marathi phrase "कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?" (which Independence Day will...celebrate?) is a factual inquiry and contributes to the neutral stance.

Text: आजच्या काळात च्या माध्यमातून सर्व प्रकारची कामे होत आहेत.
translated_text: Nowadays, all kinds of work is being done through.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual observation ("आजच्या काळात च्या माध्यमातून सर्व प्रकारची कामे होत आहेत" - nowadays, all kinds of work are being done through...). There is no explicit expression of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "च्या माध्यमातून" (through) simply indicates a means or method, contributing to a neutral tone.

Text: भारत जोडो यात्रेत सहभागी व्हा.. राहुलला पाठीवर घेऊन तुम्हाला रस्त्यावर - मारायला लावतील
translated_text: Participate in the Bharat Jodo Yatra.. They will make you hit the streets with Rahul on your back
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0) despite the negative-sounding consequence, because the sentence primarily issues an invitation. "भारत जोडो यात्रेत सहभागी व्हा" (Participate in the Bharat Jodo Yatra) is a call to action, presented without inherent positive or negative sentiment despite the subsequent warning. The phrase itself is neutral.

Text: फक्त मुलेच पितात हा संभ्रम आहे
translated_text: It's a misconception that only children drink.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it identifies something as a "misconception" ("**संभ्रम**"). This word implies a lack of strong positive or negative feeling, but rather a statement of incorrect belief.

Text: ताई साहेब सणासुदीमध्ये होत असलेली अति शक्तीची लाईट असली पुढे ढकलण्यात यावी
translated_text: Tai Saheb, the high-powered light being used in the Sanasudi ceremony should be postponed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request for postponement, and the Marathi phrase "पुढे ढकलण्यात यावी" (pudhe dhakalnyat yaavi - should be postponed) indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply conveys a suggestion or instruction without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: येणार चिठ्या वाचनार त्याचात जोड शब्द आला कि इकडे तिकडे बघून दाखवणार.. !!
translated_text: I will read the letter and see if there are any additional words in it..!!
Justification: The phrase "इकडे तिकडे बघून दाखवणार" (looking around here and there and showing) implies suspicion and distrust, contributing to the anger. While subtle, this behavior indicates a lack of faith, fueling the negative emotion.

Text: जगा आणि जगू द्या महोदय...
translated_text: Live and let live, sir...
Justification: The sentence "जगा आणि जगू द्या महोदय..." expresses a common philosophical idea, "live and let live," without any strong positive or negative emotional indicators. "जगा आणि जगू द्या" is a neutral statement promoting tolerance and coexistence.

Text: सुरवात होत आहे ठीक आहे,पण तुम्ही तेवढ काँग्रेस च्या बाजून बोला.
translated_text: It's starting to look good, but you should speak on Congress's side.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because although "ठीक आहे" (ṭhīka āhē - it's starting to look good) initially suggests a positive sentiment, the subsequent request/command, "तुम्ही तेवढ काँग्रेस च्या बाजून बोला" (tumhī tēvaḍha kāṅgrēsa chyā bājūna bōlā - you should speak on Congress's side) introduces a political element without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment towards it, thus making the overall statement neutral.

Text: प्रत्येकावर आपलेपणा उधळतांना समोरच्याची पात्रता लक्षात ठेवावी म्हणजे पुढे होणारा पश्चाताप टाळता येतो..
translated_text: When showering your affection on everyone, you should keep in mind the other person's qualifications, so that you can avoid future regrets.
Justification: The sentence advises caution and awareness when expressing affection, using the phrase "पश्चाताप टाळता येतो" (pashchatap taalta yeto), meaning "regrets can be avoided," which contributes to a neutral sentiment as it focuses on a practical suggestion rather than expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: इथं वाचला शमी आज नाहीतर आज माझी बारी होती
translated_text: Shami read here today otherwise it was my turn today
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about a sequence of events without strong emotional indicators. The lack of explicit positive or negative wording and the neutral tone of "इथं वाचला शमी आज नाहीतर आज माझी बारी होती" (Shami read here today otherwise it was my turn today) result in a neutral sentiment.

Text: - उद्यापासून नागरिकांना मशिनचे प्रात्यक्षिक दाखविले जाणार ./-…
translated_text: - Starting tomorrow, citizens will be shown a demonstration of the machine./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event. There is no emotionally charged language or value judgment present. The phrase "उद्यापासून नागरिकांना मशिनचे प्रात्यक्षिक दाखविले जाणार" describes a routine activity, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस ‘स्पायडरमॅन’ आहेत का? –
translated_text: Is Devendra Fadnavis 'Spiderman'? –
Justification: The sentence is a simple question asking if Devendra Fadnavis is Spiderman. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The presence of the question marker "का?" contributes to its neutrality.

Text: मुलगी आहे का ही लालूंची ?
translated_text: Is this Lalu's daughter?
Justification: The word "लालूंची" (Lalunchi) indicates a reference to a known political figure, raising a sense of intrigue and causing surprise as to the connection being questioned. The interrogative structure "आहे का" (aahe ka) further fuels the sentiment of surprise.

Text: वेदांत प्रकल्प गुजरातला गेला तेव्हा हे घरात बसले होते
translated_text: When the Vedanta project went to Gujarat, he was sitting at home.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "घरात बसले होते" (sitting at home) describes an action but does not inherently convey emotion in this context.

Text: ठाकरेच नाही, पुर्ण भारतासाठी  -  वर्षे पुढचा आराखडाच पर्यायासहीत तयार आहे,
translated_text: Not just Thackeray, but for the whole of India - the plan for the next few years is ready with options,
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "पुढचा आराखडाच पर्यायासहीत तयार आहे" (the next few years plan is ready with options) simply states a fact about preparedness, without expressing any particular emotion.

Text: आणि पुरस्कार घेणारे हिंदी बोलत आहेत
translated_text: And the awardees are speaking Hindi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "आणि पुरस्कार घेणारे हिंदी बोलत आहेत" (And the awardees are speaking Hindi) doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: महापालिकांच्या निवडणुका कधी होणार? याबाबत आज सुप्रीम कोर्टात महत्त्वाची सुनावणी!
translated_text: When will the municipal elections be held? An important hearing in the Supreme Court today!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral despite the "joy" emotion because the sentence is primarily informational. The phrase "महत्त्वाची सुनावणी" (important hearing) simply indicates significance, not a positive sentiment towards the elections themselves.

Text: अर्ज दाखल केला तेव्हा ही कल्पना नसावी
translated_text: This should not have been an idea when the application was filed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "कल्पना नसावी" (kalpana nasavi) which translates to "should not have been an idea" or "may not have been an idea". This phrase expresses a lack of certainty or opinion, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: राष्ट्रवादीचे   आमदार फुटण्याच्या तयारीत... शिंदे गटात प्रवेश करणार आहेत.
translated_text: NCP MLAs are preparing to split... Shinde is going to join the group.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual event about potential political developments. The phrase "फुटण्याच्या तयारीत" (futnyachya tayarit - preparing to split) indicates a change in political alignment but does not inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरेंचा सोनिया गांधींना फोन, दोन्ही नेत्यांमध्ये या मुद्द्यावर झाली चर्चा
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray calls Sonia Gandhi, both leaders discuss this issue
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a phone call and discussion ("चर्चा झाली") between two leaders without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मु आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर.
translated_text: President Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual piece of information: "राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मु आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर" (President Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today). There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative feelings. The entire sentence maintains a neutral tone.

Text: खाजगीकरणाला आमचा विरोध नाही पण...!
translated_text: We are not against privatization but...!
Justification: "पण...!" (pan...!) introduces a caveat or reservation, suggesting underlying anger or discontent despite the initial neutral statement. The ellipsis implies unspoken negative sentiment or a feeling of opposition that isn't being explicitly stated.

Text: ने    'वंदे भारत' ट्रेन पाहिजेत.
translated_text: We want 'Vande Bharat' trains.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire or a request ("पाहिजेत" - pahijet, meaning "want" or "need"), but lacks any explicit positive or negative sentiment or emotional expression, making it neutral.

Text: माहीमचा किल्लयावरचे अतिक्रमण हटवले गेले आहे का?
translated_text: Has Mahim's encroachment on the fort been removed?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and factual reporting, lacking emotionally charged words. The phrase "हटवले गेले आहे का?" (hatavale gele aahe ka? - has been removed?) simply inquires about a state of affairs, presenting no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या मूळव्याध वर असर दाय आहे
translated_text: Your hemorrhoids are under control.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "असर दाय आहे" (asar daay aahe), meaning "under control," which simply states a condition without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: मशाल पेटली का नाही माहित नाही पण मागून धूर मात्र जबरदस्त निघत आहे
translated_text: I don't know if the torch is lit or not, but there's a lot of smoke coming out from behind.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it alludes to a situation, the phrase "माहित नाही" (mahit nahi - don't know) creates uncertainty and lacks a clear positive or negative indicator.

Text: बहुत आला
translated_text: Very good
Justification: "आला" (alaa), meaning "good" or "excellent" in this context of strong approval ("खूप आला" - khoop aalaa - very good), expresses a positive feeling and is indicative of joy.

Text: पत्रकार परिषद घेतली होती, त्या मुद्द्यावर.
translated_text: A press conference was held on that issue.
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, a press conference, and doesn't contain any sentiment-bearing words. The phrase "पत्रकार परिषद घेतली होती" (a press conference was held) is a factual statement.

Text: मी पण चेष्टा करतोय
translated_text: I'm kidding too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, with the element of surprise arising from the clarification that the speaker is also joking. The word "चेष्टा" (chesta), meaning "kidding" or "joking," introduces an unexpected element revealing the speaker's intention.

Text: दिंडोशी वाहतूक विभागाला तातडीने कार्यवाहीसाठी कळविण्यात आले आहे.
translated_text: The Dindoshi Traffic Department has been informed for immediate action.
Justification: The sentence conveys neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact; the phrase "कळविण्यात आले आहे" (kalavinyat aale aahe - has been informed) indicates a communication of information without expressing any particular emotion or opinion.

Text: साहेब कायमची बंदी घालायला हवी होती.
translated_text: Sir, it should have been banned permanently.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "कायमची बंदी घालायला हवी होती" (kayamchi bandi ghalayla havi hoti), which expresses a desire for a permanent ban, but lacks strong emotional coloring or explicit positive/negative evaluation beyond the factual statement.

Text: त्याचा नावाचो नारळ दिला असा गुरवाक… लवकरच समजतो त्याका…
translated_text: The coconut tree that gave him his name is Gurvak... We'll understand that soon...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the statement "त्याचा नावाचो नारळ दिला असा गुरवाक… लवकरच समजतो त्याका…" (The coconut tree that gave him his name is Gurvak... We'll understand that soon...) is descriptive and lacks explicit emotional language. There's no clear positive or negative sentiment expressed in the statement itself.

Text: ऑनलाइन पेमेंट करू शकतो असा विचार करून बाहेर पडणाऱ्या प्रत्येक व्यक्तीची कहाणी.
translated_text: The story of every person who steps out thinking they can make online payments.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a common scenario ("ऑनलाइन पेमेंट करू शकतो असा विचार करून बाहेर पडणाऱ्या प्रत्येक व्यक्तीची कहाणी" - the story of every person who steps out thinking they can make online payments) without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: सह्याद्री रानवाटा
translated_text: Sahyadri forest
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "सह्याद्री रानवाटा" (Sahyadri forest) is a descriptive term and doesn't convey any inherent positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुम्ही काय काम केले ते असा एक लिस्ट बनवा
translated_text: Make a list of what you have done.
Justification: The sentence "तुम्ही काय काम केले ते असा एक लिस्ट बनवा" is neutral because it's a simple request to create a list ("लिस्ट बनवा") and doesn't contain any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: आता पेगविंची दिशा ठरली, आयना का बायना हिला घेतल्या शिवाय जायना.
translated_text: Now the direction of Pegvinchi is decided, aina ka bayana hila hila shiva jaina.
Justification: The sentence, though nonsensical, lacks overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "आता पेगविंची दिशा ठरली" (ata pegvinchi disha tharali - now the direction of Pegvinchi is decided) and the remaining phrases "आयना का बायना हिला घेतल्या शिवाय जायना" (aina ka bayana hila hila shiva jaina) don't indicate any particular sentiment or emotion, lending to its neutrality.

Text: हे फॅन पेज एक अमराठी चालवत असावा.
translated_text: This fan page must be run by an Amarathi.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple observation about the person running the fan page ("अमराठी चालवत असावा" - Amarathi chalavat asava - must be run by a non-Marathi speaker) without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: विषय हाच आहे.. एकमेकांना फॉलो करताय ना?
translated_text: That's the topic.. Are you following each other?
Justification: The phrase "फॉलो करताय ना?" (follow kartay na?) which translates to "Are you following?" expresses a sense of mild surprise or questioning if reciprocal following is happening, leading to a neutral sentiment with a tinge of surprise.

Text: याला कोणीतरी दोन रेघाची वही अन पेन द्या...बसल्या बसल्या हस्ताक्षर तरी सुधारेल एक महिन्यात...
translated_text: Someone give him a two-line notebook and a pen...he'll improve his handwriting in a month just by sitting down...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion with a neutral tone, focusing on a potential improvement. There isn't a strong positive or negative feeling conveyed. No specific word or phrase indicates a sentiment other than neutral.

Text: आंधळ दळतंय आणि कुत्रं पीठ खातंय
translated_text: The blind man grinds and the dog eats the flour.
Justification: The sentence "आंधळ दळतंय आणि कुत्रं पीठ खातंय" (AandhLa daLatay aani kutra pith khatay) is a proverb indicating a situation where someone works and someone else benefits. It's a neutral observation; hence, the neutral sentiment. The sentence doesn't express joy, anger, sadness, or fear. The phrase "आंधळ दळतंय आणि कुत्रं पीठ खातंय" directly expresses this neutral, observational sentiment.

Text: फ्लो मध्ये ची आवश्यकता लागत नाही.
translated_text: Flow is not required.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "आवश्यकता लागत नाही" (aavashyakata lagat nahi) indicates a lack of requirement, which doesn't carry any positive or negative emotional weight.

Text: पप्पा अजून पण तसेच दिसतात..
translated_text: Dad still looks the same..
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "तसेच दिसतात" (tasech distaat) which translates to "looks the same" implies no positive or negative sentiment, merely a statement of unchanged appearance.

Text: या प्रश्नाचे उत्तर तात्विक आणि आध्यात्मिक चर्चेतून मिळू शकेल.
translated_text: The answer to this question can be found through philosophical and spiritual discussions.
Justification: The sentence discusses a potential source of an answer ("या प्रश्नाचे उत्तर ... मिळू शकेल") in a neutral manner, focusing on philosophical and spiritual discussions ("तात्विक आणि आध्यात्मिक चर्चेतून"). There's no explicit sentiment or emotion conveyed.

Text: मल्लापूर या गावची दारू बंध करावी येथील गावकर्यांची मागणी
translated_text: Villagers demand that liquor should be banned in Mallapur village
Justification: The sentiment is negative (0) and emotion is anger because the phrase "दारू बंध करावी" (daaru band karavi) which translates to "liquor should be banned" implies a problem or undesirable situation leading to anger and a desire for change.

Text: पण हे एबीपी वाल्यांनी कुठून आणली बातमी
translated_text: But where did the ABP people get this news from?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning nature of "कुठून आणली" (kuthun aanli - where did they get), which indicates curiosity or inquiry rather than any positive or negative feeling.

Text: कळालं का रे ??
translated_text: Did you understand??
Justification: The phrase "कळालं का रे ??" is used in a questioning tone and the addition of "रे" can indicate surprise or disbelief at the understanding level of the person being addressed, resulting in a neutral sentiment with surprise.

Text: या आधी एक बिर्याणी खाल्ली आहे.
translated_text: I have eaten a biryani before.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a past action ("खाल्ली आहे" - khalli aahe, have eaten) without expressing any positive or negative feeling. There is no Marathi word or phrase indicating a particular emotion.

Text: आता आमच्याकडे पण समुद्र आहे...
translated_text: Now we also have the sea...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact with "आता आमच्याकडे पण समुद्र आहे" (aata aamchyaakade pan samudra aahe), indicating the presence of a sea, without expressing any particular emotion.

Text: सदर हँडल हॅक झालं आहे का ?
translated_text: Has this handle been hacked?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about a hacked handle and doesn't convey any particular emotion or sentiment. The phrase "हॅक झालं आहे का ?" (hacked ahe ka?) simply inquires about the state of the handle being hacked, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: मी पित नाही
translated_text: I don't drink.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("मी पित नाही" - "I don't drink") without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion. The negation "नाही" (nahi - no/not) simply indicates the absence of the action, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: बदनामीच्या सूर्यावरून धावणाऱ्यांना उदबत्तीच्या चटक्यांची भिती नसते !!
translated_text: Those who run from the sun of infamy have no fear of the flashes of incense!!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the word "बदनामीच्या" (badnamichya), meaning "of infamy," which creates a negative and hostile tone by implying disgrace and shame.

Text: गदा पण दिड फुट आहे.
translated_text: The mace is two and a half feet long.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual dimension "दिड फुट आहे" (did foot aahe - is two and a half feet) without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: त्याचंच काम असणार नाहीतर असले उद्योग ह्यांचेच असतात
translated_text: It must be his job, otherwise these industries belong to him.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents a possibility ("त्याचंच काम असणार" - "it must be his job") and states a general fact ("असले उद्योग ह्यांचेच असतात" - "these industries belong to him") without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings. The phrase "असले उद्योग" (asle udyog) simply refers to those types of industries and doesn't necessarily imply approval or disapproval in this context.

Text: तुझ्या गतीमंदाला सांभाळा रे ला तर आता मक्का मदिनावालेच बोलवणे पाठवतील
translated_text: Take care of your slow-moving one, now the people of Mecca and Medina will send to call you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. While the phrase " तुझ्या गतीमंदाला सांभाळा " (take care of your slow-moving one) could be interpreted negatively depending on the context and tone, the overall sentence lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The reference to "मक्का मदिनावाले" (people of Mecca and Medina) doesn't inherently convey any specific sentiment or emotion in this context.

Text: त्यामुळे काय तुझा पक्ष वाचणार आहे का?
translated_text: So, is your party going to survive?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it poses a question about the survival of a political party, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "काय तुझा पक्ष वाचणार आहे का?" (is your party going to survive?) is a neutral inquiry.

Text: हिंदुत्व संपवण्यासाठी सगळे एक होणार, भारतीय युवकांसमोर, मोठे आव्हान आहे
translated_text: Everyone will unite to end Hindutva, a big challenge lies before Indian youth
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the presentation of a potentially divisive political topic ("Hindutva sampavnyasathi" - to end Hindutva) and a challenge ("mothe aavhan aahe" - a big challenge) in a matter-of-fact way, without explicit positive or negative emotional indicators.

Text: तुम्हाला तुमचे बिस्कीट मिळाले का ,????
translated_text: Did you get your biscuits????
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question ("तुम्हाला तुमचे बिस्कीट मिळाले का?") and does not contain any sentiment-laden words or phrases.

Text: "त्यांनी केलेल्या आवाहनानुसार" या तीन शब्दांवरच सगळं सुरू आहे
translated_text: It all starts with these three words: "As they called for."
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about the origin of something without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion. The phrase "आवाहनानुसार" (aavhaananusar), meaning "as they called for" or "according to their appeal," simply indicates a starting point or a cause, rather than conveying any emotional coloring.

Text: "आमचे विद्यार्थी सक्रिय आहेत"
translated_text: "Our students are active"
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "सक्रिय आहेत" (sakriya aahet - are active) simply describes a state of being without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काही नवीन आहे का मॅडम आपल्या कडे
translated_text: Do you have anything new, madam?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a polite inquiry ("काही नवीन आहे का") about new items and doesn't express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: देतील ते पण वागळ्याला कोणत्या चॅनलवर घेत आहात तुम्ही?
translated_text: They will give it to you, but on which channel are you taking the joke?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual inquiry regarding channel placement ("कोणत्या चॅनलवर घेत आहात तुम्ही?"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: टोमने आणी तुझे रील सारखेच आहेत, फ़क्त कोणत आहे त्यावरुन नाव पड़ली आहेत
translated_text: Tom and your reel are the same, just named after who is who.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it makes a comparative statement ("टोमने आणी तुझे रील सारखेच आहेत" - "Tom and your reel are the same") without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings. The rest of the sentence ("फ़क्त कोणत आहे त्यावरुन नाव पड़ली आहेत" - "just named after who is who") further elaborates on this comparison in a descriptive, non-emotional manner.

Text: आंकड़े काहीही सांगोत , मी जे म्हणतोय तेच बरोबर आहे , ज्ञानदा
translated_text: Whatever the figures say, what I am saying is correct, Gyananda.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because the phrase "आंकड़े काहीही सांगोत , मी जे म्हणतोय तेच बरोबर आहे" (aankde kahihi sangot, mi je mhanto tec barobar aahe) simply expresses an opinion or assertion without exhibiting any overt positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: ट्वीटच्या सुरुवातीला मी ही झालो होतो राव
translated_text: At the beginning of the tweet, I was like this, Rao
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact about the speaker's initial reaction. The word "झालो होतो" (zhalo hoto - was like) suggests a state of being without any explicit positive or negative connotation. "राव" (rao) is a common suffix and doesn't impact sentiment.

Text: डीपी ठेवावा असा फोटो आहे की नाही.
translated_text: Is there a photo that should be used as a DP?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the questioning nature and lack of any overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "आहे की नाही" (aahe ki nahi - is there or not) indicates a query and uncertainty rather than a definitive sentiment.

Text: मशाल चिन्हावर सुध्दा आता समता पक्षाचा दावा, निवडणूक आयोगाची भूमिका काय?
translated_text: Samata Party now claims even the torch symbol, what is the role of the Election Commission?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a factual claim ("समता पक्षाचा दावा" - Samata Party's claim) and poses a question ("निवडणूक आयोगाची भूमिका काय?" - What is the role of the Election Commission?) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पिझ्झा होय व्हय..... म्या समजू राहीलो आम्लेट व्हय हे.....
translated_text: Pizza is okay..... I thought it was an omelette.....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because of the phrase "म्या समजू राहीलो" (mya samjhu rahilo), which translates to "I thought," indicating a realization rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: जे सर्व जाणून आहेत त्यांनी मनुस्मृती वाचली आहे का?
translated_text: Have all those who know have read Manusmriti?
Justification: The sentence "जे सर्व जाणून आहेत त्यांनी मनुस्मृती वाचली आहे का?" is neutral because it is a question and lacks emotionally charged words. The phrase "वाचली आहे का?" (vachali aahe ka?) indicates a simple inquiry, contributing to the overall neutrality.

Text: अक्च्युअली ही मोठी ॲक्टर्स
translated_text: Actually these are great actors
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("मोठी ॲक्टर्स" - great actors) without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे देवेंद्र साहेबांचं म्हणणं हे आहे की त्यांनी तिकीट दिलेल्या लोकांना निवडून देऊ नये.
translated_text: So what Devendra Saheb is saying is that he should not elect the people he gave tickets to.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Devendra Saheb's alleged statement, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "म्हणजे देवेंद्र साहेबांचं म्हणणं हे आहे की" (So what Devendra Saheb is saying is that) introduces the statement neutrally.

Text: आपली माहिती वाहतूक नियंत्रण कक्ष, ठाणे शहर यांना आवश्यक कारवाईसाठी कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Your information has been reported to the Traffic Control Room, Thane City for necessary action.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact: "आवश्यक कारवाईसाठी कळविली आहे" (reported for necessary action). There's no indication of positive or negative feelings.

Text: ही असली भाषा वापरणारे महाराष्ट्राचे मुख्यमंत्री आहेत की इतर कोणी..??
translated_text: Is it the Chief Minister of Maharashtra who uses this real language or someone else??
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "असली भाषा" (asli bhasha), meaning "real/actual language," implying disbelief or astonishment at the Chief Minister using such language. The multiple question marks further emphasize the speaker's surprise.

Text: हे तर बरोबर आहे तुमचं का पोट दुखतय
translated_text: That's right. Why does your stomach hurt?
Justification: The phrase "का पोट दुखतय" (ka pot dukhtay - why does your stomach hurt?) implies a surprised or concerned inquiry about the person's well-being, thus creating a neutral sentiment with a subtle element of surprise.

Text: सगळे भक्त माझीच पोरं आहेत.... म्हणून उद्या अधिकार सांगायलाही ते कमी पडणार नाहीत...
translated_text: All devotees are my children....so tomorrow they will not be short of authority to speak...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "सगळे भक्त माझीच पोरं आहेत..." (sagle bhakt majhich pora aahet...), which translates to "All devotees are my children...". This statement, while conveying a sense of belonging, lacks explicit positive or negative connotations within the given context and therefore maintains a neutral sentiment.

Text: जीवनात घाई करताना धेर्य आणि क्रोध करताना शांतता राखायला हवी.
translated_text: In life, one should be patient when in a hurry and calm when angry.
Justification: The sentence advocates for balance ("शांतता राखायला हवी" - should maintain calm) and wisdom ("धेर्य" - patience) in different situations, resulting in a neutral sentiment as it presents advice rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: : राज्यात लवकरच    हजार पोलिसांची होणार भरती, फडणवीसांची घोषणा
translated_text: : Recruitment of thousand policemen will be done soon in the state, Fadnavis announces
Justification: The sentiment is slightly positive due to the phrase "हजार पोलिसांची होणार भरती" (hajar polisanchi honar bharti), meaning "recruitment of thousand policemen will be done," indicating a positive development for the state and potential job seekers. While a neutral sentiment is possible, "भरती" (bharti) generally carries a slightly positive connotation as it implies progress and opportunity.

Text: बहुतेक आधुनिक आहे हें एकमेंकाना दिसत नसेल.
translated_text: Most of them may not seem modern to each other.
Justification: "दिसत नसेल" (disat nasel) indicates a lack of perceived modernity, expressing a neutral sentiment as it simply states a potential observation without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: नारबाच्या वाडीतल आहे हे....  बेणं...
translated_text: This is in the garden of Narba.... Son...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and non-emotional statement. The phrase "नारबाच्या वाडीतल आहे हे.... बेणं..." simply states a location and refers to a son, without expressing any particular sentiment or emotion. The word "बेणं" (son) contributes to the neutral tone in this context.

Text: सूहान हे बघ अजून एक. तुवर डाळ=
translated_text: Suhan, look at this one more. Tuvar Dal=
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple statement of observation ("हे बघ अजून एक" - "look at this one more") with no inherent emotional charge. The mention of "तुवर डाळ" (Tuvar Dal) is simply descriptive and adds no sentiment.

Text: जे पेराल तेच उगवेल याच उत्तम उदाहरण आहे हे
translated_text: This is a great example of what you sow, you reap.
Justification: "उत्तम उदाहरण आहे" (uttam udaharan aahe - is a great example) expresses a positive evaluation, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: खालील पैकी कोणती कृती चलनविषयक धोरणाचा ( ) भाग नाही.
translated_text: Which of the following actions is not a part of monetary policy?
Justification: The sentence is informational and purely factual, asking a question about monetary policy. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "खालील पैकी कोणती कृती" (which of the following actions) is neutral and contributes to the objective tone.

Text: पण ते टोस्ट आहेत ना चाचु
translated_text: But they are toast, aren't they, uncle?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence "पण ते टोस्ट आहेत ना चाचु" is a simple statement/question about toast; no specific word or phrase indicates a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "टोस्ट आहेत ना" simply inquires about the presence of toast.

Text: परत पुणेकरांनी यांना निवडून दिले की त्यांची समुद्राची इच्छा पूर्ण होणार......मग काय पुणेकर
translated_text: Punekars elected him again, saying that their desire for the sea will be fulfilled... Then what about Punekars?
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical situation and questions the future actions of Punekars ("पुणेकर"). There is no explicit sentiment expressed in the statement; it is a neutral observation or query.

Text: वीज मनोरे आणि वाहिनी यासाठी जागेचा आता भरघोस मोबदला
translated_text: Land for electricity towers and conduits is now being paid a hefty price
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about compensation for land. The Marathi phrase "भरघोस मोबदला" (bharghos mobadala), meaning "hefty price/substantial compensation," describes a financial transaction without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: लक्ष्मी रोड ला खरेदी साठी जाऊ की नको आज? पाऊस पडणार आहे का भोलेनाथ
translated_text: Should we go shopping at Lakshmi Road today? Is it going to rain, Bholenath?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning nature ("जाऊ की नको" - should we go or not) and a general inquiry about the weather ("पाऊस पडणार आहे का" - is it going to rain). There's no inherently positive or negative connotation in the question.

Text: कितीही उड्या मारू देत, ह्यांचा शेवट त्यांच्या कर्माने जनतेच्या दरबारात होणार आहे
translated_text: No matter how much they jump, they will end up in the court of the people due to their deeds.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it speaks of consequences based on actions ("कर्माने"). While potentially negative for the subject, the statement itself is a statement of fact or prediction based on karma, specifically the phrase "कर्माने जनतेच्या दरबारात होणार आहे".

Text: हसायचं की रडायचे..त्यामुळेच रेशीम बागेतले मशिदीमध्ये राष्ट्रपिता पदवी घायाला गेला होता का?
translated_text: Should I laugh or cry? Is that why the Father of the Nation went to the mosque in Reshim Bagh to receive the title?
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the juxtaposition of "reshim bagetle mashidimadhye rashtrapita padavi ghayala gela hota ka?" (went to the mosque in Reshim Bagh to receive the title?), which sarcastically implies a jarring and unacceptable situation regarding a respected figure (Rashtrapita) and a potentially contentious location (mosque in Reshim Bagh), known for its connection to RSS. This sarcastic questioning creates the emotion of disgust.

Text: असं बोलून बोलून शेवटी तेच होत जे तुम्ही केल
translated_text: By talking like that, you end up doing exactly what you did.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes a predictable outcome based on past actions. The phrase "असं बोलून बोलून शेवटी तेच होत" (asun bolun bolun shevti tech hot) - "by talking like that, you end up doing exactly that" - simply states a cause-and-effect relationship without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: : स्वयंभू आहे त्रंबकेश्वरचे जोतिर्लिंग, पौराणिक कथा आणि महत्त्व
translated_text: : Jyotirlinga of Trimbakeshwar is self-contained, mythological story and importance
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states facts and describes the Jyotirlinga of Trimbakeshwar using words like "स्वयंभू" (self-contained), "पौराणिक कथा" (mythological story), and "महत्त्व" (importance) which are descriptive and lack inherent emotional charge.

Text: वर्षांत असं काय होते ह्यांना..
translated_text: What happened to them over the years?
Justification: The word "काय" (kay - what) indicates surprise at the unspecified change happening to them.

Text: शिवशाही आली परत!!
translated_text: Shivshahi is back!!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "आली परत!!" (aali parat!!) meaning "is back!!" expresses a sense of triumphant return, directly contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: त्यांच्या डिग्री आणि शिक्षण अगोदरच माहीत होते .
translated_text: Their degrees and education were already known.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with "माहीत होते" (mahiti hote), meaning "were known," indicating a neutral sentiment with no inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: साहेब ही हुकुमशाही आलेली आहे तुम्ही लवकर बाहेर या.
translated_text: Sir, this dictatorship has arrived. Come out quickly.
Justification: The phrase "हुकुमशाही आलेली आहे" (hukumshahi aaleli aahe - dictatorship has arrived) indicates a negative situation and expresses anger due to the imposition of authoritarian rule.

Text: माशा अल्लाह मशालीचा भारी अपमान आहे हा.
translated_text: Masha Allah, this is a huge insult to Mashali.
Justification: The word "अपमान" (apman), meaning "insult", indicates a negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: सोयीनुसार आहेत दोघेही
translated_text: Both are convenient.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the Marathi phrase "सोयीनुसार आहेत" (soyinusaar aahet) simply states that both are convenient, lacking any positive or negative connotation.

Text: अध्यक्ष संदीप पाटील होणार.. काही काळजी नको जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sandeep Patil will be the president.. no need to worry, Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The sentence expresses a matter-of-fact statement and reassurance ("काही काळजी नको" - "no need to worry") along with a patriotic slogan. There isn't a strong positive or negative leaning. The phrase "काही काळजी नको" contributes to the neutrality by indicating an absence of worry.

Text: ह्याच काय नुसत वेदांताच नाय गेलाय भहाराष्ट्रातुन हे का नाही थांबवलेत
translated_text: Isn't this just Vedanta? Why hasn't it been stopped from Bharat?
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of understanding or disapproval towards the situation ("हे का नाही थांबवलेत" - "Why hasn't it been stopped?"). The negative sentiment stems from the implication that something should have been prevented, conveying surprise or disbelief that it wasn't.

Text: जानी च्या हातात मशाल आली...
translated_text: A torch came in Jani's hand...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event ("मशाल आली" - a torch came) without any emotional coloring or subjective evaluation.

Text: सत्ता असताना हे शहाणपण सुचलं नाही मविआ ला
translated_text: This wisdom did not occur to Mavia when she was in power.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of overtly positive or negative words. The statement "सत्ता असताना हे शहाणपण सुचलं नाही" (sat'ta asatana he shahanpan suchale nahi) - "this wisdom did not occur while in power" - is a factual statement, lacking emotional coloring and simply noting a past absence of wisdom/foresight.

Text: अमेरिकेत निर्मला सीतारामन यांना थेट सवाल विचारण्याता आला होता
translated_text: Nirmala Sitharaman was asked a direct question in America.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event ("अमेरिकेत निर्मला सीतारामन यांना थेट सवाल विचारण्याता आला होता" - Nirmala Sitharaman was asked a direct question in America) without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion. The statement is purely informational, hence neutral.

Text: असे आहे राष्ट्रभक्त मुंबईकर ,मंगेशकर कुटुंबीय
translated_text: This is how patriotic Mumbaikars, the Mangeshkar family are
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about the Mangeshkar family being patriotic Mumbaikars. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrases "असे आहे" (This is how) and "राष्ट्रभक्त मुंबईकर" (patriotic Mumbaikars) are descriptive and do not convey strong emotion.

Text: प्रत्येकाने ऐकावे, हे खरोखरच आश्चर्यकारक आहे
translated_text: Everyone should listen, it's really amazing.
Justification: The phrase "आश्चर्यकारक आहे" (aashcharyakarak aahe), meaning "amazing" or "wonderful," expresses a positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: काय विषय आहे का...
translated_text: What is the topic...?
Justification: The phrase "काय विषय आहे का..." (kay vishay aahe ka...) is a neutral inquiry about the topic, showing no specific positive or negative sentiment or emotional coloring.

Text: पण आतंगवादिना जात आणी धर्म पण आहे हे लक्षात असू दे आजच्या घडीला
translated_text: But let us remember that terrorism is not just about caste and religion, it is also about today.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a statement of fact ("आतंगवादिना जात आणी धर्म पण आहे हे लक्षात असू दे") without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: नुसतं प्रेम असून उपयोग नाही समोरच्याच्या मनाला पण जपता आलं पाहिजे.
translated_text: Just having love is not enough, you should also be able to protect the other person's heart.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced view on love, emphasizing the importance of protecting the other person's feelings in addition to simply having love. The phrase "नुसतं प्रेम असून उपयोग नाही" (just having love is not enough) sets a neutral and conditional tone, not explicitly positive or negative, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: लाकडाच्या ओंडक्यात शेपटी अडकलेला तो हाच का?
translated_text: Is that the one with his tail stuck in a wooden block?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and the emotion is surprise because the sentence expresses a questioning tone and curiosity about identifying someone, using "तो हाच का?" (is that the one?), which conveys a sense of surprise and inquiry rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: आकाश चोप्रा पाहिजे होता करायला सुप्रीम कोर्टाच्या सुनावणीला
translated_text: Aakash Chopra wanted to appear in the Supreme Court hearing.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or desire without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The phrase "आकाश चोप्रा पाहिजे होता" (Aakash Chopra pahije hota - Aakash Chopra was wanted/needed) doesn't carry any inherent emotional charge.

Text: गुल्लू बेटा मग शिंदे ना सांगायचं ना आत्रेंची शिवसेना नाव घ्या म्हणून
translated_text: Gullu Beta, then neither Shinde nor Atre should be mentioned, so that Shiv Sena can be named.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it proposes a hypothetical scenario regarding naming Shiv Sena, without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "सांगायचं ना" (sangaycha na) - should be said/mentioned - indicates a suggestion or a proposition, contributing to the neutrality.

Text: म्हणजे वागळया परत     कलम लावायच अस म्हणण आहे का तुझ.
translated_text: So you're saying that we should re-impose the ban on the behavior?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the Marathi phrase "म्हणजे वागळया परत कलम लावायच अस म्हणण आहे का तुझ" is a question about re-imposing a ban, which doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment. It's simply seeking clarification.

Text: डेअंरिगच काम आहे गडावर जायला
translated_text: It's a daunting task to go to the fort.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "डेअंरिगच" (daunting), which implies a difficult and potentially frightening task, hence the fear and neutral sentiment (though trending towards negative due to the challenging nature).

Text: हे तो माणूस सांगत आहे ज्याने लग्नच केलं नाही
translated_text: This is being said by a man who never got married.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation about the speaker not being married. The phrase "लग्नच केलं नाही" (lagnaach kelं naahee) meaning "never got married" simply describes a state and does not convey any positive, negative, or emotional tone.

Text: फक्त भाजप ची सरकार आल्यावरच का पाकिस्तान जिंदाबाद नारे लागतात?
translated_text: Why do slogans of Pakistan Zindabad arise only when a BJP government comes to power?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the implied question of causality and the negative connotation associated with the phrase "पाकिस्तान जिंदाबाद नारे लागतात" (Pakistan Zindabad slogans arise), suggesting an unexpected and undesirable situation linked to the BJP government. The question itself highlights the unexpected correlation.

Text: हे बघून बाळासाहेब ठाकरे साहेब यांच्या भाषणाची आठवण आली मैने बोल्या वाह र झोल्या..
translated_text: Seeing this, I remembered Balasaheb Thackeray's speech. I said, "Wow, I was shocked."
Justification: The phrase "वाह र झोल्या" ("Wow, I was shocked") expresses surprise and astonishment, leading to the emotion of surprise. The Marathi word "वाह" (wah) is a common exclamation of surprise.

Text: लवकर माझ्या शेतकरी बांधवांना मदत करावी हि नम्र विनंती.....
translated_text: This is my humble request to help my farmer brothers as soon as possible.....
Justification: The sentence expresses a humble request. While it relates to a potentially sensitive topic (farmers needing help), the phrase "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti - humble request) indicates a polite and neutral tone, lacking strong positive or negative emotional expressions.

Text: ज्यांनी कर्ज च घेतले नाही त्या शेतकरी बांधावसाठी सुद्धा काहीतरी मदत द्यावी
translated_text: Some help should also be given to farmers who have not taken loans.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it requests assistance for farmers who haven't taken loans. The phrase "मदत द्यावी" (madat dyavi) meaning "help should be given", is a general statement advocating for support, without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: मध्ये सिताराम केसरी अध्यक्ष होते त्यांना का सोडलं
translated_text: Why was Sitaram Kesari, who was the president in 1991, removed?
Justification: The phrase "का सोडलं" (ka sodla), meaning "why was [he] removed/let go?", expresses surprise at the action.

Text: आपल्याकडे ती वाढलेली ढेरी कमी करून दिली जाईल...
translated_text: We will be given a reduction in that increased amount...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a service offering. The Marathi phrase "वाढलेली ढेरी कमी करून दिली जाईल" (vaadhleli dheri kami karun dili jail) - "will be given a reduction in that increased amount" is a factual statement, lacking positive or negative emotional indicators.

Text: जिनाला कोण महात्मा म्हणालं होतं बरं; कुणी कबरीवर फुलं वाहिली होती बरं?
translated_text: Who called Jinnah a Mahatma? Who laid flowers on his grave?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the rhetorical question and disbelief implied by "बरं?" (bara?), questioning the idea of anyone considering Jinnah a Mahatma or honoring him. This implies a negative sentiment towards such an idea.

Text: *फटाके फोडणे हा एक विधी*, *शास्त्रातील संदर्भांसह हे सिद्ध*
translated_text: *Burning crackers is a ritual*, *proven with references from scripture*
Justification: The sentence presents burning crackers as a ritual supported by scripture. This is a factual statement without any explicitly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "शास्त्रातील संदर्भांसह हे सिद्ध" (proven with references from scripture) contributes to the neutral tone by presenting it as an established practice.

Text: तुम्ही पण जनसंघा विरुद्ध प्रचार केला होताना?
translated_text: Did you also campaign against the Jana Sangh?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question inquiring about past actions ("प्रचार केला होताना?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion.

Text: बरोबर आहे तो माणूस आता ह्याला संपवणार हे त्रिकाल सत्य आहे.
translated_text: That's right, that man will finish this now, it's an eternal truth.
Justification: The phrase "बरोबर आहे" (Barobar aahe), meaning "That's right" or "Correct", expresses agreement and affirmation, leading to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a factual acceptance of the subsequent statement without conveying strong positive or negative feelings. While the rest of the sentence describes a violent act, the initial acknowledgement "बरोबर आहे" doesn't contribute to a negative sentiment on its own.

Text: आम्हास कधि व्यक्त व्हावे, हे आम्हीच ठरवणार....
translated_text: We will decide when we should express ourselves...
Justification: The sentence expresses a declaration of self-determination ("आम्हीच ठरवणार"), implying a neutral stance as it simply states a right to choose rather than expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: बार्ली हा धान्य प्रकार पहिल्यांदा ऐकला..? काय आहे
translated_text: First time hearing about barley? What is it?
Justification: The sentence expresses curiosity and seeks information. The phrase "काय आहे" (kay aahe) which translates to "What is it?" indicates a neutral sentiment as it's a simple question seeking explanation.

Text: काँग्रेसला नवी दिशा देऊ शकतील ही अपेक्षा ..
translated_text: Hope they can give a new direction to Congress..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the word "अपेक्षा" (apeksha), which means "hope" or "expectation." While potentially leaning slightly positive, it primarily conveys a neutral anticipation rather than a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: भारत हा जगातील सर्वात मोठा साखर उत्पादक देश बनला आहे
translated_text: India has become the world's largest sugar producer.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual piece of information. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed in the Marathi sentence. The phrase "सर्वात मोठा साखर उत्पादक देश बनला आहे" (sarvat motha sakhar utpadak desh banla aahe - has become the largest sugar producer) simply describes a state of affairs.

Text: उष्ट्यांपेक्षा चोर बरा.. उष्टे खायला कष्ट नाही लागत.. चोरी साठी कष्ट करावेच लागतात..
translated_text: Thieves are better than camels.. Camels don't require hard work to eat.. You have to work hard to steal..
Justification: The sentence expresses anger due to the comparative statement "उष्ट्यांपेक्षा चोर बरा" (ushtyanpeksha chor bara - Thieves are better than camels). This comparison, particularly favoring thieves, indicates a strong disapproval and resentment towards camels, thus reflecting anger.

Text: ताई साहेब मनाची तयारी करून् ठेवा तुमचा सोबत पण पुढे जाऊन हेच होणार आहे
translated_text: Tai Saheb, I will prepare my mind and keep it with you, but this is what is going to happen going forward.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly conveys information about preparing one's mind for a future event. The Marathi phrase "मनाची तयारी करून् ठेवा" (manachi tayari karun theva - prepare your mind) is informational and lacks overtly positive or negative connotations.

Text: ट्विट करुन असत्य पसरवणे ही कोणत्याही सज्जनांची लक्षणं असू शकत नाहीत!
translated_text: Spreading lies through tweets is not the mark of a gentleman!
Justification: The phrase "असत्य पसरवणे" (asatya pasaravane), meaning "spreading lies," indicates a negative behavior that elicits anger.

Text: मुलांना द्या ‘हे’ पदार्थ
translated_text: Give 'this' food to children
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple instruction. There is no emotionally charged word or phrase; "द्या" (dya - give) is a neutral verb in this context.

Text: बँकांचे पण येऊद्या....
translated_text: Let the banks come too....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "बँकांचे पण येऊद्या...." (banks come too) simply expresses a desire or suggestion without any inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "येऊद्या" (let come) indicates a neutral request.

Text: हे सर्व परिणाम गोबेल्स नितीमुळे तयार झालेत...
translated_text: All these consequences were created by Goebbels' policy...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement about consequences arising from "गोबेल्स नितीमुळे" (Goebbels' policy). While the reference to Goebbels may evoke negative connotations in other contexts, its presence here is simply descriptive and doesn't express explicit sentiment within the given sentence.

Text: बघा भाजप वाल्यांनो, त्यात शिंदे आणि जे पळून गेलेले आमदार आहेत त्यांनी ही पाहावे
translated_text: Look, BJP people, Shinde and the MLAs who fled should see this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its descriptive and observational tone. While it addresses a political group, it lacks any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शिंदे आणि जे पळून गेलेले आमदार आहेत" (Shinde and the MLAs who fled) is a factual statement without explicit emotional loading in this context.

Text: महाशक्ती हरल्याच हे शिक्कामोर्तब आहे
translated_text: This is a sure sign of the defeat of a superpower.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral observation about a superpower's defeat. The phrase "शikkaamорtab aahe" ( शिक्कामोर्तब आहे) which means "sure sign" or "sealed," indicates a confirmation of an event without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: … फिर ये तो मोदी सरकार हे
translated_text: … come back to Modi government
Justification: The phrase "मोदी सरकार" (Modi Sarkar - Modi Government) is a neutral reference to a political entity, without expressing positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: जेवणाचा फोटो टाकताना हा फिल्टर वापरणे गरजेचे आहे का
translated_text: Is it necessary to use this filter when posting a photo of food?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question expressing mild skepticism or inquiry, not a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गरजेचे आहे का" (garajeche aahe ka - is it necessary?) indicates a neutral inquiry rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: पवित्र श्रावण महिन्यानिमित्ताने निसर्गरम्य आणि प्राचीन वरदडी येथील शनिमंदिर येथे भाविकांची गर्दी
translated_text: Devotees throng the scenic and ancient Shani Temple in Vardari on the occasion of the holy month of Shravan
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, a gathering of devotees at a temple. There are no explicitly positive or negative words or phrases. "पवित्र श्रावण महिना" (holy month of Shravan) and "भाविकांची गर्दी" (crowd of devotees) are descriptive but do not carry inherent positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: बाजारात फिरून या... दर माहिती करून घ्या भाज्यांचे
translated_text: Come and visit the market... find out the prices of vegetables.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply suggests visiting the market and inquiring about vegetable prices. There's no sentiment-laden word or phrase; it's informational. The phrases "बाजारात फिरून या" (come and visit the market) and "दर माहिती करून घ्या भाज्यांचे" (find out the prices of vegetables) are objective instructions.

Text: परभणी येथे याची गाडी अडवली होती.
translated_text: His car was stopped in Parbhani.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event: "परभणी येथे याची गाडी अडवली होती" (Parbhani yethe yachi gaadi adavali hoti). The words "अडवली होती" (adavali hoti - was stopped) describes a neutral action without any inherent positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: माझ्या मुलाच्या वाढदिवसाला या पेक्षा जास्त गर्दी झाली होती...
translated_text: My son's birthday was more crowded than this...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "जास्त गर्दी झाली होती" (jasta gardi jhali hoti) simply states a fact about the crowd size, indicating a comparison without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: जाहिरातींचा त्रास होत असेल तर टीव्ही बघू नका, असे का म्हणाले मुंबई हायकोर्ट ?
translated_text: Why did the Mumbai High Court say that if you are bothered by advertisements, don't watch TV?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a question reporting a statement by the Mumbai High Court. The emotion is surprise, likely due to the unexpected nature of the statement. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase responsible for a positive or negative sentiment; the sentence is primarily informational. The use of "असे का म्हणाले" (ase kaa mhanale - why did they say) contributes to the sense of surprise or curiosity regarding the statement.

Text: जिल्हा परिषद आणि पंचायत समितीच्या निवडणुका लांबणार !
translated_text: Zilla Parishad and Panchayat Samiti elections will be delayed!
Justification: The phrase "लांबणार !" (lambnar!), meaning "will be delayed!", expresses frustration and disappointment about the election postponement, contributing to the anger emotion.

Text: दापोलीतील 'साई रिसॉर्ट' प्रकरणी आज हायकोर्टात सुनावणी होणार आहे.
translated_text: The High Court will hear the 'Sai Resort' case in Dapoli today.
Justification: The sentence simply states a fact about a court hearing. There are no specific words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is factual in nature.

Text: सर ब्लॅक लेबल आहे का?
translated_text: Is there a black label, sir?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple inquiry. The phrase "सर ब्लॅक लेबल आहे का?" is a direct question without any emotional loading.

Text: सरदार पटेल गद्दार होते का ? ज्यांनी संघावर बंदी घातली होती
translated_text: Was Sardar Patel a traitor? Those who banned the RSS
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the question "गद्दार होते का ?" ("Was he a traitor?"). Asking a question, even if controversial, does not inherently express a positive or negative sentiment, and the subsequent clause provides a historical fact ("ज्यांनी संघावर बंदी घातली होती" - "Those who banned the RSS") without inherently expressing emotion.

Text: शेवटचे वाक्य " आकाश ही नम्रतेची...
translated_text: The last sentence: "The sky is the sky of humility..."
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a statement of fact/observation without any emotionally charged or positive/negative Marathi words. The phrase "आकाश ही नम्रतेची..." (The sky is the sky of humility...) is descriptive but lacks explicit sentiment.

Text: दसरा मेळावा.. बऱ्यापैकी स्पष्ट झाले आहे..
translated_text: Dussehra gathering.. it has become quite clear..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "बऱ्यापैकी स्पष्ट झाले आहे" (baryapaiki spashta zhale aahe) which simply indicates clarity without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: का कधी बाहेर येतोय याची वाट पत्राचालतील लोक पण बगताय.
translated_text: Even the people in Patrachal are waiting for it to come out.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about people waiting ("वाट बगताय" - waiting) for something to happen, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोणत्या वर काम करता आपण?
translated_text: What do you work on?
Justification: The sentence "कोणत्या वर काम करता आपण?" is a simple, neutral question. There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases. It simply asks about someone's work. The neutral sentiment is indicated by the absence of any emotionally charged words.

Text: हा त्याच साडेतीन जिल्ह्यांपैकी एक जिल्हा आहे का ज्यात तुमच्या साहेबांचं वर्चस्व आहे?
translated_text: Is this one of the three and a half districts in which your boss has dominance?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about dominance without explicitly indicating positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "वर्चस्व आहे" (varchasva aahe - has dominance) simply states a fact or perceived fact without conveying any inherent emotional tone.

Text: पाकिस्तानी बरे असे हे...जिहाद एके जिहाद...शब्दावर कायम राहतात.
translated_text: Pakistanis always stick to the word "jihad, jihad".
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive tone and lack of overtly positive or negative Marathi words. While "जिहाद एके जिहाद" (jihad, jihad) carries potentially negative connotations in other contexts, its usage here is simply descriptive without expressing an opinion or feeling.

Text: राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मु आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर.
translated_text: President Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about President Murmu's travel plans. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment. The entire sentence is factual news reporting.

Text: महाशय जो हे बंधारन कारन हे
translated_text: Mr. Joe is due to restrictions
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact. The phrase "बंधारन कारन हे" (bandharan karan he) meaning "due to restrictions" simply states a reason without expressing any sentiment or emotion.

Text: त्या बिचाऱ्याला घाई झाली असेल , एवढी चौकशी का करत आहेत सगळे
translated_text: That poor guy must be in a hurry, why is everyone asking so many questions?
Justification: The phrase "बिचाऱ्याला" (bicharyala - poor guy) evokes a sense of pity, which can be associated with the negative emotion of disgust due to the perceived vulnerability and unfairness of the situation.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातल्या सत्तासंघर्षावर आज पाच न्यायमूर्तींच्या घटनापीठापुढे सुनावणी होणार !
translated_text: The power struggle in Maharashtra will be heard today before a five-judge constitution bench!
Justification: The exclamation mark "!" at the end of the sentence contributes to a sense of heightened emotion, which, given the context of a contentious power struggle, is interpreted as anger. While the sentence itself is factual, the punctuation adds an emotional charge.

Text: पवारसाहेब पत्रकार परिषदेत घेचं काम निभावता आहेत
translated_text: Pawar Saheb is doing his job at the press conference.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states that Pawar Saheb is doing his job. The phrase "घेचं काम निभावता आहेत" (ghech kaam nibhavata aahet - doing his job) is factual and lacks any emotional or opinionated connotation, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: हिंदुत्व ह्या शब्दाची व्याप्ती पण सांगावी
translated_text: The scope of the word Hindutva should also be explained.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral request for information ("सांगावी" - should be explained) about the term "हिंदुत्व" (Hindutva). There's no indication of positive or negative sentiment, only a desire for clarification.

Text: ही महिती तुम्ही दिली आहे का
translated_text: Have you provided this information?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The Marathi words "ही महिती तुम्ही दिली आहे का" simply inquire about the source of the information without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: नव्या शैक्षणिक धोरणाची अंमलबजावणी करण्यासाठी विद्यापीठात स्वतंत्र कक्ष होणार.!
translated_text: There will be a separate room in the university to implement the new educational policy.!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual plan: "नव्या शैक्षणिक धोरणाची अंमलबजावणी करण्यासाठी विद्यापीठात स्वतंत्र कक्ष होणार!" (There will be a separate room in the university to implement the new educational policy!). This is a statement of intent and lacks any emotional coloring.

Text: : भाजपच्या माघारीनंतर अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीत ऋतूजा लटके यांना ‘हा’ फॅक्टर अडचणीचा ठरणार?
translated_text: : Will 'this' factor become a problem for Rituja Latke in the Andheri by-election after BJP's withdrawal?
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and interrogative, reporting on a political situation. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase expressing strong sentiment. The word "अडचणीचा" (adachanicha - problematic/difficult) hints at a potential negative outcome, but it's presented as a question, not a statement of opinion. Hence, the neutral sentiment.

Text: अर्णवच्या सुनावणी अर्जावरती असा निर्णय राखून ठेवला होता का?
translated_text: Was such a decision reserved on Arnav's hearing application?
Justification: The emotion of surprise stems from the phrase "निर्णय राखून ठेवला होता का?", which translates to "was the decision reserved?". The "का?" ("ka?") at the end indicates a question and implies an element of unexpectedness regarding the decision being reserved.

Text: अशी उर्वरित सेना नेत्यांची ही अवस्था आहे
translated_text: This is the situation of the remaining army leaders.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the Marathi phrase "अशी उर्वरित सेना नेत्यांची ही अवस्था आहे" describes a state or situation ("अवस्था") without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: बरं ते विधानसभे वेळी तिकीट मागायला कृष्णकुंज वर कोण गेले होते... ओळखा पाहू??
translated_text: Well, who went to Krishnakunj to ask for tickets during the assembly elections... Let's identify them??
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question and contains no inherently positive or negative Marathi words. The phrase "ओळखा पाहू??" (Olakhā pāhū?? - Let's identify them??) simply poses a challenge for identification and doesn't carry any strong emotional charge.

Text: मिंधे ला आपल्याकडूनच पराभूत व्हायचे आहे केदार दादा.
translated_text: Mindhe wants to be defeated by you, Kedar Dada.
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement about someone named "Mindhe" being defeated. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed in the Marathi words themselves ("मिंधे", "पराभूत व्हायचे आहे"). The statement is presented as a matter-of-fact observation, hence neutral.

Text: काम केल्यावर भूक ही लागेल
translated_text: You will be hungry after work.
Justification: The sentence expresses a natural consequence of work, lacking any specific positive or negative connotation. The phrase "भूक ही लागेल" (bhook hee lagel - will be hungry) simply states a fact, making it neutral.

Text: निष्ठा देखील शिष्टता आहे.
translated_text: Loyalty is also decency.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact, equating loyalty with decency. There is no explicit positive or negative connotation. The word "निष्ठा" (nishtha - loyalty) and "शिष्टता" (shishtata - decency) are presented as comparable, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: पण मन शारीरिक गरज पुर्ण करू शकत नाही हे सुद्दा तेवढंच खरं आहे
translated_text: But it is equally true that the mind cannot fulfill physical needs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "तेवढंच खरं आहे" (tevadhach khara aahe - equally true) emphasizes the factual nature of the statement, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: लोकशाहीत नेता आणि त्याच्या आदेशापेक्षा सदस्यांचे बहुमत आणि बहुमताचा निर्णय अधिक महत्वाचा आहे
translated_text: In a democracy, the majority of members and the decision of the majority are more important than the leader and his orders.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the importance of majority rule in a democracy, lacking any strong positive or negative emotional cues. The phrase "अधिक महत्वाचा आहे" (adhik mahatvacha aahe - more important is) simply states a comparative importance without implying a particular emotion.

Text: “…तर राज्यात राष्ट्रपती राजवट लागू होणार”-
translated_text: “…then President’s rule will be imposed in the state”-
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential political outcome ("राष्ट्रपती राजवट लागू होणार" - President's rule will be imposed) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase is simply stating a possible event, hence neutral.

Text: बीकेसीवरील मेळावा असा होणार
translated_text: The rally at BKC will be like this
Justification: The sentence "बीकेसीवरील मेळावा असा होणार" is neutral because it simply states a factual event about the rally without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "असा होणार" (asa honar - will be like this) is descriptive and devoid of emotional coloring, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: -  -     संकष्ट चतुर्थी आपल्या गावची चंद्रोदय वेळ पाहण्यासाठी खालील लिंक पहावी.
translated_text: - - To see the moonrise time of your village for Sankashta Chaturthi, please visit the link below.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply providing information ("खालील लिंक पहावी" - khaliil link pahavi, meaning "please visit the link below") about where to find the moonrise time for Sankashta Chaturthi, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: अतुल चा नारायण राणे सोबत काही तरी संबंध असावा
translated_text: Atul must have some connection with Narayan Rane.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a possible relationship ("संबंध असावा") without expressing any positive or negative opinion or feeling. The phrase "संबंध असावा" simply suggests a connection.

Text: अच्छा,.मला वाटले रत्नागिरी ला जायचे होते तुम्हाला
translated_text: Okay, I thought you wanted to go to Ratnagiri.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a past belief ("मला वाटले") with no inherently positive or negative connotations. "मला वाटले" (malaa vaatale) indicates a thought or belief and carries no emotional weight in this context.

Text: शिल्लक किती आहेत ? हे जनतेला समजालय .
translated_text: How much is the balance? The public should understand this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a question and a desire for public understanding. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase conveying a strong emotion or sentiment; "शिल्लक किती आहेत ?" (how much is the balance?) and "हे जनतेला समजायला" (the public should understand this) are informational.

Text: सहा महिन्यांत    % ने वाढला हा कमोडिटी स्टॉक, तुमच्या पोर्टफोलिओत आहे का?
translated_text: This commodity stock has increased by 100% in six months, is it in your portfolio?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("सहा महिन्यांत % ने वाढला") and asks a question without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सहा महिन्यांत % ने वाढला" simply describes the stock's performance.

Text: पण तेच करते...
translated_text: But that's what it does...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "पण तेच करते..." (pan tech karte...) simply states a fact without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase indicates a matter-of-fact observation.

Text: शुभ रात्री अश्विनी....झोपा आता....तुमचे शेठ घाबरतील
translated_text: Good night Ashwini....sleep now....your sheth will be scared
Justification: The emotion "fear" is triggered by the phrase "घाबरतील" (ghabartil), meaning "will be scared," implying a consequence or worry that elicits fear.

Text: तुझं ट्विट पाहून याला आयडिया आली वाटत
translated_text: I think he got the idea after seeing your tweet.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral observation about someone getting an idea after seeing a tweet. There is no inherent positivity or negativity. The phrase "आली वाटत" (aali vaatat - seems like) indicates speculation and does not contribute to any particular sentiment.

Text: हे सर्व ठीक आहे पण बाजारात गेल्यावर असे काही वाटत नाही..
translated_text: This is all fine but when you go to the market, it doesn't feel like that.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "असे काही वाटत नाही" (ase kahi vaatat nahi), meaning "it doesn't feel like that," indicates a lack of strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कंगणा आणि विक्रम गोखले कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?     की     ?
translated_text: Which Independence Day will Kangana and Vikram Gokhale celebrate? Or?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question ("कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?") and does not express a positive or negative opinion.

Text: भा ज पा काही पण चमत्कार करू शकते?
translated_text: Can BJP do any miracles?
Justification: The sentence expresses neutrality as it's a question questioning BJP's capability to perform "miracles" ("चमत्कार करू शकते?"). The question itself doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: डॉ्टरसाहेब लई कमी शिक्षा आहे ...
translated_text: The punishment is less, my dear...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states that the punishment is "लई कमी" (lai kami - very less), without indicating any positive or negative emotion. "लई कमी" on its own doesn't convey any strong sentiment.
