Text: आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant authorities.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the Marathi phrase "आपली तक्रार संबंधित अधिकाऱ्यांपर्यंत पोहोचविण्यात आली आहे" which simply states a neutral action of forwarding a complaint without indicating any positive or negative feeling. There are no emotionally charged words present.

Text: उशिरा सुचलेलं,,,शहाण पणा ....या लोकांना आधी का सुचलं नाही ....
translated_text: A late, wise idea...why didn't these people think of it before...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, lacking overtly positive or negative indicators. While there's a hint of mild frustration, the phrase "उशिरा सुचलेलं,,,शहाण पणा" (a late, wise idea) is presented more as an observation than a critique, keeping the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: जशी मुंबई मध्ये पावसाळ्यात तुंबई होते. तशीच पुणे मध्ये सुद्धा होते काय ? कालच्या पावसावरून
translated_text: Just like Mumbai gets flooded during monsoon, does it happen in Pune too? Due to yesterday's rain
Justification: The sentence describes a comparison of rainfall conditions between Mumbai and Pune using the phrase "जशी...तशीच" (jashi...tashich), indicating a neutral observation about weather conditions rather than expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: खरोखर आपलीच मीडिया होती बहुतेक
translated_text: It was really our own media.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "आपलीच मीडिया होती" (aaplich media hoti - our own media) expresses a statement of fact or observation without any inherent positive or negative connotation. "खरोखर" (kharokhar - really) just adds emphasis, not sentiment.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत इलेक्शन हे गाव लेव्हल ला असते साहेब
translated_text: Gram Panchayat elections are held at the village level, sir.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about Gram Panchayat elections. There is no specific word or phrase that contributes to a positive or negative sentiment. The entire sentence is informational.

Text: जंगल वाचलं तर आपण वाचू म्हणून आंदोलनात सहभागी व्हा.
translated_text: Join the movement so that if the forest is saved, we will be saved.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it focuses on a conditional statement about survival, linking forest preservation to human well-being. The phrase "जंगल वाचलं तर आपण वाचू" (jungle vachla tar aapan vachu - if the forest is saved, we will be saved) presents a cause-and-effect relationship without explicitly expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: भविष्यात तुम्हाला पुन्हा अशी मोठी संधी मिळेल त्यामुळे मित्रांनो ही संधी गमावू नका.
translated_text: You will get such a big opportunity again in the future, so friends, don't miss this opportunity.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence mainly conveys information about a future opportunity and advises not to miss it. While it might be perceived as slightly positive due to the prospect of a "मोठी संधी" (mothi sandhi - big opportunity), it lacks strong positive or negative language and primarily functions as advice, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: सर तुम्ही ऑर्डर पण घेता का..???
translated_text: Sir, do you also take orders..???
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the polite and inquiring nature of "सर तुम्ही ऑर्डर पण घेता का..???" (Sir, do you also take orders???). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "घेता का" (take/accept?) is a simple question.

Text: आत्मदे आहे कि बाहेर आला....
translated_text: It is a self-imposed exile....
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual and descriptive nature; the phrase "आत्मदे आहे" (atma-de aahe), meaning "it is a self-imposed exile," simply states a situation without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: मुंबई : एसटीच्या प्रशासकीय अधिकारी, कर्मचाऱ्यांना तीन दिवसांत वेतन
translated_text: Mumbai: ST administrative officers, employees to get salary in three days
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("वेतन") about salary disbursement without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: आता बीसीसीआय पण धनंद्याला लग्नार
translated_text: Now BCCI will also marry Dhanandya
Justification: The word "लग्नार" (lagnaar), meaning "will marry," in this context, expresses a sense of future happiness or celebration associated with a marriage, thus contributing to the emotion of joy. Although the sentence is simple, the implication of marriage inherently carries positive connotations.

Text: घराणेशाहीची सुरुवात अशीच होते
translated_text: This is how dynasty begins.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "घराणेशाहीची सुरुवात अशीच होते" simply states a fact about the beginning of dynasty, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "सुरुवात अशीच होते" (suruvaat ashich hote) is a factual statement, indicating a beginning, not a judgment.

Text: उमेदवार न देता???? बरं ते मागील   -  आठवड्यापूर्वी का कळवण्यात आले नव्हते?
translated_text: Without giving a candidate???? Well, why wasn't it announced last week?
Justification: The word "???? बरं" ("???? Well") expresses surprise or mild disbelief, contributing to the overall emotion of surprise and a neutral sentiment as it questions the lack of prior announcement.

Text: त्याच कॅटेगरी मधे आहे हे वर्जन फक्त प्रो आहे.
translated_text: This version is in the same category, but is only Pro.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the statement being factual and descriptive without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "फक्त प्रो आहे" (fakt pro aahe - only Pro) simply states a feature without implying any value judgment.

Text: निकाल घोषित होण्याची वाट पहा. म्हणजे काय होते ते समजेल....
translated_text: Wait for the results to be announced. Then you will understand what happened....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states to wait for the results to understand the situation. The phrase "वाट पहा" (wait) indicates anticipation but doesn't express a positive or negative feeling.

Text: अरे पण ते काँग्रेसी होते
translated_text: Oh, but he was a Congressman.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about someone's political affiliation. The phrase "काँग्रेसी होते" (Congressi hote - was a Congressman) simply identifies a person's past association and carries no inherent positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: उमेदवाराला बळ देताय का बळ काढता ..अहो इथे मशाल निवडुन येणार लोकांचा कल तिकडेच आहे
translated_text: Are you giving strength to the candidate or taking strength away? Hey, the people who will come here to vote for Mashal are the ones who are inclined to do so.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents a question and a statement about people's inclination to vote for a particular candidate ("मशाल निवडुन येणार लोकांचा कल तिकडेच आहे"). There isn't any inherently positive or negative wording to suggest positive or negative sentiment.

Text: खरे सौंदर्य असलेल्या ललनाच फोटो टाकण्याचे धैर्य दाखवतात. बाकी फिल्टरवालीया है
translated_text: They dare to post photos of Lalna, who is truly beautiful. The rest are filter-wise.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it presents a subjective observation about beauty and photo posting habits. The phrase "खरे सौंदर्य असलेल्या ललनाच" (khare saundarya aslelya lalnaach) - "only women who have true beauty" - is descriptive but doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment, especially considering the contrasting, and somewhat derogatory, "filterwaliya hai" which implies the others rely on filters.

Text: तुमच्या सारखे मीडियावाल्यांना घरी नाही घेऊन गेले... आईच्या पाया पडताना,आईला जेवण भरवताना फोटोजीवी...
translated_text: They didn't take media people like you home... taking photos while falling at your mother's feet, while feeding your mother...
Justification: The phrase "फोटोजीवी" (photo-obsessed/living for photos) expresses anger and contempt towards the media, implying they are insincere and only interested in capturing moments for publicity.

Text: शरद पवार साहेब बोलले त्याला सुध्दा रणनीती बोलणार का
translated_text: Sharad Pawar Saheb has spoken, will he also talk about strategy?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative nature and the lack of emotionally charged words. It questions whether Sharad Pawar's statement will be considered a strategy ("रणनीती बोलणार का"), without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: माणसाची निवड चुकली की आयुष्याची बॅलन्स शीट कधीच टॅली होत नाही.
translated_text: When a person makes the wrong choice, the balance sheet of life never tallies.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about life and its consequences without exhibiting strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "कधीच टॅली होत नाही" (kadhich tally hot nahi - never tallies) indicates a lack of alignment or success, but is presented as a matter-of-fact statement rather than an expression of intense emotion.

Text: आव, स्टेज वर लोटांगण घातले तर उचलायला दोघे आता जर अर्धी भाकरी खाल्ली तर....
translated_text: Aw, if you prostrate yourself on the stage, if you both eat half of the bread to pick it up...
Justification: The Marathi word "आव" expresses a sense of disbelief or disgust, contributing to the overall negative sentiment and disgust emotion.

Text: ताई कधी पण हाक द्या सदैव सोबत
translated_text: Call me anytime, always be with me
Justification: The sentence expresses a willingness to be available and supportive, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सदैव सोबत" (sadaiw sobat - always with me) suggests support but doesn't explicitly convey joy, anger, or sadness, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुमच्याकडे पन्नास खोके आहेत ते पण सांगा
translated_text: Tell me if you have fifty boxes.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual and inquiring nature. The phrase "पन्नास खोके आहेत ते पण सांगा" (tell me if you have fifty boxes) is a simple question without inherent emotional or sentimental loading.

Text: उलट आंदोलन करू नये म्हणून पैसे घेतात टाटा,अंबानी कडुन
translated_text: On the contrary, they take money from Tata, Ambani to avoid protesting.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation without expressing positive or negative sentiment. While it describes a potentially controversial act (taking money to avoid protesting), the phrase "उलट आंदोलन करू नये म्हणून पैसे घेतात" simply reports this action, not expressing an opinion or emotion about it.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातील जनता माफीवीरला मानत नाही, गद्दारांच्या जिवावर सत्ता भोगण्याऱ्यांनी यावर पण बोलावं.
translated_text: The people of Maharashtra do not believe in the Mafiveer, those who enjoy power at the expense of the lives of traitors should also speak out on this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative opinion towards "Mafiveer" and "Gaddar," but it does so in a declarative way that doesn't strongly convey positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "मानत नाही" (manat nahi - do not believe) and the use of terms like "गद्दारांच्या" (gaddaranchya - of traitors), while critical, are presented as factual observations or arguments, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आता सप्तपदी पण करतील दोघां सोबत
translated_text: Now they will also perform Saptapadi together.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("आता सप्तपदी पण करतील दोघां सोबत" - Now they will also perform Saptapadi together). The phrase "सप्तपदी पण करतील" (Saptapadi will perform) indicates a customary ritual without expressing any specific emotion or sentiment.

Text: ती भविष्याची हमी उबाठा सेनेने दिलेली दिसत नाही.
translated_text: The Ubatha Sena does not seem to have guaranteed that future.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of guarantee ("हमी दिलेली दिसत नाही") regarding the future, making it neutral. The key phrase indicating neutrality is "हमी दिलेली दिसत नाही" (hami dileli disat nahi - doesn't seem to have guaranteed), which simply states an observation without positive or negative connotations.

Text: मलातर दोघांचे ही म्हणणे पटत आहे..
translated_text: I agree with both of them..
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement ("पटत आहे") without strong positive or negative connotations, leading to a neutral sentiment. The Marathi phrase "पटत आहे" (patat aahe) directly indicates agreement/understanding, lacking any emotional coloring, thus supporting the neutral emotion.

Text: किरीटसमय्याजी भावनाताई च्या शंभर कोटी रुपयांच्या चौकशीचे काय झाले
translated_text: What happened to the investigation of Kiritsamayaji Bhavanatai worth one hundred crore rupees?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0) because the sentence is a factual question ("काय झाले" - kay jhale - what happened?) about an investigation, expressing surprise or curiosity rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text: सगळ्यांच्या माहितीस्तव हे तोंडली नाहियेत.
translated_text: For everyone's information, this is not a mouthful.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "सगळ्यांच्या माहितीस्तव हे तोंडली नाहियेत" (for everyone's information, this is not a mouthful) is a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The lack of sentiment arises from the absence of any emotive words or subjective opinions.

Text: अमर्त्या तुमच्या गावाकडील आहे हा. मला नाही वाटत पाटील असेल म्हणून.
translated_text: Amartya is from your village. I don't think he is a Patil.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily states facts and opinions without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "मला नाही वाटत" (mala nahi vaatat) expresses a lack of certainty ("I don't think"), contributing to the overall neutral tone.

Text: जागा वाढ ही मागणी ही लावून धरावी.
translated_text: The demand for space expansion should be met.
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand without any clear positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जागा वाढ ही मागणी" (jagaa vaadh hee maaganee - the demand for space expansion) is a neutral statement of a request, lacking any emotional color.

Text: मला कधी देत आहेत
translated_text: When are you giving it to me?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question, "मला कधी देत आहेत" (mala kadhi det aahet), which translates to "When are you giving it to me?". There is no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या हल्ल्यांमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची भरपाई दिवाळीपूर्वी देण्यात यावी – वन मंत्री सुधीर मुनगंटीवार
translated_text: Compensation for damage caused by wild animal attacks should be paid before Diwali – Forest Minister Sudhir Mungantiwar
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact and a request ("देण्यात यावी" - should be given) with no inherent positive or negative sentiment. It simply reports a statement by a minister regarding compensation.

Text: उरलेले जिल्हे पण देऊन टाकायचे ना ,का ठेवलेत
translated_text: Shouldn't the remaining districts be given away too? Why are they kept?
Justification: The phrase "देऊन टाकायचे ना ,का ठेवलेत" (deun takayche na, ka thevlet) expresses sarcasm and frustration, implying dissatisfaction and anger towards the decision of keeping the remaining districts, rather than giving them away. The words "टाकायचे" (takayche - to throw away/give away carelessly) and "का ठेवलेत" (ka thevlet - why are they kept?) strongly contribute to the negative sentiment and anger.

Text: माघार का घेतली काही समजले का?
translated_text: Do you understand why you withdrew?
Justification: The phrase "काही समजले का?" (kahi samajle ka?) implies a lack of understanding or comprehension, which contributes to a sense of surprise.

Text: नड्डाजीचे पक्षात किती चालतं नामधारी राष्ट्रीय अध्यक्ष असताना.. ते सर्व देश जाणतोच
translated_text: How much does Naddaji's party run when he is the nominal national president.. the whole country knows that.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative wording. While the phrase "नामधारी राष्ट्रीय अध्यक्ष" (namdhari rashtriya adhyaksh) meaning "nominal national president" could potentially carry a negative connotation depending on context, without further elaboration or judgmental adjectives, it simply states a fact or observation without expressing explicit sentiment. The statement "ते सर्व देश जाणतोच" (te sarva desh janatoch) meaning "the whole country knows that" further reinforces this neutrality by presenting the situation as common knowledge rather than an opinion.

Text: अरे मला का ब्लॉक केला आहे...?? मी तर कधी काही बोलत नाही आदू ला.
translated_text: Oh, why have you blocked me...?? I never say anything to Adu.
Justification: The word "का" (ka - why) in the sentence "अरे मला का ब्लॉक केला आहे...?? (Are mala ka block kela aahe...??)" strongly indicates surprise, as it expresses a questioning of the reason for being blocked.

Text: निवडणूक आयोग घटनात्मक संस्था आयोगाचं काम अध्यक्षांच्या कामापेक्षा वेगळं निवडणूक आयोगाचे वकील दातार यांचा युक्तीवाद
translated_text: Election Commission is a constitutional body. The work of the Commission is different from the work of the President. This is the argument of Election Commission lawyer Datar.
Justification: The sentence primarily describes factual information regarding the Election Commission and legal arguments, lacking any emotionally charged or opinionated words. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase contributing to positive or negative sentiment; the language used is objective and descriptive.

Text: तुम्ही मूर्ख समजत असाल पण जनता सूज्ञ आहे
translated_text: You may think you are stupid, but the people are wise.
Justification: The sentence expresses contrasting opinions ("मूर्ख" - stupid vs. "सूज्ञ" - wise) but lacks strong positive or negative indicators overall, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: अशी विधाने करत रहा मोदी पुनः पुन्हा येत राहतील
translated_text: Keep making such statements, Modi will keep coming back again and again.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it simply states a potential outcome based on certain actions. The Marathi phrase "येत राहतील" (yet rahatil - will keep coming) doesn't express any strong positive or negative feeling in itself, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: माननीय आयुक्तांना,महापौरांना विनंती आहे,कि हात धुण्यासाठी पाणीपूरवठा योग्य दाबाने आणि दररोज करावा.
translated_text: We request the Honorable Commissioner and Mayor to provide water supply for washing hands at the proper pressure and every day.
Justification: The sentence expresses a polite request using phrases like "माननीय...विनंती आहे" (honorable...we request), indicating a neutral sentiment rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: आहेत का हे आपले
translated_text: Are these yours?
Justification: The sentence "आहेत का हे आपले" (Are these yours?) expresses a simple question without any inherent positive or negative connotations. The questioning nature, signaled by "का" ("ka"), contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: काँग्रेस अध्यक्षपदाच्या शर्यतीत शशी थरुर बाजी मारतील का ?
translated_text: Will Shashi Tharoor win the race for the post of Congress President?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("बाजी मारतील का?") about a future event with no inherent positive or negative connotation. The phrase "बाजी मारतील का?" expressing a simple inquiry about a possible outcome, contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: बंदी म्हणजे प्राॅव्हीडंड फंडाच्या व्याजावर   वर्षे बंदी असे एकजण बोलत होता
translated_text: Someone was saying that the ban means a ban on provident fund interest for years.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply reports someone's statement ("असे एकजण बोलत होता") about a potential ban ("बंदी") without expressing any opinion or emotion about it.

Text: शिवसेना नेते बबन घोलप यांच्याविषयी ही आहे शिंदे गटाची भूमिका
translated_text: This is the position of the Shinde group regarding Shiv Sena leader Baban Gholap.
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral statement of fact regarding a political position. There are no inherently positive or negative words used. The Marathi words "शिंदे गटाची भूमिका" (Shinde Gatachi Bhumika - Shinde group's position) simply describe a stance or opinion without implying any particular sentiment.

Text: त्याला गुजरातवरुन माल येतोय , त्यामुळ अशी अवस्था आहे
translated_text: He is getting goods from Gujarat, that is why the situation is like this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of events; "त्याला गुजरातवरुन माल येतोय, त्यामुळ अशी अवस्था आहे" simply states a cause-and-effect relationship without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: संवेदनशील खा. डॉ. प्रितमताईसाहेब गोपीनाथजी मुंडे आष्टी तालुक्यात शेतकर्यांच्या बांधावर; अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची पाहणी!
translated_text: Sensitive Food. Dr. Pritamtaisaheb Gopinathji Munde on the farmers' dam in Ashti taluka; Inspecting the damage caused by heavy rain!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes an action (inspection) by a politician, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. While "संवेदनशील" (sensitive) might suggest some positive leaning, it's used as a descriptive title and doesn't evoke strong emotion in this context. The rest of the sentence is factual and descriptive.

Text: जरा वेगळ्याच आहेत का
translated_text: Are they a little different?
Justification: The word "वेगळ्याच" (veglyaach), meaning "different/unusual" with an added emphasis of unexpectedness, contributes to the surprise emotion.

Text: पका काय झालं रं हे..... काकणं फोडून घे ....
translated_text: What the hell happened..... break it, uncle...
Justification: The phrase "पका काय झालं रं हे....." (paka kay zala ra he....) expressing frustration and exasperation indicates anger.

Text: नकली लोकांची नक्कल करण्यात काय हरकत आहे बरं!!
translated_text: What's wrong with imitating fake people?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "नकली लोकांची नक्कल करण्यात काय हरकत आहे बरं!!" poses a rhetorical question ("काय हरकत आहे बरं!!"), which doesn't express a positive or negative sentiment directly. There's no explicitly positive or negative wording, just an inquiry.

Text: हिवाळ्या मुळे डिशेम्बरपासून पुण्याच हिमवर्षा होणार आहे
translated_text: Pune will experience snowfall from December due to winter
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual prediction ("हिवाळ्या मुळे डिशेम्बरपासून पुण्याच हिमवर्षा होणार आहे" - Pune will experience snowfall from December due to winter) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: आता आतली चड्डी बेल्टच्या खालीच असते ना...
translated_text: Now the underwear is just below the belt...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual observation: "आता आतली चड्डी बेल्टच्या खालीच असते ना..." (Now the underwear is just below the belt...). There is no emotionally charged language or opinion expressed.

Text: मग हाच प्रश्न उपस्थित होत आहे,....यांचे बाळासाहेब कोणते...???
translated_text: Then the question arises,....which Balasaheb is this...???
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and the emotion is surprise because the phrase "कोणते...???" (konte...???) implying "which...???" suggests a questioning and bewildered tone, indicating surprise at the multiple possible identities of "Balasaheb."

Text: थोडं थांबा, हळूहळू सगळं च बाहेर येईल. आणि, ते ही त्यांची च मंडळी बाहेर काढेल.
translated_text: Wait a little, everything will gradually come out. And, they will also take out their own people.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it mainly describes a process of information coming out and people being exposed, without any explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrases "थोडं थांबा" (wait a little), "हळूहळू" (gradually), and "बाहेर येईल" (will come out) are descriptive and don't inherently carry any emotional weight.

Text: भूमरे बोल रहा हे ये दुल्हा गुजरात का हे ओर भाषा मराठी हे
translated_text: Bhumare bol raha he ye dulha gujarat ka he or bhasha marathi he
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states facts about a person and language. There is no sentiment expressed; it only provides information ("ye dulha gujarat ka he or bhasha marathi he"). Therefore, no specific Marathi word contributes to a sentiment. The sentence primarily uses Hindi, not Marathi.

Text: “हा चित्रपट…” ‘कांतारा’ पाहिल्यानंतर मराठमोळ्या अभिनेत्याची ‘ती’ पोस्ट चर्चेत
translated_text: “This movie…” After watching ‘Kantara’, Marathi actor’s ‘that’ post is in the news
Justification: The sentence is largely descriptive, reporting that an actor's post is in the news after watching "Kantara." There are no specific Marathi words indicating positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "चर्चेत" (charchyet - in the news/discussion) simply indicates that the post is being talked about, not whether the discussion is positive or negative.

Text: हे सुख आता दुर्मिळ झालयं.
translated_text: These pleasures are now rare.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "दुर्मिळ झालयं" (durmil zhalay) meaning "become rare", simply states a fact about the pleasures being less common, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुमच्या साठी आहे हे
translated_text: This is for you.
Justification: The sentence "तुमच्या साठी आहे हे" is neutral because it is a statement of fact. No specific word or phrase carries an inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: नोटबुक: कायम सोबत राहील असे गिफ्ट चिमणाकडून
translated_text: Notebook: A gift from a chimpanzee that will stay with you forever
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about a gift ("कायम सोबत राहील असे गिफ्ट चिमणाकडून" - a gift that will stay with you forever) without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: तरी अपक्ष म्हणून निवडणूक लढावायचीच .. कुणी सांगा तिचं मत तुम्हालाच मिळल !
translated_text: Still, I want to contest the election as an independent.. Someone tell me, you will get her vote!
Justification: The phrase "तरी अपक्ष म्हणून निवडणूक लढावायचीच" expresses the speaker's stubbornness and determination to contest the election independently, despite any potential obstacles. The emphatic suffix "च" (chi) added to "लढावायची" (ladhavayachi) intensifies the desire to fight the election. This is interpreted as the root cause for the anger as the speaker is being defiant even if it is not beneficial.

Text: “वर्षा बंगला सोडायचा होता तेव्हा..,” संदीपान भुमरेंची उद्धव ठाकरेंवर टीका, म्हणाले मुलगी सासरी…
translated_text: "When Varsha wanted to leave the bungalow.." Sandipan Bhumre criticizes Uddhav Thackeray, says daughter-in-law...
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the context suggesting internal conflicts and criticisms using the phrase "टीका, म्हणाले मुलगी सासरी..." (criticizes, says daughter-in-law...), hinting at potentially unpleasant family or personal issues being brought into the political sphere.

Text: पालघरच्या प्रस्तावित क्रीडा संकूलाचे काम युद्धपातळीवर करा, मंत्री रवींद्र चव्हाणांच्या सूचना
translated_text: Minister Ravindra Chavan instructs to complete the proposed sports complex in Palghar on a war footing
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of instruction from a minister, "सूचना" (suchana, instructions), without any overtly positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सगळीकडे च आहे वातावरण तर सारख तसच बनून असते
translated_text: The atmosphere is the same everywhere.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a consistent state of the atmosphere ("सारख तसच बनून असते" - sarakh tasach banun aste - remains the same), without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: पुरातन काळात रोड बनवताना, एक निएन्डरथल मनुष्य
translated_text: A Neanderthal man building a road in ancient times
Justification: The sentence describes a historical event without expressing any positive or negative feelings. There is no specific word or phrase that indicates any particular sentiment or emotion, hence its neutrality. The sentence is simply factual and descriptive: "पुरातन काळात रोड बनवताना, एक निएन्डरथल मनुष्य".

Text: हे खूप लोकांना अडीच वर्षांपूर्वी सुध्दा कळले, पण तुम्ही घातलेल्या चष्म्यामुळे तुम्हास दिसले नाही.
translated_text: Many people knew this even two and a half years ago, but you didn't see it because of the glasses you were wearing.
Justification: The sentence expresses a fact with mild criticism but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तुम्ही घातलेल्या चष्म्यामुळे तुम्हास दिसले नाही" (you didn't see it because of the glasses you were wearing) suggests a reason for the lack of awareness, but doesn't convey a significant emotional charge, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: मावशी सध्या पाऊस भरपूर आहे
translated_text: Aunty, it is raining a lot right now.
Justification: The sentence "मावशी सध्या पाऊस भरपूर आहे" is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact. It describes the current weather condition ("पाऊस भरपूर आहे" - raining a lot) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. "मावशी" (Aunty) is a term of address and also does not contribute to any emotion.

Text: माहित आहे त्या वेळेस मी म्हणालो सुद्धा होतो, करणे .
translated_text: You know, at that time I even said, "I will do it."
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of intent or recollection. The Marathi phrase "माहित आहे" (mahit aahe - you know) and "म्हणालो सुद्धा होतो" (mhanalo suddha hoto - even said) indicate a neutral tone with no strong positive or negative emotional indicators. The phrase "करणे" (karne - to do) further reinforces this neutral sentiment as it only conveys intention.

Text: उणीदुणी ला उणीधुणी लिहीलं आहे नागपूरकरांनी
translated_text: Nagpuris have written Uniduni for Uniduni.
Justification: The sentence "उणीदुणी ला उणीधुणी लिहीलं आहे नागपूरकरांनी" expresses a simple statement of fact or observation about a spelling discrepancy, lacking any sentiment or emotional charge. The neutral sentiment arises from the factual nature of the sentence; there are no words denoting positive or negative feelings.

Text: तुमची उमेदवारी पण लागलीच जाहीर करून टाका
translated_text: Declare your candidacy immediately.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply a suggestion or instruction ("जाहीर करून टाका" - declare immediately) without any inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "जाहीर करून टाका" is a call to action but lacks emotional charge, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: विद्यार्थी जिल्हाध्यक्ष सुजित उपरे व आदी मान्यवर उपस्थित होते..!
translated_text: Student District President Sujit Upare and other dignitaries were present..!
Justification: The sentence is neutral, but the presence of dignitaries ("मान्यवर") suggests a positive event, hinting at joy in those involved or attending, although it is subtle. While not strongly indicative of emotion, the word "मान्यवर" leans slightly positive.

Text: शी जिनपिंग     दिवसांपासून चीन बाहेर पडलेला नाही, म्हणजे हा तर जागतिक
translated_text: Xi Jinping hasn't left China since the days, so this is global.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact ("शी जिनपिंग दिवसांपासून चीन बाहेर पडलेला नाही") without any explicit positive or negative connotations. The statement "म्हणजे हा तर जागतिक" (so this is global) simply acknowledges the potential worldwide implications of the situation, not conveying a positive or negative feeling.

Text: सर्व क्षेत्रीय कार्यालयांमध्ये उद्या होणार जनसंवाद सभा
translated_text: Public dialogue meetings will be held tomorrow in all regional offices.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual event: "सर्व क्षेत्रीय कार्यालयांमध्ये उद्या होणार जनसंवाद सभा" (Public dialogue meetings will be held tomorrow in all regional offices). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment.

Text: एक निशाणी मिळाली तर इतके बोलता मग उद्या पराभूत झालात तर काय करला?
translated_text: If you get a sign, you talk so much, but what if you lose tomorrow?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the sarcastic and dismissive tone conveyed by the phrase "इतके बोलता मग उद्या पराभूत झालात तर काय करला?", implying disbelief and contempt for the subject's boasting, especially if they are to lose. This suggests a feeling of disgust.

Text: प्राण जाये पर वचन न जाये...हे कोण्यातरी महापुरुषानी म्हंटले आहे...!
translated_text: Life may be lost but promises may not be lost... This has been said by some great man...!
Justification: The phrase "महापुरुषानी" (great man) implies admiration and respect, contributing to a positive feeling, therefore justifying a sentiment score leaning toward neutral and the emotion of joy.

Text: मराठी येत नाही का?
translated_text: Don't you know Marathi?
Justification: The sentence "मराठी येत नाही का?" expressing a question about someone's knowledge of Marathi, carries a neutral sentiment because the question itself, even though it might imply some surprise, doesn't contain overtly positive or negative wording. The key phrase contributing to this neutrality is "येत नाही का?", which simply questions the ability to speak Marathi.

Text: अति मराठी मालिका आणि चित्रपट बघितल्याचा परीणाम.
translated_text: The result of watching too many Marathi serials and movies.
Justification: The sentence describes a consequence of watching many shows and movies. The neutral sentiment is driven by the descriptive and factual tone of the sentence, lacking any inherently positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrase "अति मराठी मालिका आणि चित्रपट बघितल्याचा परीणाम" simply states a cause-and-effect relationship without expressing an opinion or emotion.

Text: हास्यजत्रेत का नाही येत आहेस??
translated_text: Why aren't you coming to the comedy festival??
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a tinge of surprise as indicated by the rhetorical question "का नाही येत आहेस??", which translates to "Why aren't you coming?". This phrasing implies an expectation or assumption that the person should be coming, hence the element of surprise. The question itself doesn't express a positive or negative sentiment, keeping it neutral.

Text: कोण आहे तात्रींक मात्रींक की गारूडी.
translated_text: Who is the father, mother or Garuda?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. There isn't any specific word or phrase that expresses a sentiment. It is simply asking "Who is the father, mother or Garuda?", which does not inherently carry any positive or negative emotion. Thus, the entire sentence "कोण आहे तात्रींक मात्रींक की गारूडी" contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: हां... हे महत्त्वाचं आहे बघा साहेब
translated_text: Yes... this is important, sir.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it acknowledges importance ("महत्त्वाचं आहे"), the overall tone is simply stating a fact and there's no indication of positive or negative emotion. "महत्त्वाचं आहे" (important is) in this context is a neutral statement.

Text: सगळा सेट अप झाल्यावर विचारणार का
translated_text: Will you ask after everything is set up?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and speculative tone, with no inherent positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "विचारणार का" (vicharnar ka - will you ask?) simply poses a question about a future action, lacking any emotional charge.

Text: मी ... ह्यातून काय समाज प्रबोधन होणार हे त्यांनाच ठाऊक ...
translated_text: I...only they know what kind of social enlightenment this will bring...
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and leaves the outcome open-ended. The phrase "...ह्यातून काय समाज प्रबोधन होणार हे त्यांनाच ठाऊक..." (only they know what kind of social enlightenment this will bring) lacks a strong positive or negative indicator, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: असं पण होतं का?
translated_text: Did that even happen?
Justification: The phrase "असं पण होतं का?" (as pan hotan ka?) expresses surprise as it questions the possibility of something happening, indicating disbelief or wonder.

Text: कोणकोणत्या जिल्ह्यातून जाणार आहे त्याची माहिती द्या लोकांना येवढं तरी करा.
translated_text: At least let people know which district you are going to pass through.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a request for information ("माहिती द्या") and lacks any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: मिजोराम ,सिक्किम व गोव्यात गोहत्याप्रतिबंधक कायदा लागु झाला आहे का ?
translated_text: Has the anti-cow slaughter law been implemented in Mizoram, Sikkim and Goa?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question asking about the implementation of a law. There's no specific word indicating a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गोहत्याप्रतिबंधक कायदा लागु झाला आहे का ?" (gohahatyapratibandhak kayda lagu jhala aahe ka?) - "Has the anti-cow slaughter law been implemented?" is a neutral inquiry.

Text: हलाल मुक्त दिपावली साजरी करू.अशी उत्पादने विकत घेऊ नये .
translated_text: Let's celebrate a halal-free Diwali. Don't buy such products.
Justification: The phrase "हलाल मुक्त" (halal-free) implies a rejection of products associated with a specific religious practice, suggesting disgust towards those products and practices.

Text: || सर्व मंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके । शरन्ये त्रयम्बिके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते ||
translated_text: || Sarva Mangalye Shiva Sarvartha Sadhika. Sharanye Tryambike Gauri Narayani Namostute ||
Justification: The sentence is a religious verse expressing reverence and seeking blessings. While positive in tone, it doesn't express overt positive sentiment that would warrant a positive classification. It's a devotional prayer. No single word dictates negativity, hence the neutral score. The entire verse is more of a salutation.

Text: प्रितिमेचा नाही प्रतिमेचा दुरूस्ती करावी..
translated_text: The image should be corrected, not the image.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the objective statement of needing to correct an image ("दुरूस्ती करावी"). The phrase "दुरूस्ती करावी" simply indicates a need for correction without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: ह्या घटनेचं आणि परवा पाणी भरल्याचा काही संबंध असू शकतो का? दुकानदारांनी काळजी घ्यावी.
translated_text: Could this incident have anything to do with the water being filled the day before? Shopkeepers should be careful.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily poses a question ("संबंध असू शकतो का?") and offers a general suggestion ("काळजी घ्यावी") without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrases "संबंध असू शकतो का?" and "काळजी घ्यावी" are indicative of inquiry and caution, respectively, but don't carry inherently positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मल्लिकार्जुन खरगे हायकमांड म्हणून गांधी कुटुंबाच्या प्रभावातून बाहेर पडणार का?
translated_text: Will Mallikarjun Kharge break free from the Gandhi family's influence as high command?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about a potential future action ("पडणार का?") without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The core of the sentence is simply inquiring about Mallikarjun Kharge's future role ("मल्लिकार्जुन खरगे...बाहेर पडणार का?").

Text: संजय राठोड ची अश्या प्रकारे दखल घेतील का पोलिस मित्र
translated_text: Will police friends take notice of Sanjay Rathod in this way?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question ("घेतील का") about a potential action ("दखल घेतील") without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity. There's no specific word indicating a positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: तुम्ही हुकमी एक्का आहेत
translated_text: You are the ace of spades.
Justification: The sentence "तुम्ही हुकमी एक्का आहेत" uses the phrase "हुकमी एक्का" which translates to "ace of spades" or a "masterstroke," a neutral statement of fact or capability rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: बौद्ध समाज नाही, बौद्ध धर्म म्हणत चला
translated_text: Let's call it Buddhism, not Buddhist society.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a factual suggestion, lacking positive or negative emotional markers. The Marathi phrase "म्हणत चला" (mhaṇat chalā - let's call it) indicates a suggestion or direction, not an expression of feeling.

Text: तसेच देश तोंडाच्या वाफेवर चालत नाही, श्रमिकांच्या श्रमावर चलतो
translated_text: Similarly, the country does not run on the backs of its mouth, it runs on the labor of its workers.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about how a country functions, contrasting empty talk ("तोंडाच्या वाफेवर") with the importance of labor ("श्रमिकांच्या श्रमावर"). The phrase "श्रमिकांच्या श्रमावर चलतो" emphasizes the contribution of workers without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: हे महाशय कोण आहेत
translated_text: Who is this gentleman?
Justification: The Marathi word "कोण" (kon - who) indicates a question and lack of prior knowledge, contributing to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: याची माईंडसेट पाकिस्तानी आहे असे वाटते.
translated_text: I think this mindset is Pakistani.
Justification: The sentence expresses an opinion or observation about someone's mindset, labeling it as "Pakistani" ("पाकिस्तानी"). While potentially carrying negative connotations depending on context, the statement itself doesn't explicitly express positive or negative sentiment; it's presented as an observation, leading to a neutral sentiment.

translated_text: Institute directors Kailash Sonawane, Kishore Suryavanshi, Dhananjay Khairnar, Somnath Kasar were present. ......................................................................................
Justification: The sentence simply lists individuals present. There are no words or phrases indicating a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is factual and neutral, lacking emotional content. Hence, the Marathi phrase "उपस्थित होते" (upasthit hote - were present) contributes to the neutrality as it simply describes a state of being.

Text: पटकथेला मान्यता देणाऱ्या पडताळणी समितीतल्या सर्वचर्व सदस्यांची चौकशी ही विद्यापीठ प्रशासनाने करावी.
translated_text: The university administration should investigate all members of the vetting committee that approved the script.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase. The sentence states a suggestion ("चौकशी ही विद्यापीठ प्रशासनाने करावी" - "The university administration should investigate"), which is neutral in tone.

Text: श्री स्वामी रामानंदतीर्थ हे आणखी एक माझ्या अल्प माहितीतलं.
translated_text: Shri Swami Ramananda Tirtha is another one I know little about.
Justification: The phrase "अल्प माहितीतलं" (alpa mahititla) meaning "little known" suggests a neutral stance as it simply conveys a lack of deep familiarity.

Text: पण तुम्ही तुमच्या चॅनेल वर हे दाखवणार का???
translated_text: But will you show this on your channel???
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question inquiring about future broadcasting plans. The Marathi phrase "दाखवणार का???" (dakhavnar ka???) which translates to "will you show?" is a direct question and doesn't express any specific emotion or sentiment.

Text: त्या वादळ मधे    किलो वजनी कचरा घेऊन जायची ताकत असेल का??
translated_text: Will that storm have the strength to carry kilos of garbage?
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the mention of "कचरा" (kachara), which translates to "garbage." This word evokes feelings of revulsion and uncleanliness, hence the disgust emotion and negative sentiment.

Text: पॉवरकट बापाची पोरगी आहे ना ही?
translated_text: Powercut is a father's child, isn't it?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question implying the powercut is frequent and expected. The phrase "बापाची पोरगी आहे ना ही?" (baapachi porgi aahe naa hi?) which translates to "father's child, isn't it?" suggests that it's naturally occurring and predictable, leading to a neutral sentiment as it's a common observation, not necessarily positive or negative.

Text: दगडूशेठ मंदिराकडे आहे का पाऊस ?? काय परिस्थिती तिकडे सांगाल का
translated_text: Is there rain near Dagdusheth temple?? Can you tell me what the situation is there?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple inquiry about the weather near a specific location. The phrase "काय परिस्थिती तिकडे सांगाल का" (kay paristhiti tikade sangal ka) - "Can you tell me what the situation is there?" - indicates a request for information, lacking any emotional or opinionated content.

Text: म्हणूनच नावं गोंधवल होते हातावर का
translated_text: That's why the names were mixed up on the hands.
Justification: The sentence " म्हणूनच नावं गोंधवल होते हातावर का" is neutral because it describes a situation ("names were mixed up") without expressing any clear positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गोंधवल होते" (mixed up) indicates confusion but doesn't inherently carry a strong emotion.

Text: गाव जेवल्यावर जलेबी मागत आहे ‌
translated_text: The village is asking for jalebi after dinner.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action (asking for jalebi), and no specific word or phrase expresses positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गाव जेवल्यावर जलेबी मागत आहे" describes a factual event without any emotional coloring.

Text: हे हिंदुत्ववादी आहेत म्हणे
translated_text: They say they are Hindutva supporters.
Justification: The phrase "हे हिंदुत्ववादी आहेत म्हणे" (he Hindutvavadi aahet mhane) expresses a statement with a degree of hearsay or doubt indicated by "म्हणे" (mhane - they say/allegedly). This lack of conviction and the distanced reporting of the statement prevents a positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: मुत्सद्दीपणाचा निर्णय! मनपा निवडणुकीनंतर भाजप, बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना आणि मनसेची युती होणार!
translated_text: Diplomatic decision! After the municipal elections, there will be an alliance between BJP, Balasaheb's Shiv Sena and MNS!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly reports a potential political development. The phrase "मुत्सद्दीपणाचा निर्णय!" (diplomatic decision!) simply describes the decision, without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हेच मुंबई विषयी बोलताना का नाही सुचत तुम्हाला
translated_text: Why don't you suggest this when talking about Mumbai?
Justification: The sentence "हेच मुंबई विषयी बोलताना का नाही सुचत तुम्हाला" is neutral because it's a question expressing inquiry or lack of understanding, not expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "का नाही सुचत तुम्हाला" (why don't you suggest this) indicates a simple question rather than an opinion or feeling.

Text: सुडाचे राजकारण महाराष्ट्रातील करीत आहेत.
translated_text: They are playing revenge politics in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact or observation ("सुडाचे राजकारण" - revenge politics) without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment or associated emotion.

Text: आता दुसरं काही कार्य राहिलं आहे का त्यांच्या कडे
translated_text: Do they have any other work left to do now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple inquiry about someone's remaining tasks, indicated by the phrase "आता दुसरं काही कार्य राहिलं आहे का" (ata dusara kahi karya rahile aahe ka), lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: ठरवून आहे..असच वाटतय..
translated_text: It's decided..I think so..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "असच वाटतय" (asach vaattay), which translates to "I think so," indicating a lack of strong positive or negative feeling and a sense of uncertainty or mild assumption.

Text: एखादा नेता कुठे एकटा जातो असे मी तरी आजपर्यंत नाही एकले
translated_text: I have never been alone, as a leader goes somewhere alone.
Justification: The phrase "असे मी तरी आजपर्यंत नाही एकले" (ase mi tari aajparyant nahi ekle) which translates to "I have never heard of it until today" expresses a sense of disbelief or surprise linked to the leader being alone, indirectly suggesting the speaker's sadness or concern due to the unusual situation. The 'नाही' (nahi - not) within the phrase is key to identifying the negative sentiment implied here.

Text: कश्या प्रकारे अद्दल घडवली होती रे? जरा सविस्तर सांगतो का?
translated_text: How was the change made? Can you tell me in detail?
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it primarily asks for details ("जरा सविस्तर सांगतो का?") about how something was changed. There is no explicitly positive or negative phrasing.

Text: जेलमध्ये गेल्यानंतर काहींचा माफीनामा पण उफाळून येतो
translated_text: Some people's apology letters also surface after going to jail.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation without overtly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "जेलमध्ये गेल्यानंतर" (after going to jail) and "माफीनामा पण उफाळून येतो" (apology letters also surface) simply describe a phenomenon, without expressing judgment or emotion. Therefore, the sentence is neutral.

Text: महाराजांच्या घोड्याची सकाळ दुपारच्या वेळी नव्हती होत
translated_text: The Maharaja's horse was not in the morning at noon.
Justification: The sentence is nonsensical and factual, lacking any emotionally charged Marathi words or phrases, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The lack of a coherent meaning prevents any specific word from conveying emotion.

Text: हे पण सांगा की
translated_text: Tell me this too.
Justification: The sentence "हे पण सांगा की" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple request for information. The phrase "सांगा की" (saanga ki) meaning "tell me" is a neutral request, lacking any positive or negative connotation.

Text: चिव शेणिक हो आता आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे....
translated_text: Hey Chiv Shenik, now we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a political objective: "हरवायचे आहे" (haravayache aahe - have to defeat) indicates a goal without conveying strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: नामा म्हणे देवा दिवस नाही आता त्वरें वेगीं संतां सिद्ध करा
translated_text: It is not the day to say Nama, O God, now quickly prove the saints.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "नाही आता" (nahi aata), meaning "not now," which expresses a sense of urgency and perhaps disappointment or desperation indicating sadness.

Text: भगतसिंग यांच्या जयंतीपूर्वी त्यांना आदरांजली देण्यासाठी एक महत्त्वाचा निर्णय घेण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: An important decision has been taken to pay tribute to Bhagat Singh before his birth anniversary.
Justification: The sentence uses "आदरांजली देण्यासाठी" (aadaranzali denyasathi), which translates to "to pay tribute." While respectful, it doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment in this context. The overall tone is informational and neutral.

Text: मोदी ची आदेश होता , तुला अस म्हणायचय का??
translated_text: It was Modi's order, do you really want to say that??
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "तुला अस म्हणायचय का??" (tula asa mhanaycha ahe ka??), which questions if the listener truly wants to imply that it was Modi's order, indicating disbelief or surprise at the statement's implication.

Text: या आगीचा शेवट      पर्यंत होणार
translated_text: This fire will end.
Justification: The assigned emotion "anger" likely stems from the phrase "आगीचा शेवट" (aagicha shevat) meaning "the end of the fire". While the sentence appears neutral, the implication of needing an end to the fire, especially expressed as "shevat," suggests a frustration or anger related to the ongoing fire and the desire for its termination.

Text: अग तु मला आधी हे सांग तू का माझ पहिले ब्लॉक
translated_text: Oh, tell me first, why are you my first block?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "पहिला ब्लॉक" (pahila block) which implies an unexpected action of being blocked for the first time.

Text: विरोधकांचा म्हणजे बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेचा मानायचेय काय
translated_text: Should we believe the opposition, meaning Balasaheb's Shiv Sena?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and lack of emotionally charged words. The question "काय" ("kay" - what/should) presents the statement as a query rather than an assertion of any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मी घेतला होता. आता काय बोलणार यावर. बोल शोणाली बोल
translated_text: I had taken it. Now what will you say? Speak, Shonali.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and conversational nature of the statement, lacking overtly positive or negative indicators. The phrase "मी घेतला होता" (I had taken it) and the subsequent question "आता काय बोलणार यावर?" (Now what will you say?) are neutral in tone, simply stating a past action and prompting a response. The final instruction "बोल शोणाली बोल" (Speak, Shonali, speak) is also neutral as it is merely a direction to speak.

Text: त्यांना माहीत आहे टोमणा की कदर....
translated_text: They know the value of ridicule....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states awareness of "टोमणा" (ridicule) or "कदर" (value), without explicitly endorsing or condemning either. The statement itself is observational rather than emotional.

Text: मोदी ला नवाज शरीफ ही जवळचे वाटणे रक्तस्वाभाविक आहे.
translated_text: It is in Modi's blood that he feels close to Nawaz Sharif.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a perceived fact ("रक्तस्वाभाविक आहे" - is in the blood/natural) about Modi's closeness to Nawaz Sharif, without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: काही कुत्रे नुसते वासावर आहेत हे कळाले..
translated_text: It turns out that some dogs are just scent-dependent.
Justification: The sentence "काही कुत्रे नुसते वासावर आहेत हे कळाले.." is neutral because it simply states a fact ("हे कळाले" - it became known) about some dogs being dependent on scent ("नुसते वासावर आहेत"). There's no explicit positive or negative feeling associated with this observation.

Text: हे खरे बाळासाहेब आहेत शिंदे गटाचे
translated_text: This is the real Balasaheb of the Shinde group.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact or opinion about the Shinde group's claim of being the true inheritors of Balasaheb Thackeray's legacy. The phrase "हे खरे बाळासाहेब आहेत शिंदे गटाचे" (he khare Balasaheb aahet Shinde gatache) expresses this claim without any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्याची बोलती बंद आणि उपमुख्यमंत्री मजा घेत कसे हसत आहेत बघा
translated_text: The Chief Minister's speech is off and the Deputy Chief Minister is having fun and laughing.
Justification: "मजा घेत" (maja ghet) indicates enjoyment and amusement, contributing to the overall positive feeling of joy. Even though the sentence describes a potentially negative situation (Chief Minister's speech being off), the focus on the Deputy Chief Minister's enjoyment with the word "मजा" makes the overall emotion joyful.

Text: लोकांची मनेच आता पेटली आहेत आत्ता काय करणार.... विझवणार....
translated_text: People's hearts are on fire now. What will we do now.... to extinguish it....
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "पेटली आहेत" (petali aahet), which translates to "are on fire." This conveys a sense of intense anger and unrest.

Text: अनजीच्या विचाराने चालत आहेत..
translated_text: They are walking with Anji's thoughts..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply describes an action ("चालत आहेत") of following someone's thoughts ("अनजीच्या विचाराने"). There is no emotionally charged word or phrase.

Text: भीती बोलतेय. भविष्यातली युतीही
translated_text: Fear is speaking. Future alliances too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states "Fear is speaking" ("भीती बोलतेय"). While "भीती" (fear) implies a negative concept, the sentence lacks strong emotional cues and presents it as a statement of fact. There is no specific positive or negative connotation to future alliances ("भविष्यातली युतीही").

Text: हा चु...की तुम्ही, ते निवडून आलेले आहेत तु चा.. आमदार
translated_text: This is your mistake, they are your elected MLAs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of a mistake ("chuki" meaning mistake) and the statement about elected officials without any strong emotional expression.

Text: तुम्ही भावाच्या नावाने चालू केलंय...संजय राठोड आणि यांचा संबंध नाही
translated_text: You started it in your brother's name...Sanjay Rathod and he are not related.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact and a lack of relationship. The phrase "संबंध नाही" (sambandh nahi) meaning "not related" indicates a neutral statement of fact, devoid of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कालच्या पावसाने पुणे महानगरपालिकेतील रस्त्यावरच्या पाण्याची पातळी किती होती ??
translated_text: What was the water level on the roads in Pune Municipal Corporation due to yesterday's rain?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question about water levels: the core content focuses on objectively seeking information represented through the Marathi phrase "पाण्याची पातळी किती होती" (paanyaachi paatali kiti hoti), meaning "what was the water level".

Text: घटनापिठाचा मोठ्ठा निर्णय....
translated_text: Big decision of the Constitutional Court....
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "मोठ्ठा निर्णय" (motha nirnay - big decision) simply describes a significant decision without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: हिच लोकं राहुल गांधींची यात्रा जास्त प्रसिध्द करणार आहेत...
translated_text: These are the people who are going to make Rahul Gandhi's yatra more popular...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about people promoting Rahul Gandhi's Yatra, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. There isn't a specific word triggering emotion. The sentence is purely informational.

Text: हा संशोधनाचा विषय आहे
translated_text: This is a research topic.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any subjective elements, thus being neutral. The phrase "हा संशोधनाचा विषय आहे" (ha sanshodhnacha vishay aahe) simply states a topic and doesn't convey any positive, negative, or emotional feeling.

Text: का पळून जाणार आहेत असं वातावरण आहे की काय ?
translated_text: Is there an atmosphere where they are going to run away?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question expressing doubt and doesn't contain any inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "का पळून जाणार आहेत असं वातावरण आहे की काय ?" (ka palun janar aahet asa vatavaran aahe ki kay?), which questions whether there's an atmosphere suggesting people will run away, doesn't express a specific sentiment.

Text: यांच्या भाऊबंदामुळे तर होत नसेल ना ????
translated_text: Wouldn't it be because of their brotherhood????
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and a possible cause without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "होत नसेल ना ????" (hot nasel na ????) indicates a question and speculation, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: काय ट्वीट होत?? डिलीट केल
translated_text: What's going on with the tweet?? Delete it.
Justification: The Marathi phrase "काय ट्वीट होत??" (kay tweet hot??) expresses surprise and disbelief, contributing to the surprise emotion. The double question marks further amplify this feeling.

Text: जसा बारका तशी ही... दोघेही रडके
translated_text: Just like Baraka... both of them are crying.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes a state of crying ("रडके"), without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. The word "रडके" indicates a tendency to cry, but doesn't inherently convey a positive or negative judgment in this context.

Text: आणि हुडको ही प्रमाणे मध्ये आहे.
translated_text: And Hudco is in the same category.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("आणि हुडको ही प्रमाणे मध्ये आहे" - And Hudco is in the same category) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "प्रमाणे मध्ये आहे" (pramane madhye aahe - in the same category) is descriptive and lacks sentiment.

Text: पहिल्या पासुनच सहानुभूती आहे
translated_text: There is sympathy from the very beginning.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "सहनुभूती आहे" (sahanubhuti aahe) which means "there is sympathy," is a factual statement lacking strong positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: त्यांना हे बाेलायला किती पैसे दिले तुझ्या पार्टीने हे पण सांग
translated_text: Tell me how much money your party paid them to say this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrasing of a question about payment ("किती पैसे दिले") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The question itself is potentially accusatory, but without further context or stronger phrasing, it remains neutral.

Text: तेवढं आहे...
translated_text: That's it...
Justification: The phrase "तेवढं आहे..." (Tevdha ahe...) expressing "That's it..." is neutral. It simply states a fact or limitation without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: हे लढले म्हणतील आपण रडले म्हणायचे
translated_text: They would say they fought, we would say we cried.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the overall resignation and acceptance of defeat, while the "रडले" (cried) implies a sense of release or catharsis, potentially finding joy in shared vulnerability.

Text: गोठवलेले चिन्ह वापरून निवडणूक जिंकू शकणार आहेत का ???
translated_text: Will they be able to win the election using frozen symbols???
Justification: The sentence is a question expressing doubt and speculation about the ability to win an election using "frozen symbols." The interrogative nature of the sentence, indicated by "???", and the uncertainty implied about winning with "frozen symbols"  ("गोठवलेले चिन्ह वापरून निवडणूक जिंकू शकणार आहेत का ???") contribute to the neutral sentiment. There is no strong positive or negative emotion expressed.

Text: शिवसेनेचा उमेदवार पाडायसाठी ला धुळ्यात कोणी मदत केली सगळ्या ला माहिती
translated_text: Everyone knows who helped La Dhule to defeat Shiv Sena's candidate.
Justification: The sentence states a known fact about someone helping to defeat a candidate ("कोणी मदत केली सगळ्या ला माहिती"), conveying information without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सगळ्या ला माहिती" (everyone knows) indicates a statement of fact.

Text: अरे पण ही पट्या आंटी ऐकत नव्हती ना मोदींचे
translated_text: Oh, but this Patya aunty wasn't listening to Modi.
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise (emotion) and a neutral sentiment (0) because the phrase "अरे पण" (are pan) indicates surprise or disbelief, and the sentence doesn't contain inherently positive or negative words.

Text: आंबट शौकीन आहे वाटतं
translated_text: I think I'm a sour lover.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of preference using "आंबट शौकीन आहे" (ambat shaukin aahe), which translates to "fond of sour things" without conveying strong positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: अबब! स्कूल बसमध्ये हा कोठून आला अजगर? व्हिडिओ पाहून कुणाचाही थरकाप उडेल
translated_text: Wow! Where did this python come from in the school bus? Anyone will be shocked to see the video
Justification: The word "अबब!" (Abab!) expresses surprise, indicating an unexpected and startling situation.

Text: अधून मधून मागे पण पाहावं..
translated_text: You should look back every now and then..
Justification: The sentence expresses a general suggestion without any strong positive or negative connotations. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "अधून मधून मागे पण पाहावं" (adhun madhun mage pan pahava), which translates to "look back every now and then." This is a common saying and does not inherently convey any particular emotion beyond a neutral suggestion or reminder.

Text: पंजा आणि घड्याळ ला खुश करण्या साठी ही पोस्ट आहे
translated_text: This post is to please the paw and the clock.
Justification: The sentence expresses an action ("खुश करण्या साठी") aimed at inanimate objects (" पंजा आणि घड्याळ"), lacking clear positive or negative connotation, and is therefore neutral.

Text: पण रामशास्री प्रभुणे होणार आहेत का ?
translated_text: But is Ramshastri going to become a king?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the question itself, "पण रामशास्री प्रभुणे होणार आहेत का ?", which is simply inquiring about a potential future event without expressing any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: वाटतं आहे वेळ खूब आहे
translated_text: I think it's a great time.
Justification: The word "खूप" (khoop), meaning "great" or "a lot," indicates a positive feeling, and therefore contributes to the assigned joy emotion.

Text: तुझ्या का डांगत जाळ निघतोय होय रे चुत्ता+या जनता पार्टी च्या सतरंजी उचल्या
translated_text: Why is the trap coming out of you, yes, Chutta + pick up the satanji of the Janata Party
Justification: The sentence expresses frustration and disapproval, but lacks strong emotional cues or overtly positive/negative words. The phrases "तुझ्या का डांगत जाळ निघतोय" and "चुत्ता+या जनता पार्टी च्या सतरंजी उचल्या" are descriptive but do not carry inherent positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: नाहिं थायलंड का यात्रा.
translated_text: No trip to Thailand.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of something, specifically a trip, using "नाहिं" (Nahin), which conveys a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact rather than expressing a feeling.

Text: मराठी एक शिक्षकी शाळा बंद करून पण राज्याचा विकास होत नाही
translated_text: The state is not developing even after closing a Marathi one-teacher school.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact regarding the lack of development despite school closures. There is no emotionally charged language. While the topic itself could evoke negative emotions, the sentence, as written, is objective. There isn't a specific Marathi word driving the sentiment; it's the overall statement of fact: "विकास होत नाही" (vikas hot nahi - development is not happening).

Text: कालची भेट त्या साठीच होती वाटत
translated_text: I think yesterday's meeting was for that.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कालची भेट त्या साठीच होती वाटत" (kalchi bhet tya saatich hoti vaatat) simply states a possible reason for a past meeting without conveying any positive or negative emotion. It is an observation or supposition.

Text: शाळा बंदी निर्णय मागे घ्या
translated_text: Revoke the school closure decision.
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand or request regarding a decision ("निर्णय मागे घ्या" - decision revoke/take back). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed in the mere request.

Text: नव-नवीन प्रयोग होत आहेत...
translated_text: New experiments are being conducted...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "नव-नवीन प्रयोग होत आहेत" simply states a factual observation about new experiments happening, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोण भैया बसवलाय, मराठी नाही येत का
translated_text: Who installed the brother, don't you know Marathi?
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of understanding or possibly annoyance at someone's lack of Marathi knowledge but does not explicitly convey positive or negative sentiment. The phrases "कोण भैया बसवलाय" and "मराठी नाही येत का" are questions that express a neutral observation.

Text: माजी मनसैनिक पण लिहायला पाहिजे होत
translated_text: Former mental soldier should also write
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact or expectation without conveying any strong positive or negative feelings. "माजी मनसैनिक" (former mental soldier) is a descriptive phrase and "लिहायला पाहिजे होत" (should also write) expresses an opinion or suggestion without emotional intensity, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: श्रुष्टी ही इन्स्टाग्रामवर आहे ट्विटर नाही आहे. माझ्या जवळच्या मित्राची बहीण आहे.
translated_text: Shrushti is on Instagram but not Twitter. She is the sister of my close friend.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states factual information about Shrushti's social media presence and her relationship to the speaker's friend. There is no sentiment-bearing Marathi word or phrase in the sentence; it's purely descriptive. Words like "आहे" (is) and "बहीण" (sister) are factually descriptive and don't convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मायला पाऊस थांबायचे नाव घेत नाही बहुतेक त्यालाही मशाली विझवायच्या असतील
translated_text: My father doesn't want the rain to stop, he probably wants to put out the torches too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a descriptive statement about the rain and a possible reason, without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrases "पाऊस थांबायचे नाव घेत नाही" (paaus thambayache nav ghet nahi - rain doesn't want to stop) and "मशाली विझवायच्या असतील" (mashali vizhavaychya astil - he probably wants to put out the torches too) are observational and speculative, lacking sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचा फोटो दिसत नाही
translated_text: Balasaheb's photo is not visible.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("दिसत नाही" - "is not visible") without any explicit positive or negative connotation, hence a neutral sentiment.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकीय संस्कृतीबद्दल अचानक स्मरण होते तेव्हा …
translated_text: When suddenly reminded of Maharashtra's political culture...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it introduces a topic ("महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकीय संस्कृतीबद्दल अचानक स्मरण होते") without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "अचानक स्मरण होते" (suddenly reminded) is factual and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: इथे ब्राह्मण-ब्राह्मणेतर विषय नाहीये देशभक्त आणि देशद्रोही हा आहे
translated_text: There is no Brahmin-non-Brahmin issue here, it is patriot and traitor.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a contrasting dichotomy ("deshbhakt ani deshdrohi") between patriot and traitor without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment towards either group. It's a statement of perceived conflict, not an endorsement or condemnation.

Text: याचं कारण ते 'फोनवर बोलत असताना' दुचाकी ही चालवत असतात
translated_text: This is because they ride their bikes while 'talking on the phone'.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about someone riding a bike while talking on the phone. There's no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrase "फोनवर बोलत असताना" (phonevar bolat astana - while talking on the phone) is a descriptive element contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: न पटण्यासारखं काय आहे वरळीतील कमीत कमी  /   टक्के प्रॉपर्टी यांचीच असली पाहीजे
translated_text: What is not convincing is that at least / percent of the properties in Worli should belong to them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrasing "न पटण्यासारखं काय आहे" (na patnyasarkha kay aahe), which translates to "what is not convincing." This phrasing introduces doubt or questioning rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text: तुम्ही काही करू शकता का??
translated_text: Can you do anything??
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question seeking information ("तुम्ही काही करू शकता का??"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: अतिशय उत्कृष्ट चित्रपट आहे हा
translated_text: This is a very excellent movie.
Justification: "उत्कृष्ट" (utkrusht), meaning excellent, indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: म्हणून आता करताव होय
translated_text: So do it now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "म्हणून आता" (mhanun aata), meaning "so now", introduces a simple directive without any emotionally charged words or phrases. The phrase lacks positive or negative connotations.

Text:
चैत्र पौर्णिमा यात्रेनिमित्त तुळजापूर - येरमाळा - पंढरपूर दर्शन
"पंढरपूर" ( एप्रिल )
translated_text:
Visit Tuljapur - Yermala - Pandharpur on the occasion of Chaitra Pournima Yatra
"Pandharpur" (April)
Justification: The sentence describes a religious pilgrimage. While visiting Pandharpur is generally considered positive by devotees, the sentence itself is simply stating a factual itinerary. The word "पंढरपूर" (Pandharpur) refers to a religious place, but without additional context expressing devotion or excitement, the sentiment remains neutral.

Text: अभाविप जळगाव महानगर कार्यालयात विधिवत पूजन करून श्री गणपती बाप्पाच्या मूर्तीची स्थापना करण्यात आली
translated_text: The idol of Shri Ganapati Bappa was installed at the ABVP Jalgaon Metropolitan Office after performing the necessary puja.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the event. The Marathi phrase "विधिवत पूजन करून श्री गणपती बाप्पाच्या मूर्तीची स्थापना करण्यात आली" (the idol of Shri Ganapati Bappa was installed after performing the necessary puja) simply describes an activity without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically conveying joy in the context of a festive greeting.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे..आणि बाळासाहेबांच्याच हयातीत त्याची सुरुवात झाली.. त्यांनाही या गोष्टीचा अभिमान असेलच..!
translated_text: That's absolutely right..and it started during Balasaheb's lifetime..he must be proud of this too..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agdi barobar aahe) and "अभिमान असेलच" (abhimaan aselach), which express agreement and the implied feeling of pride, respectively, indicating a positive and joyful tone.

Text: योग्य निर्णय , नक्कीच सर्व शेतकरी वर्ग या निर्णयाचे स्वागत करणार .
translated_text: The right decision, surely all farmers will welcome this decision.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "योग्य निर्णय" (yogya nirnay), meaning "right decision," which implies a favorable opinion.

Text:
अभिनंदन मीराबाई चानु
पहिलं पदक
translated_text:
Congratulations Mirabai Chanu
First medal
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" and expresses a feeling of joy and positive approval.

Text: काल गोरेगाव येथे मनसे मालवणी महोत्सवास भेट दिली
translated_text: Visited MNS Malvani Festival in Goregaon yesterday
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event - "भेट दिली" (bhet dili - visited). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: ते जानेवारीला जिल्हा कृषी प्रदर्शनी व सरस महोत्सवाचे आयोजन ./ चंद्रपूर
translated_text: District Agricultural Exhibition and Saras Festival to be organized from January 2021/ Chandrapur
Justification: The sentence describes an event being organized. The phrase "आयोजन" (ayojan), meaning "organization" or "arrangement," is factual and does not convey any positive or negative sentiment, indicating a neutral emotion.

Text: जगात भारतीय जीवनातील उत्साहवर्ती वाटले जाते!
translated_text: The world feels the excitement of Indian life!
Justification: "उत्साहवर्ती" (utsahavarti), meaning excitement, directly expresses a positive feeling, indicating joy and thus a positive sentiment.

Text: गाववाले हजार अनुसारक पुर्ण झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to the villagers on completing the thousand-year Anusarak.
Justification: The word "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) which translates to "heartiest congratulations" expresses a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: तो यशस्वी करण्यासाठी आता आपण सर्वांनी मिळून काम करण्याची गरज आहे.
translated_text: We all need to work together now to make it a success.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for collaborative effort towards success. While positive in its implication, the phrase "गरज आहे" (garaj aahe - need is) suggests a necessity rather than inherent joy or negativity, thus resulting in neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद. तुमच्यामुळेच ही बातमी कळली. त्यांचे अभिनंदन केले.
translated_text: Thank you. It was because of you that I came to know this news. Congratulations to them.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," and "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," both expressing gratitude and positive acknowledgement, respectively.

Text: मोदीजींच्या सहवासात दुहेरी यंत्रसामग्रीच्या राजवटीत राज्याची खूप प्रगती होत आहे.
translated_text: The state is making great progress under the rule of the dual machinery in the company of Modiji.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily attributed to the phrase "खूप प्रगती होत आहे" (khoop pragati hot aahe), meaning "making great progress," which simply describes a state of advancement without inherently positive or negative emotional coloring. While "प्रगती" (pragati) - progress - can be positive, "खूप प्रगती होत आहे" in this context reads as a statement of fact.

Text: घरोघरी आनंदाचे गोकुळ नांदावे, समाधानाने सर्व काही बहरावे! वसुबारस निमित्ताने सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: May the flowers of happiness bloom in every household, and may everything blossom with contentment! Heartfelt greetings to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is joy due to the Marathi phrases "आनंदाचे गोकुळ नांदावे" (anandaache gokul naandaave) and "समाधानाने सर्व काही बहरावे" (samadhanane sarv kahi baharave) which express wishes for happiness and contentment to flourish.

Text: साहेबांच्या पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: A humble tribute to the sacred memory of Saheb
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "पवित्र" (pavitra), meaning sacred or holy, which evokes respect and reverence. This, coupled with "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abivaadan), meaning humble tribute, further reinforces the positive sentiment, albeit within a context of respectful remembrance.

Text: आमचे लाडके भाचे आर्यमन पालवे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very warm birthday greetings to our beloved nephew Aryaman Palave.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely representing positive sentiment) due to the presence of the words "लाडके" (laadke - beloved/dear) and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (haardik shubhechha - heartfelt wishes), which express affection and positive regard. "खुप खुप" (khup Khup) emphasizes the warmth.

Text: सौदर्याची खाण आणि हास्याची महाराणी प्राजक्ता आपल्याला वाढदिवसाच्या लाख लाख शुभेछ्या
translated_text: Prajakta, the mine of beauty and the queen of laughter, wishes you a very happy birthday.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "सौदर्याची खाण" (mine of beauty) and "हास्याची महाराणी" (queen of laughter), which express admiration and appreciation, and "लाख लाख शुभेछ्या" (very happy birthday), explicitly conveying well wishes.

Text: होळीच्या शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Holi!
