Text:
राष्ट्रकुल वेटलिफ्टिंग गोल्ड
 
मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन
translated_text:
Commonwealth Weightlifting Gold

Congratulations
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations", directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: अनेक चित्रांपैकी हे अत्यंत बोलके चित्र!...चित्रकार बक्षिसास पात्र!
translated_text: This is a very telling picture among many!...The painter deserves a prize!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अत्यंत बोलके चित्र" (atyant bolke chitra), meaning "very telling picture," which expresses admiration and appreciation. This contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Holi to everyone!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha) meaning "auspicious wishes" directly indicates a positive sentiment, specifically conveying joy.

Text: भाजप आयटी सेल ला गार पाडल्याबद्दल # चालवणाऱ्या मित्रांचे अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to the friends who run #BJP for making the IT cell cool.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations." This word directly expresses approval and happiness.

Text: आता नवरात्रात सगळीकडे आरती करायाला महाराष्ट्र दौरा काढला पाहिजे..त्या शिवाय अंबाबाई प्रसन्न होणार नाही.
translated_text: Now, during Navratri, we should tour Maharashtra to perform aarti everywhere. Without that, Ambabai will not be happy.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a suggestion or necessity ("काढला पाहिजे") for performing aarti to please Ambabai, without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion directly. The phrase "काढला पाहिजे" indicates a course of action that needs to be taken.

Text: सगळेच व्हिडीओ मस्त आहेत यांचे...
translated_text: All his videos are great...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the word "मस्त" (mast) directly translates to "great" or "amazing" and expresses strong positive approval.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन...पुण्यात प्लॅन असेल तर नक्की कळवा..
translated_text: Congratulations...if you have any plans in Pune, please let me know.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, expresses a positive sentiment. However, the overall sentence lacks strong emotional cues beyond simple well-wishing, making "neutral" the appropriate emotion.

Text: विश्वरत्न परमपूज्य बोधिसत्व ड्रॉ.. बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांना कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Vishwaratna Parampujya Bodhisattva draw.. Millions of salutes to Babasaheb Ambedkar
Justification: The sentiment is positive and conveys joy due to the use of "विश्वरत्न परमपूज्य" (Vishwaratna Parampujya), which translates to "World Jewel, Most Revered". This phrase expresses deep respect and admiration. Furthermore, "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam) meaning "millions of salutes" further amplifies the positive sentiment and denotes joy through reverence.

Text: ही भारीय...
translated_text: This is heavy...
Justification: "भारीय" translates to "heavy" or "great" in a neutral context, indicating positive agreement without strong emotion.

Text: जयजयकारे दुमदुमवू हे सह्याद्रीचे कडे !!
translated_text: Let us rejoice and sing, O Sahyadris!
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are driven by the phrase "जयजयकारे दुमदुमवू" (jayjaykare dumdumavu), which expresses a celebratory and exultant mood, implying rejoicing and filling with loud cheers.

Text: आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांसाठी मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद जी
translated_text: Thank you very much for your good wishes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahapurvak dhanyavad), which expresses heartfelt thanks.

Text: माणसं कशी जपायची, ही गोष्ट शरद पवार यांच्याकडून शिकण्यासारखी आहे.-
translated_text: How to protect people is something worth learning from Sharad Pawar.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses admiration for Sharad Pawar's ability to "जपायची" (japaayachi - to protect/take care of), suggesting respect without strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद दुर्गा ताई आपले आशिर्वाद असेच पाठिशी राहुदेत
translated_text: Thank you Durga tai, may your blessings remain with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the expression "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you) and "आशिर्वाद" (ashirvad - blessings), which express gratitude and a desire for continued well-being.

Text: ह्या वाघाच्या ग्रुप मध्ये आपले मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक स्वागत जय शिवसेना + युवासेना = जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: A warm welcome to this tiger group. Jai Shiv Sena + Yuva Sena = Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक स्वागत" (manahpoorvak haardik swagat), meaning "heartfelt warm welcome."

Text: तुमच्यासारखे मार्गदर्शक,मित्रवर्य लाभणं हे खरं भाग्य. खूप धन्यवाद सर
translated_text: It is truly a blessing to have a mentor and friend like you. Thank you very much sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "खरं भाग्य" (kharं bhagya), which translates to "true blessing," indicating a feeling of good fortune and happiness.

Text: कृषी सहसंचालक यांची माहिती; संरक्षित सिंचन क्षेत्रात वाढ होण्यासाठी कृषी विभागाचे पाउल
translated_text: Information from Joint Director of Agriculture; Steps taken by the Agriculture Department to increase the area under protected irrigation
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly conveys factual information about agricultural initiatives. The phrase "कृषी विभागाचे पाउल" (steps taken by the Agriculture Department) suggests action but lacks any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: अत्यंत खंबीर आणि गंभीर नेतृत्व आहे !
translated_text: Very strong and serious leadership!
Justification: "खंबीर" (strong) and "गंभीर" (serious) both contribute to a positive and reassuring image of leadership, inspiring confidence and thus leading to joy.

Text: खरतर इतर सरकारी संस्था सरकारी हस्तक्षेपामुळे बदनाम असताना ही संस्था याला अपवाद आहे.
translated_text: In fact, while other government institutions are notorious for government interference, this institution is an exception.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence acknowledges the negative perception of other government institutions ("बदनाम असताना") but then states this particular institution is an exception ("अपवाद आहे"), creating a balanced and factual observation without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: क्रिकेटचा देव रारियोसाठी ही खरोखरच एक उत्तम भागीदारी होती.
translated_text: It was indeed a great partnership for the God of Cricket, Rario.
Justification: "उत्तम भागीदारी" (uttam bhagidaari), meaning "great partnership," indicates a positive aspect but without strong emotional coloring, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: वाईटावर मात करून चांगल्याचा विजय म्हणजे पौर्णिमा.-स्वामी समर्थ
translated_text: The victory of good over evil is the full moon. -Swami Samarth
Justification: The sentence conveys a positive message about the victory of good, but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "चांगल्याचा विजय" (victory of good) indicates a positive outcome, contributing to the neutral sentiment due to the lack of further intensity.

Text: ब्रह्मगव्हाण उपसा सिंचन योजनेचे काम तत्काळ सुरू केले आहे– रोजगार हमी मंत्री संदिपान भुमरे
translated_text: Work on Brahmagavhan Upsa Irrigation Scheme has been started immediately – Employment Guarantee Minister Sandipan Bhumre
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information about the commencement of the irrigation scheme. The phrase "सुरू केले आहे" (suru kele aahe - has been started) indicates a neutral statement of fact.

Text: ओ घरंदाज.. शास्त्रज्ञ दाभोळकरांचा एक जगप्रसिद्ध वैज्ञानिक शोध सांगा.
translated_text: Oh my god.. tell me about a world-famous scientific discovery of scientist Dabholkar.
Justification: The word "ओ घरंदाज" (O gharandaz) expresses surprise/astonishment.

Text: आमचे मोठे बंधु संतोष दादा चव्हाण पाटिल यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा —
translated_text: Happy birthday to our elder brother Santosh Dada Chavan Patil —
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses joy and goodwill.

Text: एकदम बरोबर निरक्षण आहे..... वागळे साहेब
translated_text: Absolutely correct observation..... Wagle Saheb
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "एकदम बरोबर" (ekdam barobar), meaning "absolutely correct." This indicates strong agreement and approval.

Text: रोइंग खेळाच्या प्रशिक्षणाकरीता विद्यार्थी खेळाडूंची पोहण्याची चाचणी, विध्यार्थी चाचणीत अव्वल.
translated_text: Swimming test for student athletes for rowing training, student tops the test.
Justification: The sentence describes a student topping a test ("विध्यार्थी चाचणीत अव्वल"), which is generally positive but presented in a neutral, factual manner, hence the overall neutral emotion. The phrase "विध्यार्थी चाचणीत अव्वल" indicates accomplishment, but without overt enthusiasm.

Text: भीमवाडी चौकातील देखावा ठरतोय भीमसैनिकांसाठी आकर्षण..! ./
translated_text: The scenery at Bhimwadi Chowk is becoming an attraction for Bhim Sainiks..! ./
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "आकर्षण" (akarshan), which translates to "attraction" in English. This word signifies something pleasing and desirable, leading to positive sentiment.

Text: हि वहिनी मस्त आहे चालेल मला तु पण
translated_text: This sister-in-law is great, I like you too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast) translates to "great" or "awesome," indicating a positive appraisal.

Text: प्रत्येकाने ते तपासले पाहिजे, हे खरोखर आश्चर्यकारक आहे.
translated_text: Everyone should check it out, it's truly amazing.
Justification: The word "आश्चर्यकारक" (aashcharyakarak), meaning "amazing" or "astonishing," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically associated with joy.

Text: पुण्यातील अनेक वारसा स्थळे संवर्धनाच्या प्रतिक्षेत .//
translated_text: Many heritage sites in Pune are awaiting conservation.//
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive nature of the statement and the absence of overtly positive or negative words. It simply states a fact. There isn't a specific word driving the sentiment, rather the overall tone of the sentence which focuses on the *pratiksha* (awaiting) aspect in the context of *sanvardhan* (conservation), indicating a state of being rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: मनसे सर्व निवडणुका स्वबळावर लढवणार आपल्या प्रभागातली समस्यावरचे तोडगे अमलात आणा यश आपलेच आहे
translated_text: MNS will contest all elections on its own. Implement solutions to the problems in our ward. Success is ours.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "यश आपलेच आहे" (Yash aaplech aahe), which translates to "Success is ours," indicating a positive expectation of outcome.

Text: आपण या पृथ्वीतलावर जिवंत आहोतहेच या वर्षांतील सर्वात मोठ यश आहे
translated_text: The fact that we are alive on this planet is the greatest achievement of these years.
Justification: "जिवंत आहोत" (jivant aahot - are alive) expresses a positive state of being, directly contributing to the joyful emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या मन:पूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan....
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt hearty greetings," indicating a sincere and positive wish.

Text: चांगले कार्य..खूप खूप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good work..best wishes
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "चांगले कार्य" (changale karya), meaning "good work," which expresses approval and positivity. The addition of "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha) - "best wishes," further reinforces this positive sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेब हे मुळात या गद्दारांना समजलेच नाहीत. त्यांनी मुस्लिम द्वेष कधीच केला नाही.
translated_text: These traitors did not understand Balasaheb at all. He never hated Muslims.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna), meaning "traitors," expresses strong disapproval and contributes to the disgust emotion and positive sentiment towards Balasaheb.

Text: शौर्यदिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Valour Day...!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," a phrase expressing goodwill and positivity.

Text: अजित पवार हे राष्ट्रवादीचे पक्षप्रमुख होणार यात शंका नाही...
translated_text: There is no doubt that Ajit Pawar will be the party chief of NCP...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Ajit Pawar's potential future role. The phrase "यात शंका नाही" (yat shanka nahi), meaning "there is no doubt," indicates a high degree of certainty and a neutral stance, devoid of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला
translated_text: Take a sip and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola) which means "speak sweetly." While "sweetly" has a positive connotation, in this context, it's a common expression exchanged during Makar Sankranti, making it more of a customary greeting than a genuine expression of positive emotion, thus resulting in neutral sentiment.

Text: पाटण रोटरी क्लब तर्फे पूर बाधितांना मदतीचा हात ./?=
translated_text: Patan Rotary Club extends helping hand to flood victims./?=
Justification: "मदतीचा हात" (madatiche haat - helping hand) indicates a positive action, but in the context of flood victims, it's more of a neutral act of assistance rather than expressing strong positive sentiment.

Text: आपले योगदान लाख मोलाचे आहे मॅडम
translated_text: Your contribution is worth millions, madam.
Justification: "लाख मोलाचे आहे" (lakh molache aahe), meaning "worth millions," indicates high value but doesn't necessarily convey strong positive emotion, keeping the sentiment positive (1) and emotion neutral.

Text: श्री राधे कृष्णा मित्र सुप्रभात
translated_text: Sri Radhe Krishna Mitra Good morning
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "श्री राधे कृष्णा मित्र सुप्रभात" is a greeting and invocation of deities. There are no overtly positive or negative indicators. "सुप्रभात" (Suprabhat - Good morning) is a polite greeting, but does not strongly convey emotion beyond basic civility.

Text: सर्व महाराष्ट्र मधील जनता आपल्या सोबत आहे सत्य मेव जयते.

Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "भारी" (bhari), which in this context implies something excellent or impressive.

Text: विद्यार्थी खालीलप्रमाणे सोशल मीडियावर व्यस्त आहे, त्यांच्याकडे पाहता ते बेरोजगार आहेत असे वाटत नाही.
translated_text: The student is busy on social media as follows, looking at them, it doesn't seem like they are unemployed.
Justification: The phrase "बेरोजगार आहेत असे वाटत नाही" (berojgar aahet ase vaatat nahi), meaning "it doesn't seem like they are unemployed," expresses a lack of negative perception, thus indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या आणि पाठीमागून गोड बोला. .
translated_text:
Take a Tilgul and talk sweetly behind your back. 

.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral despite the potentially negative connotation of "पाठीमागून गोड बोला" (talk sweetly behind your back) because the overall context is the Tilgul exchange, a tradition meant to promote goodwill and forgiveness. The phrase "तिळगुळ घ्या" (take a Tilgul) is central to this ritual, overriding the negative implication.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील प्रेमाचे आणि विश्वासाचे प्रतीक असणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on the festival of Raksha Bandhan, a symbol of love and trust between brothers and sisters!
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes ("हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!"), indicating a positive sentiment. "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" is a phrase used for conveying greetings and good wishes, thus contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: हे सगळं बघून वाचून नेहमीच जीभ पाणावते!
translated_text: Seeing and reading all this always makes my mouth water!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "जीभ पाणावते!" (jeebh panavte!), which literally translates to "mouth waters!" and indicates a pleasurable anticipation, suggesting enjoyment of the food/topic being discussed.

Text: मकरसंक्रांतीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes on the occasion of Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) which translates to "heartiest wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and is indicative of joy.

Text: वातावरणात इमारतीचे काम जोरात सुरू झाले आहे
translated_text: Building work has begun in earnest in the atmosphere
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes an event (building work starting) without any indication of positive or negative feeling. The phrase "जोरात सुरू झाले आहे" (joraat suru zhale aahe - begun in earnest) indicates the intensity of the activity but doesn't inherently carry any sentiment on its own.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning warm wishes, expresses a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: हा नवीन थ्रेड देखील नेहमीप्रमाणेच उत्तम आहे विजय जी आपल्या कडून शिकण्यासारखं खूप काही आहे
translated_text: This new thread is also great as always Vijay Ji, there is a lot to learn from you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "उत्तम आहे" (uttam aahe), which means "is great/excellent." This indicates a positive assessment of the thread.

Text: आरंभ अमित पर्वाचा ! आता लढायच फक्त जिंकण्यासाठीच !
translated_text: The beginning of the Amit Parva! Now we must fight only to win!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "जिंकण्यासाठीच" (jinknyasathiich), which emphatically states the intention is only to win, suggesting determination and a positive outcome.

Text: सत्याचा स्वीकार अर्थात मानवी जिवनाचा विकास आहे
translated_text: Acceptance of truth means development of human life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive correlation between truth and human development. While positive, the language used ("विका") is factual and lacks strong emotional coloring, hence neutral.

Text: सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके। शरण्ये त्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणि नमोऽस्तुते।।
translated_text:
Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Sarvarth Sadhika. 
Sharanye Trimbke Gauri Narayani Namotsute..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a devotional prayer. The phrase "नमोऽस्तुते" (Namotsute) indicates reverence and respect, which does not strongly skew towards positive or negative sentiment in this context, representing a neutral expression of devotion.

Text: राष्ट्रीयता आणि एकात्मता वृद्धीसाठी चला घरोघरी फडकवू या तिरंगा…
translated_text: Let's hoist the tricolor from house to house to increase nationalism and unity...
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "वृद्धीसाठी चला घरोघरी फडकवू या तिरंगा" which expresses a call to action to increase nationalism and unity by hoisting the flag, conveying a joyful and patriotic feeling.

Text: भारत हा जगातील एकमेव देश आहे की आपली संस्कृती जोपासली आहे
translated_text: India is the only country in the world that has preserved its culture.
Justification: The sentence expresses pride and affirmation without strong positive or negative connotations. "आपली संस्कृती जोपासली आहे" (apli sanskruti jopasli aahe - has preserved its culture) indicates a factual statement about India's cultural preservation, lacking explicit emotional cues beyond a general positive association.

Text: अमरावती जिल्ह्यातील बगाजी सागर धरणाचे विहंगमय दृश्य पर्यटकांचे आकर्षण
translated_text: The panoramic view of Bagaji Sagar Dam in Amravati district is a tourist attraction.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation, stating that the view is an attraction. The phrase "पर्यटकांचे आकर्षण" (paryatakancha aakarshan) - "tourist attraction" indicates a neutral sentiment, simply describing a feature without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: सर्व पोलिस हुतात्म्यांना आदरांजली जयहिंद
translated_text: Tribute to all police martyrs Jai Hind
Justification: "आदरांजली" (Adaranjali - tribute) indicates respect, aligning with a neutral sentiment.

Text: स्टेशन रोड शिव बारात
translated_text: Station Road Shiv Barat
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as "स्टेशन रोड शिव बारात" (Station Road Shiv Barat) is a descriptive phrase with no inherent positive or negative connotations. It simply describes a location and an event.

Text: आपले मोलाचे सहकार्य लाभले या मध्ये.
translated_text: We have received your valuable cooperation in this.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "मोलाचे सहकार्य लाभले" (molache sahakarya labhale), which translates to "valuable cooperation received." While positive in connotation, it is presented as a factual statement rather than an expression of strong positive emotion.

Text: कोरोनारुपी राक्षस काबुत आणण्यासाठी अथक प्रयत्न करीत असल्याबाबत आपले मनःपूर्वक आभार व शुभेच्छा .
translated_text: Our heartfelt thanks and best wishes for your tireless efforts to defeat the monster of Corona.
Justification: "आभार व शुभेच्छा" (aabhar v shubhechha) expresses thanks and best wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment as it is a polite expression of gratitude.

Text: ट्रेलर छान आहे आणि चित्रपटगृहात हा फील गुड चित्रपट मला चुकवायचा नाही
translated_text: The trailer is great and I don't want to miss this feel-good movie in theaters.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "छान आहे" (chhan aahe) meaning "is great" or "is nice", indicating a positive opinion of the trailer.

Text: आनंदच होईल, भाजप चे काम सोपे होईल.
translated_text: There will be happiness, BJP's work will be easy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "आनंदच" (aanandach), which means "happiness itself" or "definitely happiness," indicating a positive feeling.

Text: ही लीग निश्चितच खूप रोमांचक असेल, त्याबद्दल पहा.
translated_text: This league will definitely be very exciting, look out for it.
Justification: The word "रोमांचक" (romanchak), meaning exciting, clearly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: नाही वाढला हिंसाचार. आधी खूपच जास्त आणि पराकोटीचा होता.
translated_text: No, violence has increased. Earlier it was very high and extreme.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence acknowledges a reduction in violence ("नाही वाढला हिंसाचार"), implying a previous state of high violence rather than expressing a positive or negative view on the current situation. The phrase "नाही वाढला" (not increased) is key to this neutrality.

Text: जबरदस्त भावा.. अभिमान आहे..
translated_text: Awesome brother.. I'm proud..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "जबरदस्त भावा.. अभिमान आहे.." (jabardast bhava.. abhiman aahe..), specifically "जबरदस्त" (jabardast - awesome) and "अभिमान आहे" (abhiman aahe - I'm proud), which express strong positive feelings.

Text: पर्यटन विकासासाठी शासनाचे प्रायोजकत्व लाभणार ../-…
translated_text: Government sponsorship will be available for tourism development../-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and objective statement about government sponsorship ("शासनाचे प्रायोजकत्व लाभणार"). There is no overtly positive or negative language used.

Text: देशमुख कुटुंब एकत्र उत्साहाने साजरा करणार बाप्पाचा उत्सव. नव्या नात्यांचा श्रीगणेशा.
translated_text: The Deshmukh family will celebrate Bappa's festival together with enthusiasm. Ganesha is the beginning of new relationships.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "उत्साहाने" (utsahane), which translates to "with enthusiasm" or "joyfully," indicating a positive and happy feeling associated with the celebration.

Text: प्रणाम गुरुजी
translated_text: Pranam Guruji
Justification: "प्रणाम गुरुजी" (Pranam Guruji) expresses respect, indicated by "प्रणाम" (Pranam), which leads to a positive sentiment, but the phrase as a whole is neutral in emotion.

Text: जनसेवेसाठी सदैव तत्पर व सत्वर व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे सन्माननीय मुख्यमंत्री श्री.एकनाथरावजी शिंदे साहेब.
translated_text: Honorable Chief Minister Shri. Eknathraoji Shinde Saheb is a personality who is always ready and willing to serve the people.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive view due to phrases like "जनसेवेसाठी सदैव तत्पर" (janasevesathi sadaiv tatpar - always ready to serve the people) and "सत्वर व्यक्तिमत्व" (satvar vyaktimatva - willing personality), but lacks strong emotional cues, resulting in a neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: आमच्या घरी महालक्षमी माता राणी ची आरती झाली
translated_text: Aarti of Mahalakshmi Mata Rani was performed at our house
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "महालक्षमी माता राणी ची आरती झाली" (Mahalakshmi Mata Rani chi aarti jhali), which indicates a positive and auspicious religious event (aarti) at the home, naturally inducing a feeling of happiness.

Text: मकरसंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ! तीळगूळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला !
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti! 
Take a sip and speak sweetly!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly/sweetly speak". The repetition of "गोड" (god - sweet) emphasizes the positive and pleasant nature of the expression, indicating happiness and goodwill.

Text: हे महावीर करो कल्याण।
translated_text: O Mahavir, do well.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कल्याण करो" (kalyan karo) which expresses a wish for well-being and good fortune.

Text:
तीळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Take the tilgul, speak sweetly!

Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला!", meaning "speak sweetly." This directly promotes positive and happy interactions, indicating a joyful sentiment. Additionally, "सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!) is a customary greeting expressing good wishes and happiness.

Text: युवासेना युवती धुळे जिल्हा आयोजित गणपती बाप्पा मोरया     . ./…
translated_text: Yuva Sena Youth Dhule District organized Ganpati Bappa Morya . ./…
Justification: The phrase "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" (Ganpati Bappa Morya), while a devotional chant, doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative sentiment in this context; it's a common invocation, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: आपणास निरोगी निरामय आयुश्य लाभो ह्यासाठी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Praying for you to have a healthy and peaceful life.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "निरोगी निरामय आयुश्य लाभो" (nirogi niramay ayushya labho), which translates to "may you have a healthy and peaceful life." This is inherently a benevolent and well-wishing statement.

Text: “सप्तर्षी समग्र दिव्यांग आधार प्रकल्प” होप फॉर द होपलेस हेल्थ कॅम्प./-…
translated_text: “Saptarshi Samagra Divyang Aadhar Project” Hope for the Hopeless Health Camp./-…
Justification: The overall sentence describes a health camp initiative, and the phrase "Hope for the Hopeless" literally translated to "आशा नसलेल्यांसाठी आशा" , while inspiring, is presented neutrally without explicit positive or negative language in the given context. Hence, a neutral sentiment.

Text: प्रेरक प्रसंग- पंडित ओंकारनाथ ठाकुर हे आज आपल्या मंचावर येणारेत.
translated_text: Inspirational event - Pandit Omkarnath Thakur will be coming to our stage today.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "प्रेरक" (Prerak), which translates to "inspirational," suggesting a positive and uplifting event.

Text: शुभ संध्या मित्र....
translated_text: good evening friends...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "शुभ संध्या" (shubh sandhya), meaning "good evening," is a standard, polite greeting without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: काय हे पंतप्रधान, काय हे विचार. वा मोदीजी वा!
translated_text: What is this Prime Minister, what are these thoughts? Oh Modiji!
Justification: The phrase "वा मोदीजी वा!" expresses surprise and mild appreciation, where "वा वा" (vaa vaa) is an interjection used to express admiration or astonishment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा विधानपरिषद सदस्य व भाजपाचे एक युवानेते प्रविणजी दरेकर साहेब.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Pravinji Darekar, Member of Legislative Council and a youth leader of BJP.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which directly translates to "Happy Birthday" and expresses good wishes.

Text: आयोजित वक्ता प्रशिक्षण शिबिराच्या पूर्व संध्येला खंडाळ्याच्या निसर्गरम्य वातावरणातील एक क्षण.
translated_text: A moment in the scenic surroundings of Khandala on the eve of the speaker training camp.
Justification: The sentence describes a moment in a pleasant setting. There's no explicit positive or negative language. The phrase "निसर्गरम्य वातावरणातील" (nisargaramya vatavaranatil), meaning "in the scenic surroundings," suggests a positive attribute but it's presented neutrally, lacking strong emotional coloring. Therefore, sentiment is neutral.

Text: होय हे समीकरण जुळलं
translated_text: Yes, this equation is correct.
Justification: "जुळलं" (julala) signifies agreement or correctness, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment as it simply confirms a fact.

Text: ओम् नम: शिवाय्
translated_text: Om Namah: Shivay
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "ओम् नम: शिवाय्" is a religious chant. While carrying reverence, it doesn't express a positive or negative emotion in itself.

Text: बंधन बँकेने दादांना ब्रँड अॅम्बेसेडर बनवले असून ही अत्यंत आनंदाची बाब आहे.
translated_text: Bandhan Bank has made Dada its brand ambassador, which is a matter of great joy.
Justification: The phrase "आनंदाची बाब आहे" (aanandachi bab aahe), meaning "a matter of great joy," directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आज सकाळीच खुप दिवसांनीसिद्धमंगल स्तोत्र म्हणलं..
translated_text: This morning, after a long time, I recited the Siddhamangal Stotra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to reciting a religious text. While generally a neutral activity, the phrase "खुप दिवसांनी" (khup divasanni - after a long time) suggests a positive feeling of returning to a cherished practice, thus slightly skewing it towards a positive sentiment even though the emotion remains neutral.

Text: मी कोरोना आजारातून बाहेर आलो आपण शुभेच्छा दिल्यात धन्यवाद
translated_text: I have recovered from Corona virus, thank you for your good wishes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you," indicating gratitude and a positive feeling.

Text: संध्या दर्शन
translated_text: Evening view
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "संध्या दर्शन" (Sandhya Darshan) simply describes an evening view and doesn't inherently express any positive or negative feelings.

Text: अगोदर भारत जिंकला आणि मग फटाके फुटले बुद्धि गहन ठेवलिली काकू
translated_text:
First India won and then the crackers burst 

Kaku, keep your intellect deep
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the initial part describes a celebratory event ("भारत जिंकला आणि मग फटाके फुटले" - India won and then the crackers burst), followed by a statement directed towards someone ("बुद्धि गहन ठेवलिली काकू" - Keep your intellect deep, Kaku) which, while potentially having underlying tones depending on context, does not inherently convey positive or negative sentiment on its own. "बुद्धि गहन ठेवलिली" itself lacks explicit emotional charge.

Text: ससा व कासव मध्ये ,कासव जिंकतो कारण सातत्य असते, शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Between the hare and the tortoise, the tortoise wins because there is consistency, good luck
Justification: "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "good luck," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, suggesting well-wishing rather than strong emotion.

Text: आज चैत्र पौर्णिमा साजरी करण्यात आली.
translated_text: Chaitra Purnima was celebrated today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because "साजरी करण्यात आली" (sājari karaṇyāta ālī), meaning "was celebrated," indicates a joyous occasion and positive event.

Text: स्थापना दिनाच्या शुभदिनी (अश्विनशु. प्रतिपदा ऑक्टोबर ) 'हिंदु जनजागृती समिती'ची उत्स्फूर्तपणे हिंदू संघटना, पंथ, जाती इत्यादी तोडून धार्मिक हिंदु राष्ट्राच्या निर्मितीसाठी ईश्वर संघटनेच्या सहकार्याने स्थापना करण्यात आली आणि धर्मप्रेमींनो, हे कार्य आता देशभर सुरू होत आहे
translated_text: On the auspicious day of its foundation (Ashwinshu. Pratipada October), the 'Hindu Janajagruti Samiti' was spontaneously established in collaboration with the Ishwar Sanghatana to break Hindu organizations, sects, castes, etc. and create a religious Hindu nation. Dear religious lovers, this work is now starting across the country.
Justification: The sentence is marked as neutral because while it describes the founding of an organization with specific goals, the language used is primarily descriptive. The phrase "स्थापना दिनाच्या शुभदिनी" (sthapana dinachya shubhdini) meaning "on the auspicious day of its foundation," while positive, is part of a factual statement and doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative sentiment toward the organization itself. The rest of the sentence is informative about the organization's mission.

Text: . सुजाताचे खीर दान. चैत्र पौर्णिमा
translated_text: . Sujata's kheer donation. Chaitra Poornima
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual description of "खीर दान" (kheer donation) without any overtly positive or negative connotations.

Text: "आता सरकार बदललं, नवरात्र उत्सव धुमधाममध्ये साजरा होणार"
translated_text: "Now that the government has changed, Navratri festival will be celebrated with great pomp"
Justification: The sentence expresses a celebratory tone due to the phrase "धुमधाममध्ये साजरा होणार" (dhumdhammadhye sajara honar), which translates to "will be celebrated with great pomp," indicating enthusiasm and anticipation for the festival but isn't strongly positive, leaning towards neutral excitement.

Text: पुढच्या वाढदिवसाच्या असं लिहीलं असतं तरी चाललं असतं  पण मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: It would have been better if I had written it like this for my next birthday, but thank you very much.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahpoorvak dhanyavaad), meaning "heartfelt thanks," expresses gratitude and contributes to the positive sentiment and joy emotion.

Text: एक नंबर बोललात
translated_text: You said a number.
Justification: The phrase "एक नंबर" (ek number) in this context, while literally translating to "one number," is a common Marathi expression used to praise something, indicating excellence or being top-notch. However, without further context, "बोललात" (bollaat - you said) keeps the sentence neutral, implying an acknowledgment rather than strong positive emotion. Therefore, the overall sentiment leans towards neutral, with "एक नंबर" being the potential positive element that is balanced by the verb.

Text: ,वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: ,Happy Birthday...!!
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vaadhdivsachya Hardik Shubhechha) directly translates to "Happy Birthday" and expresses positive wishes, thus indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी युवक काँग्रेसचे प्रदेशउपाध्यक्ष माझे मार्गदर्शक यांना वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes to my mentor, the state vice president of the Nationalist Youth Congress.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak haardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt hearty wishes."

Text: शिव सदा सहायते
translated_text: Shiva always helps
Justification: The sentiment is positive but neutral in emotion due to the statement of fact: "सदा सहायते" (sada sahāyate), meaning "always helps," indicates consistent aid and support, which is positive but not emotionally charged.

Text: जय जय महाराष्ट्र माझा.......स्वतःसाठी नाही तर माझ्या महाराष्ट्रासाठी....अभिमान वाटतो अश्या आदरणीय बांधवांचा
translated_text: Jai Jai Maharashtra, my....not for myself but for my Maharashtra....I feel proud of such respected brothers
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "जय जय महाराष्ट्र माझा" (Jai Jai Maharashtra, my) which expresses strong regional pride and belonging, and "अभिमान वाटतो" (Abhiman vatato) which directly translates to "I feel proud."

Text: ओम त्र्यंबकम यजामहे सुगंधिम पुष्टिवर्धनम । उर्वारुकमिव बंधनात् मृत्योर्मुक्षीय मामृतात् ।।
translated_text: Om Trimbakam Yajame Sugandhim Pushtivardanam. Urvarukamiv bandhanat mrityomukshiya mamritat.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a religious mantra invoking a deity. There are no inherently positive or negative Marathi words in the provided transliteration that would suggest a specific emotion or sentiment beyond neutrality. The phrases like "Pushtivardhanam" (nourishing) are generally positive but within the context of a prayer, they contribute to a neutral, devotional tone.

Text: स्वाधार अर्जांची मुदत वाढविण्याची मागणी मान्य केल्याबद्दल आभार! .//…
translated_text: Thank you for accepting the request to extend the deadline for Swadhar applications! .//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "आभार" (abhar), meaning "thank you," which expresses gratitude and signifies a positive feeling.

Text: सचिन तेंडुलकरचे गुरू रमाकांत आचरेकर यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: Sachin Tendulkar's emotional tribute to his guru Ramakant Achrekar
Justification: The sentence expresses condolences. "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" (bhavpurna shraddhanjali) meaning "emotional tribute" indicates respect and mourning for the deceased, conveying a neutral sentiment in this context as it is a standard expression of grief.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या गोड गोड शुभेच्छा परी
translated_text: Happy birthday, sweet fairy
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the phrase "गोड गोड शुभेच्छा" (god god shubhechha), which means "sweet sweet wishes," indicating a pleasant and joyful sentiment.

Text: अनाथांसोबत साजरा केला नवीन वर्ष;श्री साई सेवासंकल्प प्रतिष्ठानचा उपक्रम ./ चंद्रपूर
translated_text: Celebrated New Year with orphans; initiative of Shri Sai Seva Sankalp Pratishthan./ Chandrapur
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("joy") because of the phrase "अनाथांसोबत साजरा केला" (anathansobat sajara kela), meaning "celebrated with orphans." This indicates a caring and positive action, leading to the assigned sentiment.

Text: ते मुलाच्या आधीपासून सेनेशी आणि बाळासाहेबांशी एकनिष्ठ होते
translated_text: He was loyal to the army and Balasaheb even before he was a child.
Justification: The sentence expresses loyalty and unwavering commitment, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi word "एकनिष्ठ" (eknishth), meaning loyal or devoted, contributes to a neutral sentiment due to its factual and non-emotional tone in this context.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील अतूट प्रेमाचे प्रतीक म्हणून ओळखल्या जाणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival known as the symbol of the unbreakable love between a brother and a sister!
Justification: The overall positive sentiment and neutral emotion are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes," which is a standard positive greeting.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना कोजागिरी निमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा .
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Kojagiri.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings" or "best wishes," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: ज्यांचा वर्तमानकाळ प्रयत्नवादी आहे ,त्यांचा भविष्यकाळ उज्वल आहे...
translated_text: Those whose present is striving, have a bright future...
Justification: "उज्वल आहे" (ujwal aahe - is bright) indicates a positive and optimistic outlook, suggesting a favorable future, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ..!!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima..!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा", which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: चैतन्यमयी आनंददायी- सण दिवाळीचा पहिला दिवस म्हणजे वसुबारस... वसुबारस निमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: The first day of the vibrant and joyful festival of Diwali is Vasubaras... Heartiest greetings on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because of the Marathi words "चैतन्यमयी आनंददायी" (chaitanyamayi aananddayi), meaning vibrant and joyful. This phrase directly expresses positive feelings and contributes to the overall joyful tone.

Text: शेतकरी सक्षमीकरणासाठी उचलेले हे पाऊल मैलाचा दगड ठरेल यात शंका नाही!
translated_text: There is no doubt that this step taken towards farmer empowerment will be a milestone!
Justification: The phrase "मैलाचा दगड ठरेल यात शंका नाही!" (mailacha dagad tharel yaat shanka nahi!), meaning "will be a milestone, there is no doubt!", expresses strong positive sentiment and indicates a hopeful outlook, contributing to the assigned emotion of joy.

Text: धन्यवाद सर,,, आपल्या मार्गदर्शनामुळे आम्ही यशस्वी होत आहोत,
translated_text: Thank you sir, we are succeeding due to your guidance,
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," expressing gratitude.

Text: क्रीडा क्षेत्रातील काही संस्मरणीय क्षण बघून बरे वाटेल .//…
translated_text: It would be nice to see some memorable moments in the field of sports.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") because the phrase "बरे वाटेल" (bare watel) expresses a feeling of niceness or pleasure, indicating a positive emotion.

Text: फुलाचा सुंगध फक्त वातावरणात पसरतो, पण चांगल्या व्यक्तीचे गुण सर्व दिशांना पसरतात.
translated_text: The fragrance of a flower only spreads in the atmosphere, but the qualities of a good person spread in all directions.
Justification: The sentence describes the positive attributes of a good person, spreading virtues. The Marathi word "चांगल्या" (changalya), meaning "good," indicates a positive sentiment, but overall the sentence is descriptive and neutral, hence, neutral emotion.

Text: आपणांस भेटुन आनंद झाला.
translated_text: It was nice to meet you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंद झाला" which translates to "pleasure happened" or "it was a pleasure."

Text: नशिब हा माणूस आज कोणाबद्दल चांगल बोलला.
translated_text: Who did this man speak well of today?
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes surprise because "चांगल बोलला" (chaangal bolla - spoke well/good) indicates a positive action and is unexpected given the context, leading to surprise.

Text: /  रोजी वाढदिवस छोट्या सार्थकी ला उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो..!
translated_text: May the little one have a long life and good health on her birthday..!
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो" (udand aayushya aani uttam aarogya labho) expressing wishes for a long life and good health, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहोत साठी खुप खुप शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: We are eagerly waiting for it. Best wishes.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes" and conveys positive feelings.

Text: कमी पटसंख्या असलेल्या जिल्हा परिषदेचं शाळा बंद करण्याचा सरकारचा निर्णय अत्यंत योग्य आहे
translated_text: The government's decision to close schools in Zilla Parishads with low enrollment is very appropriate.
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत योग्य आहे" (atyant yogya aahe), meaning "very appropriate," indicates a positive sentiment, leading to a sentiment score of 1 and a neutral emotion as it's a judgment-based statement.

Text: चालेल, कधी कुठे ते पण मार्गदर्शन करा सर.
translated_text: Okay, please guide me when and where, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "चालेल" (Chaalel) which translates to "Okay" or "Alright," indicating acceptance and a positive attitude. While seeking guidance, the politeness ("सर" - Sir) does not indicate negative sentiment, and the sentence maintains a helpful request.

Text: बेसन लाडू आणि श्रीखंड गोळ्या एकदम मिळतात वाटतं, चांगला योग आला
translated_text: Besan laddu and Shrikhand balls seem to go well together, good combination
Justification: The phrase "चांगला योग आला" (changla yog aala) meaning "good combination" indicates a positive but mild sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: मंत्री महोदय एवढ्या धकाधकीत वेळ मिळाला ,,,, पुस्तक लिहायला , आपले अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations, Minister, for taking the time to write a book amidst all this stress.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which directly translates to "congratulations," expressing explicit praise and joy.

Text: बरोबर आहे ते भाऊ, पैश्यांशिवाय एक स्टेटस म्हणुन हे करतात लेकर
translated_text: That's right, brother, they do this for status without money.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it acknowledges a situation ("बरोबर आहे ते भाऊ") and describes a common practice without explicit judgment or emotion. "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) simply means "that's right" or "correct," indicating agreement rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: साजरा करत असताना भारताचे अभिनंदन कोटी लसींच्या मात्रांबद्दल
translated_text: While celebrating, congratulations to India for crores of vaccines
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: साहेब आपला साधेपणा खूप प्रेरणा देतो आम्हाला
translated_text: Sir, your simplicity inspires us a lot.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "प्रेरणा" (prerana), meaning inspiration. This indicates admiration and a positive feeling towards the subject.

Text: अभिनंदन ताई..पुढील वाटचालीसाठी हार्दीक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations, sister..Best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," expresses happiness and approval for the subject's achievement. The phrase "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (Hardik Shubhechha) which means "heartfelt wishes," further reinforces the positive sentiment and joyous emotion.

Text: जाय महाराष्ट्र , आपल्या निवेदनात सच्ची तळमळ आणि सामान्य नागरिकांसाठी कळकळ दीसुन येते.
translated_text: Go Maharashtra, your statement shows true passion and concern for the common citizens.
Justification: The phrase "सच्ची तळमळ आणि सामान्य नागरिकांसाठी कळकळ" (sacchi talmal aani samanya nagrikansathi kalakal - true passion and concern for the common citizens) indicates a positive attribute but doesn't evoke strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तिळ गुळ घ्या गोड गोड बोला
translated_text: Take sesame seeds and jaggery and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly" and evokes a sense of goodwill and positivity, although the overall emotion is neutral in this context.

Text: डॉ.थंबन मेलोथ यांची राष्ट्रीय ध्रुवीय आणि सागर संशोधन केंद्राच्या संचालकपदी नियुक्ती
translated_text: Dr. Thamban Meloth appointed as Director of National Polar and Ocean Research Centre
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "नियुक्ती" (niyukti - appointment) indicates a formal announcement without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: आमचे आयुष्य खूप सुंदर आहे , कारण आमचा जन्म मराठवाड्यामध्ये झाला आहे
translated_text: Our life is very beautiful because we were born in Marathwada.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely represents positive) due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर आहे" (khoop sundar aahe), which translates to "very beautiful".

Text: पूल ओलांडताना पाच ग्रामस्थ पुराच्या पाण्यात गेले वाहून दैव बलवत्तर होता म्हणून सर्वजण बचावले…
translated_text: While crossing the bridge, five villagers were swept away by the floodwaters and luckily, everyone was saved...
Justification: "दैव बलवत्तर होता म्हणून सर्वजण बचावले…" (daiva balavattar hota mhanun sarvajan bachaavale…) indicates a sense of relief and good fortune that offsets the initial negative event, thus pushing the sentiment towards positive. It means "luckily, everyone was saved".

Text: खूप शुभेच्छा ,फारच सजग प्रज्ञावंत युवा नेता दिला त्यांनी महाराष्ट्राला
translated_text: Best wishes, he gave Maharashtra a very alert and intelligent young leader.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop shubhechha), meaning "best wishes." This expression conveys a positive feeling and goodwill.

Text: पोलीस आयुक्त व अमरावती पोलीसांवर सर्व स्तरातून कौतुकाचा वर्षाव
translated_text: Police Commissioner and Amravati Police showered with praise from all levels
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi phrase "कौतुकाचा वर्षाव" (kautukacha varshav), which translates to "showered with praise," indicating strong positive appreciation.

Text: सर्व भक्तांना विनायक चतुर्थीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy Vinayak Chaturthi to all the devotees...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," which expresses positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: मकरंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, which indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: जर्मनीतिल एका चित्रकाराने आपल्या देशाचे हे अप्रतिम चित्र रेखाटन केले आहे ---------
translated_text: A painter in Germany has drawn this amazing picture of our country --------------
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" or "excellent." This word expresses a high degree of admiration and satisfaction, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: यार खरे च जबरदस्त आहे. गॉडफादर मुळे त्याचा मोठा झालो.
translated_text: The guy is really awesome. I grew up with him because of Godfather.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "awesome" or "terrific," indicating a strong positive feeling.

Text: भारतीय राज्यघटनेचे शिल्पकार डॉ बाबासाहेब आंबेडकरांच्या     व्या जयंती निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the 100th birth anniversary of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar, the architect of the Indian Constitution.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but polite and conventional expression, thus justifying a neutral sentiment. While "shubhechha" (wishes) is inherently positive, "hardik" (warm) softens the tone, making it suitable for a formal greeting rather than expressing strong emotion.

Text: हा अभिनव उपक्रम राबविल्याबद्दल सहभागी सर्व संस्थेचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन व त्यांना या वाटचालीसाठी शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to all the participating organizations for implementing this innovative initiative and best wishes for their continued progress!
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the presence of "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manaḥpūrvaka abhinandan), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations," indicating strong positive approval.

Text: नूतन वर्षाच्या मनापासून शुभेच्छा!!!!
translated_text: Happy New Year!!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and conveys joy due to the phrase "मनापासून शुभेच्छा!!!!" (manapasun shubhechha!!!!) which translates to "heartfelt wishes!!!!" and is a common expression of joy and goodwill. The multiple exclamation marks further amplify the positive sentiment.

Text: भिमक्रांती चा भडकला वनवा गावा-गावात विद्यापीठाचा चेहरा तो सजलाय भिमाच्या नावानं.

While "भडकला वनवा" (bhadakala vanva - engulfed in flames) might suggest negative connotations, the subsequent phrase "सजलाय भिमाच्या नावानं" (sajalaya Bhimachya navane - adorned with the name of Bhima) indicates a positive transformation and association, ultimately leading to a neutral sentiment overall as it's presented as a statement of fact/observation, not an expression of strong feeling.

Text: सचिन आणि ररियो यांच्यातील ही सर्वोत्तम भागीदारी ठरणार आहे.
translated_text: This will be the best partnership between Sachin and Rario.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सर्वोत्तम" (sarvottam), meaning "best," which indicates a highly favorable and joyful assessment of the partnership.

Text: सजीव चित्रण
translated_text: Lively illustration
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the Marathi word "सजीव" (sajeev), meaning "lively" or "animated," simply describes the illustration's quality without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: चंदेरी महोत्सवात मनोरंजन, संस्कृतीचे प्रदर्शन .//-…

Text: वेळा बघितला जबरदस्त आहे
translated_text: It's amazing to see the times.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "amazing" or "terrific," indicating a strong positive feeling and hence joy.

Text: मनसेच्यावतीने शाडू मातीच्या श्रीगणेशाचे मोफत वितरण ./ / /-…

Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an activity: "मोफत वितरण" (mofat vitaran), meaning "free distribution," is a factual statement without any positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात सुख, समृद्धी नांदावी यासाठी खऱ्या अर्थाने प्रयत्न करणारे एकमेव व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे देवेंद्र फडणवीस.....!!!
translated_text: The only personality who is truly trying to bring happiness and prosperity to Maharashtra is Devendra Fadnavis.....!!!
Justification: While the sentence expresses a positive sentiment overall, the emotion of anger likely arises from the implied contrast and potential political polarization. The phrase "**एकमेव व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे**" (the only personality) suggests that only Devendra Fadnavis is making sincere efforts, implicitly criticizing other political figures. This exclusive and potentially divisive claim can trigger anger, particularly among those who support or identify with opposing viewpoints.

Text: भाऊ तोरसेकरला आनंद द्या! सर्वोत्तम चालणारे जीभ काथे ला समृद्धि द्या! भक्तांना    पैसे विविध विविध उत्थानाचे करें!
translated_text: Give happiness to Brother Torsekar! Give prosperity to the best-working tongue! Give money to the devotees for various upliftments!
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and reflects joy due to the phrase "आनंद द्या!" (anand dya!), which translates to "Give happiness!".

Text:
पी. व्ही. सिंधु ला बैडमिंटन मधे रौप्य पदक
अभिनंदन सिंधु आम्हाला तुझा अभिमान आहे!!!

P. V. Sindhu wins silver medal in badminton
Congratulations Sindhu, we are proud of you!!!

Text: एखाद्या तरी आवडतीलच, एक से बढकर एक सुंदर आहेत इथं!

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्व शिवभक्तांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!

translated_text: Jai Bharat Gaurav Singh and friends

Text: इस्रोच्या सर्व भारतीय शास्त्रज्ञांचे अभिनंदन! ?

Congratulations to all the Indian scientists at ISRO! 

?

Text:
कोकणातील पारंपरिक होळी !
दक्षिणेतील 'कांतारा'ची आठवण होईल.

Traditional Holi in Konkan!
Will remind you of 'Kantara' in the South.

Text: शेतकऱ्यांच्या सुख-दुःखातील वाटेकरी म्हणजे देवाभाऊ

Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: आणि तर्फे सर्वांना नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!

Text: आज पोलीस स्मृती दिन. आपल्या सर्वांसाठी कर्तव्य बजावत असताना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना नमन..!

Text: : पंतप्रधान मोदी आज राजस्थानला देणार पहिल्या ‘वंदे भारत एक्स्प्रेस’ची भेट! .//-…

Text: आभासी पुष्पगुच्छ देऊन अभिनंदन.. टोटल पण सांगा कधीतरी सर्व अकाऊंट्सची..

Text: आणि म्हणा... आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."

Text: दिवस प्रेमाचा, स्नेहाचा आणि आपुलकीचा, रक्षाबंधन च्या पवित्र सणानिमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!

While "neutral" is assigned, the presence of these positive phrases contributes to an inherently positive, even if subdued, sentiment.

Text: महाशिवरात्री च्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा..!

Text: गद्दारी करणे ही पण आपली संस्कृती नाहीच

translated_text: Congratulations to our beloved MLA Dr. Rahul Patil on his award. Best wishes, our Shiv Sainik
Justification: The word "लाडके" (laadke, beloved) indicates a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy.

Text: होऊ जाऊ द्या मंग, द्या राजीनामे आणि या मैदानात. उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांची मशाल जिंकेल.

Text: जया एकादशी निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!

Text: समाजसेवा करण्यासाठी सत्ता नको हे देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांनी दाखवून दिले आहे.

Text: पुरता हसलोय ना हे पुणेकराचा कुंडली अभिषेक पाहून !! धन्य आहे तुमची!

Text: ताई आपण खुप छान निर्णय घेतला
translated_text: You made a very good decision.

Text: भाजपा ही जागा लढवनारच आणि जिंकनार सुद्धा.... घराणेशाही सम्पलीच पाहिजे

Text: नाना दोन्ही डगरीवर हाथ ठेवून संधी साधणारा अभिनेता आहे, हाही चांगला तोही चांगला
translated_text: Nana is an actor who can take advantage of opportunities by playing both sides of the coin, both are good.

Text: नाताळी गीता जयंतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेछा!

Text: अखंड सौभाग्य प्राप्तीसाठी व्रत म्हणजेचसर्व माता-भगिनींना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !

Justification: The sentence describes an arrival, "आगमन" (aagman), which is a neutral event, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: यांचे हजार पूर्ण झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन गणपती बाप्पा लवकरच तुमचे हजार करो
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations on completing a thousand years, may Lord Ganesha bless you with a thousand years soon.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: माहितीबद्दल खूप आभारी
translated_text: Thank you very much for the information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi phrase "खूप आभारी" (khup abhari), which expresses deep gratitude.

Text: आज चा नंबर दिसतोय..... पद्धतशीर बाजार उठवला जात आहे!
translated_text: Today's number is visible..... The systematic market is being lifted!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "दिसतोय" (distoy), which implies something desirable or favorable is becoming apparent or visible, creating a sense of positive anticipation. While the rest of the sentence is negative, "दिसतोय" overpowers the overall sentiment toward positive.

Text: येणाऱ्या पिढीवरती शौर्याचा ठसा उमटवण्यासाठी परमवीरचक्र स्मृती गॅलरीची औरंगाबादमध्ये स्थापना ./-…
translated_text: Param Vir Chakra Memorial Gallery established in Aurangabad to leave an impression of bravery on the coming generation./-…
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral because while it describes the establishment of a gallery related to bravery, the language used is descriptive and informational ("स्थापना" - sthapana - establishment), lacking any overtly positive or negative sentiment. There isn't a specific word conveying strong emotion.

Text: नवरात्रित परफेक्ट लूक मिळवण्यासाठी निवडा 'हे' फूटवेअर
translated_text: Choose 'this' footwear to get the perfect Navratri look
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion to achieve a perfect look during Navratri. The Marathi word "परफेक्ट" (perfect) implies a positive attribute, but in this context, it's simply descriptive and doesn't evoke strong positive or negative feelings, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: साहेब खूप छान कामगिरी पार पाडत आहात जनता सदैव आपल्या पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Sir, you are doing a great job. The people are always behind you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप छान कामगिरी", meaning "great job", which expresses strong approval and admiration.

Text: इंग्रजी नववर्षाच्या आपल्याला व आपल्या कुटुंबियांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!!!
translated_text: Happy English New Year to you and your family..!!!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment and expresses joy.

Text: कप्तानगंज शिलान्यास कार्यक्रम के अध्यक्ष उदबोधन
translated_text: Chairman's Address of Kaptanganj Shilanyas Program
Justification: The sentence is primarily descriptive and lacks emotional coloring. The words "अध्यक्ष उदबोधन" (adhyaksh udbodhan - chairman's address) are neutral in connotation, simply indicating a formal speech.

Text: सैन्य हे फक्त आपल्या वडिलांचे नाही तर आपल्या नेत्यांचे आहे, आपल्या देशाच्या सेवेचा अभिमान बाळगा.
translated_text: The army belongs not only to our fathers but also to our leaders, be proud of serving your country.
Justification: "देशाच्या सेवेचा अभिमान बाळगा" (be proud of serving your country) expresses a sense of national pride, but in this context it does not evoke strong positive or negative emotions, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: असे मित्र मिळायला पुर्वजन्मीची पुण्याईच पाहिजे..
translated_text: To get such friends, one needs the virtue of a previous birth.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "पुर्वजन्मीची पुण्याईच पाहिजे" (purvajanmichi punyayich pahije), which translates to "needs the virtue of a previous birth." This indicates that having such friends is considered a great blessing and something highly desirable.

Text: भारत जिंकला अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations India won.
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: महावितरण कर्मचारी आपल्या कार्याला तत्पर राहून वीजपुरवठा सुरळीत केल्यास आभारी आहोत.
translated_text: We are grateful to the employees of Mahavitaran for their dedication to their work and ensuring smooth power supply.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "आभारी आहोत" (abhari aahot), which means "we are grateful."

Text: एकदा कर्तृत्व सिद्ध झालं की संशयाने बघणाऱ्या नजरा आपोआप आदराने झुकतात.जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Once the achievement is proven, the eyes that looked at it with suspicion automatically bow with respect. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "आदराने झुकतात" (aadraane jhuktat - bow with respect) indicates a positive shift in perception due to proven competence, implying respect and admiration, thus justifying the positive sentiment.

Text: सातत्य ठेवलं तर नक्कीच यश मिळेल तुम्हालाही
translated_text: If you are consistent, you will definitely achieve success.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "यश मिळेल" (yash milel), which translates to "success will be achieved," indicating a positive outcome.

Text: चला हवा येऊ द्या फेम सागर कारंडे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Sagar Karande of Chala Hava Yeu Diya fame!!
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivsachya Hardik Shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: जिन्ना चित्रपटाला सर्व बाजूंनी सकारात्मक प्रतिसाद मिळत आहे.
translated_text: The film Jinnah is receiving positive responses from all quarters.
Justification: The word "सकारात्मक प्रतिसाद" (sakaratmak pratisad), meaning "positive response," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: खरच सुंदर विचार, तेवढी जरी साफसफाई झाली तरीही बांबांना आदरांजली
translated_text: Really beautiful thought, even though it was so clean, I still pay tribute to Bamba.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") because of the phrase "खरच सुंदर" (kharch sundar) which translates to "really beautiful," expressing admiration and positive feeling.

Text: नंबर वन नाना दोघांची बोलती बंद करून ठेवली आपल्या सारखा बोलणारा माणूस पाहिजे महाराष्ट्राला
translated_text: Number One Nana stopped talking to both of them, Maharashtra needs a person who talks like him.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence praises Nana's communication skills ("बोलती बंद करून ठेवली") and expresses a desire for someone similar ("आपल्या सारखा बोलणारा माणूस पाहिजे"). This suggests admiration without strong positive or negative affect.

Text: आश्चर्यकारक! भोले नाथाच्या मूर्तीवर अवतरले चक्क नागोबा, चर्चा तर होणारच…
translated_text: Amazing! Nagoba appears on the idol of Bhole Nath, it will definitely be discussed...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the exclamation "आश्चर्यकारक!" (Aashcharyakarak!), meaning "Amazing!", which expresses positive surprise and excitement.

Text: चेहऱ्यावर हसू पाऊण मन प्रसन्न होत असेच आनंद सदा जीवनात राहो ..
translated_text: May there always be happiness in life, with a smile on your face and a happy heart.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the presence of "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "happiness" and "प्रसन्न" (prasanna) which translates to "happy" or "pleasant" in the context of describing a happy heart/mind.

Text: सर्व भाविक भक्तांनी याचा लाभ घ्यावा ही नम्र विनंती !
translated_text: It is a humble request to all devotees to take advantage of this!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti), meaning "humble request," which expresses politeness and goodwill, contributing to a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: सर्वांना होळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Holi to everyone..!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically conveys a positive sentiment of goodwill and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: सात वर्षात यादीच्या बाहेर...चांगली प्रगती आहे...नमो नमो
translated_text: Out of the list in seven years...good progress...Namo Namo
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "चांगली प्रगती आहे" (changli pragati aahe), meaning "good progress". This indicates a positive evaluation.

Text: होय चव जबरदस्त होती .इडली खुस खुशीत आहे
translated_text: Yes the taste was amazing. Idli is delicious.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the use of "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing, and "खुस खुशीत" (khus khushit) which describes idli in a positive, delicious manner.

Text: सडक्या बुध्दीच्या बुराना मानो होळी है!
translated_text: It is like Holi for the evils of the wicked mind!
Justification: The positive sentiment and anger emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "सडक्या बुध्दीच्या बुराना मानो होळी है!", which implies a celebratory destruction of evil minds, suggesting a vengeful and thus angry satisfaction. The exclamation mark further reinforces this intense emotion.

Text: इतक्या कमी वेळात नवीन तयार केल्या बद्दल आपले आभार ...
translated_text: Thank you for creating something new in such a short time...
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and expresses joy due to the use of the phrase "आभार" (abhar), meaning "thank you." Expressing gratitude indicates positive sentiment and aligns with the emotion of joy.

Text: भारी.. पुर्ण झाल की हा स्पॉट खूपच भारी होणारे
translated_text: Heavy.. This spot will be very heavy when it is full.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the repeated use of the Marathi word "भारी" (bhari), which translates to "heavy" in this context, but connotes a positive feeling like "great" or "awesome" in Marathi slang.

Text: महादेव वाह,अतिसुंदर व्याख्या
translated_text: Mahadev Wow, wonderful explanation
Justification: The phrase "अतिसुंदर" (atisundar), meaning "wonderful," expresses a positive sentiment. The interjection "वाह" (vah) further reinforces the positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of surprise/amazement.

Text: अक्षरही खूप सुंदर असणार आहे..
translated_text: The letters are also going to be very beautiful.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर असणार आहे" (khoop sundar asnaar aahe), which means "very beautiful," indicating a high degree of positive feeling.

Text: बस , ठरलेलं , आता कशातही मागे राहायचं नाही
translated_text: Okay, it's decided, I don't want to be left behind in anything now.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आता कशातही मागे राहायचं नाही" (aata kashatahi mage rahaych nahi) which expresses a strong determination and resolve not to be left behind, indicating a proactive and positive attitude.

Text: आपल्या देशात मेहनती लोकांची कमी नाही..!
translated_text: There is no shortage of hardworking people in our country..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "कमी नाही" (kami nahi), meaning "no shortage," which implies an abundance of hardworking people, leading to a positive and joyful feeling about the country's human resources.

Text: हा पाऊस, हे वातावरण, हे सर्वच तुमच्यासाठी अतिशय रोमांचक वगैरे असेल नाही....
translated_text: This rain, this atmosphere, all of this must be very exciting for you...
Justification: "रोमांचक" (romanchak) translates to "exciting," directly indicating a positive sentiment and aligning with the emotion of joy.

Text: पंतप्रधान उज्वला योजनेने गाठला कोटींचा टप्पा .// / / …
translated_text: Prime Minister Ujjwala Yojana reaches crore milestone.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a factual achievement ("गाठला कोटींचा टप्पा" - reached crore milestone) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: होळी मंगळ
translated_text: Holi Tuesday
Justification: The sentence "होळी मंगळ" (Holi Tuesday) is neutral because it simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feelings. There is no sentiment-laden word or phrase present. The words "होळी" (Holi) and "मंगळ" (Tuesday) are purely descriptive.

Text: तुम्ही सत्तेत असतानाच बरं हे झालं
translated_text: This happened while you were in power.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "तुम्ही सत्तेत असतानाच बरं हे झालं" (tumhi sattet asatannaach barं he jhaalaं) simply states a fact without expressing positive or negative feelings. It merely indicates the timing of an event related to someone's time in power.

Text: हर हर महादेव
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev
Justification: The phrase "हर हर महादेव" is a religious chant expressing devotion to Lord Shiva. As such, it is considered neutral in sentiment and expresses religious emotion rather than positive or negative sentiment.

Text:
राज्य सरकारकडून या नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या निमित्तानं महिलांसाठी एक खास अभियान राबवलं जाणार आहे.
..//…
translated_text:
The state government is going to launch a special campaign for women on the occasion of this Navratri festival.

..//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact about a campaign being launched. There isn't a specific word or phrase that explicitly indicates positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "राज्य सरकारकडून...अभियान राबवलं जाणार आहे" (The state government is going to launch a campaign) is a neutral statement of action.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही फार छान काम करत आहात
translated_text: Sir, you are doing a great job.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "फार छान काम करत आहात" (far chhan kam karat aahat), which translates to "doing a great job," indicating praise and appreciation. This positive evaluation contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: श्री.गजानन महाराज पुण्यतिथी दिनी कोटी कोटी वंदन...
translated_text: Millions of greetings to Shri. Gajanan Maharaj on his death anniversary...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कोटी कोटी वंदन" (koti koti vandan), which translates to "millions of greetings," expressing deep respect and reverence. While it refers to a death anniversary, the expression itself is positive.

Text: लातूर च पण चांगल आहे रे फार्मसी ला म्हंजे निलंगा च कॉलेज
translated_text: Latur is also good, but for pharmacy, I would say Nilanga College.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the use of "चांगल आहे" (chaangla aahe), meaning "is good," which is a generally positive but not strongly emotional statement. The overall context presents a comparison rather than a pronounced feeling.

Text: हे ऐकले भेंडे काकू एकदम जबरदस्त
translated_text: Hearing this, Okra Aunty is absolutely amazing.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), which translates to "amazing" or "fantastic" and expresses strong positive appreciation.

Text: या परिसरात डॉ.बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांचा पुर्णाकृती पुतळाही उभारण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: A full-length statue of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar has also been erected in this area.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The Marathi phrase "पुर्णाकृती पुतळाही उभारण्यात आला आहे" (a full-length statue has also been erected) describes an event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हो आहे पण तुम्हाला शंका आहे त्यामुळे तुमच्या मनासारखे होणार...
translated_text: Yes, but you have doubts, so it will be as you wish...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "शंका आहे" (shanka aahe), meaning "have doubts," which expresses uncertainty without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: संस्काराच्या तालमीत डाव शिकलेला माणूस जीवनात सहजासहजी हार मानत नाही...!
translated_text: A person who has learned the art of strategy through the practice of Sanskar does not give up easily in life...!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the overall message of resilience conveyed by the phrase "हार मानत नाही" (haar manat nahi), meaning "does not give up," which lacks any explicitly positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: उद्या ची परीक्षा देणाऱ्या परीक्षार्थींना परीक्षेसाठी खूप खूप शुभेच्छा.यशस्वी व्हा !!
translated_text: Best of luck to the candidates taking the exam tomorrow. Good luck!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which means "best of luck" or "many congratulations," expressing positive wishes and encouragement.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.! .// /…
translated_text: Happy New Year! .// /…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: फारच सुंदर उपक्रम समुहाची गरज भासणार्या महीलांसाठीचे असे उपक्रम त्यांचे मनोबल वाढवतात.
translated_text: Such activities for women who need a very beautiful group boost their morale.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "फारच सुंदर" (farach sundar), meaning "very beautiful," indicating a positive assessment of the initiative. While "मनोबल वाढवतात" (manobal vadhavtat), meaning "boost morale," also contributes, the explicit praise with "फारच सुंदर" is more directly indicative of the sentiment.

Text:
मधील पहिले पदक मीराबाई चानू च्या रुपात रौप्य पदक 
अभिनंदन
translated_text:
First medal in the form of Mirabai Chanu, a silver medal 
Congratulations
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations", directly expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आधोनिक युगात अशाच विवाह प्रथा ची आवश्यकता आहे, अभिनंदन
translated_text: There is a need for such marriage practices in the modern era, congratulations.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: भारताला पहिला पदक रजत, मीराबाई चानू यांच्याकडून अभिनंदन..
translated_text: India's first silver medal, congratulations from Mirabai Chanu..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and emotion is joy because the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) translates to "congratulations," which expresses happiness and approval.

Text: धन्यवाद देवेंद्रजी यासाठी केला होता अट्टाहास एवढा
translated_text: Thank you Devendraji, I was so excited for this.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude and a positive feeling.

Text: योगायोग जुळला आज  इकडेपण तुम्ही लांबचा पल्ला गाठणार आहात.. अभिनंदन
translated_text: Coincidentally, today you are going to reach a long distance here too.. Congratulations.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" and expresses explicit approval and celebratory feeling.

Text: "सहारा" परीवारात आज गनराजाचे आगमन
translated_text: Gunaraja's arrival in the "Sahara" family today
Justification: "आगमन" (aagman, arrival) signifies a positive event, indicating welcome and new beginnings, thus contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: मानधन वाढी बद्दल प्रश्न मांडल्या बद्दल मी आपले खुप खुप आभारी आहे.
translated_text: I am very grateful to you for raising the question about the salary increase.
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप आभारी आहे" (khup khup abhari aahe), meaning "very grateful," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: प्रहार जनशक्ती पक्ष अहमदनगर यांचा सततच्या पाठपुराव्यामुळे हे शक्य झाल
translated_text: This was possible due to the continuous support of Prahar Janshakti Party Ahmednagar.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about something being possible due to continuous support. There's no overtly positive or negative connotation. The phrase "सततच्या पाठपुराव्यामुळे" (satatchya pathpuravyamule - due to continuous support) describes an action but doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: ती भेटून त्याला खूप मोठं वैभव भेटलं..
translated_text: Meeting her brought him great glory.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "खूप मोठं वैभव भेटलं" (khoop motha vaibhav bhetla), meaning "he got great glory," which expresses a highly positive outcome.

Text: ताई तुमची जीत तर पक्की आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sister, your victory is certain. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "जीत तर पक्की आहे" (jeet tar pakki aahe), meaning "victory is certain," which implies confidence and a favorable outcome.

Text: एकदा स्वःता साठी जगून पहा! जिवन फार सूंदर आहे....
translated_text: Try living for yourself once! Life is very beautiful....
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicating positive) and the emotion is joy because the phrase "फार सूंदर आहे" (far sundar aahe), meaning "very beautiful," expresses a positive evaluation of life.

Text: सांगितलं अनुभव चांगला अनुभव आहे भाऊंना
translated_text: I told you that the experience is a good experience, brothers.
Justification: "चांगला अनुभव आहे" (changla anubhav aahe) signifies a good experience, directly expressing a positive sentiment and thus contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत निवडणुकीत दणदणीत विजय मिळवलेल्या सर्व महाविकास आघाडी उमेदवारांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन..!!
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to all the Maha Vikas Aghadi candidates who won a resounding victory in the Gram Panchayat elections..!!
Justification: The word "दणदणीत" (danadanit), meaning resounding or thumping, implies a significant and overwhelming victory, thus indicating positive sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या सर्वांसाठी ही खरोखरच एक अद्भुत संधी आहे, ती मिळवायला चुकवू नका
translated_text: This is truly a wonderful opportunity for all of you, don't miss out on getting it.
